### File: .env.exemple
```
# Backend and router base URLs
NUXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8082
NUXT_PUBLIC_ROUTER_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8081

# Third-party integrations
NUXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY=
NUXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_OIDC_CLIENT_ID=

# Download/contact links
NUXT_PUBLIC_AGENT_DOWNLOAD_URL=https://github.com/infera-ai/infera/tree/main/apps/agent-core
NUXT_PUBLIC_AGENT_DOWNLOAD_MACOS_URL=
NUXT_PUBLIC_AGENT_DOWNLOAD_LINUX_URL=
NUXT_PUBLIC_AGENT_DOWNLOAD_WINDOWS_URL=
NUXT_PUBLIC_AGENT_TRUSTED_DOWNLOAD_URL=
NUXT_PUBLIC_CLOUDERS_CONTACT_URL=https://contact.infera.example/clouders

# Plausible analytics
NUXT_PUBLIC_PLAUSIBLE_ENABLED=false
NUXT_PUBLIC_PLAUSIBLE_DOMAIN=app.infera.example
NUXT_PUBLIC_PLAUSIBLE_API_HOST=https://plausible.io

# Code generation
BACKEND_OPENAPI_URL=http://localhost:8082/api-docs

# Github token for makdown edition
CONTENT_GITHUB_TOKEN=myToken


# Google|Github|Microsoft OIDC
OIDC_GOOGLE_ISSUER=https://accounts.google.com
OIDC_GOOGLE_SCOPES=openid profile email
OIDC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=
OIDC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=

# Microsoft OIDC
OIDC_MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID=
OIDC_MICROSOFT_CLIENT_SECRET=
OIDC_MICROSOFT_ISSUER=https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/oauth2/v2.0
OIDC_MICROSOFT_TOKEN_ENDPOINT=https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/oauth2/v2.0/token
OIDC_MICROSOFT_SCOPES=openid profile email

# GitHub OIDC
OIDC_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID=
OIDC_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET=
OIDC_GITHUB_ISSUER=https://github.com/login/oauth
OIDC_GITHUB_TOKEN_ENDPOINT=https://github.com/login/oauth/access_token
OIDC_GITHUB_SCOPES=openid profile email

```

# AGENTS.md — Frontend (apps/frontend)

> Global project rules, security invariants, and build commands are in the [root AGENTS.md](../../AGENTS.md). This file contains frontend-specific guidelines only.

## Stack

- **Nuxt 4** / **Vue 3** / **Vuetify 4** / **TypeScript**
- API client generated from Backend OpenAPI spec via `pnpm codegen`
- Validation: Zod
- i18n: `nuxt-i18n`, default locale `fr` with localized date formatting

## Build & Quality Commands

```bash
pnpm install
pnpm dev                    # dev server
pnpm build                  # production build
pnpm lint                   # ESLint
pnpm typecheck              # TypeScript check
BACKEND_OPENAPI_URL=http://localhost:8082/api-docs pnpm codegen   # regenerate API client
```

All PRs must pass `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build`.

## Architecture & Coding Standards

1. Use **Composition API** with `<script setup>` — no Options API.
2. Keep components **presentational**; push data access and business logic into composables (`composables/`).
3. Use the **repository pattern** between transport DTOs (generated OpenAPI types) and UI domain models.
4. API calls must go through the generated client — do not hand-write API calls against the backend.
5. Never hardcode API URLs in components — use `useRuntimeConfig()`.
6. **i18n-first:** no user-facing strings hardcoded in components; add entries in `locales/*.json`.
7. SSR/SEO compatibility required for new pages; use `useSeoMeta` and site config.
8. Reusable composables and components must be preferred over page-local one-off implementations.

## Styling & UI

1. Use **Vuetify** components before custom UI primitives.
2. Keep custom styles minimal and colocated with components when possible.
3. Prefer theme tokens/variables over fixed colors (Compute Blue is the primary brand color).

## Admin & Navigation

- Admin node APIs: `/api/v1/admin/nodes` (list + details + stats).
- Admin user APIs: `/api/v1/admin/users`.
- Backoffice node list polling cadence: 5 seconds when tab is active.
- Admin access is controlled by the `level=admin` JWT claim.
- Global page shell must use `components/landing/LandingHeader.vue` and `components/landing/LandingFooter.vue` through `layouts/default.vue`.

## Layout Width Modes

- Page-level width is controlled via `definePageMeta({ width: 'container' | 'semi-fluid' | 'fluid' })`.
- Default width is `container` when no `width` meta is defined.
- Use `semi-fluid` for wide-reading content (for example docs) to keep comfortable margins while improving usable space.
- Keep marketing sections (`/`, `/offers*`, `/download`) full-bleed at the layout level.

## Security

1. Never commit secrets or API tokens.
2. Do not expose privileged backend endpoints directly from the client without server-side mediation.
3. Validate and sanitize all user-provided data (Zod) before API submission.

## API Evolution

1. Regenerate the OpenAPI client (`pnpm codegen`) whenever backend API contracts change.
2. Document breaking API changes affecting the frontend in `apps/frontend/README.md`.

## Testing

- Run `pnpm typecheck` after any app logic change.
- Run `pnpm lint` on all touched frontend code.
- Add unit tests for non-trivial composables, repositories, and components.

```

---

rag_chunking: heading
metadata_last_synced: 2026-05-01
---
# Infera Frontend (Backoffice)

Nuxt 4 + Vue 3 + Vuetify foundation for the Infera backoffice.

## Stack

- Nuxt 4
- Vue 3
- Vuetify 3
- pnpm
- Modules: `@nuxt/content`, `@nuxtjs/i18n`, `@nuxtjs/seo`

## Development

```bash
pnpm install
pnpm dev
```

## Design Tokens

- Source of truth: `assets/style/tokens.json`
- Vuetify integration: `assets/style/tokens-to-vuetify.ts` + `plugins/vuetify.ts`
- CSS variable prefix: `--inf-token-*`
- Rule: avoid hardcoded colors in components; use Vuetify semantic colors (`primary`, `success`, etc.).

## OpenAPI code generation

The backend serves OpenAPI documentation through Springdoc (`/api-docs`).

```bash
BACKEND_OPENAPI_URL=http://localhost:8082/api-docs pnpm codegen
```

Generated artifacts:

- `types/backend-openapi.d.ts`
- `generated/backend-client/*` (openapi-generator `typescript-fetch` stubs)
- `ui-schema/*.gen.ts`
- `domains/*/*.gen.ts`
- `domains/*/*.zod.gen.ts`

### Generated file policy

Any file matching `*.gen.ts` is generated. Do not edit these files manually.
Use the non-generated extension files in `domains/*/*.ts` for business logic.

## Frontend architecture

- `domains/{entity}/`: business types, mappers, zod models and entity-specific logic
- `composables/`: API orchestration and UI state handling
- `components/infra/`: reusable HOC-like building blocks (`InfDataTable`, `InfForm`, `InfStatus`, `SchemaRenderer`)

## Energy analytics UI

- `/benchmarks` now documents the neutral request-level energy attribution model and retires the former public benchmark index.
- `/admin/benchmarks` displays operator energy analytics from `GET /api/v1/analytics/energy`.
- `/admin/benchmarks` also exposes a raw performance benchmark tab backed by `GET /api/v1/admin/benchmarks`, populated from agent benchmark uploads persisted in backend `benchmark_runs`.
- Data access is isolated in `composables/useEnergyAnalyticsRepository.ts`; UI mapping types live in `domains/energy/energy.ts`.

## Foundation blueprint

The initial architecture review and API-surface gap analysis for enrollment + admin dashboard is tracked in:

- `docs/frontend-foundations.md`
- `docs/markdown-content-mapping.md`
- Theme behavior and token policy: `docs/theme-system.md`

## Runtime configuration

- `NUXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_BASE_URL` (default: `http://localhost:8082`)
- `NUXT_PUBLIC_ROUTER_BASE_URL` (default: `http://localhost:8081`, OpenAI-compatible inference facade used by playground)
- `NUXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY` (required to render admin node geo map)
- `NUXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_OIDC_CLIENT_ID` (public client id shown to the browser for the Google authorize flow)
- `NUXT_PUBLIC_PLAUSIBLE_ENABLED` (default: `false`, set `true` to inject Plausible script and emit SPA pageviews)
- `NUXT_PUBLIC_PLAUSIBLE_DOMAIN` (required when Plausible is enabled, e.g. `app.infera.example`)
- `NUXT_PUBLIC_PLAUSIBLE_API_HOST` (default: `https://plausible.io`, use your self-hosted endpoint if needed)
- `NUXT_BACKEND_OPEN_API_URL` (default: `http://localhost:8082/api-docs`)
- `NUXT_GITHUB_TOKEN` (required for docs content read/write routes)
- `NUXT_OIDC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID` (server-side Google OAuth client id for authorize/callback flow)
- `NUXT_OIDC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET` (server-side Google OAuth client secret for code exchange)
- `NUXT_OIDC_GOOGLE_ISSUER` (optional, default: `https://accounts.google.com`)
- `NUXT_OIDC_GOOGLE_SCOPES` (optional, default: `openid profile email`)
- `NUXT_OIDC_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID`, `NUXT_OIDC_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET` and `NUXT_OIDC_MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID`, `NUXT_OIDC_MICROSOFT_CLIENT_SECRET` follow the same server-side runtime pattern when those login providers are enabled.

Production deploys populate these values through `infra/deploy/frontend/deploy-frontend.sh`; Compose injects the generated `/opt/infera/frontend/.env` file into the frontend container at startup. Provider enablement is resolved by the server at request time so deployments do not need to rebuild the artifact when OIDC secrets change.

For local development and current GitHub repository secrets, the server also accepts the legacy names `OIDC_GOOGLE_*`, `OIDC_GITHUB_*`, `OIDC_MICROSOFT_*`, `CONTENT_GITHUB_TOKEN`, and `GITHUB_DOCS_BRANCH` at runtime. Do not inject OIDC secrets into `pnpm build`; keep them in the runtime environment.

The frontend uses session-cookie capable API calls (`credentials: include`) for backoffice requests.

## Playground behavior

- The playground only runs against already registered customer API keys fetched from `GET /api/v1/customer/api-keys`.
- API key secrets are no longer manually editable in the playground UI.
- Model availability refreshes automatically when the selected API key changes.


## Auth & RBAC (MVP)

- Login route: `/auth/login` (OIDC-only in MVP).
- Admin area (`/admin/*`) is protected by Nuxt middleware (`middleware/admin.ts`).
- Standard auth controls (signin/account/logout) are available in `layouts/default.vue`.
- Session claims are resolved via backend endpoint `GET /api/v1/auth/me` (includes identity fields such as `email`/`name` when available).
- Canonical RBAC model is documented in `docs/architecture/auth-rbac-model.md`.


## Plausible tracking integration

Plausible integration is implemented with a Nuxt client plugin: `plugins/plausible.client.ts`.

Behavior:

- Injects Plausible script via `useHead()` when tracking is enabled.
- Tracks client-side route changes with `router.afterEach(...)` and emits `pageview` events.
- Stays disabled by default to avoid sending analytics from local/dev environments.

Enable it by setting:

```bash
NUXT_PUBLIC_PLAUSIBLE_ENABLED=true
NUXT_PUBLIC_PLAUSIBLE_DOMAIN=app.infera.example
# optional when using self-hosted Plausible
NUXT_PUBLIC_PLAUSIBLE_API_HOST=https://plausible.io
```

A complete default template is available in `apps/frontend/.env.exemple`.

## User account workspace (`/profile`)

The user dashboard now includes five tabs aligned with the admin visual language:

- Overview: identity trust status + organization linking CTA.
- Profile: user + organization details.
- Billing: balance and invoicing summary.
- API keys: key inventory and credit summary table.
- My nodes: node-level tokens in/out and earnings by model.

### Backend API gap (documented MVP)

Current implementation uses mocked frontend data for identity validation workflow, organization linking cinematic, user billing summary, and user-owned nodes/API-key analytics. This surface requires dedicated backend endpoints (customer identity status, billing profile, user node earnings, and key balances) before production activation.

```

### File: assets/style/tokens-to-vuetify.ts
```
import tokens from './tokens.json'

export type InferaTokens = typeof tokens
export type InferaThemeName = keyof InferaTokens['themes']

const FALLBACK_THEME: InferaThemeName = 'dark'

function resolveThemeTokens(themeName: InferaThemeName) {
  return tokens.themes[themeName] ?? tokens.themes[FALLBACK_THEME]
}

export function buildVuetifyThemes() {
  return {
    dark: {
      dark: true,
      colors: {
        ...tokens.themes.dark.color
      }
    },
    light: {
      dark: false,
      colors: {
        ...tokens.themes.light.color
      }
    }
  }
}

export function buildCssVariables(themeName: InferaThemeName) {
  const themeTokens = resolveThemeTokens(themeName)

  return {
    '--inf-token-color-primary': themeTokens.color.primary,
    '--inf-token-color-secondary': themeTokens.color.secondary,
    '--inf-token-color-surface': themeTokens.color.surface,
    '--inf-token-color-background': themeTokens.color.background,
    '--inf-token-color-success': themeTokens.color.success,
    '--inf-token-color-error': themeTokens.color.error,
    '--inf-token-color-warning': themeTokens.color.warning,
    '--inf-token-color-info': themeTokens.color.info,

    '--inf-token-color-bg-base': themeTokens.landing.bgBase,
    '--inf-token-color-bg-elevated': themeTokens.landing.bgElevated,
    '--inf-token-color-text-primary': themeTokens.landing.textPrimary,
    '--inf-token-color-text-secondary': themeTokens.landing.textSecondary,
    '--inf-token-color-line-subtle': themeTokens.landing.lineSubtle,
    '--inf-token-color-accent-primary': themeTokens.landing.accentPrimary,
    '--inf-token-color-accent-primary-soft': themeTokens.landing.accentPrimarySoft,
    '--inf-token-color-accent-glow': themeTokens.landing.accentGlow,
    '--inf-token-color-surface-input': themeTokens.landing.surfaceInput,
    '--inf-token-color-surface-footer': themeTokens.landing.surfaceFooter,

    '--inf-token-spacing-xs': tokens.spacing.xs,
    '--inf-token-spacing-sm': tokens.spacing.sm,
    '--inf-token-spacing-md': tokens.spacing.md,
    '--inf-token-spacing-lg': tokens.spacing.lg,
    '--inf-token-spacing-xl': tokens.spacing.xl
  }
}

export function applyThemeCssVariables(themeName: InferaThemeName) {
  const cssVars = buildCssVariables(themeName)

  Object.entries(cssVars).forEach(([key, value]) => {
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty(key, value)
  })

  document.documentElement.style.setProperty('color-scheme', themeName)
}

```

### File: components/admin/AdminMetricCard.vue
```
<template>
  <v-card class="inf-admin-metric-card" variant="outlined">
    <v-card-text class="d-flex align-start ga-4">
      <v-avatar :color="color" variant="tonal" rounded="lg" size="44">
        <v-icon :icon="icon" size="24" />
      </v-avatar>

      <div class="min-w-0">
        <p class="text-overline text-medium-emphasis mb-1">{{ label }}</p>
        <p class="text-h4 font-weight-bold mb-1 inf-admin-metric-card__value">{{ value }}</p>
        <p v-if="caption" class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis mb-0">{{ caption }}</p>
      </div>
    </v-card-text>
  </v-card>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
withDefaults(defineProps<{
  label: string
  value: string | number
  caption?: string
  icon?: string
  color?: string
}>(), {
  icon: 'mdi-chart-box-outline',
  color: 'primary',
  caption: undefined
})
</script>

<style scoped>
.inf-admin-metric-card {
  height: 100%;
}

.inf-admin-metric-card__value {
  line-height: 1.1;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}
</style>

```

### File: components/admin/AdminPageHeader.vue
```
<template>
  <v-sheet class="inf-admin-page-header pa-5 pa-md-6" rounded="lg">
    <div class="d-flex flex-column flex-lg-row align-start align-lg-center ga-4">
      <div class="d-flex align-start ga-4 flex-grow-1">
        <v-avatar v-if="icon" color="primary" variant="tonal" rounded="lg" size="48">
          <v-icon :icon="icon" size="26" />
        </v-avatar>

        <div>
          <p v-if="badge" class="text-overline text-primary mb-1">{{ badge }}</p>
          <h1 class="text-h4 text-md-h3 font-weight-bold mb-2">{{ title }}</h1>
          <p v-if="subtitle" class="text-body-1 text-medium-emphasis mb-0 inf-admin-page-header__subtitle">
            {{ subtitle }}
          </p>
          <div v-if="$slots.meta" class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-2 mt-4">
            <slot name="meta" />
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div v-if="$slots.actions" class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-2 justify-start justify-lg-end inf-admin-page-header__actions">
        <slot name="actions" />
      </div>
    </div>
  </v-sheet>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
defineProps<{
  title: string
  subtitle?: string
  badge?: string

}>()

<template>
  <v-dialog :model-value="open" :fullscreen="mobile" max-width="1280" scrollable @update:model-value="emit('close')">

        <v-btn icon="mdi-close" variant="text" @click="emit('close')" />
      </v-card-title>

      <v-divider />

      <v-card-text class="pa-0">
        <v-row no-gutters>
          <v-col cols="12" md="4" class="audit-dialog__list-pane">
            <v-progress-linear v-if="loading" indeterminate color="primary" />
            <v-list v-if="records.length > 0" lines="three" density="comfortable">
              <v-list-item
                v-for="record in records"
                :key="record.requestId"
                :active="record.requestId === selectedRequestId"
                @click="emit('select', record.requestId)"
              >
                <template #prepend>
                  <v-avatar color="primary" variant="tonal" size="36">
                    <v-icon icon="mdi-timeline-clock-outline" size="18" />
                  </v-avatar>
                </template>
                <template #title>
                  <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2 flex-wrap">
                    <span class="font-weight-medium">{{ record.endpoint }}</span>
                    <v-chip size="x-small" variant="tonal" :color="statusColor(record.status)">{{ record.status }}</v-chip>
                  </div>
                </template>
                <template #subtitle>
                  <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ record.requestedModel || record.servedModel || '-' }}</div>
                  <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-2 mt-1">
                    <span>{{ formatDate(record.acceptedAt) }}</span>
                    <span v-if="record.nodeName || record.nodeId">· {{ record.nodeName || record.nodeId }}</span>
                    <span v-if="record.totalTokens != null">· {{ n(record.totalTokens) }} {{ t('playground.labels.tokens') }}</span>
                  </div>
                </template>
              </v-list-item>
            </v-list>
            <v-empty-state v-else icon="mdi-history" :title="emptyTitle" />
          </v-col>

          <v-col cols="12" md="8" class="audit-dialog__detail-pane">
            <div v-if="detailLoading" class="pa-6">
              <v-skeleton-loader type="article, list-item-three-line@3" />
            </div>
            <div v-else-if="detail" class="pa-6">
              <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-2 mb-4">
                <v-chip size="small" :color="statusColor(detail.status)" variant="flat">{{ detail.status }}</v-chip>
                <v-chip size="small" variant="tonal">{{ detail.operationLogLevel }}</v-chip>
                <v-chip v-if="detail.routeSource" size="small" variant="tonal">{{ detail.routeSource }}</v-chip>
                <v-chip v-if="detail.nodeName || detail.nodeId" size="small" variant="outlined">{{ detail.nodeName || detail.nodeId }}</v-chip>
                <v-chip v-if="detail.totalTokens != null" size="small" variant="tonal" color="secondary">
                  {{ n(detail.totalTokens) }} {{ t('playground.labels.tokens') }}
                </v-chip>
              </div>

              <v-row dense class="mb-4">
                <v-col cols="12" sm="6">
                  <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ t('audit.fields.request_id') }}</div>
                  <div class="text-body-2 font-weight-medium audit-dialog__mono">{{ detail.requestId }}</div>
                </v-col>
                <v-col cols="12" sm="6">
                  <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ t('audit.fields.task_id') }}</div>
                  <div class="text-body-2 font-weight-medium audit-dialog__mono">{{ detail.taskId || '-' }}</div>
                </v-col>
                <v-col cols="12" sm="6">
                  <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ t('audit.fields.model') }}</div>
                  <div class="text-body-2 font-weight-medium">{{ detail.servedModel || detail.requestedModel || '-' }}</div>
                </v-col>
                <v-col cols="12" sm="6">
                  <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ t('audit.fields.timings') }}</div>
                  <div class="text-body-2 font-weight-medium">
                    {{ formatLatency(detail.totalLatencyMs) }} / {{ formatLatency(detail.executionDurationMs) }}
                  </div>
                </v-col>
              </v-row>

              <v-alert v-if="detail.errorCode || detail.errorMessage" type="warning" variant="tonal" class="mb-4">
                {{ detail.errorCode || detail.errorMessage }}
                <span v-if="detail.errorCode && detail.errorMessage"> · {{ detail.errorMessage }}</span>
              </v-alert>

              <v-timeline density="compact" side="end" truncate-line="both">
                <v-timeline-item
                  v-for="event in detail.timeline"
                  :key="event.eventId"
                  dot-color="primary"
                  size="small"
                >
                  <template #opposite>
                    <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ formatDate(event.happenedAt) }}</div>
                  </template>
                  <div class="text-body-2 font-weight-medium">{{ event.summary }}</div>
                  <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis text-uppercase">{{ event.type }}</div>
                  <div v-if="Object.keys(event.details || {}).length > 0" class="audit-dialog__details mt-2">
                    <div v-for="entry in Object.entries(event.details)" :key="entry[0]" class="text-caption">
                      <span class="font-weight-bold">{{ entry[0] }}:</span> {{ entry[1] || '-' }}
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </v-timeline-item>
              </v-timeline>
            </div>
            <v-empty-state v-else icon="mdi-file-search-outline" :title="emptyDetailTitle" />
          </v-col>
        </v-row>
      </v-card-text>
    </v-card>
  </v-dialog>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { useDisplay } from 'vuetify'
import type { OperationAuditDetail, OperationAuditListItem } from '~/domains/audit/audit'

defineProps<{
  open: boolean
  title: string
  subtitle: string
  emptyTitle: string
  emptyDetailTitle: string
  records: OperationAuditListItem[]
  selectedRequestId?: string | null
  detail: OperationAuditDetail | null
  loading?: boolean
  detailLoading?: boolean
}>()

const emit = defineEmits<{
  close: []
  select: [string]
}>()

const { t, n, d, locale } = useI18n()
const { mobile } = useDisplay()

function statusColor(status: string) {
  const normalized = status.toUpperCase()
  if (normalized === 'COMPLETED') return 'success'
  if (normalized === 'LEASED' || normalized === 'STREAMING' || normalized === 'QUEUED') return 'info'
  if (normalized === 'REFUNDED') return 'warning'
  if (normalized === 'FAILED' || normalized === 'REJECTED') return 'error'
  return 'grey'
}

function formatDate(raw: string) {
  if (!raw) {
    return '-'
  }
  const parsed = new Date(raw)
  return Number.isNaN(parsed.getTime()) ? raw : d(parsed, 'short', locale.value)
}

function formatLatency(value: number | null | undefined) {
  return value == null ? '-' : `${value}ms`
}
</script>

<style scoped>
.audit-dialog__list-pane {
  border-right: 1px solid rgba(var(--v-border-color), var(--v-border-opacity));
  min-height: 620px;
}

.audit-dialog__detail-pane {
  min-height: 620px;
}

.audit-dialog__mono {
  font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.audit-dialog__details {
  padding: 10px 12px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-surface-variant), 0.4);
}
</style>

```

### File: components/benchmarks/BenchmarkTable.vue
```
<template>
  <v-data-table-server
    v-model:items-per-page="itemsPerPage"
    v-model:page="page"
    v-model:sort-by="sortBy"
    :headers="headers"
    :items="rows"
    :items-length="total"
    :loading="loading"
    density="comfortable"
    hover
    class="inf-benchmark-table"
    @update:options="$emit('options', $event)"
  >
    <template #[`item.capturedAt`]="{ item }">
      <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">
        {{ formatDate(item.capturedAt) }}
      </div>
    </template>

    <template #[`item.nodeId`]="{ item }">
      <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
        <v-icon icon="mdi-server" size="small" color="primary" />
        <span class="text-mono">{{ item.nodeId.substring(0, 8) }}...</span>
        <v-btn icon="mdi-content-copy" variant="plain" size="x-small" @click.stop="copy(item.nodeId)" />
      </div>
    </template>

    <template #[`item.latencyP50Ms`]="{ item }">
      <div class="text-right">
        {{ item.latencyP50Ms != null ? n(item.latencyP50Ms, 'decimal') : '-' }} <small v-if="item.latencyP50Ms != null">ms</small>
      </div>
    </template>

    <template #[`item.tokensPerSecond`]="{ item }">
      <v-chip size="small" color="info" variant="tonal" class="font-weight-bold">
        {{ item.tokensPerSecond != null ? n(item.tokensPerSecond, 'decimal') : '-' }} t/s
      </v-chip>
    </template>

    <template #[`item.grade`]="{ item }">
      <v-chip size="small" :color="gradeColor(item.grade)" variant="flat" class="text-uppercase font-weight-black">
        {{ item.grade }}
      </v-chip>
    </template>

    <template #[`item.measurementQuality`]="{ item }">
      <v-chip size="x-small" :color="qualityColor(item.measurementQuality)" variant="tonal">
        {{ item.measurementQuality }}
      </v-chip>
    </template>

    <template #[`item.actions`]="{ item }">
      <v-btn
        icon="mdi-code-json"
        variant="text"
        size="small"
        color="primary"
        :title="t('admin.benchmarks.raw.actions.view_payload')"
        @click.stop="openPayload(item)"
      />
    </template>

    <template #no-data>
      <div class="pa-8 text-center text-medium-emphasis">
        <v-icon icon="mdi-database-off-outline" size="large" class="mb-2" />
        <p>{{ t('admin.benchmarks.raw.empty') }}</p>
      </div>
    </template>
  </v-data-table-server>

  <v-dialog v-model="dialog" width="800" scrollable>
    <v-card rounded="xl" elevation="24">
      <v-card-title class="pa-6 pb-2 d-flex align-center justify-between">
        <div class="d-flex align-center ga-3">
          <v-avatar color="primary" variant="tonal" size="40">
            <v-icon icon="mdi-code-json" size="24" />
          </v-avatar>
          <div>
            <div class="text-h6 font-weight-bold">{{ t('admin.benchmarks.raw.payload_dialog.title') }}</div>
            <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ selectedRun?.runId }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <v-spacer />
        <v-btn icon="mdi-close" variant="text" size="small" @click="dialog = false" />
      </v-card-title>

      <v-card-text class="pa-6">
        <v-alert v-if="!parsedPayload" type="warning" variant="tonal" class="mb-4">
          {{ t('admin.benchmarks.raw.payload_dialog.empty') }}
        </v-alert>
        <div v-else class="json-viewer-container">
          <JsonTree :value="parsedPayload" />
        </div>
      </v-card-text>

      <v-divider />

      <v-card-actions class="pa-4 bg-surface-variant-light">
        <v-btn
          prepend-icon="mdi-content-copy"
          variant="tonal"
          color="primary"
          @click="copyPayload"
        >
          {{ t('admin.benchmarks.raw.payload_dialog.copy') }}
        </v-btn>
        <v-spacer />
        <v-btn variant="text" @click="dialog = false">{{ t('common.close') }}</v-btn>
      </v-card-actions>
    </v-card>
  </v-dialog>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import JsonTree from '~/components/infra/JsonTree.vue'
import type { BenchmarkRunView } from '~/domains/benchmarks/benchmarks'

const props = defineProps<{
  rows: BenchmarkRunView[]
  total: number
  loading: boolean
  itemsPerPage: number
}>()

defineEmits(['options', 'select'])

const { t, n, d } = useI18n()

const page = ref(1)
const itemsPerPage = ref(props.itemsPerPage)
// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
const sortBy = ref<any[]>([])

const dialog = ref(false)
const selectedRun = ref<BenchmarkRunView | null>(null)

const headers = computed(() => [
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.raw.fields.captured_at'), key: 'capturedAt', sortable: true },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.raw.fields.node_id'), key: 'nodeId', sortable: true },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.raw.fields.model_id'), key: 'modelId', sortable: true },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.raw.fields.workload'), key: 'workloadType', sortable: true },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.raw.fields.latency_p50'), key: 'latencyP50Ms', align: 'end' as const, sortable: true },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.raw.fields.tps'), key: 'tokensPerSecond', align: 'end' as const, sortable: true },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.raw.fields.score'), key: 'score', align: 'end' as const, sortable: true },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.raw.fields.grade'), key: 'grade', align: 'center' as const, sortable: true },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.raw.fields.quality'), key: 'measurementQuality', align: 'center' as const, sortable: true },
  { title: '', key: 'actions', sortable: false, align: 'center' as const }
])

const parsedPayload = computed(() => {
  if (!selectedRun.value?.rawPayloadJson) return null
  try {
    return JSON.parse(selectedRun.value.rawPayloadJson)
  } catch {
    return null
  }
})

function openPayload(item: BenchmarkRunView) {
  selectedRun.value = item
  dialog.value = true
}

async function copyPayload() {
  if (selectedRun.value?.rawPayloadJson) {
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(selectedRun.value.rawPayloadJson)
  }
}

function formatDate(val: string) {
  if (!val) return '-'
  return d(new Date(val), 'short')
}

function gradeColor(grade?: string) {
  switch (grade?.toUpperCase()) {
    case 'S': return 'deep-purple-accent-4'
    case 'A': return 'success'
    case 'B': return 'primary'
    case 'C': return 'warning'
    case 'D': return 'error'
    default: return 'grey'
  }
}

function qualityColor(quality?: string) {
  switch (quality?.toUpperCase()) {
    case 'HIGH': return 'success'
    case 'MEDIUM': return 'warning'
    case 'LOW': return 'error'
    default: return 'grey'
  }
}

async function copy(text: string) {
  await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text)
}
</script>

<style scoped>
.inf-benchmark-table :deep(th) {
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-surface-variant), 0.05) !important;
  font-weight: 600 !important;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}

.text-mono {
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace;
  font-size: 0.875rem;
}

.bg-surface-variant-light {
  background-color: rgba(var(--v-theme-surface-variant), 0.3) !important;
}

.json-viewer-container {
  border-radius: 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
}
</style>

```

<template>

            @click="toggleLogsDrawer"
          >
            {{ t('playground.actions.show_logs') }}
          </v-btn>
          <v-btn
            :href="routerSwaggerUrl"
            target="_blank"
            rel="noopener noreferrer"
            color="secondary"
            variant="tonal"
            rounded="pill"
            prepend-icon="mdi-api"
            class="inf-openapi-cta"
          >
            {{ t('playground.actions.openapi_docs') }}
          </v-btn>
        </div>
        <p class="text-body-2 text-medium-emphasis">{{ t('playground.description') }}</p>
        <p class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis mt-1 mb-0">{{ t('playground.hints.openapi') }}</p>
      </div>



      <v-tabs v-model="activeTab" color="primary" class="px-2">
        <v-tab value="chat" prepend-icon="mdi-chat-outline">{{ t('playground.tabs.chat') }}</v-tab>
        <v-tab value="embeddings" prepend-icon="mdi-vector-polyline">{{ t('playground.tabs.embeddings') }}</v-tab>
        <v-tab value="completions" prepend-icon="mdi-text-box-outline">{{ t('playground.tabs.completions') }}</v-tab>
        <v-tab value="images" prepend-icon="mdi-image-outline">{{ t('playground.tabs.images') }}</v-tab>
        <v-tab value="speech" prepend-icon="mdi-account-voice">{{ t('playground.tabs.speech') }}</v-tab>
        <v-tab value="transcriptions" prepend-icon="mdi-waveform">{{ t('playground.tabs.transcriptions') }}</v-tab>
        <v-tab value="moderations" prepend-icon="mdi-shield-alert-outline">{{ t('playground.tabs.moderations') }}</v-tab>
        <v-tab value="files" prepend-icon="mdi-file-outline">{{ t('playground.tabs.files') }}</v-tab>
      </v-tabs>
      <v-divider />

      <v-window v-model="activeTab" class="pa-4">

        <!-- ── Chat tab ── -->
        <v-window-item value="chat">
          <v-textarea
            v-model="chatPrompt"
            :label="t('playground.fields.prompt')"
            rows="5"
            auto-grow
            variant="outlined"
            class="mb-3"
          />
          <v-file-input
            v-model="attachments"
            :label="t('playground.fields.attachments')"
            accept="image/*,audio/*"
            multiple
            chips
            show-size
            variant="outlined"
            density="comfortable"
            class="mb-3"
          />

          <div class="d-flex align-center ga-3 mb-4">
            <v-btn
              color="primary"
              :loading="tester.runningChat.value"
              prepend-icon="mdi-play-outline"
              @click="onRunChat"
            >{{ t('playground.actions.run_chat') }}</v-btn>
            <v-btn
              v-if="chatHistory.length > 0"
              variant="text"
              size="small"
              color="error"
              prepend-icon="mdi-delete-sweep-outline"
              @click="clearChatHistory"
            >{{ t('playground.actions.clear_history') }}</v-btn>
          </div>

          <v-alert v-if="chatError" type="error" variant="tonal" closable class="mb-4" @click:close="chatError = ''">
            {{ chatError }}
          </v-alert>

          <transition-group
            v-if="chatHistory.length > 0"
            name="result-fade"
            tag="div"
            class="d-flex flex-column ga-4"
          >
            <v-card v-for="item in chatHistory" :key="item.id" variant="outlined">
              <div class="d-flex align-center pa-3 pb-1 ga-2 flex-wrap">
                <v-chip
                  size="small"
                  :color="item.diagnostics.status === 'success' ? 'success' : 'error'"
                  variant="flat"
                >
                  <v-icon
                    start
                    :icon="item.diagnostics.status === 'success' ? 'mdi-check-circle' : 'mdi-alert-circle'"
                    size="small"
                  />
                  {{ t(`playground.labels.status_${item.diagnostics.status}`) }}
                </v-chip>
                <v-chip v-if="item.diagnostics.durationMs !== undefined" size="small" variant="tonal">
                  {{ item.diagnostics.durationMs }}ms
                </v-chip>
                <v-chip v-if="item.diagnostics.totalTokens" size="small" variant="tonal" color="secondary">
                  {{ item.diagnostics.totalTokens }} {{ t('playground.labels.tokens') }}
                </v-chip>
                <v-chip v-if="item.diagnostics.modelServed" size="small" variant="outlined" class="font-monospace">
                  {{ item.diagnostics.modelServed }}
                </v-chip>
                <span class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis ms-auto">{{ formatTime(item.timestamp) }}</span>
                <v-tooltip
                  :text="copiedId === item.id ? t('playground.actions.copied') : t('playground.actions.copy_output')"
                  location="top"
                >
                  <template #activator="{ props: tipProps }">
                    <v-btn
                      v-bind="tipProps"
                      :icon="copiedId === item.id ? 'mdi-check' : 'mdi-content-copy'"
                      size="small"
                      variant="text"
                      :color="copiedId === item.id ? 'success' : undefined"
                      @click="copyOutput(item.output, item.id)"
                    />
                  </template>
                </v-tooltip>
              </div>

              <v-card-text class="pt-2">
                <pre v-if="item.output" class="playground-console pa-3 rounded-lg">{{ item.output }}</pre>
                <v-expansion-panels variant="accordion" class="mt-3" elevation="0">
                  <v-expansion-panel :title="t('playground.labels.diagnostics')" elevation="0">
                    <v-expansion-panel-text>
                      <pre class="playground-console pa-2 text-medium-emphasis" style="font-size: 11px">{{ JSON.stringify(item.diagnostics, null, 2) }}</pre>
                    </v-expansion-panel-text>
                  </v-expansion-panel>
                </v-expansion-panels>
              </v-card-text>
            </v-card>
          </transition-group>

          <div
            v-else-if="!tester.runningChat.value"
            class="d-flex flex-column align-center justify-center py-10 text-center"
          >
            <v-icon size="56" icon="mdi-chat-sleep-outline" color="medium-emphasis" class="mb-3 opacity-30" />
            <p class="text-body-2 text-medium-emphasis">{{ t('playground.hints.no_result') }}</p>
          </div>
        </v-window-item>

        <!-- ── Embeddings tab ── -->
        <v-window-item value="embeddings">
          <v-textarea
            v-model="embeddingInput"
            :label="t('playground.fields.embedding_input')"
            rows="5"
            auto-grow
            variant="outlined"
            class="mb-3"
          />

          <div class="d-flex align-center ga-3 mb-4">
            <v-btn
              color="primary"
              :loading="tester.runningEmbeddings.value"
              prepend-icon="mdi-play-outline"
              @click="onRunEmbeddings"
            >{{ t('playground.actions.run_embeddings') }}</v-btn>
            <v-btn
              v-if="embeddingHistory.length > 0"
              variant="text"
              size="small"
              color="error"
              prepend-icon="mdi-delete-sweep-outline"
              @click="clearEmbeddingHistory"
            >{{ t('playground.actions.clear_history') }}</v-btn>
          </div>

          <v-alert v-if="embeddingError" type="error" variant="tonal" closable class="mb-4" @click:close="embeddingError = ''">
            {{ embeddingError }}
          </v-alert>

          <transition-group
            v-if="embeddingHistory.length > 0"
            name="result-fade"
            tag="div"
            class="d-flex flex-column ga-4"
          >
            <v-card v-for="item in embeddingHistory" :key="item.id" variant="outlined">
              <div class="d-flex align-center pa-3 pb-1 ga-2 flex-wrap">
                <v-chip
                  size="small"
                  :color="item.diagnostics.status === 'success' ? 'success' : 'error'"
                  variant="flat"
                >
                  <v-icon
                    start
                    :icon="item.diagnostics.status === 'success' ? 'mdi-check-circle' : 'mdi-alert-circle'"
                    size="small"
                  />
                  {{ t(`playground.labels.status_${item.diagnostics.status}`) }}
                </v-chip>
                <v-chip v-if="item.diagnostics.durationMs !== undefined" size="small" variant="tonal">
                  {{ item.diagnostics.durationMs }}ms
                </v-chip>
                <span class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis ms-auto">{{ formatTime(item.timestamp) }}</span>
                <v-tooltip
                  :text="copiedId === item.id ? t('playground.actions.copied') : t('playground.actions.copy_output')"
                  location="top"
                >
                  <template #activator="{ props: tipProps }">
                    <v-btn
                      v-bind="tipProps"
                      :icon="copiedId === item.id ? 'mdi-check' : 'mdi-content-copy'"
                      size="small"
                      variant="text"
                      :color="copiedId === item.id ? 'success' : undefined"
                      @click="copyOutput(item.output, item.id)"
                    />
                  </template>
                </v-tooltip>
              </div>

              <v-card-text class="pt-2">
                <pre v-if="item.output" class="playground-console pa-3 rounded-lg">{{ item.output }}</pre>
                <v-expansion-panels variant="accordion" class="mt-3" elevation="0">
                  <v-expansion-panel :title="t('playground.labels.diagnostics')" elevation="0">
                    <v-expansion-panel-text>
                      <pre class="playground-console pa-2 text-medium-emphasis" style="font-size: 11px">{{ JSON.stringify(item.diagnostics, null, 2) }}</pre>
                    </v-expansion-panel-text>
                  </v-expansion-panel>
                </v-expansion-panels>
              </v-card-text>
            </v-card>
          </transition-group>

          <div
            v-else-if="!tester.runningEmbeddings.value"
            class="d-flex flex-column align-center justify-center py-10 text-center"
          >
            <v-icon size="56" icon="mdi-vector-polyline" color="medium-emphasis" class="mb-3 opacity-30" />
            <p class="text-body-2 text-medium-emphasis">{{ t('playground.hints.no_result') }}</p>
          </div>
        </v-window-item>
        <v-window-item v-for="tab in advancedTabs" :key="tab.value" :value="tab.value">
          <PlaygroundTabHost
            :tab="tab.value"
            :api-key="selectedApiKeyValue"
            :model="tester.selectedModel.value"
            :temperature="tester.temperature.value"
            :max-tokens="tester.maxTokens.value"
          />
        </v-window-item>

      </v-window>
    </v-col>

    <KeyCreateDialog
      :open="openCreateKey"
      @close="openCreateKey = false"
      @create="onCreateKey"
    />

    <v-dialog v-model="secretDialogOpen" max-width="560">
      <v-card rounded="lg">
        <v-card-title>{{ t('keys.secret.title') }}</v-card-title>
        <v-card-text>
          <v-alert type="warning" variant="tonal" class="mb-4">{{ t('keys.secret.warning') }}</v-alert>
          <v-text-field
            :model-value="createdSecret"
            readonly
            variant="outlined"
            density="comfortable"
            prepend-inner-icon="mdi-key-variant"
            hide-details
          />
        </v-card-text>
        <v-card-actions>
          <v-spacer />
          <v-btn variant="text" @click="secretDialogOpen = false">{{ t('common.close') }}</v-btn>
          <v-btn color="primary" :prepend-icon="secretCopied ? 'mdi-check' : 'mdi-content-copy'" @click="copyCreatedSecret">
            {{ secretCopied ? t('playground.actions.copied') : t('playground.actions.copy_key') }}
          </v-btn>
        </v-card-actions>
      </v-card>
    </v-dialog>

    </v-row>

    <PlaygroundLogsDrawer
      :open="logsDrawerOpen"
      :collapsed="logsDrawerCollapsed"
      :subtitle="selectedKey?.name || t('playground.logs.no_key')"
      :records="playgroundLogs"
      :selected-request-id="selectedLogRequestId"
      :detail="selectedLogDetail"
      :loading="logsLoading"
      :detail-loading="logDetailLoading"
      :error="logsError"
      @close="logsDrawerOpen = false"
      @select="onSelectLog"
      @toggle-collapse="logsDrawerCollapsed = !logsDrawerCollapsed"
    />
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import PlaygroundTabHost from '~/components/capacity-tester/PlaygroundTabHost.vue'
import PlaygroundLogsDrawer from '~/components/capacity-tester/PlaygroundLogsDrawer.vue'
import KeyCreateDialog from '~/components/keys/KeyCreateDialog.vue'
import type { OperationAuditDetail, OperationAuditListItem } from '~/domains/audit/audit'
import type { KeyCreateRequest } from '~/domains/keys/keys'

interface HistoryEntry {
  id: number
  timestamp: Date
  output: string
  diagnostics: {
    startedAt: string
    durationMs: number
    modelRequested: string
    modelServed?: string
    promptTokens?: number
    completionTokens?: number
    totalTokens?: number
    status: 'success' | 'error'
    errorCode?: string
    errorMessage?: string
  }
}

const { t } = useI18n()
const runtimeConfig = useRuntimeConfig()
const { session } = useAuthSession()
const route = useRoute()
const tester = useCapacityTester()
const isAuthenticated = computed(() => !!session.value)
const routerSwaggerUrl = computed(() => {
  return new URL('/swagger-ui.html', runtimeConfig.public.routerBaseUrl).toString()
})

type AdvancedTab = 'completions' | 'images' | 'speech' | 'transcriptions' | 'moderations' | 'files'
const advancedTabs: Array<{ value: AdvancedTab }> = [
  { value: 'completions' },
  { value: 'images' },
  { value: 'speech' },
  { value: 'transcriptions' },
  { value: 'moderations' },
  { value: 'files' }
]
const activeTab = ref<'chat' | 'embeddings' | AdvancedTab>('chat')
const chatPrompt = ref('')
const embeddingInput = ref('')
const attachments = ref<File[]>([])
const modelError = ref('')
const chatError = ref('')
const embeddingError = ref('')
const copiedId = ref<number | null>(null)
const openCreateKey = ref(false)
const secretDialogOpen = ref(false)
const secretCopied = ref(false)
const createdSecret = ref('')
const chatHistory = ref<HistoryEntry[]>([])
const embeddingHistory = ref<HistoryEntry[]>([])
const MAX_HISTORY = 20
const logsDrawerOpen = ref(false)
const logsDrawerCollapsed = ref(false)
const logsLoading = ref(false)
const logDetailLoading = ref(false)
const logsError = ref('')
const playgroundLogs = ref<OperationAuditListItem[]>([])
const selectedLogRequestId = ref<string | null>(null)
const selectedLogDetail = ref<OperationAuditDetail | null>(null)
const terminalStatuses = ['COMPLETED', 'FAILED', 'REJECTED', 'REFUNDED']
let logsPollHandle: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | null = null

const selectedKey = computed(() => tester.keyRows.value.find(row => row.apiKeyId === tester.selectedApiKeyId.value))
const selectedApiKeyValue = computed(() => selectedKey.value?.keyValue?.trim() || '')
const sidebarContext = computed(() => {
  if (activeTab.value === 'files') {
    return {
      showModel: false,
      showTemperature: false,
      showMaxTokens: false
    }
  }

  if (activeTab.value === 'chat' || activeTab.value === 'completions') {
    return {
      showModel: true,
      showTemperature: true,
      showMaxTokens: true
    }
  }

  if (activeTab.value === 'embeddings') {
    return {
      showModel: true,
      showTemperature: false,
      showMaxTokens: false
    }
  }

  return {
    showModel: true,
    showTemperature: false,
    showMaxTokens: false
  }
})



onMounted(async () => {
  await tester.init()
  await refreshLogs()
  startLogsPolling()
})

onBeforeUnmount(() => {
  stopLogsPolling()
})

watch(logsDrawerOpen, async (open) => {
  if (open) {
    await refreshLogs()
  }
})

watch(() => tester.selectedApiKeyId.value, async () => {
  selectedLogRequestId.value = null
  selectedLogDetail.value = null
  await refreshLogs()
})

async function onApiKeyChange() {
  modelError.value = ''
  try {
    await tester.onSelectApiKey()
    await refreshLogs()
  } catch (error) {
    modelError.value = mapError(error)
  }
}

async function onRunChat() {
  chatError.value = ''
  const prevResult = tester.chatResult.value
  try {
    await tester.runChat({ prompt: chatPrompt.value, attachments: attachments.value || [] })
  } catch (error) {
    chatError.value = mapError(error)
  } finally {
    const newResult = tester.chatResult.value
    if (newResult && newResult !== prevResult) {
      chatHistory.value.unshift({ id: Date.now(), timestamp: new Date(), ...newResult })
      if (chatHistory.value.length > MAX_HISTORY) chatHistory.value.pop()
    }
    await refreshLogs()
  }
}

async function onRunEmbeddings() {
  embeddingError.value = ''
  const prevResult = tester.embeddingResult.value
  try {
    await tester.runEmbeddings(embeddingInput.value)
  } catch (error) {
    embeddingError.value = mapError(error)
  } finally {
    const newResult = tester.embeddingResult.value
    if (newResult && newResult !== prevResult) {
      embeddingHistory.value.unshift({ id: Date.now(), timestamp: new Date(), ...newResult })
      if (embeddingHistory.value.length > MAX_HISTORY) embeddingHistory.value.pop()
    }
    await refreshLogs()
  }
}

async function onCreateKey(payload: KeyCreateRequest) {
  const created = await tester.createKey(payload)
  openCreateKey.value = false
  createdSecret.value = created.keyValue || ''
  secretCopied.value = false
  if (createdSecret.value) {
    secretDialogOpen.value = true
  }
}

async function copyOutput(text: string, id: number) {
  if (!text) return
  try {
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text)
    copiedId.value = id
    setTimeout(() => { copiedId.value = null }, 2000)
  } catch {
    // clipboard API unavailable (non-secure context)
  }
}

async function copyCreatedSecret() {
  if (!createdSecret.value) return
  try {
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(createdSecret.value)
    secretCopied.value = true
    setTimeout(() => { secretCopied.value = false }, 2000)
  } catch {
    // clipboard API unavailable (non-secure context)
  }
}

function clearChatHistory() {
  chatHistory.value = []
}

function clearEmbeddingHistory() {
  embeddingHistory.value = []
}

function formatTime(date: Date): string {
  return date.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit' })
}

function modelHref(model: string) {
  return `/models/${encodeURIComponent(model)}`
}

function toggleLogsDrawer() {
  logsDrawerOpen.value = !logsDrawerOpen.value
}

function startLogsPolling() {
  stopLogsPolling()
  logsPollHandle = setInterval(() => {
    void refreshLogs()
  }, 3000)
}

function stopLogsPolling() {
  if (logsPollHandle) {
    clearInterval(logsPollHandle)
    logsPollHandle = null
  }
}

async function refreshLogs() {
  const apiKey = selectedKey.value?.keyValue?.trim()
  if (!apiKey) {
    playgroundLogs.value = []
    selectedLogRequestId.value = null
    selectedLogDetail.value = null
    return
  }

  logsLoading.value = playgroundLogs.value.length === 0
  logsError.value = ''
  try {
    const newLogs = await tester.listOperationAuditLogs(apiKey, 20)
    
    // Only update if data changed (simple check on length or first requestId)
    if (JSON.stringify(newLogs) !== JSON.stringify(playgroundLogs.value)) {
      playgroundLogs.value = newLogs
    }

    const currentId = selectedLogRequestId.value
    const latestId = playgroundLogs.value[0]?.requestId || null
    
    // Auto-select latest if nothing selected
    const targetId = currentId || latestId

    if (targetId) {
      const isTerminal = selectedLogDetail.value && 
                        selectedLogDetail.value.requestId === targetId && 
                        terminalStatuses.includes(selectedLogDetail.value.status.toUpperCase())
      
      // Only fetch detail if:
      // 1. It's a different request
      // 2. Or the current one is not terminal
      if (selectedLogDetail.value?.requestId !== targetId || !isTerminal) {
        await onSelectLog(targetId)
      }
    } else {
      selectedLogRequestId.value = null
      selectedLogDetail.value = null
    }
  } catch (error) {
    logsError.value = mapError(error)
  } finally {
    logsLoading.value = false
  }
}

async function onSelectLog(requestId: string) {
  const apiKey = selectedKey.value?.keyValue?.trim()
  if (!apiKey) {
    return
  }
  selectedLogRequestId.value = requestId
  logDetailLoading.value = true
  try {
    selectedLogDetail.value = await tester.getOperationAuditLog(apiKey, requestId)
  } catch (error) {
    logsError.value = mapError(error)
  } finally {
    logDetailLoading.value = false
  }
}

// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
function mapError(error: any): string {
  const code = String(error?.statusMessage || error?.data?.statusMessage || '')
  if (code) {
    const key = `playground.errors.${code}`
    const translated = t(key)
    if (translated !== key) return translated
  }
  return error instanceof Error ? error.message : t('errors.unknown_error')
}
</script>

<style scoped>
.inf-playground-shell {
  position: relative;
}

.inf-playground__sidebar-col {
  border-right: thin solid rgba(var(--v-border-color), var(--v-border-opacity));
}

.inf-playground__sidebar {
  position: sticky;
  top: 64px;
  max-height: calc(100vh - 64px);
  overflow-y: auto;
  border-right: thin solid rgba(var(--v-border-color), var(--v-border-opacity));
}

.inf-create-key-cta {
  min-height: 42px;
}

.inf-openapi-cta {
  min-height: 42px;
}

.inf-selected-key {
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.06);
}

.inf-facet-card {
  height: 100%;
  border: thin solid rgba(var(--v-border-color), var(--v-border-opacity));
}

.min-w-0 {
  min-width: 0;
}

@media (max-width: 959px) {
  .inf-playground__sidebar-col {
    border-right: none;
    border-bottom: thin solid rgba(var(--v-border-color), var(--v-border-opacity));
  }

  .inf-playground__sidebar {
    position: static;
    max-height: none;
    overflow-y: visible;
    border-right: none;
  }
}

.playground-console {
  white-space: pre-wrap;
  word-break: break-word;
  margin: 0;
  font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace;
  font-size: 13px;
  line-height: 1.6;
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-surface-variant), 0.4);
  display: block;
}

.result-fade-enter-active {
  transition: opacity 0.25s ease, transform 0.25s ease;
}

.result-fade-enter-from {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(-6px);
}
</style>

```

### File: components/capacity-tester/LogTerminal.vue
```
<template>
  <div class="log-terminal">
    <!-- Header: Quick Metrics -->
    <div class="log-terminal__metrics px-4 py-3 border-bottom">
      <v-row dense>
        <v-col cols="4">
          <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ t('playground.logs.metrics.latency') }}</div>
          <div class="text-body-2 font-weight-bold">{{ formatLatency(detail.totalLatencyMs) }}</div>
        </v-col>
        <v-col cols="4">
          <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ t('playground.logs.metrics.tokens') }}</div>
          <div class="text-body-2 font-weight-bold">
            {{ detail.totalTokens != null ? n(detail.totalTokens) : '-' }}
          </div>
        </v-col>
        <v-col cols="4">
          <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ t('playground.logs.metrics.energy') }}</div>
          <div class="text-body-2 font-weight-bold text-success">
            {{ detail.joulesNet ? `${detail.joulesNet}J` : '-' }}
          </div>
        </v-col>
      </v-row>
    </div>

    <!-- Terminal Content -->
    <div class="log-terminal__console pa-4">
      <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2 mb-4">
        <v-icon icon="mdi-console" size="16" color="primary" />
        <span class="text-caption font-weight-bold text-uppercase tracking-wider">Operation Audit</span>
        <v-spacer />
        <v-btn
          icon="mdi-content-copy"
          variant="text"
          size="x-small"
          density="comfortable"
          @click="copyJson"
        />
      </div>

      <div class="log-terminal__events">
        <div v-for="event in detail.timeline" :key="event.eventId" class="log-terminal__event mb-3">
          <div class="d-flex ga-3">
            <div class="log-terminal__time text-caption text-disabled font-monospace">
              {{ formatTime(event.happenedAt) }}
            </div>
            <div class="log-terminal__marker">
              <div :class="['log-terminal__dot', `log-terminal__dot--${event.type.toLowerCase()}`]" />
              <div class="log-terminal__line" />
            </div>
            <div class="log-terminal__body">
              <div class="text-body-2 font-weight-medium mb-1">{{ event.summary }}</div>
              <div v-if="event.details && Object.keys(event.details).length > 0" class="log-terminal__details pa-2 rounded">
                <div v-for="(val, key) in event.details" :key="key" class="text-caption d-flex ga-2">
                  <span class="text-primary opacity-70">{{ key }}:</span>
                  <span class="text-medium-emphasis">{{ val }}</span>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Raw Metadata -->
      <v-expansion-panels variant="accordion" class="log-terminal__expansion mt-4" elevation="0">
        <v-expansion-panel elevation="0">
          <v-expansion-panel-title class="px-0 py-2 text-caption font-weight-bold text-uppercase">
            <v-icon icon="mdi-code-json" start size="14" />
            Raw Metadata
          </v-expansion-panel-title>
          <v-expansion-panel-text>
            <pre class="log-terminal__json">{{ cleanDetail }}</pre>
          </v-expansion-panel-text>
        </v-expansion-panel>
      </v-expansion-panels>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import type { OperationAuditDetail } from '~/domains/audit/audit'

const props = defineProps<{
  detail: OperationAuditDetail
}>()

const { t, n } = useI18n()

const cleanDetail = computed(() => {
   
  const { timeline, ...rest } = props.detail
  return JSON.stringify(rest, null, 2)
})

function formatLatency(value: number | null | undefined) {
  return value == null ? '-' : `${value}ms`
}

function formatTime(raw: string) {
  if (!raw) return '--:--:--'
  const date = new Date(raw)
  return date.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour12: false, hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit', fractionalSecondDigits: 1 })
}

function copyJson() {
  navigator.clipboard.writeText(JSON.stringify(props.detail, null, 2))
}
</script>

<style scoped>
.log-terminal {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: 100%;
}

.log-terminal__metrics {
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-surface-variant), 0.2);

.log-terminal__console {

  font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace;
}

}

  align-items: center;
  width: 12px;
  flex-shrink: 0;
}

.log-terminal__dot {
  width: 8px;
  height: 8px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--v-theme-primary);
  margin-top: 6px;
  z-index: 1;
}

.log-terminal__dot--error { background: rgb(var(--v-theme-error)); }
.log-terminal__dot--success { background: rgb(var(--v-theme-success)); }
.log-terminal__dot--info { background: rgb(var(--v-theme-info)); }

  flex: 1;

}

}

### File: components/capacity-tester/PlaygroundCompletionsTab.vue
```
<template>
  <div class="d-flex flex-column ga-4">
    <v-row>
      <v-col cols="12" xl="7">
        <v-card variant="outlined" rounded="lg">
          <v-card-text class="d-flex flex-column ga-4">
            <v-textarea
              v-model="prompt"
              :label="t('playground.fields.prompt')"
              rows="7"
              auto-grow
              variant="outlined"
              prepend-inner-icon="mdi-text"
              hide-details
            />

            <v-combobox
              v-model="stopSequences"
              :label="t('playground.fields.stop_sequences')"
              multiple
              chips
              closable-chips
              clearable
              variant="outlined"
              prepend-inner-icon="mdi-cancel"
              hide-details
            />

            <v-text-field
              v-model="suffix"
              :label="t('playground.fields.suffix')"
              variant="outlined"
              prepend-inner-icon="mdi-format-letter-case"
              hide-details
            />
          </v-card-text>
          <v-card-actions class="px-4 pb-4">
            <v-btn
              color="primary"
              :loading="loading"
              prepend-icon="mdi-play"
              @click="run"
            >
              {{ t('playground.actions.run_completions') }}
            </v-btn>
          </v-card-actions>
        </v-card>
      </v-col>

      <v-col cols="12" xl="5">
        <v-card variant="outlined" rounded="lg" min-height="100%">
          <v-card-text class="d-flex flex-column ga-4 fill-height">
            <div class="d-flex align-center justify-space-between ga-2">
              <div>
                <div class="text-subtitle-2">{{ t('playground.results.generated_text') }}</div>
                <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ t('playground.hints.completions_output') }}</div>
              </div>
              <v-chip v-if="usage?.total_tokens" size="small" color="secondary" variant="tonal">
                {{ usage.total_tokens }} {{ t('playground.labels.tokens') }}
              </v-chip>
            </div>

            <v-alert
              v-if="error"
              type="error"
              variant="tonal"
              closable
              @click:close="error = ''"
            >
              {{ error }}
            </v-alert>

            <div
              v-if="output"
              class="rounded-lg bg-surface-variant pa-4 text-body-2 flex-grow-1"
            >
              {{ output }}
            </div>

            <div
              v-else
              class="d-flex flex-column align-center justify-center py-10 text-center text-medium-emphasis flex-grow-1"
            >
              <v-icon icon="mdi-text-box-search-outline" size="52" class="mb-3 opacity-50" />
              <span>{{ t('playground.hints.no_result') }}</span>
            </div>

            <PlaygroundRawResponse v-if="response" :payload="response" :title="t('playground.labels.raw_response')" />
          </v-card-text>
        </v-card>
      </v-col>
    </v-row>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import PlaygroundRawResponse from '~/components/capacity-tester/PlaygroundRawResponse.vue'

const props = defineProps<{
  apiKey: string
  model: string
  temperature: number
  maxTokens: number
}>()

const { t } = useI18n()
const playground = usePlayground()

const prompt = ref('')
const suffix = ref('')
const stopSequences = ref<string[]>([])
const loading = ref(false)
const error = ref('')
const response = ref<unknown>(null)

const output = computed(() => {
  const value = (response.value as { choices?: Array<{ text?: string }> } | null)?.choices?.[0]?.text
  return typeof value === 'string' ? value.trim() : ''
})

const usage = computed(() => (response.value as { usage?: { total_tokens?: number } } | null)?.usage)

async function run() {
  error.value = ''

  if (!props.apiKey || !props.model) {
    error.value = t('playground.errors.configuration_required')
    return
  }

  if (!prompt.value.trim()) {
    error.value = t('playground.errors.empty_prompt')
    return
  }

  loading.value = true
  try {
    response.value = await playground.runCompletionsRaw({
      apiKey: props.apiKey,
      payload: {
        model: props.model,
        prompt: prompt.value.trim(),
        temperature: props.temperature,
        max_tokens: props.maxTokens,
        stop: stopSequences.value.length > 0 ? stopSequences.value : undefined,
        suffix: suffix.value.trim() || undefined
      }
    })
  } catch (runError) {
    error.value = mapError(runError)
  } finally {
    loading.value = false
  }
}

function mapError(runError: unknown): string {
  const statusMessage = String((runError as { statusMessage?: string, data?: { statusMessage?: string } })?.statusMessage
    || (runError as { data?: { statusMessage?: string } })?.data?.statusMessage
    || '')
  if (statusMessage) {
    const key = `playground.errors.${statusMessage}`
    const translated = t(key)
    if (translated !== key) {
      return translated
    }
  }

  return runError instanceof Error ? runError.message : t('errors.unknown_error')
}
</script>

```

### File: components/capacity-tester/PlaygroundFilesTab.vue
```
<template>
  <v-row>
    <v-col cols="12" xl="4">
      <v-card variant="outlined" rounded="lg">
        <v-card-text class="d-flex flex-column ga-4">
          <v-file-input
            v-model="selectedFile"
            :label="t('playground.fields.file_upload')"
            prepend-icon="mdi-file-upload-outline"
            show-size
            variant="outlined"
            hide-details
          />

          <v-select
            v-model="purpose"
            :label="t('playground.fields.file_purpose')"
            :items="purposeOptions"
            variant="outlined"
            prepend-inner-icon="mdi-tag-outline"
            hide-details
          />
        </v-card-text>
        <v-card-actions class="px-4 pb-4">
          <v-btn color="primary" :loading="loading" prepend-icon="mdi-upload" @click="run">
            {{ t('playground.actions.upload_file') }}
          </v-btn>
        </v-card-actions>
      </v-card>
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12" xl="8">
      <v-card variant="outlined" rounded="lg">
        <v-card-text class="d-flex flex-column ga-4">
          <div>
            <div class="text-subtitle-2">{{ t('playground.results.uploaded_file') }}</div>
            <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ t('playground.hints.files_output') }}</div>
          </div>

          <v-alert
            v-if="error"
            type="error"
            variant="tonal"
            closable
            @click:close="error = ''"
          >
            {{ error }}
          </v-alert>

          <v-card v-if="fileCard" variant="tonal" rounded="lg">
            <v-card-text class="d-flex align-center ga-4">
              <v-avatar color="primary" variant="tonal" rounded="lg" size="44">
                <v-icon icon="mdi-file-check-outline" />
              </v-avatar>
              <div class="min-w-0">
                <div class="text-body-1 font-weight-medium text-truncate">{{ fileCard.filename }}</div>
                <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ fileCard.id }}</div>
              </div>
              <v-spacer />
              <v-chip size="small" variant="outlined">{{ fileCard.purpose }}</v-chip>
              <v-chip size="small" color="secondary" variant="tonal">{{ formatBytes(fileCard.bytes) }}</v-chip>
            </v-card-text>
          </v-card>

          <div
            v-else
            class="d-flex flex-column align-center justify-center py-10 text-center text-medium-emphasis"
          >
            <v-icon icon="mdi-file-hidden-outline" size="52" class="mb-3 opacity-50" />
            <span>{{ t('playground.hints.no_result') }}</span>
          </div>

          <PlaygroundRawResponse v-if="response" :payload="response" :title="t('playground.labels.raw_response')" />
        </v-card-text>
      </v-card>
    </v-col>
  </v-row>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import PlaygroundRawResponse from '~/components/capacity-tester/PlaygroundRawResponse.vue'

const props = defineProps<{
  apiKey: string
}>()

const { t } = useI18n()
const playground = usePlayground()

const selectedFile = ref<File | null>(null)
const purpose = ref('assistants')
const loading = ref(false)
const error = ref('')
const response = ref<unknown>(null)

const purposeOptions = ['assistants', 'batch', 'fine-tune', 'vision']
const fileCard = computed(() => response.value as { id: string, filename: string, bytes: number, purpose: string } | null)

async function run() {
  error.value = ''
  if (!props.apiKey) {
    error.value = t('playground.errors.configuration_required')
    return
  }

  if (!selectedFile.value) {
    error.value = t('playground.errors.file_required')
    return
  }

  const formData = new FormData()
  formData.append('apiKey', props.apiKey)
  formData.append('purpose', purpose.value)
  formData.append('file', selectedFile.value)

  loading.value = true
  try {
    response.value = await playground.runFilesCreateRaw({
      apiKey: props.apiKey,
      formData
    })
  } catch (runError) {
    error.value = mapError(runError)
  } finally {
    loading.value = false
  }
}

function formatBytes(bytes: number) {
  if (!Number.isFinite(bytes)) {
    return '0 B'
  }

  if (bytes < 1024) {
    return `${bytes} B`
  }

  if (bytes < 1024 * 1024) {
    return `${(bytes / 1024).toFixed(1)} KB`
  }

  return `${(bytes / (1024 * 1024)).toFixed(1)} MB`
}

function mapError(runError: unknown): string {
  const statusMessage = String((runError as { statusMessage?: string, data?: { statusMessage?: string } })?.statusMessage
    || (runError as { data?: { statusMessage?: string } })?.data?.statusMessage
    || '')
  if (statusMessage) {
    const key = `playground.errors.${statusMessage}`
    const translated = t(key)
    if (translated !== key) {
      return translated
    }
  }

  return runError instanceof Error ? runError.message : t('errors.unknown_error')
}
</script>

<style scoped>
.min-w-0 {
  min-width: 0;
}
</style>

```

<template>
  <v-row>
    <v-col cols="12" xl="4">
      <v-card variant="outlined" rounded="lg">
        <v-card-text class="d-flex flex-column ga-4">
          <v-textarea
            v-model="prompt"
            :label="t('playground.fields.image_prompt')"
            rows="6"
            auto-grow
            variant="outlined"
            prepend-inner-icon="mdi-image-edit-outline"
            hide-details
          />

          <v-select
            v-model="size"
            :label="t('playground.fields.image_size')"
            :items="sizeOptions"
            variant="outlined"
            prepend-inner-icon="mdi-resize"
            hide-details
          />

          <v-select
            v-model="quality"
            :label="t('playground.fields.image_quality')"
            :items="qualityOptions"
            variant="outlined"
            prepend-inner-icon="mdi-star-outline"
            hide-details
          />

          <v-select
            v-model="style"
            :label="t('playground.fields.image_style')"
            :items="styleOptions"
            variant="outlined"
            prepend-inner-icon="mdi-palette-outline"
            hide-details
          />

          <v-slider
            v-model="count"
            :label="t('playground.fields.image_count')"
            :min="1"
            :max="4"
            :step="1"
            color="primary"
            thumb-label="always"
            hide-details
          />
        </v-card-text>
        <v-card-actions class="px-4 pb-4">
          <v-btn color="primary" :loading="loading" prepend-icon="mdi-play" @click="run">
            {{ t('playground.actions.generate_image') }}
          </v-btn>
        </v-card-actions>
      </v-card>
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12" xl="8">
      <v-card variant="outlined" rounded="lg">
        <v-card-text class="d-flex flex-column ga-4">
          <div class="d-flex align-center justify-space-between ga-2">
            <div>
              <div class="text-subtitle-2">{{ t('playground.results.images') }}</div>
              <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ t('playground.hints.images_output') }}</div>
            </div>
            <v-chip v-if="images.length" size="small" color="primary" variant="tonal">
              {{ images.length }}
            </v-chip>
          </div>

          <v-alert
            v-if="error"
            type="error"
            variant="tonal"
            closable
            @click:close="error = ''"
          >
            {{ error }}
          </v-alert>

          <v-row v-if="images.length" class="ma-n2">
            <v-col
              v-for="(image, index) in images"
              :key="`${index}-${image.src}`"
              cols="12"
              md="6"
              class="pa-2"
            >
              <v-card variant="tonal" rounded="lg">
                <v-img :src="image.src" aspect-ratio="1" cover />
                <v-card-actions>
                  <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ image.revisedPrompt || t('playground.labels.generated_asset') }}</div>
                  <v-spacer />
                  <v-btn
                    :href="image.src"
                    :download="`playground-image-${index + 1}.png`"
                    variant="text"
                    prepend-icon="mdi-download"
                  >
                    {{ t('playground.actions.download') }}
                  </v-btn>
                </v-card-actions>
              </v-card>
            </v-col>
          </v-row>

          <div
            v-else
            class="d-flex flex-column align-center justify-center py-10 text-center text-medium-emphasis"
          >
            <v-icon icon="mdi-image-off-outline" size="52" class="mb-3 opacity-50" />
            <span>{{ t('playground.hints.no_result') }}</span>
          </div>

          <PlaygroundRawResponse v-if="response" :payload="response" :title="t('playground.labels.raw_response')" />
        </v-card-text>
      </v-card>
    </v-col>
  </v-row>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import PlaygroundRawResponse from '~/components/capacity-tester/PlaygroundRawResponse.vue'

const props = defineProps<{
  apiKey: string
  model: string
}>()

const { t } = useI18n()
const playground = usePlayground()

const prompt = ref('')
const size = ref('1024x1024')
const quality = ref('standard')
const style = ref('vivid')
const count = ref(1)
const loading = ref(false)
const error = ref('')
const response = ref<unknown>(null)

const sizeOptions = ['256x256', '512x512', '1024x1024']
const qualityOptions = ['standard', 'hd']
const styleOptions = ['vivid', 'natural']

const images = computed(() => {
  const data = (response.value as { data?: Array<{ url?: string, b64_json?: string, revised_prompt?: string }> } | null)?.data || []
  return data
    .map((item) => ({
      src: item.url || (item.b64_json ? `data:image/png;base64,${item.b64_json}` : ''),
      revisedPrompt: item.revised_prompt || ''
    }))
    .filter((item) => item.src)
})

async function run() {
  error.value = ''
  if (!props.apiKey || !props.model) {
    error.value = t('playground.errors.configuration_required')
    return
  }

  if (!prompt.value.trim()) {
    error.value = t('playground.errors.empty_prompt')
    return
  }

  loading.value = true
  try {
    response.value = await playground.runImageGenerationsRaw({
      apiKey: props.apiKey,
      payload: {
        model: props.model,
        prompt: prompt.value.trim(),
        size: size.value,
        quality: quality.value,
        style: style.value,
        n: count.value
      }
    })
  } catch (runError) {
    error.value = mapError(runError)
  } finally {
    loading.value = false
  }
}

function mapError(runError: unknown): string {
  const statusMessage = String((runError as { statusMessage?: string, data?: { statusMessage?: string } })?.statusMessage
    || (runError as { data?: { statusMessage?: string } })?.data?.statusMessage
    || '')
  if (statusMessage) {
    const key = `playground.errors.${statusMessage}`
    const translated = t(key)
    if (translated !== key) {
      return translated
    }
  }

  return runError instanceof Error ? runError.message : t('errors.unknown_error')
}
</script>
