```
### File: components/capacity-tester/PlaygroundLogsDrawer.vue
```
<template>
  <v-navigation-drawer
    :model-value="open"
    :location="mobile ? 'bottom' : 'right'"
    :temporary="mobile"
    :rail="!mobile && collapsed"
    :width="mobile ? undefined : 520"
    :touchless="!mobile"
    class="playground-logs-drawer"
    @update:model-value="emit('close')"
  >
    <template v-if="!collapsed || mobile">
      <!-- Header -->
      <div class="d-flex align-center ga-3 px-4 pt-5 pb-3">
        <v-avatar color="primary" variant="tonal" rounded="lg" size="40">
          <v-icon icon="mdi-history" size="22" />
        </v-avatar>
        <div class="min-w-0">
          <div class="text-subtitle-1 font-weight-bold lh-tight">{{ t('playground.logs.title') }}</div>
          <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis text-truncate">{{ subtitle }}</div>
        </div>
        <v-spacer />
        <v-btn
          v-if="!mobile"
          icon="mdi-arrow-right-circle-outline"
          variant="text"
          color="medium-emphasis"
          @click="emit('toggle-collapse')"
        />
        <v-btn icon="mdi-close" variant="text" color="medium-emphasis" @click="emit('close')" />
      </div>

      <v-divider />

      <div class="playground-logs-drawer__content">
        <!-- List Section -->
        <div class="playground-logs-drawer__list">
          <div v-if="loading && records.length === 0" class="pa-4">
            <v-skeleton-loader v-for="i in 3" :key="i" type="list-item-three-line" class="mb-2" />
          </div>

          <v-list v-else lines="two" density="comfortable" class="pa-2">
            <v-list-item
              v-for="record in records"
              :key="record.requestId"
              :active="record.requestId === selectedRequestId"
              rounded="lg"
              class="mb-1"
              @click="emit('select', record.requestId)"
            >
              <template #prepend>
                <div class="status-indicator-wrapper">
                  <v-avatar
                    :color="statusColor(record.status)"
                    variant="tonal"
                    size="36"
                    :class="{ 'pulse-active': isStatusActive(record.status) }"
                  >
                    <v-icon :icon="statusIcon(record.status)" size="18" />
                  </v-avatar>
                </div>
              </template>

              <template #title>
                <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
                  <span class="text-body-2 font-weight-bold">{{ record.endpoint.split('/').pop() }}</span>
                  <v-chip size="x-small" variant="tonal" :color="statusColor(record.status)">{{ record.status }}</v-chip>
                </div>
              </template>

              <template #subtitle>
                <div class="d-flex flex-column">
                  <span class="text-caption text-truncate">{{ record.servedModel || record.requestedModel || '-' }}</span>
                  <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2 mt-1">
                    <span class="text-caption opacity-70">{{ formatDate(record.acceptedAt) }}</span>
                    <span v-if="record.totalTokens" class="text-caption opacity-70">· {{ record.totalTokens }} tokens</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </template>
            </v-list-item>
          </v-list>

          <div v-if="!loading && records.length === 0" class="pa-10 text-center">
            <v-empty-state
              icon="mdi-text-search-variant"
              :title="t('playground.logs.empty')"
              size="small"
            />
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Detail Section -->
        <div class="playground-logs-drawer__detail">
          <v-divider />
          <div v-if="detailLoading" class="pa-6">
            <v-skeleton-loader type="article, list-item-three-line@2" />
          </div>
          <div v-else-if="detail" class="h-100">
            <LogTerminal :detail="detail" />
          </div>
          <div v-else class="pa-10 text-center d-flex flex-column align-center justify-center h-100 opacity-60">
            <v-icon icon="mdi-arrow-up-bold-outline" size="32" class="mb-3" color="primary" />
            <div class="text-body-2">{{ t('playground.logs.detail_empty') }}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </template>

    <!-- Collapsed State (Rail) -->
    <template v-else>
      <div class="d-flex flex-column align-center pt-5 ga-4">
        <v-btn icon="mdi-arrow-left-circle-outline" variant="text" color="primary" @click="emit('toggle-collapse')" />
        <v-divider class="w-75" />
        <v-badge
          :content="records.length > 0 ? records.length : undefined"
          color="primary"
          offset-x="4"
          offset-y="4"
        >
          <v-avatar color="primary" variant="tonal" size="44" rounded="lg">
            <v-icon icon="mdi-history" size="24" />
          </v-avatar>
        </v-badge>
      </div>
    </template>
  </v-navigation-drawer>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { useDisplay } from 'vuetify'
import LogTerminal from './LogTerminal.vue'
import type { OperationAuditDetail, OperationAuditListItem } from '~/domains/audit/audit'

defineProps<{
  open: boolean
  collapsed: boolean
  subtitle: string
  records: OperationAuditListItem[]
  selectedRequestId?: string | null
  detail: OperationAuditDetail | null
  loading?: boolean
  detailLoading?: boolean
  error?: string
}>()

const emit = defineEmits<{
  close: []
  select: [string]
  'toggle-collapse': []
}>()

const { t, d, locale } = useI18n()
const { mobile } = useDisplay()

function statusColor(status: string) {
  const normalized = status.toUpperCase()
  if (normalized === 'COMPLETED') return 'success'
  if (normalized === 'LEASED' || normalized === 'STREAMING' || normalized === 'QUEUED') return 'info'
  if (normalized === 'REFUNDED') return 'warning'
  if (normalized === 'FAILED' || normalized === 'REJECTED') return 'error'
  return 'grey'
}

function statusIcon(status: string) {
  const normalized = status.toUpperCase()
  if (normalized === 'COMPLETED') return 'mdi-check'
  if (normalized === 'STREAMING') return 'mdi-pulse'
  if (normalized === 'QUEUED') return 'mdi-clock-outline'
  if (normalized === 'LEASED') return 'mdi-link-variant'
  if (normalized === 'FAILED' || normalized === 'REJECTED') return 'mdi-alert-circle-outline'
  return 'mdi-help-circle-outline'
}

function isStatusActive(status: string) {
  const normalized = status.toUpperCase()
  return ['QUEUED', 'LEASED', 'STREAMING'].includes(normalized)
}

function formatDate(raw: string) {
  if (!raw) return '-'
  const parsed = new Date(raw)
  return Number.isNaN(parsed.getTime()) ? raw : d(parsed, 'short', locale.value)
}
</script>

<style scoped>
.playground-logs-drawer {
  border-left: 1px solid rgba(var(--v-border-color), var(--v-border-opacity));
  z-index: 2000 !important;
}

.playground-logs-drawer__content {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  height: calc(100vh - 84px);
}

.playground-logs-drawer__list {
  flex: 0 0 45%;
  overflow-y: auto;
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-surface), 0.5);
}

.playground-logs-drawer__detail {
  flex: 1;
  overflow-y: auto;
  min-height: 0;
}

.lh-tight {
  line-height: 1.2;
}

.status-indicator-wrapper {
  position: relative;
}

.pulse-active {
  animation: pulse 2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.6, 1) infinite;
}

@keyframes pulse {
  0%, 100% {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: scale(1);
  }
  50% {
    opacity: 0.7;
    transform: scale(0.95);
  }
}

:deep(.v-list-item--active) {
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.1) !important;
  color: rgb(var(--v-theme-primary)) !important;
}
</style>

```
### File: components/capacity-tester/PlaygroundModerationsTab.vue
```
<template>
  <v-row>
    <v-col cols="12" xl="4">
      <v-card variant="outlined" rounded="lg">
        <v-card-text class="d-flex flex-column ga-4">
          <v-textarea
            v-model="input"
            :label="t('playground.fields.moderation_input')"
            rows="8"
            auto-grow
            variant="outlined"
            prepend-inner-icon="mdi-shield-outline"
            hide-details
          />
        </v-card-text>
        <v-card-actions class="px-4 pb-4">
          <v-btn color="primary" :loading="loading" prepend-icon="mdi-play" @click="run">
            {{ t('playground.actions.run_moderation') }}
          </v-btn>
        </v-card-actions>
      </v-card>
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12" xl="8">
      <v-card variant="outlined" rounded="lg">
        <v-card-text class="d-flex flex-column ga-4">
          <div class="d-flex align-center justify-space-between ga-2">
            <div>
              <div class="text-subtitle-2">{{ t('playground.results.moderation_summary') }}</div>
              <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ t('playground.hints.moderation_output') }}</div>
            </div>
            <v-chip
              v-if="result"
              :color="result.flagged ? 'error' : 'success'"
              :variant="result.flagged ? 'flat' : 'tonal'"
              size="small"
            >
              {{ result.flagged ? t('playground.labels.flagged') : t('playground.labels.allowed') }}
            </v-chip>
          </div>

          <v-alert
            v-if="error"
            type="error"
            variant="tonal"
            closable
            @click:close="error = ''"
          >
            {{ error }}
          </v-alert>

          <div v-if="scoreEntries.length" class="d-flex flex-column ga-4">
            <div v-for="score in scoreEntries" :key="score.key">
              <div class="d-flex align-center justify-space-between mb-1 ga-2">
                <span class="text-body-2">{{ score.key }}</span>
                <span class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ score.value.toFixed(3) }}</span>
              </div>
              <v-progress-linear
                :model-value="score.value * 100"
                :color="score.value >= 0.6 ? 'error' : score.value >= 0.25 ? 'warning' : 'success'"
                rounded
                height="10"
              />
            </div>
          </div>

          <div
            v-else
            class="d-flex flex-column align-center justify-center py-10 text-center text-medium-emphasis"
          >
            <v-icon icon="mdi-shield-search-outline" size="52" class="mb-3 opacity-50" />
            <span>{{ t('playground.hints.no_result') }}</span>
          </div>

          <PlaygroundRawResponse v-if="response" :payload="response" :title="t('playground.labels.raw_response')" />
        </v-card-text>
      </v-card>
    </v-col>
  </v-row>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import PlaygroundRawResponse from '~/components/capacity-tester/PlaygroundRawResponse.vue'

const props = defineProps<{
  apiKey: string
  model: string
}>()

const { t } = useI18n()
const playground = usePlayground()

const input = ref('')
const loading = ref(false)
const error = ref('')
const response = ref<unknown>(null)

const result = computed(() => (response.value as { results?: Array<{ flagged?: boolean, category_scores?: Record<string, number> }> } | null)?.results?.[0] || null)
const scoreEntries = computed(() => {
  const scores = result.value?.category_scores || {}
  return Object.entries(scores)
    .map(([key, value]) => ({ key, value }))
    .sort((left, right) => right.value - left.value)
})

async function run() {
  error.value = ''
  if (!props.apiKey || !props.model) {
    error.value = t('playground.errors.configuration_required')
    return
  }

  if (!input.value.trim()) {
    error.value = t('playground.errors.empty_prompt')
    return
  }

  loading.value = true
  try {
    response.value = await playground.runModerationsRaw({
      apiKey: props.apiKey,
      payload: {
        model: props.model,
        input: input.value.trim()
      }
    })
  } catch (runError) {
    error.value = mapError(runError)
  } finally {
    loading.value = false
  }
}

function mapError(runError: unknown): string {
  const statusMessage = String((runError as { statusMessage?: string, data?: { statusMessage?: string } })?.statusMessage
    || (runError as { data?: { statusMessage?: string } })?.data?.statusMessage
    || '')
  if (statusMessage) {
    const key = `playground.errors.${statusMessage}`
    const translated = t(key)
    if (translated !== key) {
      return translated
    }
  }

  return runError instanceof Error ? runError.message : t('errors.unknown_error')
}
</script>


<template>
  <v-expansion-panels variant="accordion" elevation="0">
    <v-expansion-panel elevation="0">
      <v-expansion-panel-title>
        <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
          <v-icon icon="mdi-code-json" size="18" />
          <span class="text-body-2">{{ title }}</span>
        </div>
      </v-expansion-panel-title>
      <v-expansion-panel-text>
        <pre class="playground-console pa-3 rounded-lg">{{ formattedPayload }}</pre>
      </v-expansion-panel-text>
    </v-expansion-panel>
  </v-expansion-panels>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
const props = withDefaults(defineProps<{
  payload: unknown
  title?: string
}>(), {
  title: 'Raw response'
})

const formattedPayload = computed(() => {
  if (typeof props.payload === 'string') {
    return props.payload
  }

  return JSON.stringify(props.payload, null, 2)
})
</script>

<style scoped>
.playground-console {
  white-space: pre-wrap;
  word-break: break-word;
  margin: 0;
  font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace;
  font-size: 13px;

              :min="0.25"

          </div>

              <v-btn :href="response.dataUrl" download="playground-speech" variant="text" prepend-icon="mdi-download">
                {{ t('playground.actions.download_audio') }}
              </v-btn>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div
            v-else
            class="d-flex flex-column align-center justify-center py-10 text-center text-medium-emphasis"

        </v-card-text>
      </v-card>

  </v-row>

<script setup lang="ts">
import PlaygroundRawResponse from '~/components/capacity-tester/PlaygroundRawResponse.vue'

const props = defineProps<{
  apiKey: string
  model: string
}>()

const { t } = useI18n()
const playground = usePlayground()

const input = ref('')
const voice = ref('alloy')
const format = ref('mp3')
const speed = ref(1)
const loading = ref(false)
const error = ref('')
const response = ref<{ dataUrl: string, contentType: string } | null>(null)

const voiceOptions = ['alloy', 'ash', 'ballad', 'coral', 'echo', 'fable', 'onyx', 'nova', 'sage', 'shimmer']
const formatOptions = ['mp3', 'opus', 'wav', 'flac', 'pcm']

async function run() {
  error.value = ''
  if (!props.apiKey || !props.model) {
    error.value = t('playground.errors.configuration_required')
    return
  }

  if (!input.value.trim()) {
    error.value = t('playground.errors.empty_prompt')
    return
  }

  loading.value = true
  try {
    response.value = await playground.runAudioSpeechRaw({
      apiKey: props.apiKey,
      payload: {
        model: props.model,
        input: input.value.trim(),
        voice: voice.value,
        response_format: format.value,
        speed: speed.value
      }
    })
  } catch (runError) {
    error.value = mapError(runError)
  } finally {
    loading.value = false
  }
}

function mapError(runError: unknown): string {
  const statusMessage = String((runError as { statusMessage?: string, data?: { statusMessage?: string } })?.statusMessage
    || (runError as { data?: { statusMessage?: string } })?.data?.statusMessage
    || '')
  if (statusMessage) {
    const key = `playground.errors.${statusMessage}`
    const translated = t(key)
    if (translated !== key) {
      return translated
    }
  }

  return runError instanceof Error ? runError.message : t('errors.unknown_error')
}
</script>

```
### File: components/capacity-tester/PlaygroundTabHost.vue
```
<template>
  <component :is="component" v-bind="componentProps" />
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import PlaygroundCompletionsTab from '~/components/capacity-tester/PlaygroundCompletionsTab.vue'
import PlaygroundFilesTab from '~/components/capacity-tester/PlaygroundFilesTab.vue'
import PlaygroundImagesTab from '~/components/capacity-tester/PlaygroundImagesTab.vue'
import PlaygroundModerationsTab from '~/components/capacity-tester/PlaygroundModerationsTab.vue'
import PlaygroundSpeechTab from '~/components/capacity-tester/PlaygroundSpeechTab.vue'
import PlaygroundTranscriptionsTab from '~/components/capacity-tester/PlaygroundTranscriptionsTab.vue'

const props = defineProps<{
  tab: 'completions' | 'images' | 'speech' | 'transcriptions' | 'moderations' | 'files'
  apiKey: string
  model: string
  temperature: number
  maxTokens: number
}>()

const component = computed(() => {
  if (props.tab === 'completions') return PlaygroundCompletionsTab
  if (props.tab === 'images') return PlaygroundImagesTab
  if (props.tab === 'speech') return PlaygroundSpeechTab
  if (props.tab === 'transcriptions') return PlaygroundTranscriptionsTab
  if (props.tab === 'moderations') return PlaygroundModerationsTab
  return PlaygroundFilesTab
})

const componentProps = computed(() => {
  if (props.tab === 'completions') {
    return {
      apiKey: props.apiKey,
      model: props.model,
      temperature: props.temperature,
      maxTokens: props.maxTokens
    }
  }

  if (props.tab === 'files') {
    return {
      apiKey: props.apiKey
    }
  }

  return {
    apiKey: props.apiKey,
    model: props.model
  }
})
</script>

```

### File: components/capacity-tester/PlaygroundTranscriptionsTab.vue
```
<template>
  <v-row>
    <v-col cols="12" xl="4">
      <v-card variant="outlined" rounded="lg">
        <v-card-text class="d-flex flex-column ga-4">
          <v-file-input
            v-model="selectedFile"
            :label="t('playground.fields.audio_file')"
            accept="audio/*"
            prepend-icon="mdi-file-music-outline"
            show-size
            variant="outlined"
            hide-details
          />

          <v-sheet border rounded="lg" class="pa-3">
            <div class="d-flex align-center justify-space-between ga-2 mb-2">
              <div>
                <div class="text-body-2 font-weight-medium">{{ t('playground.fields.microphone_capture') }}</div>
                <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ t('playground.hints.microphone_capture') }}</div>
              </div>
              <v-chip
                :color="recording ? 'error' : 'default'"
                :variant="recording ? 'flat' : 'tonal'"
                size="small"
              >
                {{ recording ? t('playground.labels.recording') : t('playground.labels.ready') }}
              </v-chip>
            </div>

            <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-2">
              <v-btn
                color="primary"
                variant="tonal"
                :disabled="!supportsRecording || recording"
                prepend-icon="mdi-record-rec"
                @click="startRecording"
              >
                {{ t('playground.actions.start_recording') }}
              </v-btn>
              <v-btn
                color="error"
                variant="tonal"
                :disabled="!recording"
                prepend-icon="mdi-stop"
                @click="stopRecording"
              >
                {{ t('playground.actions.stop_recording') }}
              </v-btn>
              <v-btn
                variant="text"
                :disabled="!recordedPreviewUrl && !selectedFile"
                prepend-icon="mdi-close"
                @click="clearAudio"
              >
                {{ t('playground.actions.clear_audio') }}
              </v-btn>
            </div>

            <audio v-if="recordedPreviewUrl" :src="recordedPreviewUrl" controls class="w-100 mt-3" />
          </v-sheet>

          <v-text-field
            v-model="language"
            :label="t('playground.fields.language')"
            variant="outlined"
            prepend-inner-icon="mdi-translate"
            hide-details
          />

          <v-text-field
            v-model="prompt"
            :label="t('playground.fields.transcription_prompt')"
            variant="outlined"
            prepend-inner-icon="mdi-message-text-outline"
            hide-details
          />

          <v-select
            v-model="responseFormat"
            :label="t('playground.fields.response_format')"
            :items="responseFormatOptions"
            variant="outlined"
            prepend-inner-icon="mdi-code-braces"
            hide-details
          />
        </v-card-text>
        <v-card-actions class="px-4 pb-4">
          <v-btn color="primary" :loading="loading" prepend-icon="mdi-play" @click="run">
            {{ t('playground.actions.run_transcription') }}
          </v-btn>
        </v-card-actions>
      </v-card>
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12" xl="8">
      <v-card variant="outlined" rounded="lg">
        <v-card-text class="d-flex flex-column ga-4">
          <div>
            <div class="text-subtitle-2">{{ t('playground.results.transcript') }}</div>
            <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ t('playground.hints.transcription_output') }}</div>
          </div>

          <v-alert
            v-if="error"
            type="error"
            variant="tonal"
            closable
            @click:close="error = ''"
          >
            {{ error }}
          </v-alert>

          <div
            v-if="transcript"
            class="rounded-lg bg-surface-variant pa-4 text-body-2"
          >
            {{ transcript }}
          </div>

          <div
            v-else
            class="d-flex flex-column align-center justify-center py-10 text-center text-medium-emphasis"
          >
            <v-icon icon="mdi-text-recognition" size="52" class="mb-3 opacity-50" />
            <span>{{ t('playground.hints.no_result') }}</span>
          </div>

          <PlaygroundRawResponse v-if="response" :payload="response" :title="t('playground.labels.raw_response')" />
        </v-card-text>
      </v-card>
    </v-col>
  </v-row>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import PlaygroundRawResponse from '~/components/capacity-tester/PlaygroundRawResponse.vue'

const props = defineProps<{
  apiKey: string
  model: string
}>()

const { t } = useI18n()
const playground = usePlayground()

const selectedFile = ref<File | null>(null)
const language = ref('')
const prompt = ref('')
const responseFormat = ref('json')
const loading = ref(false)
const error = ref('')
const response = ref<unknown>(null)
const recording = ref(false)
const recordedPreviewUrl = ref('')
const recorder = ref<MediaRecorder | null>(null)
const recorderStream = ref<MediaStream | null>(null)
const recordedChunks = ref<Blob[]>([])

const responseFormatOptions = ['json', 'verbose_json', 'text']
const supportsRecording = computed(() => import.meta.client && !!window.MediaRecorder && !!navigator.mediaDevices?.getUserMedia)
const transcript = computed(() => {
  if (typeof response.value === 'string') {
    return response.value
  }

  return String((response.value as { text?: string } | null)?.text || '')
})

onBeforeUnmount(() => {
  cleanupRecorder()
  revokePreviewUrl()
})

async function startRecording() {
  error.value = ''
  if (!supportsRecording.value) {
    error.value = t('playground.errors.microphone_unavailable')
    return
  }

  try {
    const stream = await navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ audio: true })
    const mimeType = MediaRecorder.isTypeSupported('audio/webm') ? 'audio/webm' : ''
    const mediaRecorder = new MediaRecorder(stream, mimeType ? { mimeType } : undefined)
    recorderStream.value = stream
    recordedChunks.value = []
    mediaRecorder.ondataavailable = (event) => {
      if (event.data.size > 0) {
        recordedChunks.value.push(event.data)
      }
    }
    mediaRecorder.onstop = () => {
      const blob = new Blob(recordedChunks.value, { type: mediaRecorder.mimeType || 'audio/webm' })
      selectedFile.value = new File([blob], `playground-recording.${blob.type.includes('ogg') ? 'ogg' : 'webm'}`, { type: blob.type })
      revokePreviewUrl()
      recordedPreviewUrl.value = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
      cleanupRecorder()
      recording.value = false
    }
    recorder.value = mediaRecorder
    mediaRecorder.start()
    recording.value = true
  } catch (recordError) {
    cleanupRecorder()
    error.value = mapError(recordError)
  }
}

function stopRecording() {
  recorder.value?.stop()
}

function clearAudio() {
  selectedFile.value = null
  revokePreviewUrl()
  response.value = null
}

async function run() {
  error.value = ''
  if (!props.apiKey || !props.model) {
    error.value = t('playground.errors.configuration_required')
    return
  }

  if (!selectedFile.value) {
    error.value = t('playground.errors.audio_file_required')
    return
  }

  const formData = new FormData()
  formData.append('apiKey', props.apiKey)
  formData.append('model', props.model)
  formData.append('file', selectedFile.value)
  if (language.value.trim()) {
    formData.append('language', language.value.trim())
  }
  if (prompt.value.trim()) {
    formData.append('prompt', prompt.value.trim())
  }
  formData.append('response_format', responseFormat.value)

  loading.value = true
  try {
    response.value = await playground.runAudioTranscriptionsRaw({
      apiKey: props.apiKey,
      formData
    })
  } catch (runError) {
    error.value = mapError(runError)
  } finally {
    loading.value = false
  }
}

function revokePreviewUrl() {
  if (recordedPreviewUrl.value) {
    URL.revokeObjectURL(recordedPreviewUrl.value)
    recordedPreviewUrl.value = ''
  }
}

function cleanupRecorder() {
  recorder.value = null
  if (recorderStream.value) {
    recorderStream.value.getTracks().forEach(track => track.stop())
    recorderStream.value = null
  }
}

function mapError(runError: unknown): string {
  const statusMessage = String((runError as { statusMessage?: string, data?: { statusMessage?: string } })?.statusMessage
    || (runError as { data?: { statusMessage?: string } })?.data?.statusMessage
    || '')
  if (statusMessage) {
    const key = `playground.errors.${statusMessage}`
    const translated = t(key)
    if (translated !== key) {
      return translated
    }
  }

  return runError instanceof Error ? runError.message : t('errors.unknown_error')
}
</script>

```

### File: components/content/InfContentExplorer.vue
```
<script setup lang="ts">
import type { ContentCatalogItem, ContentScope } from '~/composables/useContentCatalog'

const props = withDefaults(
  defineProps<{
    sectionPrefix?: string
    scope?: ContentScope
    mode?: 'default' | 'slug'
    showLocaleSelector?: boolean
  }>(),
  {
    sectionPrefix: '',
    scope: 'public',
    mode: 'default',
    showLocaleSelector: false
  }
)

const { t, locale, locales } = useI18n()
const switchLocalePath = useSwitchLocalePath()
const { items, pending } = useContentCatalog()
const selectedPath = ref<string | null>(null)
const query = ref('')
const selectedTags = ref<string[]>([])
const isSidebarOpen = ref(true)
const isMobileDrawerOpen = ref(false)

const baseFilteredItems = computed(() => {
  const prefix = props.sectionPrefix

  return (items.value || []).filter((item: ContentCatalogItem) => {
    if (prefix && !item.slug.startsWith(prefix)) {
      return false
    }

    if (props.scope === 'public' && item.scope !== 'public') {
      return false
    }

    if (props.scope === 'admin' && item.scope !== 'admin') {
      return false
    }

    return true
  })
})

const visibleItems = computed(() => {
  if (selectedTags.value.length === 0) {
    return baseFilteredItems.value
  }

  return baseFilteredItems.value.filter((item) => selectedTags.value.every((tag) => item.tags.includes(tag)))
})

const tagCounts = computed(() => {
  const counts = new Map<string, number>()

  for (const item of baseFilteredItems.value) {
    for (const tag of item.tags) {
      counts.set(tag, (counts.get(tag) || 0) + 1)
    }
  }

  return counts
})

const allTags = computed(() => [...tagCounts.value.keys()].sort((left, right) => left.localeCompare(right)))

const toggleTag = (tag: string) => {
  if (selectedTags.value.includes(tag)) {
    selectedTags.value = selectedTags.value.filter((currentTag) => currentTag !== tag)
    return
  }

  selectedTags.value = [...selectedTags.value, tag]
}

const formatCount = (count: number) => new Intl.NumberFormat(locale.value).format(count)

const localeItems = computed(() =>
  locales.value
    .map((localeEntry) => {
      const localeItem = localeEntry as { code: string, name?: string }

      return {
        code: localeItem.code,
        label: localeItem.name || localeItem.code.toUpperCase()
      }
    })
    .filter((item) => ['fr', 'en'].includes(item.code))
)

const toggleSidebar = () => {
  if (!isSidebarOpen.value) {
    isSidebarOpen.value = true
    return
  }

  isSidebarOpen.value = false
}

const onLocaleChange = (nextLocale: string) => {
  if (nextLocale === locale.value) {
    return
  }

  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
  const targetPath = switchLocalePath(nextLocale as any)
  if (targetPath) {
    navigateTo(targetPath)
  }
}
</script>

<template>
  <v-card class="mb-6" variant="outlined">
    <v-card-title class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
      <v-icon icon="mdi-book-open-page-variant-outline" />
      <span>{{ t('content.explorer.title') }}</span>
      <v-spacer />
      <v-select
        v-if="showLocaleSelector"
        :model-value="locale"
        :items="localeItems"
        item-title="label"
        item-value="code"
        density="compact"
        variant="outlined"
        hide-details
        prepend-inner-icon="mdi-translate"
        class="inf-locale-select"
        @update:model-value="onLocaleChange"
      />
      <v-btn
        v-if="mode === 'slug'"
        variant="text"
        size="small"
        prepend-icon="mdi-dock-left"
        @click="toggleSidebar"
      >
        {{ isSidebarOpen ? t('content.explorer.collapse') : t('content.explorer.expand') }}
      </v-btn>
    </v-card-title>
    <v-card-text>
      <v-skeleton-loader v-if="pending" type="list-item-two-line, table" />

      <template v-else>
        <div class="mb-4 d-flex ga-2 flex-wrap">
          <v-chip
            v-for="tag in allTags"
            :key="tag"
            size="small"
            :color="selectedTags.includes(tag) ? 'primary' : undefined"
            :variant="selectedTags.includes(tag) ? 'flat' : 'tonal'"
            prepend-icon="mdi-tag-outline"
            @click="toggleTag(tag)"
          >
            {{ tag }} ({{ formatCount(tagCounts.get(tag) || 0) }})
          </v-chip>
        </div>

        <div v-if="mode === 'slug'" class="slug-layout">
          <v-btn
            class="d-md-none mb-3"
            variant="tonal"
            prepend-icon="mdi-menu"
            @click="isMobileDrawerOpen = true"
          >
            {{ t('content.explorer.navigation') }}
          </v-btn>

          <v-expand-x-transition>
            <div v-if="isSidebarOpen" class="slug-layout__sidebar d-none d-md-block">
              <InfContentTree v-model:selected="selectedPath" :items="visibleItems" />
            </div>
          </v-expand-x-transition>

          <v-navigation-drawer
            v-model="isMobileDrawerOpen"
            location="left"
            temporary
            class="d-md-none"
          >
            <div class="pa-2">
              <InfContentTree v-model:selected="selectedPath" :items="visibleItems" />
            </div>
          </v-navigation-drawer>
        </div>

        <v-row v-else>
          <v-col cols="12" md="4">
            <InfContentTree v-model:selected="selectedPath" :items="visibleItems" />
          </v-col>
          <v-col cols="12" md="8">
            <InfContentSearchTable v-model:query="query" :items="visibleItems" />
          </v-col>
        </v-row>
      </template>
    </v-card-text>
  </v-card>
</template>

<style scoped>
.inf-locale-select {
  max-width: 190px;
}

.slug-layout {
  position: relative;
}

.slug-layout__sidebar {
  max-width: 420px;
}
</style>

```
### File: components/content/InfContentSearchTable.vue
```
<script setup lang="ts">
import type { ContentCatalogItem } from '~/composables/useContentCatalog'

const props = defineProps<{
  items: ContentCatalogItem[]
}>()

const { t } = useI18n()
const query = defineModel<string>('query', { default: '' })

const headers = computed(() => [
  { title: t('content.explorer.headers.title'), key: 'title' },
  { title: t('content.explorer.headers.path'), key: 'slug' },
  { title: t('content.explorer.headers.tags'), key: 'tags' }
])

const scoreMatch = (item: ContentCatalogItem, needle: string) => {
  if (!needle) {
    return 0
  }

  const title = item.title.toLowerCase()
  const description = `${item.description} ${item.content}`.toLowerCase()
  const tagText = item.tags.join(' ').toLowerCase()

  let score = 0

  if (title.includes(needle)) {
    score += 100
  }

  if (description.includes(needle)) {
    score += 40
  }

  if (tagText.includes(needle)) {
    score += 20
  }

  return score
}

const rankedItems = computed(() => {
  const needle = query.value.trim().toLowerCase()

  return [...props.items]
    .map((item) => ({ item, score: scoreMatch(item, needle) }))
    .filter(({ score }) => (needle ? score > 0 : true))
    .sort((left, right) => right.score - left.score || left.item.slug.localeCompare(right.item.slug))
    .map(({ item }) => item)
})
</script>

<template>
  <v-card variant="outlined">
    <v-card-title class="d-flex align-center ga-3">
      <v-icon icon="mdi-table-search" />
      <span>{{ t('content.explorer.index') }}</span>
      <v-spacer />
      <v-text-field
        v-model="query"
        hide-details
        density="compact"
        clearable
        prepend-inner-icon="mdi-magnify"
        style="max-width: 320px"
        :placeholder="t('content.explorer.search_placeholder')"
      />
    </v-card-title>
    <v-data-table :headers="headers" :items="rankedItems" :items-per-page="8" density="comfortable">
      <template #[`item.title`]="{ item }">
        <NuxtLink :to="item.path">{{ item.title }}</NuxtLink>
      </template>
      <template #[`item.slug`]="{ item }">
        <code>/{{ item.slug }}</code>
      </template>
      <template #[`item.tags`]="{ item }">
        <div class="d-flex ga-1 flex-wrap">
          <v-chip v-for="tag in item.tags" :key="tag" size="x-small" variant="tonal">{{ tag }}</v-chip>
        </div>
      </template>
    </v-data-table>
  </v-card>
</template>

```

### File: components/docs/RagChatPanel.vue
```
<template>
  <v-card variant="outlined" class="mb-4">
    <v-card-title>{{ t('docs.rag.title') }}</v-card-title>
    <v-card-text>
      <v-textarea v-model="question" :label="t('docs.rag.ask_label')" rows="3" />
      <div class="d-flex ga-2 mb-3">
        <v-btn :loading="loading" color="primary" @click="ask">{{ t('docs.rag.ask_btn') }}</v-btn>
        <v-btn :loading="loading" variant="tonal" @click="askStream">{{ t('docs.rag.ask_stream_btn') }}</v-btn>
      </div>
      <v-alert v-if="error" type="error" variant="tonal" class="mb-3">{{ error }}</v-alert>
      <v-sheet min-height="80" class="pa-3 rounded border">
        <div class="text-body-2" style="white-space: pre-wrap">{{ answer }}</div>
      </v-sheet>
    </v-card-text>
  </v-card>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
const { t } = useI18n()
const props = withDefaults(defineProps<{ endpointBase?: string }>(), { endpointBase: '/api/v1/admin/docs-rag' })
const question = ref('')
const answer = ref('')
const error = ref('')
const loading = ref(false)

const ask = async () => {
  loading.value = true
  error.value = ''
  try {
    const res = await $fetch<{ answerMarkdown: string }>(`${props.endpointBase}/ask`, {
      method: 'POST',
      body: { question: question.value, audience: ['backend'] }
    })
    answer.value = res.answerMarkdown || ''
  } catch (e: unknown) {
    const err = e as { data?: { detail?: string }, message?: string }
    error.value = err?.data?.detail || err?.message || t('docs.rag.request_failed')
  } finally {
    loading.value = false
  }
}

const askStream = async () => {
  loading.value = true
  error.value = ''
  answer.value = ''
  try {
    const response = await fetch(`${props.endpointBase}/ask/stream`, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
      credentials: 'include',
      body: JSON.stringify({ question: question.value, audience: ['backend'] })
    })
    const reader = response.body?.getReader()
    if (!reader) throw new Error('No stream body available')
    const decoder = new TextDecoder()
    while (true) {
      const { done, value } = await reader.read()
      if (done) break
      answer.value += decoder.decode(value)
    }
  } catch (e: unknown) {
    error.value = (e as Error)?.message || t('docs.rag.stream_failed')
  } finally {
    loading.value = false
  }
}
</script>


const props = defineProps<{

```
### File: components/infra/InfForm.vue
```
<template>
  <v-form @submit.prevent="submit">
    <v-row>
      <v-col v-for="field in schema.fields" :key="field.key" cols="12" md="6">
        <v-switch
          v-if="field.component === 'switch'"
          :model-value="Boolean(localModel[field.key])"
          :label="t(field.label)"
          color="primary"
          @update:model-value="updateValue(field.key, $event)"
        />

        <v-text-field
          v-else-if="field.component === 'number'"
          :model-value="localModel[field.key]"
          :label="t(field.label)"
          color="primary"
          type="number"
          :error-messages="errors[field.key]"
          @update:model-value="updateValue(field.key, Number($event))"
        />

        <v-textarea
          v-else-if="field.component === 'json'"
          :model-value="stringifyValue(localModel[field.key])"
          :label="t(field.label)"
          auto-grow
          color="primary"
          :error-messages="errors[field.key]"
          @update:model-value="updateJson(field.key, $event)"
        />

        <v-text-field
          v-else
          :model-value="localModel[field.key]"
          :label="t(field.label)"
          color="primary"
          :error-messages="errors[field.key]"
          @update:model-value="updateValue(field.key, $event)"
        />
      </v-col>
    </v-row>

    <v-btn color="primary" type="submit" variant="flat">
      {{ t(submitLabel) }}
    </v-btn>
  </v-form>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import type { ZodSchema } from 'zod'
import type { UiSchemaEntity } from '~/ui-schema/health.gen'

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<{
  schema: UiSchemaEntity
  modelValue: Record<string, unknown>
  submitLabel?: string
  validator?: ZodSchema
}>(), {
  submitLabel: 'common.submit',
  validator: undefined
})

const emit = defineEmits<{
  'update:modelValue': [Record<string, unknown>]
  submit: [Record<string, unknown>]
}>()

const { t } = useI18n()

const localModel = ref<Record<string, unknown>>({ ...props.modelValue })
const errors = ref<Record<string, string[]>>({})

watch(
  () => props.modelValue,
  (value) => {
    localModel.value = { ...value }
  }
)

function updateValue(key: string, value: unknown) {
  localModel.value = {
    ...localModel.value,
    [key]: value
  }
  emit('update:modelValue', localModel.value)
}

function updateJson(key: string, value: string) {
  try {
    updateValue(key, value ? JSON.parse(value) : {})
    errors.value[key] = []
  } catch {
    errors.value[key] = [t('errors.validation_error')]
  }
}

function stringifyValue(value: unknown) {
  if (!value) {
    return ''
  }

  return JSON.stringify(value, null, 2)
}

function submit() {
  if (props.validator) {
    const validationResult = props.validator.safeParse(localModel.value)
    if (!validationResult.success) {
      const fieldErrors = validationResult.error.flatten().fieldErrors
      errors.value = Object.fromEntries(
        Object.entries(fieldErrors).map(([key, val]) => [key, ((val as string[] | undefined) ?? []).map((item) => item || '')])
      )
      return
    }
  }

  emit('submit', localModel.value)
}
</script>

```

### File: components/infra/InfGoogleMap.vue
```
<template>
  <div>
    <v-alert v-if="!hasApiKey" type="warning" variant="tonal" density="comfortable">
      {{ t('nodes.map.missing_api_key') }}
    </v-alert>
    <v-alert v-else-if="loadError" type="warning" variant="tonal" density="comfortable">
      {{ t('nodes.map.load_error') }}
    </v-alert>
    <div ref="mapEl" class="inf-google-map" />
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
declare global {
  interface Window {
    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
    google?: any
  }
}

type MapMarker = {
  id: string
  lat: number
  lng: number
  label: string
}

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<{
  markers: MapMarker[]
  zoom?: number
}>(), {
  zoom: 2
})

const emit = defineEmits<{
  select: [string]
}>()

const { t } = useI18n()
const runtimeConfig = useRuntimeConfig()

const hasApiKey = computed(() => Boolean(runtimeConfig.public.googleMapsApiKey))
const mapEl = ref<HTMLElement | null>(null)
const loadError = ref(false)
// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
let map: any = null
// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
let markerPool: any[] = []

const loaderState = useState<Promise<void> | null>('google-maps-loader', () => null)

function loadGoogleMapsScript() {
  if (!import.meta.client || !hasApiKey.value) {
    return Promise.resolve()
  }
  if (window.google?.maps) {
    return Promise.resolve()
  }
  if (loaderState.value) {
    return loaderState.value
  }

  loaderState.value = new Promise<void>((resolve, reject) => {
    const script = document.createElement('script')
    script.src = `https://maps.googleapis.com/maps/api/js?key=${encodeURIComponent(runtimeConfig.public.googleMapsApiKey)}`
    script.async = true
    script.defer = true
    script.onload = () => resolve()
    script.onerror = () => reject(new Error('google_maps_load_failed'))
    document.head.appendChild(script)
  })
  return loaderState.value
}

function fitToMarkers() {
  if (!map || props.markers.length === 0 || !window.google?.maps) {
    return
  }
  const bounds = new window.google.maps.LatLngBounds()
  props.markers.forEach((marker) => {
    bounds.extend({ lat: marker.lat, lng: marker.lng })
  })
  map.fitBounds(bounds)
}

function clearMarkers() {
  markerPool.forEach((marker) => marker.setMap(null))
  markerPool = []
}

function renderMarkers() {
  if (!map || !window.google?.maps) {
    return
  }
  clearMarkers()
  markerPool = props.markers.map((entry) => {
    const marker = new window.google.maps.Marker({
      map,
      position: { lat: entry.lat, lng: entry.lng },
      title: entry.label
    })
    marker.addListener('click', () => emit('select', entry.id))
    return marker
  })
  fitToMarkers()
}

onMounted(async () => {
  if (!import.meta.client || !mapEl.value || !hasApiKey.value) {
    return
  }
  try {
    await loadGoogleMapsScript()
    map = new window.google.maps.Map(mapEl.value, {
      center: { lat: 20, lng: 0 },
      zoom: props.zoom
    })
    renderMarkers()
  } catch {
    loadError.value = true
  }
})

watch(() => props.markers, () => {
  renderMarkers()
}, { deep: true })

onBeforeUnmount(() => {
  clearMarkers()
})
</script>

<style scoped>
.inf-google-map {
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 360px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  overflow: hidden;
}
</style>

```

### File: components/infra/InfLanguageToggle.vue
```
<template>
  <v-menu location="bottom end">
    <template #activator="{ props }">
      <v-btn
        v-bind="props"
        :aria-label="t('nav.language')"
        variant="text"
        class="px-2"
      >
        <span class="text-h6">{{ activeFlag }}</span>
      </v-btn>
    </template>

    <v-list density="compact">
      <v-list-subheader>{{ t('nav.language') }}</v-list-subheader>
      <v-list-item
        v-for="item in localeItems"
        :key="item.code"
        :active="item.code === locale"
        @click="onLocaleChange(item.code)"
      >
        <template #prepend>
          <span class="mr-2 text-h6">{{ item.flag }}</span>
        </template>
        <v-list-item-title>{{ item.name }}</v-list-item-title>
      </v-list-item>
    </v-list>
  </v-menu>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
const { t, locale, locales } = useI18n()
const switchLocalePath = useSwitchLocalePath()

const flags: Record<string, string> = {
  en: '🇬🇧',
  fr: '🇫🇷'
}

const localeItems = computed(() => locales.value.map((item) => {
  const localeItem = item as { code: string, name?: string }

  return {
    code: localeItem.code,
    name: localeItem.name || localeItem.code.toUpperCase(),
    flag: flags[localeItem.code] || '🌐'
  }
}))

const activeFlag = computed(() => flags[locale.value] || '🌐')

function onLocaleChange(nextLocale: string) {
  if (nextLocale === locale.value) {
    return
  }

  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
  const targetPath = switchLocalePath(nextLocale as any)
  if (targetPath) {
    navigateTo(targetPath)
  }
}
</script>

```

### File: components/infra/InfStatus.vue
```
<template>
  <v-chip :color="chipColor" size="small" variant="tonal">
    {{ label }}
  </v-chip>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
const props = defineProps<{
  status: string
}>()

const { t } = useI18n()

const chipColor = computed(() => {
  if (props.status === 'UP') {
    return 'success'
  }

  if (props.status === 'DOWN' || props.status === 'OUT_OF_SERVICE') {
    return 'error'
  }

  if (props.status === 'DEGRADED') {
    return 'warning'
  }

  return 'info'
})

const label = computed(() => t(`health.status_values.${props.status}`))
</script>

```
### File: components/infra/InfThemeToggle.vue
```

<template>
  <v-btn
    :icon="isDark ? 'mdi-weather-sunny' : 'mdi-weather-night'"
    :aria-label="t('theme.toggle')"
    variant="text"
    @click="toggleTheme"
  />
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { useTheme } from 'vuetify'

const { t } = useI18n()
const { activeTheme, setPreference } = useThemePreference()
const vuetifyTheme = useTheme()

const isDark = computed(() => activeTheme.value === 'dark')

watch(activeTheme, (nextTheme) => {
  vuetifyTheme.change(nextTheme)
}, { immediate: true })

function toggleTheme() {
  setPreference(isDark.value ? 'light' : 'dark')
}
</script>

```
### File: components/infra/JsonTree.vue
```
<template>
  <div class="json-tree">
    <template v-if="kind === 'primitive'">
      <span class="json-tree__primitive" :class="`json-tree__primitive--${primitiveKind}`">
        {{ primitiveValue }}
      </span>
    </template>

    <v-sheet
      v-else-if="kind === 'array'"
      class="json-tree__container json-tree__container--array"
      border
      rounded="lg"
    >
      <div class="json-tree__header">
        <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
          <v-icon size="16" icon="mdi-code-brackets" />
          <span class="text-body-2 font-weight-medium">{{ t('nodes.json.array') }}</span>
        </div>
        <v-chip size="x-small" variant="tonal">{{ arrayValue.length }}</v-chip>
      </div>

      <div v-if="arrayValue.length === 0" class="json-tree__empty">
        {{ t('nodes.json.empty_array') }}
      </div>

      <div v-else class="json-tree__body json-tree__body--array">
        <div v-for="(item, index) in arrayValue" :key="index" class="json-tree__item">
          <div class="json-tree__key">[{{ index }}]</div>
          <JsonTree :value="item" :depth="depth + 1" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </v-sheet>

    <v-sheet
      v-else
      class="json-tree__container json-tree__container--object"
      border
      rounded="lg"
    >
      <div class="json-tree__header">
        <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
          <v-icon size="16" icon="mdi-code-braces" />
          <span class="text-body-2 font-weight-medium">{{ t('nodes.json.object') }}</span>
        </div>
        <v-chip size="x-small" variant="tonal">{{ objectEntries.length }}</v-chip>
      </div>

      <div v-if="objectEntries.length === 0" class="json-tree__empty">
        {{ t('nodes.json.empty_object') }}
      </div>

      <div v-else class="json-tree__body">
        <div v-for="entry in objectEntries" :key="entry.key" class="json-tree__row">
          <div class="json-tree__key">{{ entry.key }}</div>
          <JsonTree :value="entry.value" :depth="depth + 1" />
        </div>
      </div>
    </v-sheet>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
defineOptions({
  name: 'JsonTree'
})

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<{
  value: unknown
  depth?: number
}>(), {
  depth: 0
})

const { t } = useI18n()

const kind = computed(() => {
  if (props.value === null || props.value === undefined) {
    return 'primitive'
  }
  if (Array.isArray(props.value)) {
    return 'array'
  }
  if (typeof props.value === 'object') {
    return 'object'
  }
  return 'primitive'
})

const primitiveKind = computed(() => {
  if (props.value === null) return 'null'
  return typeof props.value
})

const primitiveValue = computed(() => {
  if (props.value === null) {
    return 'null'
  }
  if (props.value === undefined) {
    return 'undefined'
  }
  if (typeof props.value === 'string') {
    return props.value
  }
  if (typeof props.value === 'number' || typeof props.value === 'boolean' || typeof props.value === 'bigint') {
    return String(props.value)
  }
  return JSON.stringify(props.value)
})

const arrayValue = computed(() => (Array.isArray(props.value) ? props.value : []))

const objectEntries = computed(() => {
  if (!props.value || typeof props.value !== 'object' || Array.isArray(props.value)) {
    return []
  }
  return Object.entries(props.value as Record<string, unknown>)
    .sort(([left], [right]) => left.localeCompare(right))
    .map(([key, value]) => ({ key, value }))
})
</script>

<style scoped>
.json-tree {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 8px;
}

.json-tree__primitive {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  min-height: 28px;
  padding: 0 10px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  line-height: 1;
  word-break: break-word;
}

.json-tree__primitive--string {
  color: rgb(var(--v-theme-primary));
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.1);
}

.json-tree__primitive--number {
  color: rgb(var(--v-theme-info));
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-info), 0.12);
}

.json-tree__primitive--boolean {
  color: rgb(var(--v-theme-success));
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-success), 0.12);
}

.json-tree__primitive--bigint {
  color: rgb(var(--v-theme-info));
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-info), 0.12);
}

.json-tree__primitive--undefined,
.json-tree__primitive--null,
.json-tree__primitive--object {
  color: rgb(var(--v-theme-on-surface-variant));
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-surface-variant), 0.72);
}

.json-tree__container {
  padding: 12px;
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-surface), 0.96);
}

.json-tree__container--array {
  border-color: rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.16);
}

.json-tree__container--object {
  border-color: rgba(var(--v-theme-on-surface), 0.12);
}

.json-tree__header {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: space-between;
  gap: 12px;
  margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.json-tree__body {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 10px;
}

.json-tree__body--array {
  gap: 12px;
}

.json-tree__item,

  gap: 12px;
  align-items: start;
}

  padding-top: 6px;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.04em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: rgb(var(--v-theme-on-surface-variant));
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.json-tree__empty {
  padding: 8px 0 2px;
  font-size: 0.875rem;
  color: rgb(var(--v-theme-on-surface-variant));
}

@media (max-width: 960px) {
  .json-tree__item,
  .json-tree__row {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 6px;
  }

  .json-tree__key {
    padding-top: 0;
  }
}
</style>

```
### File: components/keys/KeyAllowedModelsTable.vue
```

<template>
  <v-sheet border rounded="lg" class="pa-4 key-model-selector">
    <div class="d-flex flex-wrap align-center justify-space-between ga-3 mb-4">
      <div>
        <div class="text-subtitle-1 font-weight-bold">{{ t('keys.fields.allowed_models') }}</div>
        <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">
          {{ t('keys.models.selector_caption', { count: filteredRows.length, total: rows.length }) }}
        </div>
      </div>
      <v-chip
        :color="aliveOnly ? 'success' : undefined"
        :variant="aliveOnly ? 'tonal' : 'outlined'"
        filter
        :model-value="aliveOnly"
        @click="aliveOnly = !aliveOnly"
      >
        <v-icon start size="16">mdi-pulse</v-icon>
        {{ t('keys.models.filters.alive') }}
      </v-chip>
    </div>

    <v-alert
      v-if="hiddenProvisionedCount > 0"
      type="info"
      variant="tonal"
      density="comfortable"
      class="mb-4"
    >
      {{ t('keys.models.provisioned_hidden', { count: hiddenProvisionedCount }) }}
    </v-alert>

    <v-slide-group v-model="selectedTags" multiple show-arrows class="mb-3 key-tag-strip">
      <v-slide-group-item
        v-for="tag in tagFilters"
        :key="tag.value"
        v-slot="{ isSelected: tagSelected, toggle }"
        :value="tag.value"
      >
        <v-chip
          class="ma-1"
          :color="tagSelected ? 'primary' : undefined"
          :variant="tagSelected ? 'flat' : 'tonal'"
          filter
          :model-value="tagSelected"
          @click="toggle"
        >
          {{ tag.label }}
          <v-badge inline :content="tag.count" color="surface-variant" class="ms-2" />
        </v-chip>
      </v-slide-group-item>
    </v-slide-group>

    <v-row density="comfortable" class="mb-3">
      <v-col cols="12" md="7">
        <v-text-field
          v-model="search"
          :label="t('keys.models.filters.search')"
          prepend-inner-icon="mdi-magnify"
          density="compact"
          variant="outlined"
          hide-details
          clearable
        />
      </v-col>
      <v-col cols="12" md="5">
        <v-select
          v-model="selectedHardware"
          :items="availableHardwareTypes"
          :label="t('keys.models.filters.hardware')"
          multiple
          chips
          clearable
          density="compact"
          variant="outlined"
          hide-details
        />
      </v-col>
    </v-row>

    <v-data-table
      v-model:sort-by="sortBy"
      :headers="headers"
      :items="filteredRows"
      :search="search"
      :loading="loading"
      :loading-text="t('keys.models.loading')"
      :no-data-text="t('keys.models.empty_for_tier')"
      item-value="id"
      density="compact"
      fixed-header
      hover
      :height="420"
      :items-per-page="8"
      :items-per-page-options="[8, 16, 32]"
      class="key-model-table"
    >
      <template #[`item.selected`]="{ item }">
        <v-checkbox-btn
          :model-value="isSelected(rowOf(item).id)"
          :disabled="!rowOf(item).selectable"
          color="primary"
          @update:model-value="toggleSelection(rowOf(item).id, Boolean($event))"
        />
      </template>

      <template #[`item.id`]="{ item }">
        <div class="py-2">
          <v-btn
            variant="text"
            density="compact"
            class="px-0 text-none font-weight-medium key-model-name"
            :ripple="false"
            @click="openModelDetails(rowOf(item).model.id)"
          >
            {{ rowOf(item).id }}
            <v-icon end size="16" class="text-medium-emphasis">mdi-information-outline</v-icon>
          </v-btn>
        </div>
      </template>

      <template #[`item.hardware`]="{ item }">
        <v-chip size="small" variant="tonal">
          <v-icon start size="15">{{ hardwareIcon(rowOf(item).hardware) }}</v-icon>
          {{ rowOf(item).hardware }}
        </v-chip>
      </template>

      <template #[`item.tags`]="{ item }">
        <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-1 key-model-tags">
          <v-chip v-for="tag in rowOf(item).tags.slice(0, 3)" :key="tag" size="x-small" variant="tonal">
            {{ tag }}
          </v-chip>
          <v-chip v-if="rowOf(item).tags.length > 3" size="x-small" variant="outlined">
            {{ t('keys.models.more_tags', { count: rowOf(item).tags.length - 3 }) }}
          </v-chip>
        </div>
      </template>

      <template #[`item.nodeCount`]="{ item }">
        <v-tooltip location="top">
          <template #activator="{ props: tip }">
            <v-chip
              v-bind="tip"
              :color="rowOf(item).nodeCount === 0 ? 'warning' : 'success'"
              variant="tonal"
              size="small"
            >
              <v-icon start size="14">{{ rowOf(item).nodeCount === 0 ? 'mdi-alert-circle-outline' : 'mdi-check-circle-outline' }}</v-icon>
              {{ rowOf(item).nodeCount }}
            </v-chip>
          </template>
          <span>{{
            rowOf(item).nodeCount === 0
              ? t('keys.models.nodes.none_tooltip')
              : t('keys.models.nodes.count_tooltip', { count: rowOf(item).nodeCount })
          }}</span>
        </v-tooltip>
      </template>

      <template #[`item.price`]="{ item }">
        <div class="text-end key-price-cell">
          <template v-if="rowOf(item).inputPrice == null && rowOf(item).outputPrice == null">
            <span class="text-medium-emphasis">-</span>
          </template>
          <template v-else>
            <span class="font-weight-medium">
            <client-only>
              <CountUp
                :key="`${rowOf(item).id}-in-${rowOf(item).inputPrice}`"
                :end-val="rowOf(item).inputPrice ?? 0"
                :decimal-places="priceDecimalPlaces(rowOf(item).inputPrice)"
                :duration="0.55"
                :options="{ useGrouping: false }"
              />
            </client-only>
            </span>
            <span class="text-medium-emphasis"> / </span>
            <span class="font-weight-medium">
            <client-only>
              <CountUp
                :key="`${rowOf(item).id}-out-${rowOf(item).outputPrice}`"
                :end-val="rowOf(item).outputPrice ?? 0"
                :decimal-places="priceDecimalPlaces(rowOf(item).outputPrice)"
                :duration="0.55"
                :options="{ useGrouping: false }"
              />
            </client-only>
            </span>
            <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">
              {{ rowOf(item).currency }}/{{ rowOf(item).unit }}
            </div>
          </template>
        </div>
      </template>

      <template #[`item.status`]="{ item }">
        <v-tooltip location="top">
          <template #activator="{ props: tip }">
            <v-chip
              v-bind="tip"
              :color="statusColor(rowOf(item).status)"
              variant="tonal"
              size="small"
            >
              <v-icon start size="14">{{ statusIcon(rowOf(item).status) }}</v-icon>
              {{ statusLabel(rowOf(item).status) }}
            </v-chip>
          </template>
          <span>{{ rowOf(item).statusTooltip }}</span>
        </v-tooltip>
      </template>
    </v-data-table>

    <v-dialog v-model="detailsDialogOpen" max-width="860" scrollable>
      <v-card v-if="selectedModel">
        <v-card-title class="d-flex align-center justify-space-between ga-3">
          <div>
            <div class="text-subtitle-1 font-weight-bold">{{ selectedModel.id }}</div>
            <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ t('models.modal.title') }}</div>
          </div>
          <v-btn icon="mdi-close" variant="text" @click="detailsDialogOpen = false" />
        </v-card-title>
        <v-card-text>
          <ModelLargeDetails :model="selectedModel" />
        </v-card-text>
      </v-card>
    </v-dialog>
  </v-sheet>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import CountUp from 'vue-countup-v3'
import ModelLargeDetails from '~/components/models/ModelLargeDetails.vue'
import type { ModelLargeView } from '~/domains/models/models'
import type { TierModelPolicyMap } from '~/composables/useTierModelPolicyRepository'

type TierId = 'PUBLIC' | 'TRUSTED' | 'HDS'

const TIER_ORDER: TierId[] = ['PUBLIC', 'TRUSTED', 'HDS']

type RowView = {
  id: string
  model: ModelLargeView
  hardware: string
  tags: string[]
  nodeCount: number
  provisionedCount: number
  inputPrice?: number
  outputPrice?: number
  currency: string
  unit: string
  availableTiers: TierId[]
  status: 'ready' | 'provisioned' | 'unavailable'
  statusTooltip: string
  selectable: boolean
}

const props = defineProps<{
  modelValue: string[]
  tier: TierId
  models: ModelLargeView[]
  policyByTier: TierModelPolicyMap
  priceMultiplier: number
  loading?: boolean
}>()

const emit = defineEmits<{
  'update:modelValue': [string[]]
}>()

const { t } = useI18n()

const selectedTags = ref<string[]>([])
const selectedHardware = ref<string[]>([])
const aliveOnly = ref(true)
const search = ref('')
const sortBy = ref([{ key: 'nodeCount', order: 'desc' as const }])
const detailsDialogOpen = ref(false)
const selectedModelId = ref('')

const availableTiersByModel = computed(() => {
  const map = new Map<string, Set<TierId>>()

  for (const tier of TIER_ORDER) {
    const scoped = props.policyByTier[tier] ?? []
    for (const model of scoped) {
      const modelId = String(model).toLowerCase()
      if (!map.has(modelId)) {
        map.set(modelId, new Set<TierId>())
      }
      map.get(modelId)?.add(tier)
    }
  }

  return map
})

const rows = computed<RowView[]>(() => {
  return props.models
    .slice()
    .sort((left, right) => left.id.localeCompare(right.id))
    .map((model) => {
      const rate = model.billing?.payPerToken
      const tags = Array.from(new Set(model.tags.map(tag => tag.toLowerCase())))
      const nodeCount = model.totalAgents ?? ((model.healthyAgents ?? 0) + (model.degradedAgents ?? 0))
      const provisionedCount = model.installedAgents ?? 0
      const availableTiers = Array.from(availableTiersByModel.value.get(model.id.toLowerCase()) ?? [])
        .sort((left, right) => TIER_ORDER.indexOf(left) - TIER_ORDER.indexOf(right))
      const multiplier = props.priceMultiplier
      const status = nodeCount > 0 ? 'ready' : provisionedCount > 0 ? 'provisioned' : 'unavailable'
      return {
        id: model.id,
        model,
        hardware: model.hardwareTier?.toUpperCase() ?? '-',
        tags,
        nodeCount,
        provisionedCount,
        inputPrice: typeof rate?.input === 'number' ? rate.input * multiplier : undefined,
        outputPrice: typeof rate?.output === 'number' ? rate.output * multiplier : undefined,
        currency: rate?.currency ?? '-',
        unit: rate?.unit ?? 'token',
        availableTiers,
        status,
        statusTooltip: statusTooltip(status, nodeCount, provisionedCount),
        selectable: availableTiers.includes(props.tier) && nodeCount > 0
      }
    })
})

const selectableModelIds = computed(() => {
  return new Set(rows.value.filter(row => row.selectable).map(row => row.id))
})

const hiddenProvisionedCount = computed(() => {
  if (!aliveOnly.value) {
    return 0
  }
  return rows.value.filter(row => row.availableTiers.includes(props.tier) && row.status === 'provisioned').length
})

const tagFilters = computed(() => {
  const counts = new Map<string, number>()
  rows.value
    .filter(row => row.availableTiers.includes(props.tier))
    .filter(row => !aliveOnly.value || row.nodeCount > 0)
    .forEach((row) => {
      row.tags.forEach((tag) => counts.set(tag, (counts.get(tag) ?? 0) + 1))
    })
  return Array.from(counts.entries())
    .map(([value, count]) => ({ value, label: value, count }))
    .sort((left, right) => right.count - left.count || left.value.localeCompare(right.value))
})

const availableHardwareTypes = computed(() => {
  const hardware = new Set<string>()
  rows.value.forEach((row) => hardware.add(row.hardware))
  return Array.from(hardware).sort((left, right) => left.localeCompare(right))
})

const filteredRows = computed(() => {
  return rows.value.filter((row) => {
    if (!row.availableTiers.includes(props.tier)) {
      return false
    }
    if (aliveOnly.value && row.nodeCount <= 0) {
      return false
    }
    if (selectedTags.value.length > 0 && !selectedTags.value.every(tag => row.tags.includes(tag))) {
      return false
    }
    if (selectedHardware.value.length > 0 && !selectedHardware.value.includes(row.hardware)) {
      return false
    }
    return true
  })
})

const headers = computed(() => [
  { title: '', key: 'selected', sortable: false, width: 44 },
  { title: t('keys.models.headers.model'), key: 'id', minWidth: 260 },
  { title: t('keys.models.headers.hardware'), key: 'hardware', width: 130 },
  { title: t('keys.models.headers.tags'), key: 'tags', sortable: false, minWidth: 180 },
  { title: t('keys.models.headers.nodes'), key: 'nodeCount', align: 'center' as const, width: 100 },
  { title: t('keys.models.headers.price'), key: 'price', align: 'end' as const, sortable: false, width: 150 },
  { title: t('keys.models.headers.status'), key: 'status', width: 120 }
])

const selectedModel = computed(() => rows.value.find(row => row.id === selectedModelId.value)?.model ?? null)

watch([() => props.tier, selectableModelIds], () => {
  const next = props.modelValue.filter(model => selectableModelIds.value.has(model))
  if (next.length !== props.modelValue.length) {
    emit('update:modelValue', next)
  }
})

watch(tagFilters, (filters) => {
  const allowed = new Set(filters.map(filter => filter.value))
  selectedTags.value = selectedTags.value.filter(tag => allowed.has(tag))
})

function isSelected(modelId: string) {
  return props.modelValue.includes(modelId)
}

function rowOf(item: unknown): RowView {
  const candidate = item as { raw?: RowView }
  return candidate.raw ?? (item as RowView)
}

function openModelDetails(modelId: string) {
  selectedModelId.value = modelId
  detailsDialogOpen.value = true
}

function toggleSelection(modelId: string, selected: boolean) {
  if (selected) {
    if (props.modelValue.includes(modelId) || !selectableModelIds.value.has(modelId)) {
      return
    }
    emit('update:modelValue', [...props.modelValue, modelId])
    return
  }
  emit('update:modelValue', props.modelValue.filter(model => model !== modelId))
}

function priceDecimalPlaces(value?: number) {
  if (value == null || Number.isInteger(value)) {
    return 0
  }
  if (value < 0.000001) {
    return 10
  }
  if (value < 0.001) {
    return 8
  }
  return 6
}

function hardwareIcon(hardware: string) {
  if (hardware.includes('GPU')) {
    return 'mdi-expansion-card'
  }
  if (hardware.includes('CPU')) {
    return 'mdi-chip'
  }
  return 'mdi-server'
}

function statusLabel(status: RowView['status']) {
  if (status === 'ready') {
    return t('keys.models.status.ready')
  }
  if (status === 'provisioned') {
    return t('keys.models.status.provisioned')
  }
  return t('keys.models.status.unavailable')
}

function statusColor(status: RowView['status']) {
  if (status === 'ready') {
    return 'success'
  }
  if (status === 'provisioned') {
    return 'warning'
  }
  return 'error'
}

function statusIcon(status: RowView['status']) {
  if (status === 'ready') {
    return 'mdi-check-circle-outline'
  }
  if (status === 'provisioned') {
    return 'mdi-clock-outline'
  }
  return 'mdi-close-circle-outline'
}

function statusTooltip(status: RowView['status'], liveCount: number, provisionedCount: number) {
  if (status === 'ready') {
    return t('keys.models.status.ready_tooltip', { count: liveCount })
  }
  if (status === 'provisioned') {
    return t('keys.models.status.provisioned_tooltip', { count: provisionedCount })
  }
  return t('keys.models.status.unavailable_tooltip')
}
</script>

<style scoped>
.key-model-selector {
  background: rgb(var(--v-theme-surface));
}

.key-tag-strip {
  min-height: 44px;
}

.key-model-table {
  border: thin solid rgba(var(--v-border-color), var(--v-border-opacity));
  border-radius: 8px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.key-model-name {
  min-height: 28px;
}

.key-model-name :deep(.v-btn__content) {
  justify-content: flex-start;
  gap: 4px;
}

.key-model-tags {
  min-width: 160px;
}

.key-price-cell {
  min-width: 128px;
}
</style>

```

### File: components/keys/KeyAuditPolicyDialog.vue
```
<template>
  <v-dialog :model-value="open" max-width="560" @update:model-value="emit('close')">
    <v-card>
      <v-card-title>{{ t('audit.policy.title') }}</v-card-title>
      <v-card-text class="d-flex flex-column ga-4">
        <v-switch
          v-model="auditTrailEnabled"
          :label="t('audit.policy.enabled')"
          color="primary"
          hide-details
        />

        <v-select
          v-model="operationLogLevel"
          :items="levelItems"
          :label="t('audit.policy.level')"
          :disabled="!auditTrailEnabled"
          variant="outlined"
          density="comfortable"
        />

        <v-text-field
          v-model="operationLogRecentLimit"
          :label="t('audit.policy.recent_limit')"
          :disabled="!auditTrailEnabled"
          type="number"
          min="1"
          max="500"
          variant="outlined"
          density="comfortable"
        />

        <v-alert type="info" variant="tonal" density="comfortable">
          {{ t('audit.policy.hint') }}
        </v-alert>
      </v-card-text>
      <v-card-actions>
        <v-spacer />
        <v-btn variant="text" @click="emit('close')">{{ t('keys.actions.cancel') }}</v-btn>
        <v-btn color="primary" @click="onSave">{{ t('audit.policy.save') }}</v-btn>
      </v-card-actions>
    </v-card>
  </v-dialog>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import type { AuditLogLevel } from '~/domains/audit/audit'
import type { KeyAuditPolicyUpdateRequest, KeyListItem } from '~/domains/keys/keys'

const props = defineProps<{
  open: boolean
  keyItem: KeyListItem | null
}>()

const emit = defineEmits<{
  close: []
  save: [KeyAuditPolicyUpdateRequest]
}>()

const { t } = useI18n()

const auditTrailEnabled = ref(false)
const operationLogLevel = ref<AuditLogLevel>('INFO')
const operationLogRecentLimit = ref('50')

const levelItems = computed(() => [
  { title: t('audit.levels.info'), value: 'INFO' },
  { title: t('audit.levels.debug'), value: 'DEBUG' }
])

watch(() => props.keyItem, (value) => {
  auditTrailEnabled.value = Boolean(value?.auditTrailEnabled)
  operationLogLevel.value = (value?.operationLogLevel || 'INFO') as AuditLogLevel
  operationLogRecentLimit.value = String(value?.operationLogRecentLimit ?? 50)
}, { immediate: true })

function onSave() {
  emit('save', {
    auditTrailEnabled: auditTrailEnabled.value,
    operationLogLevel: operationLogLevel.value,
    operationLogRecentLimit: Math.max(1, Math.min(500, Number(operationLogRecentLimit.value || '50')))
  })
}
</script>

