                    density="compact"
                    hide-details
                    :label="t('keys.billing.spend_limits.enabled')"
                  />
                </div>

                <v-expand-transition>
                  <div v-if="spendLimitEnabled" class="mt-3">
                    <v-select
                      v-model="spendLimitCurrency"
                      :items="currencyItems"
                      :label="t('keys.billing.spend_limits.currency')"
                      density="comfortable"
                      variant="outlined"
                      class="mb-3"
                    />
                    <v-text-field
                      v-model="monthlySpendLimit"
                      :label="t('keys.billing.spend_limits.monthly')"
                      :prefix="currencyPrefix"
                      type="number"
                      min="0"
                      step="0.01"
                      density="comfortable"
                      variant="outlined"
                      :rules="moneyRules"
                      class="mb-3"
                    />
                    <v-text-field
                      v-model="lifetimeSpendLimit"
                      :label="t('keys.billing.spend_limits.lifetime')"
                      :prefix="currencyPrefix"
                      type="number"
                      min="0"
                      step="0.01"
                      density="comfortable"
                      variant="outlined"
                      :rules="moneyRules"
                    />
                    <v-alert v-if="spendLimitError" type="warning" variant="tonal" density="compact" class="mt-3">
                      {{ t(spendLimitError) }}
                    </v-alert>
                  </div>
                </v-expand-transition>
              </v-sheet>
            </v-col>
          </v-row>
        </v-card-text>

        <v-card-actions class="px-6 pb-5">
          <v-spacer />
          <v-btn variant="text" @click="emit('close')">{{ t('keys.actions.cancel') }}</v-btn>
          <v-btn color="primary" prepend-icon="mdi-key-plus" :disabled="!canCreate" :loading="catalogLoading" type="submit">
            {{ t('keys.actions.create') }}
          </v-btn>
        </v-card-actions>
      </v-form>
    </v-card>
  </v-dialog>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { useDisplay } from 'vuetify'
import KeyAllowedModelsTable from '~/components/keys/KeyAllowedModelsTable.vue'
import type { KeyCreateRequest } from '~/domains/keys/keys'
import type { ModelLargeView } from '~/domains/models/models'
import type { TierModelPolicyMap } from '~/composables/useTierModelPolicyRepository'
import type { PricingPolicy } from '~/composables/usePricingPolicyRepository'

type TierId = 'PUBLIC' | 'TRUSTED' | 'HDS'
type PerformanceMode = 'TOP_10' | 'TOP_25' | 'TOP_50' | 'DISABLED'

const props = defineProps<{ open: boolean }>()

const emit = defineEmits<{
  close: []
  create: [KeyCreateRequest]
}>()

const { t, n } = useI18n()
const { mobile } = useDisplay()
const modelRepository = useModelCatalogRepository()
const policyRepository = useTierModelPolicyRepository()
const pricingRepository = usePricingPolicyRepository()

const currentStep = ref(1)
const tier = ref<TierId>('PUBLIC')
const allowedModels = ref<string[]>([])
const billingEnabled = ref(true)
const fallbackEnabled = ref(false)
const auditTrailEnabled = ref(false)
const spendLimitEnabled = ref(false)
const spendLimitCurrency = ref<'EUR' | 'USD'>('EUR')
const monthlySpendLimit = ref('')
const lifetimeSpendLimit = ref('')
const performanceMode = ref<PerformanceMode>('DISABLED')
const models = ref<ModelLargeView[]>([])
const policyByTier = ref<TierModelPolicyMap>({})
const pricingPolicy = ref<PricingPolicy | null>(null)
const catalogLoading = ref(false)
const selectorError = ref<string | null>(null)
const pricingError = ref<string | null>(null)
const spendLimitError = ref<string | null>(null)
const form = ref<{ validate: () => Promise<{ valid: boolean }> } | null>(null)

let refreshSequence = 0
let refreshTimer: ReturnType<typeof setTimeout> | null = null

const tierMetadata: Record<TierId, { icon: string, color: string }> = {
  PUBLIC: { icon: 'mdi-earth', color: 'info' },
  TRUSTED: { icon: 'mdi-shield-check-outline', color: 'primary' },
  HDS: { icon: 'mdi-hospital-building', color: 'success' }
}

const stepperItems = computed(() => [
  { title: t('keys.create.steps.essential.nav'), value: 1 },
  { title: t('keys.create.steps.performance.nav'), value: 2 },
  { title: t('keys.create.steps.governance.nav'), value: 3 }
])

const fallbackMultiplier = computed(() => pricingPolicy.value?.fallback.multiplier ?? 1.3)
const auditTrailMultiplier = computed(() => pricingPolicy.value?.auditTrail.multiplier ?? 1.1)
const fallbackBillingMode = computed(() => pricingPolicy.value?.fallback.billingMode || 'SURCHARGED')
const selectedTierMultiplier = computed(() => tierMultiplier(tier.value))
const keyMultiplier = computed(() => selectedTierMultiplier.value * (auditTrailEnabled.value ? auditTrailMultiplier.value : 1))
const performanceMultiplier = computed(() => performanceModeMultiplier(performanceMode.value))
const finalKeyMultiplier = computed(() => keyMultiplier.value * performanceMultiplier.value)
const fallbackRouteMultiplier = computed(() => finalKeyMultiplier.value * fallbackMultiplier.value)
const fallbackUpliftPercent = computed(() => n(Math.round((fallbackMultiplier.value - 1) * 100)))
const auditTrailUpliftPercent = computed(() => n(Math.round((auditTrailMultiplier.value - 1) * 100)))

const tierOptions = computed(() => (['PUBLIC', 'TRUSTED', 'HDS'] as TierId[]).map(value => ({
  value,
  title: t(`keys.tiers.${value.toLowerCase()}`),
  description: t(`keys.billing.tiers.${value.toLowerCase()}.description`),
  multiplier: tierMultiplier(value),
  ...tierMetadata[value]
})))

const activeTierLabel = computed(() => {
  return t('keys.billing.active_tier', {
    tier: t(`keys.tiers.${tier.value.toLowerCase()}`),
    multiplier: formatMultiplier(finalKeyMultiplier.value)
  })
})

const performanceModeItems = computed(() => ([
  { value: 'DISABLED', title: t('keys.billing.performance.disabled') },
  { value: 'TOP_50', title: `${t('keys.billing.performance.top50')} (x${formatMultiplier(performanceModeMultiplier('TOP_50'))})` },
  { value: 'TOP_25', title: `${t('keys.billing.performance.top25')} (x${formatMultiplier(performanceModeMultiplier('TOP_25'))})` },
  { value: 'TOP_10', title: `${t('keys.billing.performance.top10')} (x${formatMultiplier(performanceModeMultiplier('TOP_10'))})` }
]))
const currencyItems = ['EUR', 'USD']
const currencyPrefix = computed(() => spendLimitCurrency.value === 'USD' ? '$' : '€')
const moneyRules = computed(() => [
  (value: string) => !value || Number(value) >= 0 || t('keys.billing.spend_limits.invalid')
])
const modelRules = computed(() => [
  (value: string[]) => value.length > 0 || t('keys.create.validation.models_required')
])

const selectableModelOptions = computed(() => models.value
  .filter(model => isModelSelectable(model))
  .map(model => ({
    title: model.id,
    value: model.id,
    props: {
      subtitle: model.inferaMetadata?.summary || model.family
    }
  }))
  .sort((left, right) => left.title.localeCompare(right.title)))

const selectedModelDetails = computed(() => {
  const selected = new Set(allowedModels.value.map(model => model.toLowerCase()))
  const selectedRows = models.value.filter(model => selected.has(model.id.toLowerCase()))
  if (selectedRows.length > 0) {
    return selectedRows
  }
  return models.value.filter(model => isModelSelectable(model))
})

const pricePrefix = computed(() => allowedModels.value.length === 0 || selectedModelDetails.value.length > 1 ? t('keys.billing.from_prefix') : '')
const inputPerMillionLabel = computed(() => formatPerMillionPrice('input'))
const outputPerMillionLabel = computed(() => formatPerMillionPrice('output'))
const canCreate = computed(() => !catalogLoading.value && tier.value && allowedModels.value.length > 0)

watch(() => props.open, (value) => {
  if (!value) {
    return
  }
  resetForm()
  void refreshCatalogContext()
})

watch([tier, allowedModels], () => {
  if (!props.open) {
    return
  }
  scheduleCatalogRefresh()
}, { deep: true })

watch(selectableModelOptions, (options) => {
  const selectable = new Set(options.map(option => option.value))
  const next = allowedModels.value.filter(model => selectable.has(model))
  if (next.length !== allowedModels.value.length) {
    allowedModels.value = next
  }
})

onMounted(() => {
  if (props.open) {
    void refreshCatalogContext()
  }
})

onBeforeUnmount(() => {
  if (refreshTimer) {
    clearTimeout(refreshTimer)
  }
})

async function refreshCatalogContext() {
  const sequence = ++refreshSequence
  catalogLoading.value = true
  try {
    const [catalogModels, policy, pricing] = await Promise.all([
      modelRepository.listModels(),
      policyRepository.readPolicy(),
      pricingRepository.readPolicy()
    ])
    if (sequence !== refreshSequence) {
      return
    }
    models.value = catalogModels
    policyByTier.value = policy
    pricingPolicy.value = pricing
    selectorError.value = null
    pricingError.value = null
  } catch {
    if (sequence !== refreshSequence) {
      return
    }
    selectorError.value = 'errors.service_unavailable'
    pricingError.value = 'keys.billing.pricing_unavailable'
  } finally {
    if (sequence === refreshSequence) {
      catalogLoading.value = false
    }
  }
}

function scheduleCatalogRefresh() {
  if (refreshTimer) {
    clearTimeout(refreshTimer)
  }
  refreshTimer = setTimeout(() => {
    void refreshCatalogContext()
  }, 250)
}

function resetForm() {
  currentStep.value = 1
  tier.value = 'PUBLIC'
  allowedModels.value = []
  billingEnabled.value = true
  fallbackEnabled.value = false
  auditTrailEnabled.value = false
  spendLimitEnabled.value = false
  spendLimitCurrency.value = 'EUR'
  monthlySpendLimit.value = ''
  lifetimeSpendLimit.value = ''
  spendLimitError.value = null
  performanceMode.value = 'DISABLED'
}

async function onCreate() {
  const validation = await form.value?.validate()
  if (validation && !validation.valid) {
    currentStep.value = 1
    return
  }
  const monthlyLimitMinor = toMinorUnits(monthlySpendLimit.value)
  const lifetimeLimitMinor = toMinorUnits(lifetimeSpendLimit.value)
  if (spendLimitEnabled.value && monthlyLimitMinor === null && lifetimeLimitMinor === null) {
    spendLimitError.value = 'keys.billing.spend_limits.required'
    return
  }
  spendLimitError.value = null
  emit('create', {
    tier: tier.value,
    billingEnabled: billingEnabled.value,
    fallbackEnabled: fallbackEnabled.value,
    fallbackBillingMode: fallbackEnabled.value ? fallbackBillingMode.value : 'DISABLED',
    auditTrailEnabled: auditTrailEnabled.value,
    operationLogLevel: 'INFO',
    operationLogRecentLimit: 50,
    performanceRoutingEnabled: performanceMode.value !== 'DISABLED',
    performanceMode: performanceMode.value,
    spendLimitEnabled: spendLimitEnabled.value,
    spendLimitCurrency: spendLimitCurrency.value,
    monthlySpendLimitMinor: spendLimitEnabled.value ? monthlyLimitMinor : null,
    lifetimeSpendLimitMinor: spendLimitEnabled.value ? lifetimeLimitMinor : null,
    allowedModels: allowedModels.value.map(item => item.trim()).filter(Boolean)
  })
}

function tierMultiplier(tierId: TierId) {
  const row = pricingPolicy.value?.tiers.find(candidate => candidate.tier === tierId)
  return row?.multiplier ?? 1
}

function formatMultiplier(value: number) {
  return n(value, { minimumFractionDigits: 2, maximumFractionDigits: 2 })
}

function performanceModeMultiplier(mode: PerformanceMode) {
  const row = pricingPolicy.value?.performance.find(candidate => candidate.mode === mode)
  return row?.multiplier ?? 1
}

function toMinorUnits(value: string) {
  if (!value || Number(value) <= 0) {
    return null
  }
  return Math.round(Number(value) * 100)
}

function isModelSelectable(model: ModelLargeView) {
  const tierModels = policyByTier.value[tier.value] ?? []
  const policyAllowsModel = tierModels.includes(model.id.toLowerCase())
  const liveNodeCount = model.totalAgents ?? ((model.healthyAgents ?? 0) + (model.degradedAgents ?? 0))
  return policyAllowsModel && liveNodeCount > 0
}

function formatPerMillionPrice(side: 'input' | 'output') {
  const values = selectedModelDetails.value
    .map(model => model.billing?.payPerToken?.[side])
    .filter((value): value is number => typeof value === 'number')

  if (values.length === 0) {
    return t('keys.billing.price_unavailable')
  }

  const currency = selectedModelDetails.value.find(model => typeof model.billing?.payPerToken?.[side] === 'number')?.billing?.payPerToken?.currency ?? 'EUR'
  const value = Math.min(...values) * finalKeyMultiplier.value * 1_000_000
  return `${formatCurrency(value, currency)}${t('keys.billing.per_million_suffix')}`
}

function formatCurrency(value: number, currency: string) {
  return n(value, {
    style: 'currency',
    currency,
    minimumFractionDigits: value >= 1 ? 2 : 4,
    maximumFractionDigits: value >= 1 ? 2 : 6
  })
}
</script>

<style scoped>
.key-create-dialog {
  border-radius: 12px;
}

.key-stepper {
  border: thin solid rgba(var(--v-border-color), var(--v-border-opacity));
  border-radius: 8px;
  overflow: hidden;
}

.key-billing-panel {
  position: sticky;
  top: 16px;
  background: rgb(var(--v-theme-surface));
}

.key-price-summary {
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.06);
}

.key-tier-option,
.key-paid-option {
  width: 100%;
  transition: border-color 160ms ease, background-color 160ms ease, box-shadow 160ms ease, transform 160ms ease;
  cursor: pointer;
}

.key-tier-option {
  min-height: 132px;
}

.key-disabled-option {
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-surface-variant), 0.34);
}

.key-tier-option--active,
.key-paid-option--active {
  border-color: rgb(var(--v-theme-primary));
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.08);
  transform: translateY(-1px);
}

@media (max-width: 1279px) {
  .key-billing-panel {
    position: static;
  }
}
</style>

```

<template>
  <InfDataTable
    :headers="headers"
    :items="rows as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[]"
    :items-length="total"
    :items-per-page="itemsPerPage"
    :loading="loading"
    :loading-text="t('keys.table.loading')"
    :no-data-text="t('keys.table.empty')"
    @options="emit('options', $event)"
  >
    <template #[`item.apiKeyId`]="{ item }">
      <div class="d-flex flex-column">
        <span class="font-weight-medium text-truncate inf-key-id">{{ item.name || item.apiKeyId }}</span>
        <span class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ item.keyPrefix || item.apiKeyId }}</span>
      </div>
    </template>
    <template #[`item.tier`]="{ item }">
      <v-chip color="primary" variant="tonal" size="small">{{ item.tier }}</v-chip>
    </template>
    <template #[`item.enabled`]="{ item }">
      <v-chip :color="item.enabled ? 'success' : 'error'" variant="tonal" size="small">
        {{ item.enabled ? t('keys.status.active') : t('keys.status.revoked') }}
      </v-chip>
    </template>
    <template #[`item.allowedModels`]="{ item }">
      <div class="d-flex ga-1 flex-wrap">
        <v-chip v-for="model in item.allowedModels.slice(0, 3)" :key="model" size="x-small" variant="tonal">{{ model }}</v-chip>
        <v-chip v-if="item.allowedModels.length > 3" size="x-small">
          {{ t('keys.table.more_models', { count: item.allowedModels.length - 3 }) }}
        </v-chip>
      </div>
    </template>
    <template #[`item.requests`]="{ item }">
      <span class="font-weight-medium">{{ n(Number(item.requests || 0)) }}</span>
    </template>
    <template #[`item.totalTokens`]="{ item }">
      <span>{{ n(Number(item.totalTokens || 0)) }}</span>
    </template>
    <template #[`item.spend`]="{ item }">
      <div class="d-flex flex-column align-end">
        <span class="font-weight-medium">{{ formatMinor(item.monthlySpendMinor, item.spendLimitCurrency) }}</span>
        <span class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">
          {{ item.monthlySpendLimitMinor ? `/ ${formatMinor(item.monthlySpendLimitMinor, item.spendLimitCurrency)}` : t('keys.table.no_limit') }}
        </span>
        <v-chip v-if="item.spendAlertThreshold" :color="item.spendAlertThreshold >= 100 ? 'error' : 'warning'" size="x-small" variant="tonal" class="mt-1">
          {{ t('keys.table.spend_alert', { threshold: item.spendAlertThreshold }) }}
        </v-chip>
      </div>
    </template>
    <template #[`item.actions`]="{ item }">
      <div class="d-flex justify-end ga-1">
        <v-tooltip :text="t('keys.actions.analytics')">
          <template #activator="{ props: tooltipProps }">
            <v-btn v-bind="tooltipProps" icon="mdi-chart-line" size="small" variant="text" @click="emit('analytics', item.apiKeyId)" />
          </template>
        </v-tooltip>
        <v-tooltip :text="t('audit.actions.view_logs')">
          <template #activator="{ props: tooltipProps }">
            <v-btn v-bind="tooltipProps" icon="mdi-history" size="small" variant="text" @click="emit('logs', item.apiKeyId)" />
          </template>
        </v-tooltip>
        <v-tooltip :text="t('audit.actions.edit_policy')">
          <template #activator="{ props: tooltipProps }">
            <v-btn v-bind="tooltipProps" icon="mdi-tune" size="small" variant="text" @click="emit('policy', item.apiKeyId)" />
          </template>
        </v-tooltip>
        <v-tooltip :text="t('keys.actions.rotate')">
          <template #activator="{ props: tooltipProps }">
            <v-btn v-bind="tooltipProps" icon="mdi-refresh" size="small" variant="text" @click="emit('rotate', item.apiKeyId)" />
          </template>
        </v-tooltip>
        <v-tooltip :text="t('keys.actions.revoke')">
          <template #activator="{ props: tooltipProps }">
            <v-btn v-bind="tooltipProps" icon="mdi-key-remove" size="small" variant="text" color="error" @click="emit('revoke', item.apiKeyId)" />
          </template>
        </v-tooltip>
        <v-tooltip :text="t('keys.actions.delete')">
          <template #activator="{ props: tooltipProps }">
            <v-btn v-bind="tooltipProps" icon="mdi-delete-outline" size="small" variant="text" color="error" @click="emit('delete', item.apiKeyId)" />
          </template>
        </v-tooltip>
      </div>
    </template>
  </InfDataTable>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import InfDataTable from '~/components/infra/InfDataTable.vue'
import type { KeyListItem } from '~/domains/keys/keys'

defineProps<{
  rows: KeyListItem[]
  total: number
  loading?: boolean
  itemsPerPage?: number
}>()

const emit = defineEmits<{
  options: [Record<string, unknown>]
  analytics: [string]
  logs: [string]
  policy: [string]
  rotate: [string]
  revoke: [string]
  delete: [string]
}>()

const { t, n } = useI18n()

const headers = computed(() => [
  { title: t('keys.fields.api_key_id'), key: 'apiKeyId', minWidth: 220 },
  { title: t('keys.fields.client_id'), key: 'clientId', minWidth: 160 },
  { title: t('keys.fields.tier'), key: 'tier', width: 120 },
  { title: t('keys.fields.allowed_models'), key: 'allowedModels', sortable: false, minWidth: 220 },
  { title: t('keys.fields.enabled'), key: 'enabled', width: 120 },
  { title: t('keys.fields.requests'), key: 'requests', align: 'end' as const, width: 120 },
  { title: t('keys.fields.total_tokens'), key: 'totalTokens', align: 'end' as const, width: 150 },
  { title: t('keys.fields.monthly_spend'), key: 'spend', sortable: false, align: 'end' as const, width: 170 },
  { title: t('keys.fields.actions'), key: 'actions', sortable: false, align: 'end' as const, width: 260 }
])

function formatMinor(value: number | null | undefined, currency: string | null | undefined) {
  return n(Number(value || 0) / 100, { style: 'currency', currency: currency || 'EUR' })
}
</script>

### File: components/landing/EntryPointsSection.vue
```
<template>
  <section id="entry-points" class="section">
    <LandingRevealBlock>
      <v-container>
        <div class="entry-points__head">
          <div>
            <h2>{{ t('landing.entryPoints.title') }}</h2>
            <p class="section__subtitle mb-0">{{ t('landing.entryPoints.subtitle') }}</p>
          </div>
          <v-chip size="small" variant="tonal" color="primary">
            {{ t('landing.entryPoints.badge') }}
          </v-chip>
        </div>

        <v-row class="mt-6" align="stretch" density="comfortable">
          <v-col v-for="ep in primaryEntryPoints" :key="ep.key" cols="12" md="6">
            <v-card class="landing-card entry-card entry-card--primary fill-height" variant="outlined" rounded="xl">
              <v-card-item>
                <template #prepend>
                  <v-avatar size="42" color="primary" variant="tonal">
                    <v-icon :icon="ep.icon" color="primary" />
                  </v-avatar>
                </template>
                <template #append>
                  <v-chip size="x-small" variant="tonal">{{ t(`landing.entryPoints.${ep.key}.tag`) }}</v-chip>
                </template>
                <v-card-title>{{ t(`landing.entryPoints.${ep.key}.title`) }}</v-card-title>
              </v-card-item>
              <v-card-text>
                <p class="entry-card__description">{{ t(`landing.entryPoints.${ep.key}.description`) }}</p>
                <v-list class="entry-card__list" density="compact" bg-color="transparent">
                  <v-list-item v-for="point in ep.points" :key="point" class="px-0">
                    <template #prepend>
                      <v-icon icon="mdi-check-circle-outline" size="small" color="primary" />
                    </template>
                    <v-list-item-title>{{ t(`landing.entryPoints.${ep.key}.points.${point}`) }}</v-list-item-title>
                  </v-list-item>
                </v-list>
              </v-card-text>
              <v-card-actions>
                <v-btn v-if="ep.key === 'supplier'" :to="downloadTo" variant="outlined">
                  {{ t('landing.entryPoints.supplier.cta') }}
                </v-btn>
                <v-btn v-else-if="ep.key === 'client'" to="/offers" color="white" variant="flat">
                  {{ t('landing.entryPoints.client.cta') }}
                </v-btn>
              </v-card-actions>
            </v-card>
          </v-col>

          <v-col cols="12">
            <v-card class="landing-card entry-card entry-card--operator" variant="outlined" rounded="xl">
              <v-card-item>
                <template #prepend>
                  <v-avatar size="42" color="info" variant="tonal">
                    <v-icon icon="mdi-server-network" color="info" />
                  </v-avatar>
                </template>
                <template #append>
                  <v-chip size="x-small" variant="tonal">{{ t('landing.entryPoints.clouders.tag') }}</v-chip>
                </template>
                <v-card-title>{{ t('landing.entryPoints.clouders.title') }}</v-card-title>
              </v-card-item>
              <v-card-text class="entry-card__operator-body">
                <p class="entry-card__description">{{ t('landing.entryPoints.clouders.description') }}</p>
                <div class="entry-card__operator-points">
                  <v-chip
                    v-for="point in operatorPoints"
                    :key="point"
                    size="small"
                    variant="outlined"
                    class="mr-2 mb-2"
                  >
                    {{ t(`landing.entryPoints.clouders.points.${point}`) }}
                  </v-chip>
                </div>
              </v-card-text>
              <v-card-actions>
                <v-btn :href="cloudersContactTo" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" variant="text">
                  {{ t('landing.entryPoints.clouders.cta') }}
                </v-btn>
              </v-card-actions>
            </v-card>
          </v-col>
        </v-row>
      </v-container>
    </LandingRevealBlock>
  </section>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
const { t } = useI18n()
const { downloadTo, cloudersContactTo } = useLandingNav()

const primaryEntryPoints = [
  { key: 'client', icon: 'mdi-api', points: ['1', '2', '3'] },

### File: components/landing/FaqSection.vue
```
<template>
  <section id="faq" class="section">
    <LandingRevealBlock>
      <v-container>
        <h2>{{ t('landing.faq.title') }}</h2>
        <v-expansion-panels v-model="openedPanel" class="mt-6" variant="accordion">
          <v-expansion-panel v-for="key in faqItemKeys" :key="key" :elevation="0">
            <v-expansion-panel-title>
              {{ t(`landing.faq.items.${key}.q`) }}
            </v-expansion-panel-title>
            <v-expansion-panel-text>
              {{ t(`landing.faq.items.${key}.a`) }}
            </v-expansion-panel-text>
          </v-expansion-panel>
        </v-expansion-panels>
      </v-container>
    </LandingRevealBlock>
  </section>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
const { t, tm } = useI18n()
const { openedPanel } = useFaqState()

const faqItemKeys = computed(() => {
  const items = tm('landing.faq.items') as Record<string, unknown>
  return items && typeof items === 'object' ? Object.keys(items) : []
})

const faqSchema = computed(() => JSON.stringify({
  '@context': 'https://schema.org',
  '@type': 'FAQPage',
  mainEntity: faqItemKeys.value.map(key => ({
    '@type': 'Question',
    name: t(`landing.faq.items.${key}.q`),
    acceptedAnswer: {
      '@type': 'Answer',
      text: t(`landing.faq.items.${key}.a`)
    }
  }))
}))

useHead({
  script: [{ type: 'application/ld+json', innerHTML: faqSchema }]
})
</script>

```

<template>
  <section id="levels" class="section">
    <LandingRevealBlock>
      <v-container>
        <h2>{{ t('landing.levels.title') }}</h2>
        <v-row class="mt-6" align="stretch" density="comfortable">
          <v-col v-for="tier in tiers" :key="tier" cols="12" md="4">
            <v-card
              class="landing-card fill-height"
              :class="{ 'landing-card--highlight': tier === 'trusted' }"
              variant="outlined"
              :elevation="tier === 'trusted' ? 6 : 0"
            >
              <v-card-item>
                <template v-if="tier === 'trusted'" #append>
                  <v-chip color="primary" size="x-small" variant="flat">
                    {{ t('landing.levels.trusted.badge') }}
                  </v-chip>

              </v-card-item>
              <v-card-text>
                <v-list density="compact" bg-color="transparent">
                  <v-list-item v-for="key in getPointKeys(tier)" :key="key">
                    <template #prepend>
                      <v-icon
                        icon="mdi-check"
                        size="small"
                        :color="tier === 'trusted' ? 'primary' : undefined"
                      />
                    </template>
                    <v-list-item-title>{{ t(`landing.levels.${tier}.points.${key}`) }}</v-list-item-title>
                  </v-list-item>
                </v-list>
              </v-card-text>
            </v-card>
          </v-col>
        </v-row>
      </v-container>
    </LandingRevealBlock>
  </section>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
const { t, tm } = useI18n()
const tiers = ['public', 'trusted', 'hds']

}

<template>
  <section id="product" class="hero">
    <LandingGlowBackdrop />
    <LandingRevealBlock>
      <v-container class="hero__container">
        <div class="hero__content">
          <div class="hero__copy">
            <v-chip size="small" variant="flat" color="primary" class="hero__badge">
              {{ t('landing.hero.badge') }}
            </v-chip>

            <h1 class="hero__title">
              <span class="hero__title-prefix">{{ t('landing.hero.titlePrefix') }}</span>
              <span class="hero__title-word">
                <component :is="activeTitleTransition" mode="out-in">
                  <span :key="activeVariant?.text || t('landing.hero.fallbackTitleWord')" class="hero__title-emphasis">
                    {{ activeVariant?.text || t('landing.hero.fallbackTitleWord') }}
                  </span>
                </component>
              </span>
            </h1>

            <p class="hero__subtitle">
              {{ t('landing.hero.subtitle') }}
            </p>

            <div class="hero-audience d-flex ga-2 flex-wrap mt-6">
              <v-chip size="small" variant="tonal">{{ t('landing.hero.audiences.individuals') }}</v-chip>
              <v-chip size="small" variant="tonal">{{ t('landing.hero.audiences.enterprises') }}</v-chip>
              <v-chip size="small" variant="tonal">{{ t('landing.hero.audiences.clouders') }}</v-chip>
            </div>

            <v-row class="hero__signals mt-4" density="comfortable">
              <v-col v-for="signal in signals" :key="signal.key" cols="12" sm="4">
                <v-sheet class="hero-signal" rounded="lg" color="transparent" border>
                  <div class="hero-signal__value">{{ t(`landing.hero.signals.${signal.key}.value`) }}</div>
                  <div class="hero-signal__label">{{ t(`landing.hero.signals.${signal.key}.label`) }}</div>
                </v-sheet>
              </v-col>
            </v-row>

            <div class="hero__actions d-flex ga-3 flex-wrap mt-8">
              <v-btn to="/offers" color="white" variant="flat" size="large">
                {{ t('landing.hero.enterpriseCta') }}
              </v-btn>
              <v-btn :to="downloadTo" variant="outlined" size="large">
                {{ t('landing.hero.providerCta') }}
              </v-btn>
              <v-btn to="/docs" variant="text" size="large">
                {{ t('landing.hero.secondaryCta') }}
              </v-btn>
            </div>
          </div>

          <v-sheet class="hero__surface" rounded="xl" color="transparent" border>
            <div class="hero__surface-head">
              <div>
                <div class="hero__surface-eyebrow">{{ t('landing.hero.surfaceEyebrow') }}</div>
                <div class="hero__surface-title">{{ t('landing.hero.surfaceTitle') }}</div>
              </div>
              <v-chip size="small" variant="tonal" color="primary">
                {{ t('landing.hero.surfaceBadge') }}
              </v-chip>
            </div>

            <LandingHeroNetworkGraph />

            <v-row class="mt-4" density="comfortable">
              <v-col cols="12" md="6">
                <v-sheet class="hero-track hero-track--enterprise" rounded="lg" color="transparent">
                  <div class="hero-track__label">{{ t('landing.hero.tracks.enterprise.label') }}</div>
                  <div class="hero-track__title">{{ t('landing.hero.tracks.enterprise.title') }}</div>
                  <p class="hero-track__text">{{ t('landing.hero.tracks.enterprise.text') }}</p>
                </v-sheet>
              </v-col>
              <v-col cols="12" md="6">
                <v-sheet class="hero-track hero-track--provider" rounded="lg" color="transparent">
                  <div class="hero-track__label">{{ t('landing.hero.tracks.provider.label') }}</div>
                  <div class="hero-track__title">{{ t('landing.hero.tracks.provider.title') }}</div>
                  <p class="hero-track__text">{{ t('landing.hero.tracks.provider.text') }}</p>
                </v-sheet>
              </v-col>
            </v-row>
          </v-sheet>
        </div>
      </v-container>
    </LandingRevealBlock>
  </section>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed, onBeforeUnmount, onMounted, ref } from 'vue'

interface HeroTitleVariant {
  text: string
  effect?: string
}

const { t, tm } = useI18n()
const { downloadTo } = useLandingNav()
const { prefersReducedMotion } = useReducedMotion()
const activeVariantIndex = ref(0)
let variantTimer: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | undefined

const signals = [
  { key: 'compatibility' },
  { key: 'security' },
  { key: 'activation' }
]

const titleVariants = computed<HeroTitleVariant[]>(() => {
  const rawVariants = tm('landing.hero.titleVariants') as unknown as HeroTitleVariant[]
  if (!Array.isArray(rawVariants)) {
    return []
  }

  return rawVariants
    .map((variant) => {
      if (!variant || typeof variant !== 'object') return null

      const candidate = variant as { text?: unknown; effect?: unknown }
      if (typeof candidate.text !== 'string') return null

      return {
        text: candidate.text,
        effect: typeof candidate.effect === 'string' ? candidate.effect : undefined
      } as HeroTitleVariant
    })
    .filter((v): v is HeroTitleVariant => v !== null)
}) as ComputedRef<HeroTitleVariant[]>

const activeVariant = computed(() => titleVariants.value[activeVariantIndex.value] ?? null)

const effectTransitionMap: Record<string, string> = {
  fade: 'v-fade-transition',
  'slide-x': 'v-slide-x-transition',
  'slide-y': 'v-slide-y-transition',
  scale: 'v-scale-transition'
}

const activeTitleTransition = computed(() => {
  const effect = activeVariant.value?.effect ?? 'fade'
  return effectTransitionMap[effect] ?? effectTransitionMap.fade
})

onMounted(() => {
  if (titleVariants.value.length <= 1 || prefersReducedMotion.value) {
    return
  }

  variantTimer = setInterval(() => {
    activeVariantIndex.value = (activeVariantIndex.value + 1) % titleVariants.value.length
  }, 2200)
})

onBeforeUnmount(() => {
  if (variantTimer) {
    clearInterval(variantTimer)
  }
})
</script>

<style scoped lang="scss">
.hero {
  padding-top: 140px;
  padding-bottom: 96px;
  position: relative;
}

.hero__container {
  position: relative;
  z-index: 1;
}

.hero__content {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1.05fr) minmax(320px, 0.95fr);
  gap: 32px;
  align-items: center;
}

}

}

  min-height: 1.2em;
}

  -webkit-background-clip: text;
  background-clip: text;
  color: transparent;
  display: inline-block;
}

}

  backdrop-filter: blur(12px);

  letter-spacing: 0.08em;

}

}

<style scoped lang="scss">
.how__head {

  color: var(--inf-token-color-text-secondary);

    align-items: flex-start;
    flex-direction: column;

### File: components/landing/LandingHeader.vue
```
<template>
  <v-app-bar class="landing-header" scroll-behavior="elevate" flat>
    <v-container class="landing-header__container d-flex align-center ga-2">
      <NuxtLink to="/" class="landing-header__brand d-flex align-center">
        <v-img
          :src="logoSrc"
          :alt="t('app.name')"
          height="28"
          width="110"
          contain
        />
      </NuxtLink>

      <template v-if="display.mdAndUp.value">
        <v-spacer />

        <nav aria-label="Primary" class="landing-header__desktop-nav">
          <v-btn
            v-for="item in desktopLinks"
            :key="item.key"
            :to="item.to"
            :variant="item.variant"
            :exact="true"
            size="small"
            rounded="pill"
            class="landing-header__nav-btn landing-header__nav-btn--link"
            :class="{ 'landing-header__nav-btn--active': isNavActive(item.to) }"
          >
            {{ t(item.key) }}
          </v-btn>
        </nav>

        <div class="landing-header__desktop-actions">
          <div class="landing-header__desktop-cta-group">
            <v-btn
              v-for="item in desktopActions"
              :key="item.key"
              :to="item.to"
              :variant="item.variant"
              :color="item.color"
              :prepend-icon="item.icon"
              :exact="true"
              size="small"
              rounded="pill"
              class="landing-header__nav-btn"
              :class="[
                item.emphasis === 'strong'
                  ? 'landing-header__nav-btn--download'
                  : 'landing-header__nav-btn--playground',
                { 'landing-header__nav-btn--active': isNavActive(item.to) }
              ]"
            >
              {{ t(item.key) }}
            </v-btn>
          </div>

          <div class="landing-header__desktop-group landing-header__desktop-group--preferences">
            <InfLanguageToggle />
            <InfThemeToggle />
          </div>

          <div class="landing-header__desktop-group landing-header__desktop-group--identity">
            <v-btn
              v-if="!isAuthenticated"
              class="identity-cta"
              :to="{ path: '/auth/login', query: { next: route.fullPath } }"
              size="small"
              color="primary"
              variant="flat"
              rounded="pill"
            >
              {{ t('nav.sign_in') }}
            </v-btn>

            <v-menu v-else>
              <template #activator="{ props }">
                <v-btn v-bind="props" class="identity-account" prepend-icon="mdi-account-circle" size="small" variant="text" rounded="pill">
                  {{ userLabel }}
                </v-btn>
              </template>
              <v-list density="compact">
                <v-list-item :title="t('nav.authenticated_as', { level: session?.level || 'user' })" />
                <v-divider />
                <v-list-item v-if="canAccessAdmin" :to="'/admin'" :title="t('nav.admin_overview')" prepend-icon="mdi-shield-crown-outline" color="primary" />
                <v-list-item :to="'/profile'" :title="t('nav.manage_profile')" prepend-icon="mdi-account-cog-outline" />
                <v-list-item :title="t('nav.logout')" prepend-icon="mdi-logout" @click="onLogout" />
              </v-list>
            </v-menu>
          </div>
        </div>
      </template>

      <template v-else>
        <v-spacer />
        <v-app-bar-nav-icon class="ml-1" @click="drawer = !drawer" />
      </template>
    </v-container>
  </v-app-bar>

  <v-navigation-drawer
    v-if="display.smAndDown.value"
    v-model="drawer"
    location="right"
    temporary
  >
    <v-list nav>
      <v-list-subheader>{{ t('nav.navigation') }}</v-list-subheader>
      <v-list-item
        v-for="item in mobileItems"
        :key="item.key"
        :to="item.to"
        :title="t(item.key)"
        :prepend-icon="item.icon"
        :class="item.listClass"
        :active="isNavActive(item.to)"
        @click="drawer = false"
      />

      <v-divider class="my-2" />
      <v-list-subheader>{{ t('theme.title') }}</v-list-subheader>
      <v-list-item :title="t('nav.language')" prepend-icon="mdi-translate" />
      <v-list-item :title="t('theme.toggle')" prepend-icon="mdi-theme-light-dark" @click="toggleThemeFromMobile" />

      <v-divider class="my-2" />
      <v-list-subheader>{{ t('nav.account') }}</v-list-subheader>
      <v-list-item
        v-if="!isAuthenticated"
        :to="{ path: '/auth/login', query: { next: route.fullPath } }"
        :title="t('nav.sign_in')"
        @click="drawer = false"
      />
      <template v-else>
        <v-list-item
          v-for="item in desktopAccountActions"
          :key="item.key"
          :to="item.to"
          :title="t(item.key)"
          :class="item.listClass"
          :active="isNavActive(item.to)"
          :prepend-icon="item.icon"
          @click="drawer = false"
        />
        <v-list-item :to="'/profile'" :title="t('nav.manage_profile')" prepend-icon="mdi-account-cog-outline" @click="drawer = false" />
        <v-list-item
          :title="t('nav.logout')"
          prepend-icon="mdi-logout"
          @click="onMobileLogout"
        />
      </template>
    </v-list>
  </v-navigation-drawer>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { useDisplay, useTheme } from 'vuetify'
import InfLanguageToggle from '~/components/infra/InfLanguageToggle.vue'
import InfThemeToggle from '~/components/infra/InfThemeToggle.vue'

const { t } = useI18n()
const { items, primaryActions } = useLandingNav()
const display = useDisplay()
const vuetifyTheme = useTheme()
const { current } = vuetifyTheme
const drawer = ref(false)
const route = useRoute()
const router = useRouter()
const { session, fetchMe, logout } = useAuthSession()

const logoSrc = computed(() =>
  current.value.dark
    ? '/brand/logo/svg/infera_lockup_horizontal_reverse.svg'
    : '/brand/logo/svg/infera_lockup_horizontal_primary.svg'
)

const isAuthenticated = computed(() => Boolean(session.value))
const canAccessAdmin = computed(() => session.value?.level === 'admin' || Boolean(session.value?.roles?.includes('ROLE_ADMIN')))
const userLabel = computed(() => session.value?.name || session.value?.email || session.value?.subject?.slice(0, 12) || t('nav.account'))

interface LandingNavItem {
  key: string
  to: string
  variant: 'text' | 'tonal' | 'flat'
  color?: string
  icon?: string
  listClass?: string
  emphasis?: 'strong' | 'light'
}

const desktopLinks = computed<LandingNavItem[]>(() =>
  items.map(item => ({
    key: item.key,
    to: item.to,
    variant: 'text'
  }))
)

const desktopActions = computed<LandingNavItem[]>(() =>
  primaryActions.map(item => ({
    key: item.key,
    to: item.to,
    variant: item.variant,
    color: item.color,
    icon: item.icon,
    emphasis: item.emphasis as 'strong' | 'light'
  }))
)

const desktopAccountActions = computed<LandingNavItem[]>(() => {
  const accountItems: LandingNavItem[] = []

  if (isAuthenticated.value) {
    accountItems.push({
      key: 'nav.dashboard',
      to: '/',
      variant: 'text',
      icon: 'mdi-view-dashboard-outline'
    })
  }

  if (canAccessAdmin.value) {
    accountItems.push({
      key: 'nav.admin_overview',
      to: '/admin',
      variant: 'text',
      icon: 'mdi-shield-crown-outline'
    })
  }

  return accountItems
})

const mobileItems = computed(() =>
  [
    ...desktopLinks.value.map(item => ({
      ...item,
      listClass: 'landing-header__mobile-list-item'
    })),
    ...desktopActions.value.map(item => ({
      ...item,
      listClass:
        item.emphasis === 'strong'
          ? 'landing-header__mobile-list-item landing-header__mobile-list-item--download'
          : 'landing-header__mobile-list-item landing-header__mobile-list-item--playground'
    }))
  ]
)

function isNavActive(to: string) {
  if (to === '/') {
    return route.path === '/'
  }

  return route.path === to || route.path.startsWith(`${to}/`)
}

onMounted(async () => {
  if (!session.value) {
    await fetchMe()
  }
})

async function onLogout() {
  await logout()
  if (route.path.startsWith('/admin')) {
    await router.push({ path: '/auth/login', query: { next: route.fullPath } })
  }
}

async function onMobileLogout() {
  drawer.value = false
  await onLogout()
}

function toggleThemeFromMobile() {
  vuetifyTheme.global.name.value = vuetifyTheme.global.current.value.dark ? 'light' : 'dark'
}
</script>

<style scoped lang="scss">
.landing-header {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at 16% -20%, color-mix(in oklab, var(--inf-token-color-accent-glow) 66%, transparent) 0%, transparent 48%),
    color-mix(in oklab, var(--inf-token-color-bg-base) 76%, transparent);
  backdrop-filter: blur(14px) saturate(130%);
  border-bottom: 1px solid color-mix(in oklab, var(--inf-token-color-line-subtle) 82%, transparent);
}

}

### File: components/landing/OrbitalPeerHero.vue
```
<template>
  <section
    class="orbital-peer-hero"
    :class="[`orbital-peer-hero--${variant}`, `orbital-peer-hero--${layout}`]"
    :data-theme="resolvedTheme"
    :style="heroStyle"
  >
    <div class="orbital-peer-hero__field" aria-hidden="true">
      <canvas
        v-if="variant === 'particles'"
        ref="canvasRef"
        class="orbital-peer-hero__canvas"
      />

      <div v-else class="orbital-peer-hero__css-scene">
        <span
          v-for="ring in rings"
          :key="ring.key"
          class="orbital-peer-hero__ring"
          :style="ring.style"
        />
        <span
          v-for="link in links"
          :key="link.key"
          class="orbital-peer-hero__link"
          :style="link.style"
        />
        <span
          v-for="node in nodes"
          :key="node.key"
          class="orbital-peer-hero__node"
          :class="{ 'orbital-peer-hero__node--core': node.core }"
          :style="node.style"
        />
        <span
          v-for="packet in packets"
          :key="packet.key"
          class="orbital-peer-hero__packet"
          :style="packet.style"
        />
      </div>
    </div>

    <v-container class="orbital-peer-hero__container">
      <div class="orbital-peer-hero__content">
        <div class="orbital-peer-hero__copy">

          <h1>
            <span class="orbital-peer-hero__title-prefix">{{ titlePrefix }}</span>
            <span class="orbital-peer-hero__title-word">
              <component :is="activeTitleTransition" mode="out-in">
                <span
                  :key="activeTitleVariant?.text || titleFallbackWord"
                  class="orbital-peer-hero__title-emphasis"
                >
                  {{ activeTitleVariant?.text || titleFallbackWord }}
                </span>
              </component>
            </span>
          </h1>
          <p>{{ t(`${contentKey}.subtitle`) }}</p>

          <div class="orbital-peer-hero__actions">
            <v-btn
              :to="downloadTo"
              color="primary"
              size="x-large"
              variant="flat"
              prepend-icon="mdi-lan-connect"
              class="orbital-peer-hero__btn orbital-peer-hero__btn--primary"
            >
              {{ t(`${contentKey}.primaryCta`) }}
            </v-btn>
            <v-btn
              to="/offers"
              size="x-large"
              variant="outlined"
              prepend-icon="mdi-domain"
              class="orbital-peer-hero__btn orbital-peer-hero__btn--secondary"
            >
              {{ t(`${contentKey}.secondaryCta`) }}
            </v-btn>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="orbital-peer-hero__metrics" :aria-label="t('landing.orbitalHero.metrics.label')">
          <div
            v-for="metric in metricCards"
            :key="metric.key"
            class="orbital-peer-hero__metric"
          >
            <span>{{ metric.value }}</span>
            <small>{{ t(metric.labelKey) }}</small>
          </div>
          <v-chip size="small" variant="tonal" class="orbital-peer-hero__source">
            {{ t(`landing.orbitalHero.metrics.source.${metrics.source}`) }}
          </v-chip>
        </div>
      </div>
    </v-container>
  </section>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed, onBeforeUnmount, onMounted, ref, watch } from 'vue'
import type { CSSProperties } from 'vue'
import type { LandingClusterMetrics } from '~/composables/useLandingClusterMetrics'

export type OrbitalPeerHeroVariant = 'aurora' | 'particles' | 'light' | 'inline'
export type OrbitalPeerHeroLayout = 'split' | 'full'

export interface OrbitalPeerHeroConfig {
  density: number
  orbitCount: number
  packetCount: number
  motion: number
  glow: number
  visualScale: number
  linkOpacity: number
}

interface HeroTitleVariant {
  text: string
  effect?: string
}

const DEFAULT_CONFIG: OrbitalPeerHeroConfig = {
  density: 18,
  orbitCount: 5,
  packetCount: 8,
  motion: 1,
  glow: 0.76,
  visualScale: 1,
  linkOpacity: 0.34
}

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<{
  variant?: OrbitalPeerHeroVariant
  layout?: OrbitalPeerHeroLayout
  contentKey: string
  metrics: LandingClusterMetrics
  config?: Partial<OrbitalPeerHeroConfig>
}>(), {
  variant: 'aurora',
  layout: 'split',
  config: () => ({})
})

const { locale, t, tm, te, n } = useI18n()
const { activeTheme } = useThemePreference()
const { downloadTo } = useLandingNav()
const { prefersReducedMotion } = useReducedMotion()

const canvasRef = ref<HTMLCanvasElement | null>(null)
const activeTitleVariantIndex = ref(0)
let raf = 0
let resizeObserver: ResizeObserver | null = null
let titleVariantTimer: ReturnType<typeof setInterval> | undefined

const resolvedTheme = computed(() => props.variant === 'light' ? 'light' : activeTheme.value)
const cfg = computed<OrbitalPeerHeroConfig>(() => ({ ...DEFAULT_CONFIG, ...props.config }))
const title = computed(() => t(`${props.contentKey}.title`))
const fallbackTitleParts = computed(() => {
  const words = title.value.trim().split(/\s+/)
  const fallbackWord = words.pop() ?? title.value

  return {
    prefix: words.join(' '),
    word: fallbackWord
  }
})

const titlePrefix = computed(() => {
  const key = `${props.contentKey}.titlePrefix`
  return te(key) ? t(key) : fallbackTitleParts.value.prefix
})

const titleFallbackWord = computed(() => {
  const key = `${props.contentKey}.fallbackTitleWord`
  return te(key) ? t(key) : fallbackTitleParts.value.word
})

const titleVariants = computed<HeroTitleVariant[]>(() => {
  const key = `${props.contentKey}.titleVariants`
  if (!te(key)) {
    return []
  }

  const rawVariants = tm(key) as unknown as HeroTitleVariant[]
  if (!Array.isArray(rawVariants)) {
    return []
  }

  return rawVariants
    .map((variant) => {
      if (!variant || typeof variant !== 'object') return null

      const candidate = variant as { text?: unknown; effect?: unknown }
      if (typeof candidate.text !== 'string') return null

      return {
        text: candidate.text,
        effect: typeof candidate.effect === 'string' ? candidate.effect : undefined
      } as HeroTitleVariant
    })
    .filter((variant): variant is HeroTitleVariant => variant !== null)
})

const activeTitleVariant = computed(() => titleVariants.value[activeTitleVariantIndex.value] ?? null)

const effectTransitionMap: Record<string, string> = {
  fade: 'v-fade-transition',
  reveal: 'v-slide-y-transition',
  'slide-x': 'v-slide-x-transition',
  'slide-y': 'v-slide-y-transition',
  scale: 'v-scale-transition'
}

const activeTitleTransition = computed(() => {
  const effect = activeTitleVariant.value?.effect ?? 'reveal'
  return effectTransitionMap[effect] ?? effectTransitionMap.reveal
})

const seed = computed(() => {
  const m = props.metrics
  return (m.activeNodes * 31 + m.totalNodes * 13 + m.accountedInferences * 17 + m.totalTokens) % 100000
})

const seeded = (index: number, salt = 0) => {
  const value = Math.sin(seed.value + index * 91.7 + salt * 37.3) * 10000
  return value - Math.floor(value)
}

const activity = computed(() => Math.min(1, Math.max(0.18, props.metrics.activeNodes / Math.max(props.metrics.totalNodes, 1))))
const tokenPressure = computed(() => Math.min(1, Math.log10(Math.max(props.metrics.totalTokens, 10)) / 7))
const nodeCount = computed(() => Math.min(36, Math.max(9, Math.round(cfg.value.density + props.metrics.activeNodes * 0.36))))
const packetCount = computed(() => Math.min(22, Math.max(4, Math.round(cfg.value.packetCount + tokenPressure.value * 10))))
const motionFactor = computed(() => prefersReducedMotion.value ? 0 : cfg.value.motion * (0.74 + activity.value * 0.5))

const heroStyle = computed<CSSProperties>(() => ({
  '--peer-motion': String(motionFactor.value),
  '--peer-glow': String(cfg.value.glow),
  '--peer-scale': String(cfg.value.visualScale),
  '--peer-link-opacity': String(cfg.value.linkOpacity)
}))

const rings = computed(() => Array.from({ length: cfg.value.orbitCount }, (_, index) => ({
  key: `ring-${index}`,
  style: {
    '--ring-index': String(index),
    '--ring-size': `${42 + index * 12}%`,
    '--ring-tilt': `${-22 + index * 19}deg`,
    '--ring-duration': `${animationSeconds(26 - Math.min(index * 2, 10))}s`
  } as CSSProperties
})))

const nodes = computed(() => Array.from({ length: nodeCount.value }, (_, index) => {
  const core = index === 0
  const ring = core ? 0 : (index % Math.max(cfg.value.orbitCount, 1)) + 1
  const angle = seeded(index, 3) * Math.PI * 2
  const radius = core ? 0 : 16 + ring * (7.4 + activity.value * 2.4)
  const x = 50 + Math.cos(angle) * radius * 1.18
  const y = 50 + Math.sin(angle) * radius * 0.62
  const size = core ? 34 + activity.value * 16 : 7 + seeded(index, 7) * 10

  return {
    key: `node-${index}`,
    core,
    style: {
      '--node-x': `${Math.min(91, Math.max(9, x))}%`,
      '--node-y': `${Math.min(88, Math.max(12, y))}%`,
      '--node-size': `${size}px`,
      '--node-delay': `${seeded(index, 11) * -4}s`,
      '--node-duration': `${animationSeconds(3.4)}s`,
      '--node-color': index % 4 === 0 ? 'var(--peer-teal)' : index % 4 === 1 ? 'var(--peer-blue)' : index % 4 === 2 ? 'var(--peer-green)' : 'var(--peer-amber)'
    } as CSSProperties
  }
}))

const links = computed(() => nodes.value.slice(1, 15).map((node, index) => {
  const x = Number.parseFloat(String(node.style['--node-x']))
  const y = Number.parseFloat(String(node.style['--node-y']))
  const dx = 50 - x
  const dy = 50 - y
  const length = Math.hypot(dx, dy)
  const angle = Math.atan2(dy, dx) * 180 / Math.PI

  return {
    key: `link-${index}`,
    style: {
      '--link-x': `${x}%`,
      '--link-y': `${y}%`,
      '--link-length': `${length}%`,
      '--link-angle': `${angle}deg`
    } as CSSProperties
  }
}))

const packets = computed(() => Array.from({ length: packetCount.value }, (_, index) => ({
  key: `packet-${index}`,
  style: {
    '--packet-size': `${4 + seeded(index, 17) * 4}px`,
    '--packet-delay': `${seeded(index, 19) * -12}s`,
    '--packet-duration': `${animationSeconds(8 + seeded(index, 23) * 11)}s`,
    '--packet-path': `${42 + seeded(index, 29) * 22}%`
  } as CSSProperties
})))

const metricCards = computed(() => [
  {
    key: 'nodes',
    value: n(props.metrics.activeNodes),
    labelKey: 'landing.orbitalHero.metrics.activeNodes'
  },
  {
    key: 'inferences',
    value: n(props.metrics.totalKeys),
    labelKey: 'landing.orbitalHero.metrics.inferences'
  },
  {
    key: 'tokens',
    value: formatCompact(props.metrics.totalTokens),
    labelKey: 'landing.orbitalHero.metrics.tokens'
  }
])

function animationSeconds(baseSeconds: number) {
  if (motionFactor.value <= 0) {
    return baseSeconds
  }

  return Number((baseSeconds / motionFactor.value).toFixed(2))
}

function formatCompact(value: number) {
  return new Intl.NumberFormat(locale.value, {
    notation: 'compact',
    maximumFractionDigits: 1
  }).format(value)
}

function drawParticles(time = 0) {
  const canvas = canvasRef.value
  const ctx = canvas?.getContext('2d')
  if (!canvas || !ctx) return

  const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect()
  const width = rect.width
  const height = rect.height
  ctx.clearRect(0, 0, width, height)

  const cx = width * (props.layout === 'full' ? 0.5 : 0.67)
  const cy = height * 0.48
  const scale = Math.min(width / 1280, height / 720) * cfg.value.visualScale
  const points = nodes.value.map((node, index) => {
    const ring = index % Math.max(cfg.value.orbitCount, 1)
    const angle = seeded(index, 31) * Math.PI * 2 + (prefersReducedMotion.value ? 0 : time * 0.00008 * cfg.value.motion * (ring + 1))
    const radius = index === 0 ? 0 : (86 + ring * 58 + seeded(index, 37) * 42) * scale
    return {
      x: cx + Math.cos(angle) * radius * 1.56,
      y: cy + Math.sin(angle) * radius * 0.58,
      r: index === 0 ? 15 + activity.value * 10 : 3 + seeded(index, 41) * 5,
      hue: index % 4
    }
  })

  points.forEach((point, index) => {
    points.slice(index + 1).forEach((next) => {
      const distance = Math.hypot(point.x - next.x, point.y - next.y)
      if (distance > 230 * scale && index !== 0) return
      ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(37, 99, 235, ${Math.max(0.04, cfg.value.linkOpacity - distance / 820)})`
      ctx.lineWidth = 1
      ctx.beginPath()
      ctx.moveTo(point.x, point.y)
      ctx.lineTo(next.x, next.y)
      ctx.stroke()
    })
  })

  packets.value.forEach((packet, index) => {
    const from = points[index % points.length]
    const to = points[(index * 5 + 3) % points.length]
    if (!from || !to) return
    const speed = Number.parseFloat(String(packet.style['--packet-duration']))
    const progress = prefersReducedMotion.value ? seeded(index, 47) : ((time / 1000 + seeded(index, 47) * speed) % speed) / speed
    const x = from.x + (to.x - from.x) * progress
    const y = from.y + (to.y - from.y) * progress
    ctx.fillStyle = index % 3 === 0 ? '#10b981' : '#06b6d4'
    ctx.shadowColor = ctx.fillStyle
    ctx.shadowBlur = 18 * cfg.value.glow
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.arc(x, y, 3.5, 0, Math.PI * 2)
    ctx.fill()
    ctx.shadowBlur = 0
  })

  points.forEach((point) => {
    const color = point.hue === 0 ? '#06b6d4' : point.hue === 1 ? '#2563eb' : point.hue === 2 ? '#10b981' : '#f59e0b'
    ctx.fillStyle = color
    ctx.shadowColor = color
    ctx.shadowBlur = 20 * cfg.value.glow
    ctx.beginPath()
    ctx.arc(point.x, point.y, point.r, 0, Math.PI * 2)
    ctx.fill()
    ctx.shadowBlur = 0
  })

  raf = requestAnimationFrame(drawParticles)
}

function resizeCanvas() {
  const canvas = canvasRef.value
  if (!canvas) return

  const dpr = Math.min(window.devicePixelRatio || 1, 2)
  const rect = canvas.getBoundingClientRect()
  canvas.width = Math.floor(rect.width * dpr)
  canvas.height = Math.floor(rect.height * dpr)
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d')
  ctx?.setTransform(dpr, 0, 0, dpr, 0, 0)
}

function startCanvas() {
  if (props.variant !== 'particles' || import.meta.server) return
  resizeCanvas()
  cancelAnimationFrame(raf)
  raf = requestAnimationFrame(drawParticles)

  if (canvasRef.value && !resizeObserver) {
    resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(resizeCanvas)
    resizeObserver.observe(canvasRef.value)
  }
}

function startTitleVariants() {
  if (titleVariantTimer) {
    clearInterval(titleVariantTimer)
    titleVariantTimer = undefined
  }

  activeTitleVariantIndex.value = 0

  if (titleVariants.value.length <= 1 || prefersReducedMotion.value) {
    return
  }

  titleVariantTimer = setInterval(() => {
    activeTitleVariantIndex.value = (activeTitleVariantIndex.value + 1) % titleVariants.value.length
  }, 2400)
}

onMounted(startCanvas)
onMounted(startTitleVariants)

watch(() => [props.variant, props.metrics, cfg.value], startCanvas, { deep: true })
watch(titleVariants, startTitleVariants)
watch(prefersReducedMotion, startTitleVariants)

onBeforeUnmount(() => {
  cancelAnimationFrame(raf)
  resizeObserver?.disconnect()
  resizeObserver = null
  if (titleVariantTimer) {
    clearInterval(titleVariantTimer)
  }
})
</script>

<template>
  <div ref="target" class="reveal-block">
    <transition name="reveal" appear>
      <div v-show="isVisible" class="reveal-block__inner">
        <slot />
      </div>
    </transition>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
const { prefersReducedMotion } = useReducedMotion()
const { target, isVisible } = useScrollReveal(prefersReducedMotion)
</script>

<style scoped lang="scss">
.reveal-block {
  width: 100%;
}

.reveal-block__inner {
  width: 100%;
}

.reveal-enter-active,
.reveal-leave-active {
  transition: opacity 320ms ease, transform 320ms ease;
}

.reveal-enter-from,
.reveal-leave-to {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(12px);
}

@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  .reveal-enter-active,
  .reveal-leave-active {
    transition: none;
  }

  .reveal-enter-from,
  .reveal-leave-to {
    opacity: 1;
    transform: none;

### File: components/landing/RevenueSimulator.vue
```
<template>
  <v-card variant="outlined" class="landing-card revenue-simulator">
    <v-card-title class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
      <v-icon icon="mdi-chart-areaspline" />
      <span>{{ t('download.simulator.title') }}</span>
    </v-card-title>

    <v-card-subtitle>{{ t('download.simulator.subtitle') }}</v-card-subtitle>

    <v-card-text>
      <div v-if="loading" class="py-8">
        <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis mb-3">
          {{ t('download.simulator.benchmarkRunning', { progress: benchmarkProgress }) }}
        </div>
        <v-progress-linear
          :model-value="benchmarkProgress"
          color="primary"
          height="10"
          rounded
          striped
          animated
        />
      </div>

      <div v-else class="d-flex flex-column ga-4">
        <v-row dense>
          <v-col cols="12" sm="6">
            <v-sheet class="revenue-simulator__metric" rounded="xl">
              <div class="text-overline text-medium-emphasis">{{ t('download.simulator.hardware') }}</div>
              <div class="text-subtitle-1 font-weight-bold">{{ benchmarkLabel }}</div>
              <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ runtimeLabel }}</div>
            </v-sheet>
          </v-col>

          <v-col cols="12" sm="6">
            <v-sheet class="revenue-simulator__metric" rounded="xl">
              <div class="text-overline text-medium-emphasis">{{ t('download.simulator.vram') }}</div>
              <div class="text-subtitle-1 font-weight-bold">{{ benchmarkVram }} GB</div>
              <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ confidenceLabel }}</div>
            </v-sheet>
          </v-col>
        </v-row>

        <v-alert
          v-if="benchmark?.webgpuSupported === false"
          type="info"
          variant="tonal"
          density="comfortable"
          icon="mdi-monitor-shimmer"
        >
          {{ t('download.simulator.partialConfidence') }}
        </v-alert>

        <v-card variant="tonal" color="primary">
          <v-card-text class="d-flex flex-column ga-4">
            <div class="d-flex align-center justify-space-between flex-wrap ga-2">
              <div>
                <div class="text-overline">{{ t('download.simulator.monthlyBase') }}</div>
                <div class="text-h4 font-weight-bold">{{ formatCurrency(baseMonthlyEstimate) }}</div>
              </div>
              <v-chip variant="flat" color="white" prepend-icon="mdi-clock-outline">
                {{ t('download.simulator.uptimeValue', { hours: uptimeHours }) }}
              </v-chip>
            </div>

            <v-slider
              v-model="uptimeHours"
              :min="2"
              :max="24"
              :step="1"
              thumb-label="always"
              :label="t('download.simulator.uptime')"
              color="white"
              hide-details
            />
          </v-card-text>
        </v-card>

        <v-row dense>
          <v-col cols="12" sm="6">
            <v-card variant="outlined" class="h-100">
              <v-card-item>
                <template #prepend>
                  <v-avatar color="success" variant="tonal">
                    <v-icon icon="mdi-check-decagram-outline" />
                  </v-avatar>
                </template>
                <v-card-title>{{ t('download.simulator.publicEstimate') }}</v-card-title>
                <v-card-subtitle>{{ t('download.simulator.publicEstimateHint') }}</v-card-subtitle>
              </v-card-item>
              <v-card-text>
                <div class="text-h5 font-weight-bold">{{ formatCurrency(baseMonthlyEstimate) }}</div>
                <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis mt-1">
                  {{ t('download.simulator.baseRate', { amount: formatCurrency(baseHourlyEstimate) }) }}
                </div>
              </v-card-text>
            </v-card>
          </v-col>

          <v-col cols="12" sm="6">
            <v-card variant="outlined" class="h-100 trusted-estimate">
              <v-card-item>
                <template #prepend>
                  <v-avatar color="warning" variant="tonal">
                    <v-icon icon="mdi-shield-star-outline" />
                  </v-avatar>
                </template>
                <v-card-title>{{ t('download.simulator.trustedEstimate') }}</v-card-title>
                <v-card-subtitle>{{ t('download.simulator.multiplierLabel', { multiplier: trustedMultiplierLabel }) }}</v-card-subtitle>
              </v-card-item>
              <v-card-text>
                <div class="text-h5 font-weight-bold">{{ formatCurrency(trustedMonthlyEstimate) }}</div>
                <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis mt-1">
                  {{ t('download.simulator.multiplierDetail', { base: formatCurrency(baseMonthlyEstimate), trusted: formatCurrency(trustedMonthlyEstimate) }) }}
                </div>
              </v-card-text>
            </v-card>
          </v-col>
        </v-row>

        <v-card variant="tonal" :color="trustedEligible ? 'success' : 'warning'">
          <v-card-item>
            <template #prepend>
              <v-icon :icon="trustedEligible ? 'mdi-shield-check-outline' : 'mdi-shield-alert-outline'" />
            </template>
            <v-card-title>{{ t(trustedEligible ? 'download.simulator.trustedReadyTitle' : 'download.simulator.trustedGapTitle') }}</v-card-title>
            <v-card-subtitle>{{ t(trustedEligible ? 'download.simulator.trustedReadySubtitle' : 'download.simulator.trustedGapSubtitle') }}</v-card-subtitle>
          </v-card-item>
          <v-card-text class="text-body-2">
            <div v-if="isAppleTrustedFlow">{{ t('download.simulator.appleTrustedNote') }}</div>
            <div v-else-if="trustedEligible">{{ t('download.simulator.trustedReadyBody') }}</div>
            <div v-else>{{ t('download.simulator.trustedGapBody') }}</div>
          </v-card-text>
        </v-card>

        <v-list density="comfortable" lines="two" class="pa-0" bg-color="transparent">
          <v-list-item>
            <template #prepend>
              <v-icon icon="mdi-calculator-variant-outline" color="primary" />
            </template>
            <v-list-item-title>{{ t('download.simulator.multiplierExplainTitle') }}</v-list-item-title>
            <v-list-item-subtitle>{{ t('download.simulator.multiplierExplainBody', { multiplier: trustedMultiplierLabel }) }}</v-list-item-subtitle>
          </v-list-item>
          <v-list-item>
            <template #prepend>
              <v-icon icon="mdi-gauge" color="primary" />
            </template>
            <v-list-item-title>{{ t('download.simulator.benchmarkExplainTitle') }}</v-list-item-title>
            <v-list-item-subtitle>{{ t('download.simulator.benchmarkExplainBody') }}</v-list-item-subtitle>
          </v-list-item>
        </v-list>

        <v-alert type="info" variant="tonal" class="text-caption" density="comfortable">
          {{ t('download.simulator.disclaimer') }}
        </v-alert>
      </div>
    </v-card-text>
  </v-card>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed, onMounted, ref } from 'vue'
import { useHardwareBenchmark } from '~/composables/useHardwareBenchmark'
import { useModelCatalogRepository } from '~/composables/useModelCatalogRepository'
import { usePricingPolicyRepository } from '~/composables/usePricingPolicyRepository'

type DownloadMode = 'public' | 'native' | 'trusted'

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<{
  activeTier?: DownloadMode
  isAppleTrustedFlow?: boolean
}>(), {
  activeTier: 'public',
  isAppleTrustedFlow: false
})

const { t, locale } = useI18n()
const { listModels } = useModelCatalogRepository()
const { readPolicy } = usePricingPolicyRepository()
const { progress: benchmarkProgress, result, runBenchmark } = useHardwareBenchmark()

const loading = ref(true)
const uptimeHours = ref(12)
const averageRevenuePerHour = ref(0)
const trustedMultiplier = ref(1.4)

const benchmark = computed(() => result.value)
const benchmarkLabel = computed(() => benchmark.value?.gpu.name || t('download.simulator.unknownHardware'))
const benchmarkVram = computed(() => benchmark.value?.gpu.vramGbEstimate || 0)
const runtimeLabel = computed(() => t('download.simulator.runtimeValue', { runtime: benchmark.value?.gpu.runtime || 'unknown' }))
const confidenceLabel = computed(() => t(`models.hardware.confidence.${benchmark.value?.gpu.vramConfidence || 'low'}`))

const trustedEligible = computed(() => {
  if (props.isAppleTrustedFlow) return true
  const probe = benchmark.value
  if (!probe) return false
  return probe.gpu.runtime !== 'unknown' && probe.gpu.vramGbEstimate >= 8
})

const baseHourlyEstimate = computed(() => averageRevenuePerHour.value)
const baseMonthlyEstimate = computed(() => uptimeHours.value * baseHourlyEstimate.value * 30)
const trustedMonthlyEstimate = computed(() => baseMonthlyEstimate.value * trustedMultiplier.value)
const trustedMultiplierLabel = computed(() => trustedMultiplier.value.toFixed(2))

onMounted(async () => {
  try {
    await runBenchmark()

    const [models, pricing] = await Promise.all([
      listModels(),
      readPolicy().catch(() => null)
    ])

    const vramBudget = Math.max(benchmarkVram.value * 0.8, 4)
    const fitModels = models.filter((model) => {
      const parsedSize = Number.parseFloat(model.modelSize || '')
      return Number.isFinite(parsedSize) && parsedSize <= vramBudget
    })

    let totalRate = 0
    let count = 0
    fitModels.forEach((model) => {
      const outputRate = model.billing?.payPerToken?.output
      if (typeof outputRate === 'number' && Number.isFinite(outputRate)) {
        totalRate += outputRate * 10 * 3600
        count += 1
      }
    })

    averageRevenuePerHour.value = count > 0
      ? totalRate / count
      : Math.max(benchmarkVram.value, 4) * 0.005

    const trustedTierPolicy = pricing?.tiers.find(row => row.tier.includes('TRUST'))
    trustedMultiplier.value = trustedTierPolicy?.multiplier ?? 1.4
  } catch (error) {
    console.error('Failed to load simulator data', error)
    averageRevenuePerHour.value = Math.max(benchmarkVram.value, 4) * 0.005
  } finally {
    loading.value = false
  }
})

function formatCurrency(value: number) {
  return new Intl.NumberFormat(locale.value, {
    style: 'currency',
    currency: 'EUR',
    maximumFractionDigits: 0
  }).format(value)
}
</script>

<style scoped lang="scss">
.revenue-simulator {
  border-radius: 24px;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.12), transparent 42%),
    rgba(var(--v-theme-surface), 0.88);
  backdrop-filter: blur(14px);
}

.revenue-simulator__metric {
  padding: 16px;
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-surface-bright), 0.7);
  border: 1px solid rgba(var(--v-theme-outline-variant), 0.7);
}

.trusted-estimate {
  border-color: rgba(var(--v-theme-warning), 0.35) !important;
}
</style>

```

### File: components/models/ModelAvailabilityChips.vue
```
<template>
  <div class="d-flex align-center ga-1 flex-wrap">
    <v-chip
      :color="statusColor"
      :variant="totalAgents > 0 ? 'tonal' : 'outlined'"
      size="x-small"
      :prepend-icon="statusIcon"
    >
      {{ statusLabel }}
    </v-chip>
    <v-chip
      v-if="degradedAgents > 0"
      color="warning"
      variant="tonal"
      size="x-small"
      prepend-icon="mdi-alert-outline"
    >
      {{ t('models.availability.degraded', { count: degradedAgents }) }}
    </v-chip>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
const props = withDefaults(defineProps<{
  healthyAgents?: number
  degradedAgents?: number
  totalAgents?: number
}>(), {
  healthyAgents: 0,
  degradedAgents: 0,
  totalAgents: undefined
})

const { t } = useI18n()

const healthyAgents = computed(() => props.healthyAgents ?? 0)
const degradedAgents = computed(() => props.degradedAgents ?? 0)
const totalAgents = computed(() => props.totalAgents ?? (healthyAgents.value + degradedAgents.value))

const statusColor = computed(() => {
  if (healthyAgents.value > 0) return 'success'
  if (degradedAgents.value > 0) return 'warning'
  return 'default'
})

const statusIcon = computed(() => {
  if (healthyAgents.value > 0) return 'mdi-check-circle-outline'
  if (degradedAgents.value > 0) return 'mdi-alert-circle-outline'
  return 'mdi-minus-circle-outline'
})

const statusLabel = computed(() => {
  if (totalAgents.value === 0) return t('models.availability.offline')
  return t('models.availability.available', { count: healthyAgents.value })
})
</script>

```

<template>
  <div class="d-flex flex-column ga-4">
    <v-card
      v-if="hardwareProbe"
      variant="tonal"
      rounded="xl"
      color="primary"
      class="hardware-card"
    >
      <v-card-text class="pa-4">
        <div class="d-flex align-start justify-space-between ga-3 mb-3">
          <div>
            <div class="text-subtitle-2 font-weight-bold">{{ t('models.hardware.catalog_title') }}</div>
            <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ t('models.hardware.catalog_subtitle') }}</div>
          </div>
          <v-chip
            size="small"
            label
            :color="hardwareProbe.webgpuSupported ? 'success' : 'info'"
            :prepend-icon="hardwareProbe.webgpuSupported ? 'mdi-lightning-bolt-outline' : 'mdi-approximately-equal'"
          >
            {{ hardwareProbe.webgpuSupported ? t('models.hardware.webgpu') : t('models.hardware.webgl') }}
          </v-chip>
        </div>

        <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-2 mb-3">
          <v-chip size="small" variant="outlined" prepend-icon="mdi-chip">
            {{ hardwareProbe.gpu.name }}
          </v-chip>
          <v-chip size="small" variant="outlined" prepend-icon="mdi-memory">
            {{ t('models.hardware.vram_detected', { value: hardwareProbe.gpu.vramGbEstimate }) }}
          </v-chip>
          <v-chip size="small" variant="outlined" prepend-icon="mdi-memory">
            {{ t('models.hardware.ram_detected', { value: hardwareProbe.ramGbEstimate || '?' }) }}
          </v-chip>
        </div>

        <v-alert
          v-if="!hardwareProbe.webgpuSupported"
          type="info"
          variant="outlined"
          density="compact"
          icon="mdi-information-outline"
          class="mb-2"
        >
          {{ t('models.hardware.partial_confidence') }}
        </v-alert>

        <v-switch
          :model-value="compatibilityOnly"
          :label="t('models.filters.compatibility_only')"
          :messages="compatibilityHint"
          color="primary"
          inset
          density="comfortable"
          hide-details="auto"
          prepend-icon="mdi-laptop-account"
          @update:model-value="onCompatibilityChange"
        />
      </v-card-text>

      :label="t('models.filters.search')"
      prepend-inner-icon="mdi-magnify"
      clearable
      hide-details
      density="comfortable"
      variant="outlined"
      rounded="lg"
      @update:model-value="$emit('update:searchQuery', $event ?? '')"
    />

    <v-switch
      :model-value="availabilityOnly"
      :label="t('models.filters.availability_only')"
      color="primary"
      hide-details
      inset
      density="compact"
      prepend-icon="mdi-eye-outline"
      @update:model-value="onAvailabilityChange"
    />

      <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis text-uppercase mb-2">{{ t('models.filters.family') }}</div>

        multiple
        column
        @update:model-value="$emit('update:selectedFamilies', $event)"

          v-for="fam in availableFamilies"
          :key="fam"
          :value="fam"
          size="small"
          filter
          variant="outlined"
        >{{ fam }}</v-chip>
      </v-chip-group>
    </div>

      <v-chip-group
        :model-value="selectedHardwareTiers"
        multiple
        column
        @update:model-value="$emit('update:selectedHardwareTiers', $event)"
      >

        :model-value="selectedBackends"
        multiple
        column
        @update:model-value="$emit('update:selectedBackends', $event)"
      >
        <v-chip
          v-for="backend in availableBackends"
          :key="backend"
          :value="backend"
          size="small"
          filter
          variant="outlined"
        >{{ backend }}</v-chip>
      </v-chip-group>
    </div>

    <div v-if="hasContextData">
      <div class="d-flex align-center justify-space-between mb-1">
        <span class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis text-uppercase">{{ t('models.filters.context_range') }}</span>
        <span class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ contextRangeLabel }}</span>
      </div>
      <v-range-slider
        :model-value="selectedContextRange"
        :min="contextBounds.min"
        :max="contextBounds.max"
        :step="1024"
        color="primary"
        hide-details
        thumb-size="14"
        @update:model-value="$emit('update:selectedContextRange', $event)"
      />
    </div>

    <div v-if="availableTags.length">
      <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis text-uppercase mb-2">{{ t('models.columns.tags') }}</div>
      <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-1">
        <v-chip
          v-for="tag in availableTags"
          :key="tag.value"
          :variant="selectedTags.includes(tag.value) ? 'flat' : 'outlined'"
          :color="selectedTags.includes(tag.value) ? 'primary' : undefined"
          size="x-small"
          @click="$emit('toggle-tag', tag.value)"
        >
          {{ tag.value }} <span class="ml-1 opacity-60">{{ tag.count }}</span>
        </v-chip>
      </div>
    </div>

    <v-btn
      v-if="activeFilterCount > 0"
      variant="tonal"
      size="small"
      prepend-icon="mdi-filter-off-outline"
      block
      @click="$emit('reset')"
    >
      {{ t('models.filters.reset') }}
    </v-btn>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import type { HardwareProbeResult } from '~/composables/useHardwareBenchmark'

const { t } = useI18n()

const emit = defineEmits<{
  'update:searchQuery': [value: string]
  'update:selectedFamilies': [value: string[]]
  'update:selectedHardwareTiers': [value: string[]]
  'update:selectedBackends': [value: string[]]
  'update:selectedContextRange': [value: [number, number]]
  'update:availabilityOnly': [value: boolean]
  'update:compatibilityOnly': [value: boolean]
  'toggle-tag': [tag: string]
  'reset': []
}>()

const props = defineProps<{
  searchQuery: string
  selectedFamilies: string[]
  selectedHardwareTiers: string[]
  selectedBackends: string[]
  selectedTags: string[]
  availabilityOnly: boolean
  compatibilityOnly: boolean
  availableFamilies: string[]
  availableHardwareTiers: string[]
  availableBackends: string[]
  availableTags: Array<{ value: string; count: number }>
  contextBounds: { min: number; max: number }
  selectedContextRange: [number, number]
  hasContextData: boolean
  contextRangeLabel: string
  activeFilterCount: number
  hardwareProbe: HardwareProbeResult | null
}>()

const compatibilityHint = computed(() => {
  if (!props.hardwareProbe) return t('models.hardware.unavailable')
  return t(`models.hardware.confidence.${props.hardwareProbe.gpu.vramConfidence}`)
})

function onAvailabilityChange(v: unknown) {
  emit('update:availabilityOnly', Boolean(v))
}

function onCompatibilityChange(v: unknown) {
  emit('update:compatibilityOnly', Boolean(v))
}
</script>

<style scoped>
.hardware-card {
  border: 1px solid rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.18);
}
</style>
