```
### File: components/models/ModelHardwareEligibilityWidget.vue
```
<template>
  <v-card variant="outlined" rounded="xl">
    <v-card-title>{{ t('models.hardware.title') }}</v-card-title>
    <v-card-subtitle>{{ t('models.hardware.subtitle') }}</v-card-subtitle>
    <v-card-text>
      <v-alert
        v-if="result && !result.webgpuSupported"
        type="info"
        variant="tonal"
        density="compact"
        class="mb-3"
      >
        {{ t('models.hardware.partial_confidence') }}
      </v-alert>

      <div v-if="loading" class="mb-4">
        <div class="text-caption mb-2">{{ t('models.hardware.running', { progress }) }}</div>
        <v-progress-linear :model-value="progress" color="primary" height="10" striped animated />
      </div>

      <div v-else-if="reportRows.length">
        <v-list density="compact" lines="two">
          <v-list-item v-for="row in reportRows" :key="row.key">
            <template #prepend>
              <v-icon :color="row.pass ? 'success' : 'error'">{{ row.pass ? 'mdi-check-circle' : 'mdi-alert-circle' }}</v-icon>
            </template>
            <v-list-item-title>{{ row.label }}</v-list-item-title>
            <v-list-item-subtitle>{{ row.value }} · {{ t(`models.hardware.confidence.${row.confidence}`) }}</v-list-item-subtitle>
          </v-list-item>
        </v-list>
      </div>

      <div v-if="result" class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis mt-3">
        {{ t('models.hardware.meta', { os: result.os, browser: result.browser, measuredAt: result.measuredAt }) }}
      </div>
    </v-card-text>
    <v-card-actions>
      <v-chip :color="allPassed ? 'success' : 'warning'" label>{{ allPassed ? t('models.hardware.compatible') : t('models.hardware.limited') }}</v-chip>
      <v-spacer />
      <v-chip v-if="isCached" size="small" variant="tonal">{{ t('models.hardware.cached') }}</v-chip>
      <v-btn variant="text" @click="runBenchmark(true)">{{ t('models.hardware.rerun') }}</v-btn>
    </v-card-actions>
  </v-card>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed, onMounted } from 'vue'
import { evaluateRequirement, useHardwareBenchmark, type MinimalHardwareRequirement } from '~/composables/useHardwareBenchmark'

const { t } = useI18n()
const props = defineProps<{ requirement: MinimalHardwareRequirement }>()
const { loading, progress, result, runBenchmark, isCached } = useHardwareBenchmark()

const reportRows = computed(() => {
  if (!result.value) return []
  const checks = evaluateRequirement(props.requirement, result.value)
  return [
    { key: 'runtime', label: t('models.hardware.runtime'), ...checks.gpuRuntime, value: `${checks.gpuRuntime.actual} (${result.value.gpu.name})` },
    { key: 'vram', label: t('models.hardware.vram', { required: props.requirement.gpu.vramGb }), ...checks.gpuVram, value: checks.gpuVram.actual },
    { key: 'ram', label: t('models.hardware.ram', { required: props.requirement.ramGb }), ...checks.ram, value: checks.ram.actual },
    { key: 'disk', label: t('models.hardware.disk', { required: props.requirement.diskGb }), ...checks.disk, value: checks.disk.actual }
  ]
})

const allPassed = computed(() => reportRows.value.every(item => item.pass))

onMounted(() => runBenchmark())
</script>


<template>
  <div>
    <!-- Technical Specifications -->
    <div class="mb-8">
      <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis text-uppercase mb-4">{{ t('models.sections.specifications') }}</div>
      <v-row density="comfortable">
        <v-col
          v-for="spec in specs"
          :key="spec.label"
          cols="12"
          sm="6"
          md="4"
        >
          <div class="spec-tile pa-4 rounded-lg border d-flex align-center ga-3 h-100">
            <v-avatar size="32" color="surface-variant" variant="tonal" rounded="md">
              <v-icon :icon="spec.icon" size="18" />
            </v-avatar>
            <div>
              <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis font-weight-medium">{{ spec.label }}</div>
              <div class="text-body-2 font-weight-bold">{{ spec.value }}</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </v-col>
      </v-row>
    </div>

    <!-- Metadata & Additional Info -->
    <div v-if="metadataLists.length || metadataChips.length" class="mb-8">
      <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis text-uppercase mb-4">{{ t('models.sections.metadata') }}</div>
      
      <v-row>
        <v-col v-for="list in metadataLists" :key="list.label" cols="12" md="4">
          <v-card variant="tonal" class="pa-4 h-100 border-opacity-25" rounded="lg">
            <div class="text-subtitle-2 font-weight-bold mb-2">{{ list.label }}</div>
            <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-1">
              <v-chip
                v-for="val in list.values"
                :key="val"
                size="x-small"
                variant="outlined"
                class="font-weight-medium"
              >
                {{ val }}
              </v-chip>
            </div>
          </v-card>
        </v-col>
      </v-row>

      <div v-if="metadataChips.length" class="mt-4 d-flex flex-wrap ga-2">
        <v-btn
          v-for="chip in metadataChips"
          :key="chip.label"
          size="small"
          variant="tonal"
          prepend-icon="mdi-link-variant"
          rounded="pill"
          :href="String(chip.value)"
          target="_blank"
        >
          {{ chip.label }}
        </v-btn>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Compliance & Security -->
    <div v-if="hasComplianceInfo" class="mb-8">
      <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis text-uppercase mb-4">{{ t('models.fields.security_notes') }} & {{ t('models.fields.privacy') }}</div>
      <v-row density="comfortable">
        <v-col v-if="model.inferaMetadata?.privacy" cols="12" md="4">
          <div class="security-tile pa-4 rounded-lg border h-100">
            <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2 mb-2">
              <v-icon icon="mdi-shield-lock" color="success" size="20" />
              <span class="text-subtitle-2 font-weight-bold">{{ t('models.fields.privacy') }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="text-body-2 text-medium-emphasis">{{ model.inferaMetadata.privacy }}</div>
          </div>
        </v-col>
        
        <v-col v-if="model.inferaMetadata?.securityNotes?.length" cols="12" md="4">
          <div class="security-tile pa-4 rounded-lg border h-100">
            <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2 mb-2">
              <v-icon icon="mdi-security" color="warning" size="20" />
              <span class="text-subtitle-2 font-weight-bold">{{ t('models.fields.security_notes') }}</span>
            </div>
            <ul class="text-body-2 text-medium-emphasis ps-4">
              <li v-for="note in model.inferaMetadata.securityNotes" :key="note">{{ note }}</li>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </v-col>

        <v-col v-if="model.inferaMetadata?.compatibility?.length" cols="12" md="4">
          <div class="security-tile pa-4 rounded-lg border h-100">
            <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2 mb-2">
              <v-icon icon="mdi-check-decagram" color="info" size="20" />
              <span class="text-subtitle-2 font-weight-bold">{{ t('models.fields.compatibility') }}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-1">
              <v-chip v-for="item in model.inferaMetadata.compatibility" :key="item" size="x-small" variant="outlined">{{ item }}</v-chip>
            </div>
          </div>
        </v-col>
      </v-row>
    </div>

    <!-- Documentation link -->
    <div v-if="model.documentationUrl" class="mt-4">
      <v-btn
        :href="model.documentationUrl"
        target="_blank"
        rel="noopener"
        variant="flat"
        color="secondary"
        prepend-icon="mdi-open-in-new"
        rounded="lg"
        class="font-weight-bold"
      >
        {{ t('models.actions.source') }}
      </v-btn>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import type { ModelLargeView } from '~/domains/models/models'

const { t } = useI18n()
const props = defineProps<{ model: ModelLargeView }>()

const hasComplianceInfo = computed(() => {
  return !!(props.model.inferaMetadata?.privacy || 
            props.model.inferaMetadata?.securityNotes?.length || 
            props.model.inferaMetadata?.compatibility?.length)
})

const specs = computed(() => [
  { label: t('models.fields.size'), icon: 'mdi-weight', value: props.model.modelSize || '-' },
  { label: t('models.fields.context'), icon: 'mdi-text-long', value: props.model.contextSize ? `${props.model.contextSize.toLocaleString()} tokens` : '-' },
  { label: t('models.fields.backend'), icon: 'mdi-server-outline', value: props.model.backend || '-' },
  { label: t('models.fields.license'), icon: 'mdi-license', value: props.model.license || '-' },
  { label: t('models.fields.parameters_count'), icon: 'mdi-variable', value: props.model.inferaMetadata?.parameterCount || '-' },
  { label: t('models.fields.maintainer'), icon: 'mdi-account-hard-hat', value: props.model.inferaMetadata?.maintainer || '-' },
])

const metadataChips = computed(() => [
  { label: t('models.fields.license_url'), value: props.model.inferaMetadata?.licenseUrl }
].filter(item => Boolean(item.value)))

const metadataLists = computed(() => [
  { label: t('models.fields.usages'), values: props.model.inferaMetadata?.usages ?? [] },
  { label: t('models.fields.quantization'), values: props.model.inferaMetadata?.quantization ?? [] },
  { label: t('models.fields.recommended_hardware'), values: props.model.inferaMetadata?.recommendedHardware ?? [] }
].filter(item => item.values.length > 0))
</script>


<style scoped>
.spec-tile {
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-surface-variant), 0.3);
  border: 1px solid rgba(var(--v-border-color), 0.05);
  height: 100%;
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
}

.spec-tile:hover {
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-surface-variant), 0.5);
  border-color: rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.2);
}

.security-tile {
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-surface), 0.4);
  backdrop-filter: blur(8px);
}

.billing-tile {
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.04);
  border: 1px solid rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.12);
}

.font-mono {
  font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace;
}
</style>

```
### File: components/models/ModelMediumCard.vue
```
<template>
  <div class="model-medium-card" :class="`status--${availabilityStatus}`">
    <div class="card-status-bar" />

    <div class="pa-4">
      <!-- Header row -->
      <div class="d-flex align-start ga-3 mb-3">
        <v-avatar size="44" rounded="lg" color="surface-variant" class="flex-shrink-0 mt-1">
          <v-img v-if="model.icon" :src="model.icon" :alt="model.id" cover />
          <v-icon v-else icon="mdi-brain" size="22" />
        </v-avatar>

        <div class="flex-grow-1 min-w-0">
          <div class="text-subtitle-2 font-weight-bold text-truncate mb-1">{{ model.id }}</div>
          <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-1">
            <v-chip size="x-small" color="primary" variant="tonal">{{ model.family }}</v-chip>
            <v-chip size="x-small" variant="outlined">{{ model.hardwareTier }}</v-chip>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Description -->
      <p class="text-body-2 text-medium-emphasis description-clamp mb-3">{{ description }}</p>

      <!-- Specs row -->
      <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-3 text-body-2 text-medium-emphasis mb-3">
        <span v-if="model.contextSize" class="d-flex align-center ga-1">
          <v-icon icon="mdi-text-long" size="14" />
          {{ formatContextSize(model.contextSize) }}
        </span>
        <span v-if="model.modelSize" class="d-flex align-center ga-1">
          <v-icon icon="mdi-weight" size="14" />
          {{ model.modelSize }}
        </span>
        <span v-if="model.backend" class="d-flex align-center ga-1">
          <v-icon icon="mdi-server-outline" size="14" />
          {{ model.backend }}
        </span>
      </div>

      <!-- Footer: tags + availability -->
      <div class="d-flex align-center justify-space-between flex-wrap ga-2">
        <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-1">
          <v-chip
            v-for="tag in visibleTags"
            :key="tag"
            size="x-small"
            variant="outlined"
            class="tag-chip"
          >{{ tag }}</v-chip>
          <v-chip v-if="model.tags.length > MAX_TAGS" size="x-small" variant="text" class="text-medium-emphasis">
            +{{ model.tags.length - MAX_TAGS }}
          </v-chip>
        </div>

        <ModelAvailabilityChips
          :healthy-agents="model.healthyAgents"
          :degraded-agents="model.degradedAgents"
          :total-agents="model.totalAgents"
        />
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { resolveModelDescription, type ModelLargeView } from '~/domains/models/models'
import ModelAvailabilityChips from './ModelAvailabilityChips.vue'

const MAX_TAGS = 3

const { locale } = useI18n()
const props = defineProps<{ model: ModelLargeView }>()

const description = computed(() => resolveModelDescription(props.model, locale.value))
const visibleTags = computed(() => props.model.tags.slice(0, MAX_TAGS))

const availabilityStatus = computed(() => {
  if ((props.model.healthyAgents ?? 0) > 0) return 'healthy'
  if ((props.model.degradedAgents ?? 0) > 0) return 'degraded'
  return 'offline'
})

function formatContextSize(size: number): string {
  if (size >= 1000) return `${Math.round(size / 1000)}k ctx`
  return `${size} ctx`
}
</script>

<style scoped>
.model-medium-card {
  position: relative;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(var(--v-border-color), var(--v-border-opacity));
  overflow: hidden;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: box-shadow 0.2s ease, transform 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease;
  height: 100%;
  background: rgb(var(--v-theme-surface));
}

.model-medium-card:hover {
  transform: translateY(-3px);
  box-shadow: 0 12px 32px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
  border-color: rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.4);
}

.card-status-bar {
  height: 3px;
  width: 100%;
  background: rgba(var(--v-border-color), 0.2);
  transition: background 0.3s ease;
}

.status--healthy .card-status-bar {
  background: rgb(var(--v-theme-success));
}

.status--degraded .card-status-bar {
  background: rgb(var(--v-theme-warning));
}

.status--offline .card-status-bar {
  background: rgba(var(--v-border-color), 0.3);
}

.description-clamp {
  display: -webkit-box;
  -webkit-line-clamp: 2;
  line-clamp: 2;
  -webkit-box-orient: vertical;
  overflow: hidden;
  min-height: 2.4em;
}

.min-w-0 {
  min-width: 0;
}

.tag-chip {
  opacity: 0.75;
}
</style>

```
### File: components/models/ModelSelector.vue
```
<template>
  <div>
    <v-autocomplete
      :model-value="modelValue"
      :items="items"
      item-title="title"
      item-value="value"
      :label="label"
      :multiple="multiple"
      :chips="multiple"
      :clearable="clearable"
      :loading="loading"
      :error="Boolean(error)"
      :hint="error ? t(error.i18nKey) : undefined"
      persistent-hint
      density="comfortable"
      class="w-100"
      @update:model-value="onUpdate"
    >
      <template #item="{ props: itemProps, item }">
        <v-list-item v-bind="itemProps" :subtitle="(item as any)?.raw?.subtitle">
          <template #append>
            <div v-if="(item as any)?.raw" class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
              <ModelAvailabilityChips
                :healthy-agents="(item as any).raw.healthyAgents"
                :degraded-agents="(item as any).raw.degradedAgents"
                :total-agents="(item as any).raw.totalAgents"
              />
              <v-btn
                size="x-small"
                icon="mdi-information-outline"
                variant="text"
                @click.stop="openDetails((item as any).raw.value)"
              />
            </div>
          </template>
        </v-list-item>
      </template>

      <template #chip="{ props: chipProps, item }">
        <v-chip v-bind="chipProps" size="small">
          {{ (item as any)?.raw?.title }}
        </v-chip>
      </template>
    </v-autocomplete>

    <v-dialog v-model="dialogOpen" max-width="760">
      <v-card>
        <v-card-title>{{ t('models.modal.title') }}</v-card-title>
        <v-card-text v-if="selectedModel">
          <ModelLargeDetails :model="selectedModel" />
        </v-card-text>
        <v-card-text v-else>
          {{ t('models.modal.unknown_model', { modelId: selectedModelId }) }}
        </v-card-text>
        <v-card-actions>
          <v-spacer />
          <v-btn variant="text" @click="dialogOpen = false">{{ t('models.modal.close') }}</v-btn>
        </v-card-actions>
      </v-card>
    </v-dialog>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import ModelAvailabilityChips from '~/components/models/ModelAvailabilityChips.vue'
import ModelLargeDetails from '~/components/models/ModelLargeDetails.vue'
import type { ModelLargeView } from '~/domains/models/models'

withDefaults(defineProps<{
  modelValue: string | string[] | null
  label: string
  multiple?: boolean
  clearable?: boolean
}>(), {
  multiple: false,
  clearable: true
})

const emit = defineEmits<{
  'update:modelValue': [string | string[] | null]
}>()

const { t } = useI18n()
const repository = useModelCatalogRepository()

const models = ref<ModelLargeView[]>([])
const loading = ref(false)
const error = ref<{ i18nKey: string } | null>(null)

const dialogOpen = ref(false)
const selectedModelId = ref('')

const items = computed(() => models.value
  .slice()
  .sort((a, b) => a.id.localeCompare(b.id))
  .map(model => ({
    title: model.id,
    subtitle: model.family,
    value: model.id,
    healthyAgents: model.healthyAgents ?? 0,
    degradedAgents: model.degradedAgents ?? 0,
    totalAgents: model.totalAgents ?? ((model.healthyAgents ?? 0) + (model.degradedAgents ?? 0))
  })))

const selectedModel = computed(() => models.value.find(model => model.id === selectedModelId.value) ?? null)

function onUpdate(value: string | string[] | null) {
  emit('update:modelValue', value)
}

function openDetails(modelId: string) {
  selectedModelId.value = modelId
  dialogOpen.value = true
}

onMounted(async () => {
  loading.value = true
  error.value = null
  try {
    models.value = await repository.listModels()
  } catch {
    error.value = { i18nKey: 'errors.service_unavailable' }
  } finally {
    loading.value = false
  }
})
</script>


<template>
  <v-card class="node-card" :class="`node-card--${size}`" variant="outlined">
    <v-card-title class="node-card__title">
      <div class="node-card__title-body">
        <div class="d-flex flex-wrap align-center ga-2">
          <span class="text-h6 font-weight-bold">{{ node.nodeId }}</span>
          <NodeStatusChip :status="effectiveStatus" />
          <v-chip v-if="largeNode.tier" color="primary" variant="tonal" size="small">
            {{ largeNode.tier }}
          </v-chip>
          <v-chip v-if="largeNode.security?.trustLevel" color="info" variant="tonal" size="small">
            {{ largeNode.security.trustLevel }}
          </v-chip>
        </div>
        <div v-if="titleSubtitle" class="text-body-2 text-medium-emphasis">
          {{ titleSubtitle }}
        </div>
      </div>

      <v-spacer v-if="size === 'lg'" />

      <v-chip v-if="size === 'lg'" color="primary" variant="flat" class="node-card__score">
        <v-icon start size="16">mdi-speedometer</v-icon>
        {{ t('nodes.card.availability', { score: mediumNode.availabilityScore }) }}
      </v-chip>
    </v-card-title>

    <v-card-text class="node-card__content">
      <template v-if="size !== 'lg'">
        <div class="d-flex flex-column ga-2">
          <div>{{ t('nodes.fields.last_seen') }}: {{ formattedLastSeen }}</div>
          <div>{{ t('nodes.fields.availability') }}: {{ mediumNode.availabilityScore }}</div>
          <div>{{ t('nodes.fields.ip_masked') }}: {{ largeNode.ipMasked || '-' }}</div>
          <div>{{ t('nodes.fields.geo') }}: {{ formattedGeo }}</div>
          <div>{{ t('nodes.fields.agent_version') }}: {{ largeNode.runtime?.agentVersion || '-' }}</div>
          <div>{{ t('nodes.fields.localai_version') }}: {{ largeNode.runtime?.localAiVersion || '-' }}</div>
          <div>{{ t('nodes.fields.gpu_model') }}: {{ largeNode.runtime?.gpuModel || '-' }}</div>
          <div>{{ t('nodes.fields.gpu_vram_mb') }}: {{ largeNode.runtime?.gpuVramMb ?? '-' }}</div>
        </div>
      </template>

      <template v-else>
        <v-alert
          v-if="showProvisioningGap"
          type="info"
          variant="tonal"
          class="mb-5"
          density="comfortable"
        >
          {{ t('nodes.card.provisioning_gap') }}
        </v-alert>

        <v-row class="mb-4" dense>
          <v-col cols="12" xl="5">

                  <div class="text-subtitle-1 font-weight-bold">{{ t('nodes.card.live_routing') }}</div>

                    {{ t('nodes.card.live_routing_caption') }}

                  {{ liveModelCount }} {{ t('nodes.card.models_live') }}
                </v-chip>
              </div>

              <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-2 mb-4">
                <v-chip size="small" variant="tonal" color="success">
                  <v-icon start size="16">mdi-check-circle-outline</v-icon>
                  {{ t('nodes.card.loaded_count', { count: largeNode.loadedModels.length }) }}
                </v-chip>
                <v-chip size="small" variant="tonal" color="warning">
                  <v-icon start size="16">mdi-arrow-collapse-down</v-icon>
                  {{ t('nodes.card.offloaded_count', { count: largeNode.offloadedModels.length }) }}
                </v-chip>
              </div>

              <div class="node-card__pill-group">
                <template v-if="largeNode.loadedModels.length">
                  <v-chip
                    v-for="modelId in largeNode.loadedModels"
                    :key="`loaded-${modelId}`"
                    color="success"
                    variant="tonal"
                    size="small"
                    @click="openModelDetails(modelId)"
                  >
                    {{ modelId }}
                  </v-chip>
                </template>
                <span v-else class="node-card__empty">{{ t('nodes.card.no_live_models') }}</span>
              </div>

              <div class="node-card__pill-group mt-4">
                <template v-if="largeNode.offloadedModels.length">
                  <v-chip
                    v-for="modelId in largeNode.offloadedModels"
                    :key="`offloaded-${modelId}`"
                    color="warning"
                    variant="tonal"
                    size="small"
                    @click="openModelDetails(modelId)"
                  >
                    {{ modelId }}
                  </v-chip>
                </template>
                <span v-else class="node-card__empty">{{ t('nodes.card.no_offloaded_models') }}</span>
              </div>

              <div v-if="liveMetrics" class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-2 mt-4">
                <v-chip v-if="liveMetrics.gpuTempC" size="small" variant="tonal">
                  <v-icon start size="16">mdi-thermometer</v-icon>{{ liveMetrics.gpuTempC }}°C
                </v-chip>
                <v-chip v-if="liveMetrics.gpuPowerW" size="small" variant="tonal">
                  <v-icon start size="16">mdi-lightning-bolt</v-icon>{{ liveMetrics.gpuPowerW }}W
                </v-chip>
                <v-chip v-if="liveMetrics.vramUsedMb" size="small" variant="tonal">
                  {{ liveMetrics.vramUsedMb }} MB used
                </v-chip>
              </div>
            </v-sheet>
          </v-col>

          <v-col cols="12" xl="7">
            <v-sheet class="node-card__panel node-card__panel--inventory" border rounded="xl">
              <div class="node-card__panel-header">
                <div>
                  <div class="text-subtitle-1 font-weight-bold">{{ t('nodes.card.provisioned_inventory') }}</div>
                  <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">
                    {{ t('nodes.card.provisioned_inventory_caption') }}
                  </div>
                </div>
                <v-chip size="small" variant="tonal" color="primary">
                  {{ provisionedModels.length }} {{ t('nodes.card.models_provisioned') }}
                </v-chip>
              </div>

              <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-2 mb-4">
                <v-chip size="small" variant="outlined" color="primary">
                  {{ t('nodes.card.compatible_models', { count: capableModels.length }) }}
                </v-chip>
                <v-chip size="small" variant="outlined">
                  {{ t('nodes.card.json_fields', { count: structuredMetadataCount }) }}
                </v-chip>
              </div>

              <div class="node-card__section-label">
                {{ t('nodes.card.provisioned_models_label') }}
              </div>
              <div class="node-card__pill-group">
                <template v-if="provisionedModels.length">
                  <v-chip
                    v-for="model in provisionedModels"
                    :key="`provisioned-${model.name}`"
                    color="primary"
                    variant="tonal"
                    size="small"
                    @click="openModelDetails(model.name)"
                  >
                    {{ model.name }}
                    <span v-if="model.size_bytes" class="node-card__muted">
                      · {{ formatSize(model.size_bytes) }}
                    </span>
                  </v-chip>
                </template>
                <span v-else class="node-card__empty">{{ t('nodes.card.no_provisioned_models') }}</span>
              </div>

              <div class="node-card__section-label mt-4">
                {{ t('nodes.card.capable_models_label') }}
              </div>
              <div class="node-card__pill-group">
                <template v-if="capableModels.length">
                  <v-chip
                    v-for="model in capableModels"
                    :key="`capable-${model.name}`"
                    variant="outlined"
                    size="small"
                    @click="openModelDetails(model.name)"
                  >
                    {{ model.name }}
                  </v-chip>
                </template>
                <span v-else class="node-card__empty">{{ t('nodes.card.no_capable_models') }}</span>
              </div>
            </v-sheet>
          </v-col>
        </v-row>
      </template>
    </v-card-text>
  </v-card>

  <v-dialog v-model="modelDialogOpen" max-width="760">
    <v-card>
      <v-card-title>{{ t('nodes.model_modal.title') }}</v-card-title>
      <v-card-text v-if="selectedModel">
        <ModelLargeDetails :model="selectedModel" />
      </v-card-text>
      <v-card-text v-else>
        {{ t('nodes.model_modal.unknown_model', { modelId: selectedModelId }) }}
      </v-card-text>
      <v-card-actions>
        <v-spacer />
        <v-btn variant="text" @click="modelDialogOpen = false">{{ t('nodes.actions.close') }}</v-btn>
      </v-card-actions>
    </v-card>
  </v-dialog>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import ModelLargeDetails from '~/components/models/ModelLargeDetails.vue'
import NodeStatusChip from '~/components/nodes/NodeStatusChip.vue'
import type { ModelLargeView } from '~/domains/models/models'
import type { NodeLargeView, NodeMediumView, NodeSmallView } from '~/domains/nodes/nodes'

const props = withDefaults(defineProps<{
  node: NodeSmallView | NodeMediumView | NodeLargeView
  size?: 'sm' | 'md' | 'lg'
}>(), {
  size: 'md'
})

const { t, d, locale } = useI18n()
const modelRepository = useModelCatalogRepository()

const catalog = ref<ModelLargeView[]>([])
const modelDialogOpen = ref(false)
const selectedModelId = ref('')

const selectedModel = computed(() => catalog.value.find(model => model.id === selectedModelId.value) ?? null)

const mediumNode = computed<NodeMediumView>(() => ({
  nodeId: props.node.nodeId,
  status: props.node.status,
  lastSeen: 'lastSeen' in props.node ? props.node.lastSeen : '',
  availabilityScore: 'availabilityScore' in props.node ? props.node.availabilityScore : 0,
  loadedModels: 'loadedModels' in props.node ? props.node.loadedModels || [] : [],
  offloadedModels: 'offloadedModels' in props.node ? props.node.offloadedModels || [] : []
}))

const largeNode = computed<NodeLargeView>(() => ({
  ...mediumNode.value,
  tier: 'tier' in props.node ? props.node.tier : 'PUBLIC',
  nodeName: 'nodeName' in props.node ? props.node.nodeName : undefined,
  loadedModels: 'loadedModels' in props.node ? props.node.loadedModels || [] : [],
  offloadedModels: 'offloadedModels' in props.node ? props.node.offloadedModels || [] : [],
  slotIds: 'slotIds' in props.node ? props.node.slotIds || [] : [],
  ipMasked: 'ipMasked' in props.node ? props.node.ipMasked : '',
  geo: 'geo' in props.node ? props.node.geo : undefined,
  security: 'security' in props.node ? props.node.security : undefined,
  runtime: 'runtime' in props.node ? props.node.runtime : undefined,
  metadata: 'metadata' in props.node ? props.node.metadata : {}
}))

const titleSubtitle = computed(() => {
  if (props.size !== 'lg') {
    return ''
  }
  return largeNode.value.nodeName || largeNode.value.runtime?.gpuModel || t('nodes.card.subtitle_default')
})

const formattedLastSeen = computed(() => {
  if (!mediumNode.value.lastSeen) {
    return '-'
  }
  const date = new Date(mediumNode.value.lastSeen)
  return Number.isNaN(date.getTime()) ? mediumNode.value.lastSeen : d(date, 'short', locale.value)
})

const formattedGeo = computed(() => {
  const geo = largeNode.value.geo
  if (!geo) {
    return '-'
  }
  return [geo.country, geo.region, geo.city].filter(Boolean).join(' / ') || '-'
})

type LiveMetrics = { gpuTempC?: string; gpuPowerW?: string; vramUsedMb?: string }

const liveMetrics = computed<LiveMetrics | null>(() => {
  const raw = largeNode.value.metadata?.metrics
  if (!raw) {
    return null
  }
  const result: LiveMetrics = {}
  const tempMatch = raw.match(/gpuTempC=(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)/)
  const powerMatch = raw.match(/gpuPowerW=(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)/)
  const vramMatch = raw.match(/vramUsedMb=(\d+(?:\.\d+)?)/)
  if (tempMatch) result.gpuTempC = tempMatch[1]
  if (powerMatch) result.gpuPowerW = powerMatch[1]
  if (vramMatch) result.vramUsedMb = vramMatch[1]
  return Object.keys(result).length ? result : null
})

type ProfileSummaryJson = {
  active_models?: { name: string; size_bytes?: number }[]
  top_10?: { name: string; score: number; size_bytes?: number }[]
}

const parsedProfileSummary = computed<ProfileSummaryJson | null>(() => {
  return parseJsonField<ProfileSummaryJson>(largeNode.value.metadata?.profileSummaryJson)
})

const parsedSystemFingerprint = computed<Record<string, unknown> | null>(() => {
  return parseJsonField(largeNode.value.metadata?.systemFingerprintJson)
})

const provisionedModels = computed<{ name: string; size_bytes?: number }[]>(() => {
  const activeModels = parsedProfileSummary.value?.active_models
  return Array.isArray(activeModels)
    ? activeModels
        .filter((model): model is { name: string; size_bytes?: number } => Boolean(model) && typeof model === 'object' && typeof (model as { name?: unknown }).name === 'string')
        .map(model => ({ name: model.name, size_bytes: typeof model.size_bytes === 'number' ? model.size_bytes : undefined }))
    : []
})

const capableModels = computed<{ name: string; score: number }[]>(() => {
  const top10 = parsedProfileSummary.value?.top_10
  return Array.isArray(top10)
    ? top10
        .filter((model): model is { name: string; score: number } => Boolean(model) && typeof model === 'object' && typeof (model as { name?: unknown }).name === 'string')
        .map(model => ({ name: model.name, score: typeof model.score === 'number' ? model.score : 0 }))
    : []
})

const liveModelCount = computed(() => largeNode.value.loadedModels.length + largeNode.value.offloadedModels.length)
const structuredMetadataCount = computed(() => (parsedProfileSummary.value ? 1 : 0) + (parsedSystemFingerprint.value ? 1 : 0))
const showProvisioningGap = computed(() => props.size === 'lg' && provisionedModels.value.length > 0 && liveModelCount.value === 0)
const effectiveStatus = computed(() => {
  const raw = String(props.node.status || 'UNKNOWN').toUpperCase()
  if (raw === 'UP' && liveModelCount.value === 0) {
    return 'DEGRADED'
  }
  return raw
})

async function openModelDetails(modelId: string) {
  if (!catalog.value.length) {
    catalog.value = await modelRepository.listModels()
  }
  selectedModelId.value = modelId
  modelDialogOpen.value = true
}

function parseJsonField<T extends Record<string, unknown>>(raw?: string): T | null {
  if (!raw) {
    return null
  }
  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw)
    return parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' ? parsed as T : null
  } catch {
    return null
  }
}

function formatSize(sizeBytes?: number) {
  if (sizeBytes == null || Number.isNaN(sizeBytes)) {
    return '-'
  }
  const gib = sizeBytes / (1024 ** 3)
  if (gib >= 1) {
    return `${gib.toFixed(gib >= 10 ? 1 : 2)} GiB`
  }
  const mib = sizeBytes / (1024 ** 2)
  return `${mib.toFixed(mib >= 10 ? 1 : 2)} MiB`
}
</script>

<style scoped>
.node-card {
  overflow: hidden;
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.12), transparent 30%),
    linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(var(--v-theme-surface), 0.98), rgba(var(--v-theme-surface), 0.95));
}

.node-card__panel {

```
### File: components/nodes/NodeDetailsModal.vue
```

<template>
  <v-dialog :model-value="open" max-width="860" @update:model-value="onDialogUpdate">
    <v-card>
      <v-card-title>{{ t('nodes.large_view.title') }}</v-card-title>
      <v-card-text v-if="loading">{{ t('nodes.large_view.loading') }}</v-card-text>
      <v-card-text v-else-if="error">{{ t(error?.i18nKey) }}</v-card-text>
      <NodeCard v-else-if="node" :node="node" size="lg" />
      <v-card-text v-else>{{ t('nodes.large_view.empty') }}</v-card-text>
      <v-card-actions>
        <v-btn
          v-if="node"
          variant="text"
          prepend-icon="mdi-open-in-new"
          @click="openNodePage"
        >
          {{ t('nodes.actions.open_page') }}
        </v-btn>
        <v-spacer />
        <v-btn variant="text" @click="emit('close')">{{ t('nodes.actions.close') }}</v-btn>
      </v-card-actions>
    </v-card>
  </v-dialog>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import NodeCard from '~/components/nodes/NodeCard.vue'
import type { AppApiError } from '~/composables/useApiClient'
import type { NodeLargeView } from '~/domains/nodes/nodes'

const props = defineProps<{
  open: boolean
  loading: boolean
  error: AppApiError | null
  node: NodeLargeView | null
}>()

const emit = defineEmits<{
  close: []
}>()

const { t } = useI18n()

async function openNodePage() {
  if (!props.node) {
    return
  }

  await navigateTo(`/admin/nodes/${encodeURIComponent(props.node.nodeId)}`)
  emit('close')
}

function onDialogUpdate(value: boolean) {
  if (!value) {
    emit('close')
  }
}
</script>

```
### File: components/nodes/NodeFleetCharts.vue
```
<template>
  <v-row class="inf-gap-sm">
    <v-col cols="12" md="6">
      <v-card class="pa-4" rounded="lg">
        <div class="text-subtitle-1 font-weight-medium mb-4">{{ t('nodes.charts.status_title') }}</div>
        <div class="d-flex flex-column ga-3">
          <div v-for="item in statusBreakdown" :key="item.status">
            <div class="d-flex justify-space-between text-body-2 mb-1">
              <span>{{ item.label }}</span>
              <span>{{ n(item.count) }} ({{ n(item.percentage, { style: 'percent', maximumFractionDigits: 0 }) }})</span>
            </div>
            <v-progress-linear :model-value="item.percentage * 100" :color="item.color" height="10" rounded />
          </div>
        </div>
      </v-card>
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12" md="6">
      <v-card class="pa-4" rounded="lg">
        <div class="text-subtitle-1 font-weight-medium mb-4">{{ t('nodes.charts.availability_title') }}</div>
        <div class="d-flex flex-column ga-4">
          <div>
            <div class="d-flex justify-space-between text-body-2 mb-1">
              <span>{{ t('nodes.charts.average_availability') }}</span>
              <span>{{ n(averageAvailability, { maximumFractionDigits: 1 }) }}%</span>
            </div>
            <v-progress-linear :model-value="averageAvailability" color="primary" height="12" rounded />
          </div>
          <div>
            <div class="d-flex justify-space-between text-body-2 mb-1">
              <span>{{ t('nodes.charts.high_availability_nodes') }}</span>
              <span>{{ n(highAvailabilityNodes) }} / {{ n(totalNodes) }}</span>
            </div>
            <v-progress-linear :model-value="highAvailabilityRatio * 100" color="success" height="12" rounded />
          </div>
        </div>
      </v-card>
    </v-col>
  </v-row>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import type { NodeMediumView } from '~/domains/nodes/nodes'

const props = defineProps<{
  nodes: NodeMediumView[]
}>()

const { t, n } = useI18n()

const totalNodes = computed(() => props.nodes.length)

const averageAvailability = computed(() => {
  if (props.nodes.length === 0) {
    return 0
  }
  const total = props.nodes.reduce((sum, node) => sum + (node.availabilityScore ?? 0), 0)
  return Math.min(100, Math.max(0, total / props.nodes.length))
})

const highAvailabilityNodes = computed(() => props.nodes.filter((node) => node.availabilityScore >= 95).length)
const highAvailabilityRatio = computed(() => (totalNodes.value > 0 ? highAvailabilityNodes.value / totalNodes.value : 0))

const statusBreakdown = computed(() => {
  const statuses = ['UP', 'DEGRADED', 'DOWN', 'OUT_OF_SERVICE'] as const
  const colorByStatus: Record<string, string> = {
    UP: 'success',
    DEGRADED: 'warning',
    DOWN: 'error',
    OUT_OF_SERVICE: 'secondary'
  }

  return statuses.map((status) => {
    const count = props.nodes.filter((node) => (node.status || 'UNKNOWN') === status).length
    const percentage = totalNodes.value > 0 ? count / totalNodes.value : 0
    return {
      status,
      label: t(`nodes.status.${status}`),
      count,
      percentage,
      color: colorByStatus[status]
    }
  })
})
</script>

```

### File: components/nodes/NodeStatusChip.vue
```
<template>
  <v-chip :color="color" size="small" variant="tonal" class="font-weight-medium px-3 text-caption">
    <template v-if="normalizedStatus === 'UP'">
      <span class="mr-1" style="font-size: 10px; opacity: 0.8">●</span>
    </template>
    {{ t(`nodes.status.${normalizedStatus}`) }}
  </v-chip>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
const props = defineProps<{
  status: string
}>()

const { t } = useI18n()

const normalizedStatus = computed(() => props.status?.toUpperCase?.() ?? 'UNKNOWN')

const color = computed(() => {
  if (normalizedStatus.value === 'UP') return 'success'
  if (normalizedStatus.value === 'DEGRADED') return 'warning'
  if (normalizedStatus.value === 'DOWN' || normalizedStatus.value === 'OUT_OF_SERVICE') return 'error'
  return 'info'
})
</script>

```
### File: components/nodes/NodeTable.vue
```
<template>
  <InfDataTable
    :headers="headers"
    :items="rows"
    :items-length="total"
    :items-per-page="itemsPerPage"
    :loading="loading"
    :loading-text="t('nodes.table.loading')"
    :no-data-text="t('nodes.table.empty')"
    @options="onOptions"
  >
    <template #[`item.nodeId`]="{ item }">
      <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
        <v-avatar color="primary" variant="tonal" size="30">
          <v-icon icon="mdi-server" size="16" />
        </v-avatar>
        <span class="font-weight-medium text-truncate inf-node-id">{{ item.nodeId }}</span>
      </div>
    </template>
    <template #[`item.status`]="{ item }">
      <NodeStatusChip :status="displayStatus(item)" />
    </template>
    <template #[`item.hardware`]="{ item }">
      <div class="d-flex flex-column ga-2">
        <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-2">
          <v-chip
            v-for="chip in hardwareChips(item)"
            :key="chip.key"
            :color="chip.color"
            :variant="chip.variant"
            size="small"
          >
            <v-icon start size="14">{{ chip.icon }}</v-icon>
            {{ chip.label }}
          </v-chip>
          <span v-if="hardwareChips(item).length === 0" class="text-medium-emphasis">-</span>
        </div>
        <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">
          {{ runtimeSummary(item) }}
        </div>
      </div>
    </template>
    <template #[`item.lastSeen`]="{ item }">
      <span class="text-body-2">{{ formatDate(String(item.lastSeen || '')) }}</span>
    </template>
    <template #[`item.availabilityScore`]="{ item }">
      <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2 inf-availability">
        <v-progress-linear
          :model-value="Number(item.availabilityScore || 0)"
          color="success"
          height="8"
          rounded
        />
        <span class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ Number(item.availabilityScore || 0) }}%</span>
      </div>
    </template>
    <template #[`item.actions`]="{ item }">
      <v-tooltip :text="t('audit.actions.view_logs')">
        <template #activator="{ props: tooltipProps }">
          <v-btn
            v-bind="tooltipProps"
            icon="mdi-history"
            size="small"
            variant="text"
            @click="emit('logs', String(item.nodeId))"
          />
        </template>
      </v-tooltip>
      <v-tooltip :text="t('audit.actions.view_details')">
        <template #activator="{ props: tooltipProps }">
          <v-btn
            v-bind="tooltipProps"
            icon="mdi-arrow-right"
            size="small"
            variant="text"
            @click="emit('select', String(item.nodeId))"
          />
        </template>
      </v-tooltip>
    </template>
  </InfDataTable>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import InfDataTable from '~/components/infra/InfDataTable.vue'
import NodeStatusChip from '~/components/nodes/NodeStatusChip.vue'
import type { NodeMediumView } from '~/domains/nodes/nodes'

defineProps<{
  rows: NodeMediumView[]
  total: number
  loading?: boolean
  itemsPerPage?: number
}>()

const emit = defineEmits<{
  options: [Record<string, unknown>]
  logs: [string]
  select: [string]
}>()

const { t } = useI18n()

const headers = computed(() => [
  { title: t('nodes.fields.node_id'), key: 'nodeId', minWidth: 220 },
  { title: t('nodes.fields.status'), key: 'status', width: 160 },
  { title: t('nodes.fields.hardware'), key: 'hardware', minWidth: 220, sortable: false },
  { title: t('nodes.fields.last_seen'), key: 'lastSeen', minWidth: 180 },
  { title: t('nodes.fields.availability'), key: 'availabilityScore', minWidth: 180 },
  { title: t('nodes.fields.actions'), key: 'actions', sortable: false, width: 96, align: 'end' as const }
])

function onOptions(options: Record<string, unknown>) {
  emit('options', options)
}

function formatDate(raw: string) {
  if (!raw) {
    return '-'
  }

  const parsed = new Date(raw)
  if (Number.isNaN(parsed.getTime())) {
    return raw
  }

  return new Intl.DateTimeFormat(undefined, {
    dateStyle: 'short',
    timeStyle: 'short'
  }).format(parsed)
}

function hardwareChips(item: Record<string, unknown>) {
  const row = item as {
    runtime?: { gpuModel?: string; gpuVramMb?: number }
    slotIds?: string[]
  }
  const slotIds = Array.isArray(row.slotIds) ? row.slotIds : []
  const gpuPresent = slotIds.some(slot => String(slot).toLowerCase().startsWith('gpu')) || Boolean(row.runtime?.gpuModel)
  const cpuPresent = slotIds.some(slot => String(slot).toLowerCase().startsWith('cpu'))
  const chips: Array<{ key: string; label: string; icon: string; color?: string; variant: 'tonal' | 'outlined' }> = []

  if (gpuPresent) {
    chips.push({
      key: 'gpu',
      label: row.runtime?.gpuModel || t('nodes.hardware.gpu'),
      icon: 'mdi-expansion-card',
      color: 'primary',
      variant: 'tonal'
    })
  }

  if (cpuPresent) {
    chips.push({
      key: 'cpu',
      label: t('nodes.hardware.cpu'),
      icon: 'mdi-chip',
      color: 'info',
      variant: 'outlined'
    })
  }

  return chips
}

function runtimeSummary(item: Record<string, unknown>) {
  const row = item as {
    runtime?: { gpuVramMb?: number; agentVersion?: string; localAiVersion?: string }
  }
  const parts = [
    row.runtime?.gpuVramMb != null ? t('nodes.hardware.vram_mb', { count: row.runtime.gpuVramMb }) : null,
    row.runtime?.agentVersion ? t('nodes.hardware.agent', { version: row.runtime.agentVersion }) : null,
    row.runtime?.localAiVersion ? t('nodes.hardware.localai', { version: row.runtime.localAiVersion }) : null
  ].filter(Boolean)
  return parts.length ? parts.join(' · ') : t('nodes.hardware.runtime_unknown')
}

function displayStatus(item: Record<string, unknown>) {
  const row = item as {
    status?: string
    loadedModels?: string[]
    offloadedModels?: string[]
  }
  const raw = String(row.status || 'UNKNOWN').toUpperCase()
  const liveCount = (Array.isArray(row.loadedModels) ? row.loadedModels.length : 0)
    + (Array.isArray(row.offloadedModels) ? row.offloadedModels.length : 0)
  if (raw === 'UP' && liveCount === 0) {
    return 'DEGRADED'
  }
  return raw
}
</script>

<style scoped>
.inf-node-id {
  max-width: 240px;
}

.inf-availability {
  min-width: 150px;
}
</style>

```

### File: components/nodes/NodesGeoMap.vue
```
<template>
  <v-card>
    <v-card-title>{{ t('nodes.map.title') }}</v-card-title>
    <v-card-text v-if="markers.length === 0">
      {{ t('nodes.map.empty') }}
    </v-card-text>
    <v-card-text v-else class="pa-2">
      <InfGoogleMap :markers="markers" @select="emit('select', $event)" />
    </v-card-text>
  </v-card>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import InfGoogleMap from '~/components/infra/InfGoogleMap.vue'
import type { NodeMediumView } from '~/domains/nodes/nodes'

const props = defineProps<{
  nodes: NodeMediumView[]
}>()

const emit = defineEmits<{
  select: [string]
}>()

const { t } = useI18n()

const markers = computed(() => props.nodes
  .map((node) => {
    const lat = Number(node.geo?.lat)
    const lng = Number(node.geo?.lng)
    if (!Number.isFinite(lat) || !Number.isFinite(lng)) {
      return null
    }
    return {
      id: node.nodeId,
      lat,
      lng,
      label: node.nodeId
    }
  })
  .filter((entry): entry is { id: string; lat: number; lng: number; label: string } => Boolean(entry)))
</script>

```

### File: composables/useAdminKeys.ts
```
import type { AppApiError } from '~/composables/useApiClient'
import type { KeyAnalytics, KeyAuditPolicyUpdateRequest, KeyCreateRequest, KeyCreateResponse, KeyListQuery, KeyPage, KeySummary } from '~/domains/keys/keys'

export function useAdminKeys() {
  const repository = useAdminKeysRepository()

  const query = ref<KeyListQuery>({
    page: 0,
    size: 10,
    sort: 'createdAt,desc',
    days: 7
  })

  const page = ref<KeyPage>({ content: [], page: 0, size: 10, totalElements: 0, totalPages: 0 })
  const summary = ref<KeySummary>({ totalKeys: 0, activeKeys: 0, capturedRequests: 0, refundedRequests: 0, totalTokens: 0 })
  const analytics = ref<KeyAnalytics | null>(null)
  const loading = ref(false)
  const summaryLoading = ref(false)
  const analyticsLoading = ref(false)
  const error = ref<AppApiError | null>(null)
  const revealedKey = ref<KeyCreateResponse | null>(null)

  const refreshList = async () => {
    loading.value = true
    try {
      page.value = await repository.listKeys(query.value)
      error.value = null
    } catch (err) {
      error.value = err as AppApiError
    } finally {
      loading.value = false
    }
  }

  const refreshSummary = async () => {
    summaryLoading.value = true
    try {
      summary.value = await repository.summary(query.value.days)
    } finally {
      summaryLoading.value = false
    }
  }

  const refreshAll = async () => {
    await Promise.all([refreshList(), refreshSummary()])
  }

  const openAnalytics = async (apiKeyId: string) => {
    analyticsLoading.value = true
    try {
      analytics.value = await repository.analytics(apiKeyId, query.value.days)
    } finally {
      analyticsLoading.value = false
    }
  }

  const createKey = async (payload: KeyCreateRequest) => {
    const response = await repository.create(payload)
    revealedKey.value = response
    await refreshAll()
  }

  const updateAuditPolicy = async (apiKeyId: string, payload: KeyAuditPolicyUpdateRequest) => {
    const response = await repository.updateAuditPolicy(apiKeyId, payload)
    revealedKey.value = response
    await refreshAll()
    return response
  }

  const rotateKey = async (apiKeyId: string) => {
    const response = await repository.rotate(apiKeyId)
    revealedKey.value = response
    await refreshAll()
  }

  const revokeKey = async (apiKeyId: string) => {
    await repository.revoke(apiKeyId)
    await refreshAll()
  }

  const deleteKey = async (apiKeyId: string) => {
    await repository.deleteKey(apiKeyId)
    await refreshAll()
  }

  const setQuery = (next: Partial<KeyListQuery>) => {
    query.value = {
      ...query.value,
      ...next
    }
  }

  return {
    query,
    page,
    summary,
    analytics,
    loading,
    summaryLoading,
    analyticsLoading,
    error,
    revealedKey,
    refreshList,
    refreshSummary,
    refreshAll,
    openAnalytics,
    createKey,
    updateAuditPolicy,
    rotateKey,
    revokeKey,
    deleteKey,
    setQuery
  }
}

```

### File: composables/useAdminKeysRepository.ts
```
import type {
  KeyAnalytics,
  KeyAuditPolicyUpdateRequest,
  KeyCreateRequest,
  KeyCreateResponse,
  KeyPage,
  KeySummary,
  KeyListQuery
} from '~/domains/keys/keys'

export function useAdminKeysRepository() {
  const { get, post, patch, del } = useApiClient()

  const listKeys = async (query: KeyListQuery): Promise<KeyPage> => {
    return await get<KeyPage>('/api/v1/admin/keys', query as unknown as Record<string, unknown>)
  }

  const summary = async (days: number): Promise<KeySummary> => {
    return await get<KeySummary>('/api/v1/admin/keys/summary', { days })
  }

  const analytics = async (apiKeyId: string, days: number): Promise<KeyAnalytics> => {
    return await get<KeyAnalytics>(`/api/v1/admin/keys/${encodeURIComponent(apiKeyId)}/analytics`, { days })
  }

  const create = async (payload: KeyCreateRequest): Promise<KeyCreateResponse> => {
    return await post<KeyCreateResponse>('/api/v1/admin/keys', payload)
  }

  const updateAuditPolicy = async (apiKeyId: string, payload: KeyAuditPolicyUpdateRequest): Promise<KeyCreateResponse> => {
    return await patch<KeyCreateResponse>(`/api/v1/admin/keys/${encodeURIComponent(apiKeyId)}/audit-policy`, payload)
  }

  const rotate = async (apiKeyId: string): Promise<KeyCreateResponse> => {
    return await post<KeyCreateResponse>(`/api/v1/admin/keys/${encodeURIComponent(apiKeyId)}/rotate`)
  }

  const revoke = async (apiKeyId: string): Promise<void> => {
    await post(`/api/v1/admin/keys/${encodeURIComponent(apiKeyId)}/revoke`)
  }

  const deleteKey = async (apiKeyId: string): Promise<void> => {
    await del(`/api/v1/admin/keys/${encodeURIComponent(apiKeyId)}`)
  }

  return {
    listKeys,
    summary,
    analytics,
    create,
    updateAuditPolicy,
    rotate,
    revoke,
    deleteKey
  }
}


import type { AdminBulkResult, AdminAuditItem } from '~/domains/admin/users'
import type { AdminOrganizationItem, AdminOrganizationListQuery, AdminOrganizationPage, AdminOrganizationUpsertRequest } from '~/domains/admin/organizations'

export function useAdminOrganizationsRepository() {
  const { get, post, patch, del } = useApiClient()

  const list = async (query: AdminOrganizationListQuery): Promise<AdminOrganizationPage> => {
    return await get<AdminOrganizationPage>('/api/v1/admin/organizations', query as unknown as Record<string, unknown>)
  }

  const create = async (payload: AdminOrganizationUpsertRequest): Promise<AdminOrganizationItem> => {
    return await post<AdminOrganizationItem>('/api/v1/admin/organizations', payload)
  }

  const update = async (organizationId: string, payload: AdminOrganizationUpsertRequest): Promise<AdminOrganizationItem> => {
    return await patch<AdminOrganizationItem>(`/api/v1/admin/organizations/${encodeURIComponent(organizationId)}`, payload)
  }

  const disable = async (organizationId: string): Promise<void> => {
    await del<unknown>(`/api/v1/admin/organizations/${encodeURIComponent(organizationId)}`)
  }

  const bulkUpdate = async (payload: { organizationIds: string[], status: 'active' | 'disabled' }): Promise<AdminBulkResult> => {
    return await post<AdminBulkResult>('/api/v1/admin/organizations/bulk', payload)
  }

  const timeline = async (organizationId: string): Promise<AdminAuditItem[]> => {
    return await get<AdminAuditItem[]>(`/api/v1/admin/organizations/${encodeURIComponent(organizationId)}/timeline`)
  }

  return {
    list,
    create,
    update,
    disable,
    bulkUpdate,
    timeline
  }
}

```
### File: composables/useAdminUsers.ts
```
interface AdminUserItem {
  userId: string
  email: string
  level: 'user' | 'client' | 'admin'
  status: 'active' | 'disabled'
  authProvider: string
  createdAt: string
}

interface UpdateUserPayload {
  level?: AdminUserItem['level']
  status?: AdminUserItem['status']
}

export function useAdminUsers() {
  const backendBaseUrl = useRuntimeConfig().public.backendBaseUrl

  const listUsers = async () => {
    return $fetch<AdminUserItem[]>('/api/v1/admin/users', {
      baseURL: backendBaseUrl,
      credentials: 'include'
    })
  }

  const updateUser = async (userId: string, payload: UpdateUserPayload) => {
    return $fetch<AdminUserItem>(`/api/v1/admin/users/${encodeURIComponent(userId)}`, {
      method: 'PATCH',
      baseURL: backendBaseUrl,
      credentials: 'include',
      body: payload
    })
  }

  return {
    listUsers,
    updateUser
  }
}

```
### File: composables/useAdminUsersRepository.ts
```

import { AdminUserAPIsApi } from '~/generated/backend-client/apis'
import type { AdminUserUpdateRequest, AdminUserBulkUpdateRequest } from '~/generated/backend-client'
import type { AdminBulkResult, AdminAuditItem, AdminUserItem, AdminUserListQuery, AdminUserPage } from '~/domains/admin/users'

export function useAdminUsersRepository() {
  const { createApi } = useBackendClient()
  const api = createApi(AdminUserAPIsApi)

  const listUsers = async (query: AdminUserListQuery): Promise<AdminUserPage> => {
    const payload = await api.listUsers({
      page: query.page,
      size: query.size,
      search: query.search,
      level: query.level,
      status: query.status,
      organizationId: query.organizationId,
      sort: query.sort
    })
    return payload as unknown as AdminUserPage
  }

  const updateUser = async (userId: string, payload: Partial<Pick<AdminUserItem, 'level' | 'status' | 'organizationId'>>): Promise<AdminUserItem> => {
    const payloadResult = await api.updateUser({ 
      userId, 
      adminUserUpdateRequest: payload as AdminUserUpdateRequest 
    })
    return payloadResult as unknown as AdminUserItem
  }

  const bulkUpdate = async (payload: {
    userIds: string[]
    level?: AdminUserItem['level']
    status?: AdminUserItem['status']
    organizationId?: string
  }): Promise<AdminBulkResult> => {
    const payloadResult = await api.bulkUpdate({ 
      adminUserBulkUpdateRequest: payload as AdminUserBulkUpdateRequest 
    })
    return payloadResult as unknown as AdminBulkResult
  }

  const timeline = async (userId: string): Promise<AdminAuditItem[]> => {
    const payload = await api.timeline({ userId })
    return payload as unknown as AdminAuditItem[]
  }

  return {
    listUsers,
    updateUser,
    bulkUpdate,
    timeline
  }
}

```
### File: composables/useApiClient.ts
```
import { mapApiError, type AppApiError } from '~/domains/errors/api-error.mapper'

type HttpMethod = 'GET' | 'POST' | 'PATCH' | 'DELETE'

export function useApiClient() {
  const config = useRuntimeConfig()
  const ssrHeaders = import.meta.server ? useRequestHeaders(['cookie']) : {}
  const runtime = import.meta.server ? 'server' : 'client'
  const baseURL = config.public.backendBaseUrl

  function buildUrl(path: string, query?: Record<string, unknown>) {
    const url = new URL(path, baseURL)
    Object.entries(query ?? {}).forEach(([key, value]) => {
      if (value !== undefined && value !== null) {
        url.searchParams.set(key, String(value))
      }
    })
    return url.toString()
  }

  function logApiFailure(method: HttpMethod, path: string, error: unknown, startedAt: number, query?: Record<string, unknown>) {
    const elapsedMs = Math.round(performance.now() - startedAt)
    const context = {
      method,
      path,
      url: buildUrl(path, query),
      runtime,
      elapsedMs
    }
    const err = error as {
      status?: number
      statusCode?: number
      statusMessage?: string
      message?: string
      data?: unknown
      cause?: unknown
    }

    console.error('[API Client] Backend request failed', {
      ...context,
      status: err.status ?? err.statusCode ?? null,
      statusMessage: err.statusMessage,
      message: err.message,
      data: err.data,
      cause: err.cause
    })

    return mapApiError({ ...err, context })
  }

  async function get<T>(path: string, query?: Record<string, unknown>) {
    const startedAt = performance.now()
    try {
      return await $fetch<T>(path, {
        baseURL,
        query,
        credentials: 'include',
        headers: ssrHeaders
      })
    } catch (error) {
      throw logApiFailure('GET', path, error, startedAt, query)
    }
  }

  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
  async function post<T>(path: string, body?: BodyInit | Record<string, any> | null, query?: Record<string, unknown>) {
    const startedAt = performance.now()
    try {
      return await $fetch<T>(path, {
        method: 'POST',
        baseURL,
        body,
        query,
        credentials: 'include',
        headers: ssrHeaders
      })
    } catch (error) {
      throw logApiFailure('POST', path, error, startedAt, query)
    }
  }

  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
  async function patch<T>(path: string, body?: BodyInit | Record<string, any> | null, query?: Record<string, unknown>) {
    const startedAt = performance.now()
    try {
      return await $fetch<T>(path, {
        method: 'PATCH',
        baseURL,
        body,
        query,
        credentials: 'include',
        headers: ssrHeaders
      })
    } catch (error) {
      throw logApiFailure('PATCH', path, error, startedAt, query)
    }
  }

  async function del<T>(path: string, query?: Record<string, unknown>) {
    const startedAt = performance.now()
    try {
      return await $fetch<T>(path, {
        method: 'DELETE',
        baseURL,
        query,
        credentials: 'include',
        headers: ssrHeaders
      })
    } catch (error) {
      throw logApiFailure('DELETE', path, error, startedAt, query)
    }
  }

  return {
    get,
    post,
    patch,
    del
  }
}

export type { AppApiError }

```

---
### File: composables/useAuthSession.ts
```
export type AccessLevel = 'public' | 'user' | 'client' | 'admin'

export interface AuthSession {
  subject: string
  clientId: string
  level: AccessLevel
  roles: string[]
  email?: string
  name?: string
  picture?: string
}

interface OidcLoginPayload {
  provider: 'google' | string
  idToken: string
}

export function useAuthSession() {
  const session = useState<AuthSession | null>('auth-session', () => null)
  const ssrHeaders = import.meta.server ? useRequestHeaders(['cookie']) : {}

  const fetchMe = async () => {
    try {
      const data = await $fetch<AuthSession>('/api/v1/auth/me', {
        baseURL: useRuntimeConfig().public.backendBaseUrl,
        credentials: 'include',
        headers: ssrHeaders
      })
      session.value = data
      return data
    } catch (err: unknown) {
      const error = err as { status?: number; message?: string }
      const message = error.message || String(error)
      console.warn('[auth/session] Unable to resolve /auth/me session claims', message)
      
      // Only clear session if it's a 401 (Unauthorized) or if we are on server
      // Transient network errors on client shouldn't wipe out the hydrated session
      if (import.meta.server || error.status === 401) {
        session.value = null
      }
      return null
    }
  }

  const loginWithOidc = async (payload: OidcLoginPayload) => {
    await $fetch('/api/v1/auth/oidc', {
      method: 'POST',
      baseURL: useRuntimeConfig().public.backendBaseUrl,
      credentials: 'include',
      body: payload,
      headers: ssrHeaders
    })
    return fetchMe()
  }

  const logout = async () => {
    await $fetch('/api/v1/auth/logout', {
      method: 'POST',
      baseURL: useRuntimeConfig().public.backendBaseUrl,
      credentials: 'include',
      headers: ssrHeaders
    })
    session.value = null
  }

  return {
    session,
    fetchMe,
    loginWithOidc,
    logout
  }
}

```

### File: composables/useBackendClient.ts
```
import { Configuration, type Middleware, type ResponseContext } from '~/generated/backend-client'
import { mapApiError } from '~/domains/errors/api-error.mapper'

/**
 * Middleware to map OpenAPI ResponseErrors into our internal AppApiError format.
 */
const errorMappingMiddleware: Middleware = {
  post: async (context: ResponseContext) => {
    const { response } = context
    if (response.status >= 200 && response.status < 300) {
      return response
    }

    // Attempt to parse body as JSON for the mapper
    let data: unknown
    try {
      data = await response.clone().json()
    } catch {
      data = null
    }

    // Throw an error compatible with our mapper's expectations (status + data)
    throw mapApiError({
      statusCode: response.status,
      data,
      message: response.statusText,
      context: {
        method: context.init.method,
        path: context.url,
        url: context.url,
        runtime: import.meta.server ? 'server' : 'client'
      }
    })
  }
}

export function useBackendClient() {
  const config = useRuntimeConfig()
  const ssrHeaders = import.meta.server ? useRequestHeaders(['cookie']) : {}

  const configuration = new Configuration({
    basePath: config.public.backendBaseUrl,
    credentials: 'include',
    headers: ssrHeaders as Record<string, string>,
    middleware: [errorMappingMiddleware]
  })

  /**
   * Helper to instantiate an API class with shared configuration.
   */
  function createApi<T extends { new (config: Configuration): InstanceType<T> }>(ApiClass: T): InstanceType<T> {
    return new ApiClass(configuration)
  }

  return {
    configuration,
    createApi
  }
}

```

### File: composables/useBenchmarkList.ts
```
import type { AppApiError } from '~/composables/useApiClient'
import type { BenchmarkListQuery, BenchmarkPage } from '~/domains/benchmarks/benchmarks'

export function useBenchmarkList() {
  const repository = useAdminBenchmarksRepository()

  const query = ref<BenchmarkListQuery>({
    page: 0,
    size: 10,
    sort: 'capturedAt,desc'
  })
  const page = ref<BenchmarkPage>({ page: 0, size: 10, totalElements: 0, totalPages: 0, content: [] })
  const loading = ref(false)
  const error = ref<AppApiError | null>(null)

  const refresh = async () => {
    loading.value = true
    try {
      page.value = await repository.listBenchmarks(query.value)
    } catch (err) {
      error.value = err as AppApiError
    } finally {
      loading.value = false
    }
  }

  const setQuery = (next: Partial<BenchmarkListQuery>) => {
    query.value = {
      ...query.value,
      ...next
    }
  }

  return {
    query,
    page,
    loading,
    error,
    refresh,
    setQuery
  }
}

import { computed, ref } from 'vue'

/**
 * Handles beta signup form state.
 */
export function useBetaSignup() {
  const email = ref('')
  const submitted = ref(false)

  const isValidEmail = computed(() => /.+@.+\..+/.test(email.value))

  const submit = () => {
    if (!isValidEmail.value) {
      return
    }

    submitted.value = true
  }

  return {
    email,
    submitted,
    isValidEmail,
    submit
  }
}

```
### File: composables/useCapacityTester.ts
```
interface ApiKeyOption {
  apiKeyId: string
  name: string
  keyPrefix: string
  keyValue: string | null
  enabled: boolean
}

interface CapacityDiagnostics {
  startedAt: string
  durationMs: number
  modelRequested: string
  modelServed?: string
  promptTokens?: number
  completionTokens?: number
  totalTokens?: number
  status: 'success' | 'error'
  errorCode?: string
  errorMessage?: string
}

interface CapacityExecutionResult {
  output: string
  diagnostics: CapacityDiagnostics
}

interface CapacityKeyCreateRequest {
  tier: 'PUBLIC' | 'TRUSTED' | 'HDS'
  billingEnabled: boolean
  fallbackEnabled: boolean
  fallbackBillingMode: string
  auditTrailEnabled: boolean
  operationLogLevel?: string
  operationLogRecentLimit?: number
  performanceRoutingEnabled: boolean
  performanceMode: 'TOP_10' | 'TOP_25' | 'TOP_50' | 'DISABLED'
  spendLimitEnabled: boolean
  spendLimitCurrency: string
  monthlySpendLimitMinor: number | null
  lifetimeSpendLimitMinor: number | null
  allowedModels: string[]
}

const MAX_ATTACHMENT_SIZE_BYTES = 1024 * 1024
const MAX_TOTAL_ATTACHMENTS_BYTES = 2 * 1024 * 1024

export function useCapacityTester() {
  const playground = usePlayground()

  const keyRows = ref<ApiKeyOption[]>([])
  const models = ref<string[]>([])
  const selectedApiKeyId = ref<string | null>(null)
  const selectedModel = ref('')
  const temperature = ref(0.7)
  const maxTokens = ref(512)

  const chatResult = ref<CapacityExecutionResult | null>(null)
  const embeddingResult = ref<CapacityExecutionResult | null>(null)
  const chatErrorCode = ref('')
  const embeddingErrorCode = ref('')

  const apiKeyOptions = computed(() => keyRows.value
    .filter((row) => row.enabled)
    .map((row) => ({
      value: row.apiKeyId,
      title: `${row.name} (${row.keyPrefix}...)`
    })))

  const modelOptions = computed(() => models.value.map((id) => ({ title: id, value: id })))

  function selectedSecret(): string | null {
    const selectedKey = keyRows.value.find((row) => row.apiKeyId === selectedApiKeyId.value)
    return selectedKey?.keyValue?.trim() || null
  }

  async function init() {
    try {
      keyRows.value = await playground.listCustomerKeys()
      if (keyRows.value.length > 0) {
        selectedApiKeyId.value = keyRows.value[0]?.apiKeyId || null
        await onSelectApiKey()
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.warn('[CapacityTester] Unable to load customer keys (likely unauthenticated)', error)
      keyRows.value = []
    }
  }

  async function onSelectApiKey() {
    if (!selectedApiKeyId.value) {
      models.value = []
      selectedModel.value = ''
      return
    }

    await onLoadModels()
  }

  async function onLoadModels() {
    chatErrorCode.value = ''
    embeddingErrorCode.value = ''
    if (!selectedApiKeyId.value || !selectedSecret()) {
      return
    }

    try {
      const modelIds = await playground.fetchModels(selectedSecret()!)
      models.value = modelIds
      if (!selectedModel.value && modelIds.length > 0) {
        selectedModel.value = modelIds[0] || ''
      }
    } catch (error: unknown) {
      chatErrorCode.value = extractErrorCode(error)
      embeddingErrorCode.value = extractErrorCode(error)
      throw error
    }
  }

  async function runChat(params: { prompt: string, attachments: File[] }) {
    ensureBaseConfiguration()
    validateChatPayload(params.prompt, params.attachments)

    const startedAt = new Date().toISOString()
    const startMs = Date.now()

    try {
      const response = await playground.runChatRaw({
        apiKey: selectedSecret()!,
        model: selectedModel.value,
        prompt: params.prompt,
        temperature: temperature.value,
        maxTokens: maxTokens.value,
        attachments: params.attachments || []
      })

      const diagnostics = buildDiagnostics(startedAt, startMs, selectedModel.value, response, 'success')
      const output = playground.extractChatOutput(response)
      chatResult.value = { output, diagnostics }
      chatErrorCode.value = ''
    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
    } catch (error: any) {
      chatErrorCode.value = extractErrorCode(error)
      // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
      const diagnostics = buildDiagnostics(startedAt, startMs, selectedModel.value, null, 'error', chatErrorCode.value, (error as any)?.message)
      chatResult.value = { output: '', diagnostics }
      throw error
    }
  }

  async function runEmbeddings(input: string) {
    ensureBaseConfiguration()
    if (!input.trim()) {
      throw createError({ statusCode: 400, statusMessage: 'empty_embedding_input' })
    }

    const startedAt = new Date().toISOString()
    const startMs = Date.now()

    try {
      const response = await playground.runEmbeddingsRaw({
        apiKey: selectedSecret()!,
        model: selectedModel.value,
        input
      })
      const diagnostics = buildDiagnostics(startedAt, startMs, selectedModel.value, response, 'success')
      embeddingResult.value = { output: JSON.stringify(response, null, 2), diagnostics }
      embeddingErrorCode.value = ''
    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
    } catch (error: any) {
      embeddingErrorCode.value = extractErrorCode(error)
      // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
      const diagnostics = buildDiagnostics(startedAt, startMs, selectedModel.value, null, 'error', embeddingErrorCode.value, (error as any)?.message)
      embeddingResult.value = { output: '', diagnostics }
      throw error
    }
  }

  async function createKey(payload: CapacityKeyCreateRequest) {
    const created = await playground.createCustomerKey(payload)
    await refreshKeys(created.apiKeyId)
    return created
  }

  async function refreshKeys(preferredApiKeyId?: string) {
    keyRows.value = await playground.listCustomerKeys()
    selectedApiKeyId.value = preferredApiKeyId && keyRows.value.some(row => row.apiKeyId === preferredApiKeyId)
      ? preferredApiKeyId
      : keyRows.value.find(row => row.enabled)?.apiKeyId ?? keyRows.value[0]?.apiKeyId ?? null
    await onSelectApiKey()
  }

  function ensureBaseConfiguration() {
    if (!selectedModel.value || !selectedSecret()) {
      throw createError({ statusCode: 400, statusMessage: 'configuration_required' })
    }
  }

  function validateChatPayload(prompt: string, attachments: File[]) {
    if (!prompt.trim() && attachments.length === 0) {
      throw createError({ statusCode: 400, statusMessage: 'empty_chat_payload' })
    }

    const totalBytes = attachments.reduce((sum, file) => sum + file.size, 0)
    if (totalBytes > MAX_TOTAL_ATTACHMENTS_BYTES || attachments.some((file) => file.size > MAX_ATTACHMENT_SIZE_BYTES)) {
      throw createError({ statusCode: 413, statusMessage: 'attachments_too_large' })
    }
  }

  return {
    ...playground,
    keyRows,
    models,
    selectedApiKeyId,
    selectedModel,
    temperature,
    maxTokens,
    apiKeyOptions,
    modelOptions,
    chatResult,
    embeddingResult,
    chatErrorCode,
    embeddingErrorCode,
    init,
    onSelectApiKey,
    onLoadModels,
    createKey,
    refreshKeys,
    runChat,
    runEmbeddings
  }
}

function buildDiagnostics(
  startedAt: string,
  startMs: number,
  modelRequested: string,
  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
  response: any,
  status: 'success' | 'error',
  errorCode?: string,
  errorMessage?: string
): CapacityDiagnostics {
  return {
    startedAt,
    durationMs: Date.now() - startMs,
    modelRequested,
    modelServed: response?.model,
    promptTokens: response?.usage?.prompt_tokens,
    completionTokens: response?.usage?.completion_tokens,
    totalTokens: response?.usage?.total_tokens,
    status,
    errorCode,
    errorMessage
  }
}

// eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
function extractErrorCode(error: any): string {
  return String(error?.statusMessage || error?.data?.statusMessage || error?.data?.code || error?.statusCode || 'playground_proxy_error')
}

```

---
### File: composables/useContentCatalog.ts
```
export type ContentScope = 'public' | 'admin'

export interface ContentCatalogItem {
  id: string
  title: string
  description: string
  path: string
  locale: string
  slug: string
  section: string
  tags: string[]
  scope: ContentScope
  content: string
}


const extractText = (value: unknown): string => {
  if (typeof value === 'string') {
    return value
  }

  if (Array.isArray(value)) {
    return value.map((item) => extractText(item)).join(' ')
  }

  if (value && typeof value === 'object') {
    return Object.values(value as Record<string, unknown>)
      .map((item) => extractText(item))
      .join(' ')
  }

  return ''
}

export function useContentCatalog() {
  const { locale, defaultLocale } = useI18n()

  const { data, pending, error, refresh } = useAsyncData(
    () => `content-catalog:${locale.value}`,
    async () => {
      const docs = await queryCollection('pages').all()

      return docs
        .map((doc) => {
          const fullPath = doc.path || ''
          const pathSegments = fullPath.split('/').filter(Boolean)
          const localizedSegment = pathSegments[0] || defaultLocale
          const slugParts = pathSegments.slice(1)

          return {
            id: doc.id || fullPath,
            title: doc.title || slugParts.at(-1) || 'Untitled',
            description: doc.description || '',
            path: fullPath,
            locale: localizedSegment,
            slug: slugParts.join('/'),
            section: slugParts[0] || 'root',
            tags: Array.isArray(doc.tags) ? doc.tags : [],
            scope: doc.scope === 'admin' ? 'admin' : 'public',
            content: extractText(doc.body)
          } satisfies ContentCatalogItem
        })
        .filter((doc) => doc.locale === locale.value)
        .sort((left, right) => left.slug.localeCompare(right.slug))
    },
    {
      watch: [locale]
    }
  )

  return {
    items: data,
    pending,
    error,
    refresh
  }
}


  fallbackEnabled: boolean

```
### File: composables/useDownloadPlatform.ts
```
export type DownloadPlatform = 'macos' | 'linux' | 'windows'

export interface DownloadPlatformOption {
  key: DownloadPlatform
  icon: string
}

const PLATFORM_OPTIONS: DownloadPlatformOption[] = [
  { key: 'macos', icon: 'mdi-apple' },
  { key: 'linux', icon: 'mdi-linux' },
  { key: 'windows', icon: 'mdi-microsoft-windows' }
]

/**
 * Detects the visitor OS from request headers (SSR) and browser user-agent (CSR),
 * then returns a stable ordered list of platform cards with the detected platform first.
 */
export function useDownloadPlatform() {
  const ua = computed(() => {
    if (import.meta.server) {
      return useRequestHeaders(['user-agent'])['user-agent'] || ''
    }

    return navigator.userAgent || ''
  })

  const detected = computed<DownloadPlatform>(() => {
    const normalized = ua.value.toLowerCase()

    if (normalized.includes('mac os') || normalized.includes('macintosh') || normalized.includes('darwin')) {
      return 'macos'
    }

    if (normalized.includes('win')) {
      return 'windows'
    }

    return 'linux'
  })

  const orderedPlatforms = computed<DownloadPlatformOption[]>(() => {
    return [...PLATFORM_OPTIONS].sort((left, right) => {
      if (left.key === detected.value) {
        return -1
      }

      if (right.key === detected.value) {
        return 1
      }

      return 0
    })
  })

  return {
    detected,
    orderedPlatforms
  }
}

```

### File: composables/useEnergyAnalyticsRepository.ts
```
import {
  normalizeEnergyAnalyticsResponse,
  type EnergyAnalyticsQuery,
  type EnergyAnalyticsResponse
} from '~/domains/energy/energy'

export function useEnergyAnalyticsRepository() {
  const { get } = useApiClient()

  const analytics = async (query: EnergyAnalyticsQuery = {}): Promise<EnergyAnalyticsResponse> => {
    const payload = await get<EnergyAnalyticsResponse>('/api/v1/analytics/energy', clean(query))
    return normalizeEnergyAnalyticsResponse(payload)
  }

  return {
    analytics
  }
}

function clean(values: Record<string, unknown>): Record<string, unknown> {
  return Object.fromEntries(
    Object.entries(values).filter(([, value]) => value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== '')
  )
}

```
### File: composables/useEnrollment.ts
```
import type { AppApiError } from '~/composables/useApiClient'

export type EnrollmentChallengeView = {
  challengeId: string
  shortUrl: string
  status: string
  expiresAt: string
  agentId?: string
  nodeName?: string
  tierParticipating?: string
  profileSummary?: EnrollmentProfileSummary
  systemFingerprint?: EnrollmentSystemFingerprint
}

export interface EnrollmentProfileSummary {
  eligible_models?: string[]
  selected_models?: string[]
  hardware_eligible_models?: number
  budget_gb?: number
}

export interface EnrollmentSystemFingerprint {
  hostname?: string
  osName?: string
  osRelease?: string
  architecture?: string
  pythonVersion?: string
  gpuModel?: string
}

export function useEnrollment() {
  const { get, post } = useApiClient()

  const loading = ref(false)
  const confirming = ref(false)
  const error = ref<AppApiError | null>(null)
  const challenge = ref<EnrollmentChallengeView | null>(null)

  const loadChallenge = async (challengeId: string) => {
    loading.value = true
    error.value = null
    try {
      challenge.value = await get<EnrollmentChallengeView>(`/api/v1/nodes/challenges/${encodeURIComponent(challengeId)}`)
    } catch (err) {
      error.value = err as AppApiError
    } finally {
      loading.value = false
    }
  }

  const confirmChallenge = async (challengeId: string, action: 'APPROVE' | 'DENY', nodeName: string) => {
    confirming.value = true
    error.value = null
    try {
      challenge.value = await post<EnrollmentChallengeView>(
        `/api/v1/nodes/challenges/${encodeURIComponent(challengeId)}/confirm`,
        { action, nodeName }
      )
    } catch (err) {
      error.value = err as AppApiError
    } finally {
      confirming.value = false
    }
  }

  return { loading, confirming, error, challenge, loadChallenge, confirmChallenge }
}

