### File: pages/admin/benchmarks.vue
```
<template>
  <v-row class="ga-4">
    <!-- Header with tab selection -->
    <v-col cols="12">
      <AdminPageHeader
        :title="tab === 'energy' ? t('admin.benchmarks.title') : (tab === 'fleet' ? t('admin.benchmarks.fleet.title') : t('admin.benchmarks.raw.title'))"
        :subtitle="tab === 'energy' ? t('admin.benchmarks.subtitle') : (tab === 'fleet' ? t('admin.benchmarks.fleet.subtitle') : t('admin.benchmarks.raw.subtitle'))"
        :badge="tab === 'energy' ? t('admin.pages.benchmarks.badge') : (tab === 'fleet' ? t('admin.benchmarks.fleet.badge') : t('admin.benchmarks.raw.badge'))"
        :icon="tab === 'energy' ? 'mdi-flash-outline' : (tab === 'fleet' ? 'mdi-server-network' : 'mdi-speedometer')"
      >
        <template #meta>
          <v-tabs v-model="tab" density="comfortable" color="primary" class="mt-n2">
            <v-tab value="energy" prepend-icon="mdi-lightning-bolt">{{ t('admin.benchmarks.energy_tab') }}</v-tab>
            <v-tab value="performance" prepend-icon="mdi-gauge">{{ t('admin.benchmarks.performance_tab') }}</v-tab>
            <v-tab value="fleet" prepend-icon="mdi-server-network">{{ t('admin.benchmarks.fleet_tab') }}</v-tab>
          </v-tabs>
        </template>

        <template #actions>
          <v-btn
            color="primary"
            prepend-icon="mdi-refresh"
            :loading="loadingEnergy || loadingPerformance || loadingFleet"
            @click="onRefresh"
          >
            {{ t('admin.benchmarks.actions.refresh') }}
          </v-btn>
        </template>
      </AdminPageHeader>
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12">
      <v-window v-model="tab" :touch="false">
        <!-- Energy Analytics View -->
        <v-window-item value="energy">
          <v-row class="ga-4">
            <v-col cols="12">
              <v-sheet class="pa-4 inf-filter-panel" rounded="lg">
                <div class="inf-filter-grid">
                  <v-text-field v-model="energyFilters.model" :label="t('admin.benchmarks.filters.model')" clearable hide-details density="comfortable" />
                  <v-select v-model="energyFilters.methodTier" :items="methodTierItems" :label="t('admin.benchmarks.filters.method_tier')" clearable hide-details density="comfortable" />
                  <v-select v-model="energyFilters.scope" :items="scopeItems" :label="t('admin.benchmarks.filters.scope')" hide-details density="comfortable" />
                  <v-text-field v-model="energyFilters.scopeId" :label="t('admin.benchmarks.filters.scope_id')" clearable hide-details density="comfortable" />
                  <v-select v-model="energyFilters.bucket" :items="bucketItems" :label="t('admin.benchmarks.filters.bucket')" hide-details density="comfortable" />
                  <v-text-field v-model="energyFilters.minConfidence" :label="t('admin.benchmarks.filters.min_confidence')" type="number" min="0" max="1" step="0.05" hide-details density="comfortable" />
                </div>
              </v-sheet>
            </v-col>

            <v-col v-for="metric in energyMetrics" :key="metric.key" cols="12" md="6" lg="3">
              <AdminMetricCard :label="metric.label" :value="metric.value" :caption="metric.caption" :icon="metric.icon" :color="metric.color" />
            </v-col>

            <v-col cols="12">
              <v-alert type="info" variant="tonal">
                {{ t('admin.benchmarks.notice', { threshold: energyAnalytics.meta.minConfidence ?? 0 }) }}
              </v-alert>
            </v-col>

            <v-col cols="12" lg="7">
              <v-card variant="outlined" height="100%">
                <v-card-title class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
                  <v-icon icon="mdi-chart-donut" color="primary" />
                  {{ t('admin.benchmarks.sections.breakdown') }}
                </v-card-title>
                <v-card-text>
                  <v-tabs v-model="breakdownTab" density="comfortable">
                    <v-tab value="model">{{ t('admin.benchmarks.tabs.model') }}</v-tab>
                    <v-tab value="apikey">{{ t('admin.benchmarks.tabs.apikey') }}</v-tab>
                    <v-tab value="user">{{ t('admin.benchmarks.tabs.user') }}</v-tab>
                    <v-tab value="organization">{{ t('admin.benchmarks.tabs.organization') }}</v-tab>
                    <v-tab value="method">{{ t('admin.benchmarks.tabs.method') }}</v-tab>
                  </v-tabs>

                  <v-data-table
                    class="mt-4"
                    :headers="breakdownHeaders"
                    :items="activeBreakdownItems"
                    :items-per-page="8"
                    density="comfortable"
                  >
                    <template #[`item.summary.joulesNet`]="{ item }">
                      {{ formatNumber(item.summary.joulesNet, 2) }}
                    </template>
                    <template #[`item.summary.tokensTotal`]="{ item }">
                      {{ formatInteger(item.summary.tokensTotal) }}
                    </template>
                    <template #[`item.summary.jPerToken`]="{ item }">
                      {{ formatNullable(item.summary.jPerToken, 6) }}
                    </template>
                    <template #[`item.summary.whPer1kTokens`]="{ item }">
                      {{ formatNullable(item.summary.whPer1kTokens, 4) }}
                    </template>
                  </v-data-table>
                </v-card-text>
              </v-card>
            </v-col>

            <v-col cols="12" lg="5">
              <v-card variant="outlined" height="100%">
                <v-card-title class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
                  <v-icon icon="mdi-timeline-outline" color="info" />
                  {{ t('admin.benchmarks.sections.timeseries') }}
                </v-card-title>
                <v-data-table
                  :headers="timeseriesHeaders"
                  :items="energyAnalytics.timeseries"
                  :items-per-page="8"
                  density="comfortable"
                >
                  <template #[`item.summary.joulesNet`]="{ item }">
                    {{ formatNumber(item.summary.joulesNet, 2) }}
                  </template>
                  <template #[`item.summary.tokensTotal`]="{ item }">
                    {{ formatInteger(item.summary.tokensTotal) }}
                  </template>
                  <template #[`item.summary.jPerToken`]="{ item }">
                    {{ formatNullable(item.summary.jPerToken, 6) }}
                  </template>
                </v-data-table>
              </v-card>
            </v-col>

            <v-col cols="12">
              <v-card variant="outlined">
                <v-card-title class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
                  <v-icon icon="mdi-table-eye" color="primary" />
                  {{ t('admin.benchmarks.sections.ledger') }}
                </v-card-title>
                <v-data-table
                  :headers="ledgerHeaders"
                  :items="energyAnalytics.ledger"
                  :loading="loadingEnergy"
                  :items-per-page="10"
                  density="comfortable"
                >
                  <template #[`item.methodTier`]="{ item }">
                    <v-chip size="small" variant="tonal" :color="methodTierColor(item.methodTier)">
                      {{ item.methodTier }}
                    </v-chip>
                  </template>
                  <template #[`item.confidenceScore`]="{ item }">
                    {{ formatNullable(item.confidenceScore, 2) }}
                  </template>
                  <template #[`item.joulesNet`]="{ item }">
                    {{ formatNumber(item.joulesNet, 2) }}
                  </template>
                  <template #[`item.tokensTotal`]="{ item }">
                    {{ formatInteger(item.tokensTotal) }}
                  </template>
                  <template #[`item.jPerToken`]="{ item }">
                    {{ formatNullable(item.jPerToken, 6) }}
                  </template>
                  <template #[`item.partialFailure`]="{ item }">
                    <v-chip size="small" variant="tonal" :color="item.partialFailure ? 'warning' : 'success'">
                      {{ item.partialFailure ? t('admin.benchmarks.ledger.partial') : t('admin.benchmarks.ledger.complete') }}
                    </v-chip>
                  </template>
                  <template #[`item.anomalyFlag`]="{ item }">
                    <v-chip size="small" variant="tonal" :color="item.anomalyFlag ? 'error' : 'default'">
                      {{ item.anomalyFlag ? t('admin.benchmarks.ledger.flagged') : t('admin.benchmarks.ledger.normal') }}
                    </v-chip>
                  </template>
                </v-data-table>
              </v-card>
            </v-col>
          </v-row>
        </v-window-item>

        <!-- Performance Benchmarks View -->
        <v-window-item value="performance">
          <v-row class="ga-4">
            <v-col cols="12">
              <v-sheet class="pa-4 inf-filter-panel" rounded="lg">
                <div class="inf-filter-grid">
                  <v-text-field
                    v-model="performanceFilters.nodeId"
                    :label="t('admin.benchmarks.raw.filters.node')"
                    clearable
                    hide-details
                    density="comfortable"
                    prepend-inner-icon="mdi-server"
                    @update:model-value="onPerformanceFilter"
                  />
                  <v-text-field
                    v-model="performanceFilters.modelId"
                    :label="t('admin.benchmarks.raw.filters.model')"
                    clearable
                    hide-details
                    density="comfortable"
                    prepend-inner-icon="mdi-brain"
                    @update:model-value="onPerformanceFilter"
                  />
                </div>
              </v-sheet>
            </v-col>

            <v-col cols="12">
              <v-card variant="outlined" class="overflow-hidden">
                <BenchmarkTable
                  :rows="performancePage.content"
                  :total="performancePage.totalElements"
                  :loading="loadingPerformance"
                  :items-per-page="performanceQuery.size"
                  @options="onPerformanceOptions"
                />
              </v-card>
            </v-col>
          </v-row>
        </v-window-item>

        <!-- Fleet Status View -->
        <v-window-item value="fleet">
          <v-row class="ga-4">
            <v-col cols="12">
              <v-card variant="outlined" class="overflow-hidden">
                <NodeTable
                  :rows="fleetPage.content"
                  :total="fleetPage.totalElements"
                  :loading="loadingFleet"
                  :items-per-page="fleetQuery.size"
                  @options="onFleetOptions"
                  @select="onNodeSelect"
                />
              </v-card>
            </v-col>
          </v-row>
        </v-window-item>
      </v-window>
    </v-col>

    <v-col v-if="energyError || performanceError || fleetError" cols="12">
      <v-alert type="error" variant="tonal">
        {{ energyError || performanceError || fleetError }}
      </v-alert>
    </v-col>
  </v-row>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import AdminMetricCard from '~/components/admin/AdminMetricCard.vue'
import AdminPageHeader from '~/components/admin/AdminPageHeader.vue'
import NodeTable from '~/components/nodes/NodeTable.vue'
import BenchmarkTable from '~/components/benchmarks/BenchmarkTable.vue'
import { normalizeEnergyAnalyticsResponse, type EnergyAnalyticsResponse } from '~/domains/energy/energy'
import type { NodeListQuery, NodePage } from '~/domains/nodes/nodes'

definePageMeta({
  middleware: 'admin',
  width: 'semi-fluid'
})

const { t } = useI18n()
const tab = ref('energy')

// Energy Logic
const energyRepository = useEnergyAnalyticsRepository()
const energyFilters = reactive({
  model: '',
  methodTier: '',
  scope: 'global' as 'global' | 'apikey' | 'model' | 'user' | 'organization',
  scopeId: '',
  bucket: 'hour' as 'hour' | 'day',
  minConfidence: '0.25'
})
const loadingEnergy = ref(false)
const energyError = ref('')
const breakdownTab = ref('model')
const energyAnalytics = ref<EnergyAnalyticsResponse>(normalizeEnergyAnalyticsResponse({}))

// Performance Logic
const {
  query: performanceQuery,
  page: performancePage,
  loading: loadingPerformance,
  error: performanceError,
  refresh: refreshPerformance,
  setQuery: setPerformanceQuery
} = useBenchmarkList()

const performanceFilters = reactive({
  nodeId: '',
  modelId: ''
})

// Fleet Logic
const fleetRepository = useAdminNodesRepository()
const loadingFleet = ref(false)
const fleetError = ref('')
const fleetQuery = ref<NodeListQuery>({
  page: 0,
  size: 10
})
const fleetPage = ref<NodePage>({
  content: [],
  totalElements: 0,
  totalPages: 0,
  page: 0,
  size: 10
})

async function refreshFleet() {
  loadingFleet.value = true
  fleetError.value = ''
  try {
    fleetPage.value = await fleetRepository.listNodes(fleetQuery.value)
  } catch {
    fleetError.value = t('errors.unknown_error')
  } finally {
    loadingFleet.value = false
  }
}

function onFleetOptions(options: Record<string, unknown>) {
  const pageIndex = typeof options.page === 'number' ? Math.max(0, options.page - 1) : fleetQuery.value.page
  const itemsPerPage = typeof options.itemsPerPage === 'number' ? options.itemsPerPage : fleetQuery.value.size
  const sortBy = Array.isArray(options.sortBy) && options.sortBy.length > 0
    ? options.sortBy[0] as Record<string, unknown>
    : null
  const sort = sortBy && typeof sortBy.key === 'string'
    ? `${sortBy.key},${sortBy.order === 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc'}`
    : fleetQuery.value.sort
  
  fleetQuery.value = { ...fleetQuery.value, page: pageIndex, size: itemsPerPage, sort }
  void refreshFleet()
}

function onNodeSelect(nodeId: string) {
  navigateTo(`/admin/nodes/${nodeId}`)
}

useSeoMeta({
  title: () => tab.value === 'energy' 
    ? t('admin.benchmarks.title') 
    : (tab.value === 'fleet' ? t('admin.benchmarks.fleet.title') : t('admin.benchmarks.raw.title')),
  description: () => tab.value === 'energy' 
    ? t('admin.benchmarks.subtitle') 
    : (tab.value === 'fleet' ? t('admin.benchmarks.fleet.subtitle') : t('admin.benchmarks.raw.subtitle'))
})

const scopeItems = computed(() => [
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.scope.global'), value: 'global' },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.scope.apikey'), value: 'apikey' },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.scope.model'), value: 'model' },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.scope.user'), value: 'user' },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.scope.organization'), value: 'organization' }
])

const methodTierItems = computed(() => [
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.method_tiers.device_direct'), value: 'device_direct' },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.method_tiers.host_estimate'), value: 'host_estimate' }
])

const bucketItems = computed(() => [
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.buckets.hour'), value: 'hour' },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.buckets.day'), value: 'day' }
])

const energyMetrics = computed(() => [
  {
    key: 'joules',
    label: t('admin.benchmarks.metrics.joules.label'),
    value: formatNumber(energyAnalytics.value.summary.joulesNet, 2),
    caption: t('admin.benchmarks.metrics.joules.caption'),
    icon: 'mdi-flash-outline',
    color: 'primary'
  },
  {
    key: 'tokens',
    label: t('admin.benchmarks.metrics.tokens.label'),
    value: formatInteger(energyAnalytics.value.summary.tokensTotal),
    caption: t('admin.benchmarks.metrics.tokens.caption'),
    icon: 'mdi-counter',
    color: 'info'
  },
  {
    key: 'jPerToken',
    label: t('admin.benchmarks.metrics.intensity.label'),
    value: formatNullable(energyAnalytics.value.summary.jPerToken, 6),
    caption: t('admin.benchmarks.metrics.intensity.caption'),
    icon: 'mdi-gauge',
    color: 'warning'
  },
  {
    key: 'whPer1k',
    label: t('admin.benchmarks.metrics.wh.label'),
    value: formatNullable(energyAnalytics.value.summary.whPer1kTokens, 4),
    caption: t('admin.benchmarks.metrics.wh.caption'),
    icon: 'mdi-lightning-bolt',
    color: 'success'
  }
])

const activeBreakdownItems = computed(() => {
  switch (breakdownTab.value) {
    case 'apikey': return energyAnalytics.value.byApiKey
    case 'user': return energyAnalytics.value.byUser
    case 'organization': return energyAnalytics.value.byOrganization
    case 'method': return energyAnalytics.value.byMethodTier
    default: return energyAnalytics.value.byModel
  }
})

const breakdownHeaders = computed(() => [
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.breakdown.dimension'), key: 'label' },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.breakdown.requests'), key: 'summary.requests', align: 'end' as const },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.breakdown.joules'), key: 'summary.joulesNet', align: 'end' as const },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.breakdown.tokens'), key: 'summary.tokensTotal', align: 'end' as const },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.breakdown.j_per_token'), key: 'summary.jPerToken', align: 'end' as const },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.breakdown.wh_per_1k_tokens'), key: 'summary.whPer1kTokens', align: 'end' as const }
])

const timeseriesHeaders = computed(() => [
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.timeseries.bucket'), key: 'bucketStart' },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.timeseries.joules'), key: 'summary.joulesNet', align: 'end' as const },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.timeseries.tokens'), key: 'summary.tokensTotal', align: 'end' as const },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.timeseries.j_per_token'), key: 'summary.jPerToken', align: 'end' as const }
])

const ledgerHeaders = computed(() => [
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.ledger.captured_at'), key: 'eventTime' },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.ledger.model'), key: 'modelId' },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.ledger.api_key'), key: 'apiKeyId' },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.ledger.user'), key: 'userId' },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.ledger.organization'), key: 'orgId' },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.ledger.method'), key: 'methodTier' },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.ledger.confidence'), key: 'confidenceScore', align: 'end' as const },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.ledger.joules'), key: 'joulesNet', align: 'end' as const },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.ledger.tokens'), key: 'tokensTotal', align: 'end' as const },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.ledger.j_per_token'), key: 'jPerToken', align: 'end' as const },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.ledger.partial_failure'), key: 'partialFailure' },
  { title: t('admin.benchmarks.ledger.anomaly'), key: 'anomalyFlag' }
])

async function refreshEnergy() {
  loadingEnergy.value = true
  energyError.value = ''
  try {
    energyAnalytics.value = await energyRepository.analytics({
      bucket: energyFilters.bucket,
      scope: energyFilters.scope,
      scopeId: energyFilters.scopeId,
      model: energyFilters.model,
      methodTier: energyFilters.methodTier,
      minConfidence: energyFilters.minConfidence === '' ? undefined : Number(energyFilters.minConfidence)
    })
  } catch {
    energyError.value = t('admin.benchmarks.errors.load_failed')
  } finally {
    loadingEnergy.value = false
  }
}

function onRefresh() {
  if (tab.value === 'energy') {
    void refreshEnergy()
  } else if (tab.value === 'fleet') {
    void refreshFleet()
  } else {
    void refreshPerformance()
  }
}

function onPerformanceFilter() {
  setPerformanceQuery({
    page: 0,
    nodeId: performanceFilters.nodeId || undefined,
    modelId: performanceFilters.modelId || undefined
  })
  void refreshPerformance()
}

function onPerformanceOptions(options: Record<string, unknown>) {
  const pageIndex = typeof options.page === 'number' ? Math.max(0, options.page - 1) : performanceQuery.value.page
  const itemsPerPage = typeof options.itemsPerPage === 'number' ? options.itemsPerPage : performanceQuery.value.size
  const sortBy = Array.isArray(options.sortBy) && options.sortBy.length > 0
    ? options.sortBy[0] as Record<string, unknown>
    : null
  const sort = sortBy && typeof sortBy.key === 'string'
    ? `${sortBy.key},${sortBy.order === 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc'}`
    : performanceQuery.value.sort
  
  setPerformanceQuery({ page: pageIndex, size: itemsPerPage, sort })
  void refreshPerformance()
}

function formatNumber(value: number, digits: number) {
  return new Intl.NumberFormat(undefined, {
    maximumFractionDigits: digits,
    minimumFractionDigits: digits
  }).format(value)
}

function formatNullable(value: number | null, digits: number) {
  return value === null ? 'n/a' : formatNumber(value, digits)
}

function formatInteger(value: number | null) {
  return value === null ? 'n/a' : value.toLocaleString()
}

function methodTierColor(value: string) {
  return value === 'device_direct' ? 'success' : 'warning'
}

watch(
  () => ({ ...energyFilters }),
  () => {
    if (tab.value === 'energy') {
      void refreshEnergy()
    }
  }
)

watch(tab, (newTab) => {
  if (newTab === 'energy') {
    void refreshEnergy()
  } else if (newTab === 'fleet') {
    void refreshFleet()
  } else {
    void refreshPerformance()
  }
})

onMounted(() => {
  void refreshEnergy()
})
</script>

<style scoped>
.inf-filter-panel {
  border: 1px solid rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.14);
}

.inf-filter-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(180px, 1fr));
  gap: 12px;
}
</style>

```

<template>
  <v-row>
    <v-col cols="12">
      <AdminPageHeader
        class="mb-4"
        :badge="t('admin.docs.badge')"
        :title="t('admin.docs.title')"
        :subtitle="t('admin.docs.subtitle')"
        icon="mdi-book-lock-open-outline"
      />

      <InfContentExplorer section-prefix="docs/" scope="admin" />
    </v-col>
  </v-row>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import AdminPageHeader from '~/components/admin/AdminPageHeader.vue'

definePageMeta({
  middleware: 'admin'
})

const { t } = useI18n()

useSeoMeta({
  title: () => t('admin.docs.title'),
  description: () => t('admin.docs.subtitle')
})
</script>

### File: pages/admin/index.vue
```
<template>
  <v-row class="ga-4">
    <v-col cols="12">
      <AdminPageHeader
        :badge="t('admin.overview.badge')"
        :title="t('admin.overview.title')"
        :subtitle="t('admin.overview.subtitle')"
        icon="mdi-view-dashboard-outline"
      >
        <template #meta>
          <v-chip color="success" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-access-point-network" to="/admin/nodes">
            {{ t('admin.overview.health.active_nodes', { count: nodeStats.activeNodes }) }}
          </v-chip>
          <v-chip color="primary" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-shield-key-outline" to="/admin/keys">
            {{ t('admin.overview.metrics.keys.label') }} : {{ keySummary.totalKeys }}
          </v-chip>
          <v-chip color="info" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-domain" to="/admin/organisations">
            {{ t('admin.overview.metrics.organizations.label') }} : {{ organizationsPage.totalElements }}
          </v-chip>
          <v-chip color="warning" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-account-group" to="/admin/users">
            {{ t('admin.overview.metrics.users.label') }} : {{ usersPage.totalElements }}
          </v-chip>
        </template>

        <template #actions>
          <v-btn color="primary" prepend-icon="mdi-refresh" :loading="loading" @click="refreshAll">
            {{ t('admin.overview.actions.refresh') }}
          </v-btn>
        </template>
      </AdminPageHeader>
    </v-col>


    <v-col cols="12" lg="7">
      <v-card height="100%" variant="outlined">
        <v-card-title class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
          <v-icon icon="mdi-pulse" color="success" />
          {{ t('admin.overview.health.title') }}
        </v-card-title>
        <v-card-text>
          <v-progress-linear
            :model-value="healthRatio"
            color="success"
            height="16"
            rounded
            class="mb-4"
          />
          <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-4">
            <v-chip color="success" variant="tonal">
              {{ t('admin.overview.health.active_nodes', { count: nodeStats.activeNodes }) }}
            </v-chip>
            <v-chip color="default" variant="tonal">
              {{ t('admin.overview.health.total_nodes', { count: nodeStats.totalNodes }) }}
            </v-chip>
            <v-chip color="primary" variant="tonal">
              {{ t('admin.overview.health.captured_requests', { count: keySummary.capturedRequests }) }}
            </v-chip>
          </div>

          <v-divider class="my-6" />

          <div class="d-flex align-center justify-space-between mb-4">
            <span class="text-subtitle-2 font-weight-bold text-uppercase text-medium-emphasis letter-spacing-1">
              {{ t('admin.overview.health.last_nodes') }}
            </span>
            <v-btn to="/admin/nodes" variant="text" size="small" color="primary" append-icon="mdi-chevron-right" class="text-none">
              {{ t('admin.overview.actions.inspect_nodes') }}
            </v-btn>
          </div>

          <v-list v-if="recentNodes.length > 0" lines="two" class="bg-transparent pa-0 ga-1">
            <v-list-item
              v-for="node in recentNodes"
              :key="node.nodeId"
              :to="`/admin/nodes/${node.nodeId}`"
              class="node-list-item rounded-lg mb-1"
              border
            >
              <template #prepend>
                <div class="position-relative mr-2">
                  <v-avatar
                    :color="node.status === 'UP' ? 'success' : 'grey'"
                    variant="tonal"
                    size="40"
                    :class="{ 'pulse-active': node.status === 'UP' }"
                  >
                    <v-icon :icon="node.status === 'UP' ? 'mdi-server' : 'mdi-server-off'" size="20" />
                  </v-avatar>
                </div>
              </template>

              <v-list-item-title class="d-flex align-center ga-2 font-weight-bold">
                {{ node.nodeId.split('-')[0] }}
                <v-chip
                  v-if="node.runtime?.gpuModel"
                  size="x-small"
                  variant="outlined"
                  color="primary"
                  class="text-uppercase font-weight-bold"
                >
                  <v-icon start size="10">mdi-expansion-card</v-icon>
                  {{ node.runtime.gpuModel }}
                </v-chip>
              </v-list-item-title>

              <v-list-item-subtitle class="d-flex align-center ga-2 mt-1">
                <span class="text-caption d-flex align-center ga-1">
                  <v-icon size="14">mdi-clock-outline</v-icon>
                  {{ timeAgo(node.lastSeen) }}
                </span>
                <span v-if="node.geo?.country" class="text-caption">
                  • {{ node.geo.country }}
                </span>
                <span v-if="node.runtime?.gpuVramMb" class="text-caption">
                  • {{ Math.round(node.runtime.gpuVramMb / 1024) }}GB VRAM
                </span>
              </v-list-item-subtitle>

              <template #append>
                <NodeStatusChip :status="node.status" />
              </template>
            </v-list-item>
          </v-list>
          <div v-else-if="!loading" class="py-8 text-center text-medium-emphasis">
            <v-icon icon="mdi-server-network-off" size="48" class="mb-2 opacity-20" />
            <p>{{ t('admin.overview.health.no_nodes') }}</p>
          </div>
        </v-card-text>
      </v-card>
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12" lg="5">
      <v-card height="100%" variant="outlined">
        <v-card-title class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
          <v-icon icon="mdi-lightning-bolt-outline" color="primary" />
          {{ t('admin.overview.quick_actions') }}
        </v-card-title>
        <v-list density="comfortable" class="py-0">
          <v-list-item
            v-for="action in quickActions"
            :key="action.to"
            :to="action.to"
            :title="action.label"
            :subtitle="action.caption"
          >
            <template #prepend>
              <v-avatar color="primary" variant="tonal" size="34">
                <v-icon :icon="action.icon" size="18" />
              </v-avatar>
            </template>
            <template #append>
              <v-icon icon="mdi-arrow-right" />
            </template>
          </v-list-item>
        </v-list>
      </v-card>
    </v-col>



    <v-col cols="12">
      <v-alert v-if="errorMessage" type="error" variant="tonal">{{ errorMessage }}</v-alert>
    </v-col>
  </v-row>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import AdminPageHeader from '~/components/admin/AdminPageHeader.vue'
import type { KeySummary } from '~/domains/keys/keys'
import type { NodeHeroStatsView, NodeMediumView } from '~/domains/nodes/nodes'
import NodeStatusChip from '~/components/nodes/NodeStatusChip.vue'
import type { AdminOrganizationPage } from '~/domains/admin/organizations'
import type { AdminUserPage } from '~/domains/admin/users'

definePageMeta({
  middleware: 'admin'
})

const { t } = useI18n()

useSeoMeta({
  title: () => t('admin.overview.title'),
  description: () => t('admin.overview.subtitle')
})

const nodesRepository = useAdminNodesRepository()
const keysRepository = useAdminKeysRepository()
const organizationsRepository = useAdminOrganizationsRepository()
const usersRepository = useAdminUsersRepository()

const nodeStats = ref<NodeHeroStatsView>({
  activeNodes: 0,
  totalNodes: 0,
  totalKeys: 0,
  accountedInferences: 0,
  inputTokens: 0,
  outputTokens: 0,
  totalTokens: 0
})

const keySummary = ref<KeySummary>({
  totalKeys: 0,
  activeKeys: 0,
  capturedRequests: 0,
  refundedRequests: 0,
  totalTokens: 0
})

const organizationsPage = ref<AdminOrganizationPage>({ page: 0, size: 1, totalElements: 0, totalPages: 0, content: [] })
const usersPage = ref<AdminUserPage>({ page: 0, size: 1, totalElements: 0, totalPages: 0, content: [] })
const recentNodes = ref<NodeMediumView[]>([])

const loading = ref(false)
const errorMessage = ref('')

const healthRatio = computed(() => {
  if (nodeStats.value.totalNodes === 0) {
    return 0
  }
  return Math.round((nodeStats.value.activeNodes / nodeStats.value.totalNodes) * 100)
})


const quickActions = computed(() => [
  { to: '/admin/keys', icon: 'mdi-key-plus', label: t('admin.overview.actions.create_key'), caption: t('admin.overview.action_captions.keys') },
  { to: '/admin/nodes', icon: 'mdi-lan-connect', label: t('admin.overview.actions.inspect_nodes'), caption: t('admin.overview.action_captions.nodes') },
  { to: '/admin/observability', icon: 'mdi-earth', label: t('admin.overview.actions.observability'), caption: t('admin.overview.action_captions.observability') },
  { to: '/admin/benchmarks', icon: 'mdi-leaf-circle-outline', label: t('admin.overview.actions.benchmarks'), caption: t('admin.overview.action_captions.benchmarks') },
  { to: '/admin/organisations', icon: 'mdi-domain-plus', label: t('admin.overview.actions.manage_organizations'), caption: t('admin.overview.action_captions.organizations') },
  { to: '/admin/users', icon: 'mdi-account-plus', label: t('admin.overview.actions.manage_users'), caption: t('admin.overview.action_captions.users') },
  { to: '/admin/docs', icon: 'mdi-book-lock-open-outline', label: t('admin.overview.actions.admin_docs'), caption: t('admin.overview.action_captions.docs') }
])

function timeAgo(date: string | number | Date) {
  if (!date) return ''
  const now = new Date()
  const then = new Date(date)
  const seconds = Math.floor((now.getTime() - then.getTime()) / 1000)

  if (seconds < 60) return t('common.time.just_now')
  const minutes = Math.floor(seconds / 60)
  if (minutes < 60) return t('common.time.minutes', { count: minutes })
  const hours = Math.floor(minutes / 60)
  if (hours < 24) return t('common.time.hours', { count: hours })
  return t('common.time.days', { count: Math.floor(hours / 24) })
}

async function refreshAll() {
  loading.value = true
  errorMessage.value = ''

  try {
    const [nodes, keys, organizations, users, recent] = await Promise.all([
      nodesRepository.getNodeStats(),
      keysRepository.summary(7),
      organizationsRepository.list({ page: 0, size: 1 }),
      usersRepository.listUsers({ page: 0, size: 1 }),
      nodesRepository.listNodes({ page: 0, size: 5, sort: 'lastSeen,desc' })
    ])

    nodeStats.value = nodes
    keySummary.value = keys
    organizationsPage.value = organizations
    usersPage.value = users
    recentNodes.value = recent.content
  } catch {
    errorMessage.value = t('admin.overview.load_failed')
  } finally {
    loading.value = false
  }
}

await refreshAll()
</script>

<style scoped>
@keyframes pulse-dot {
  0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; }
  50% { transform: scale(2.2); opacity: 0; }
  100% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 0; }
}

.pulse-active {
  position: relative;
}

.pulse-active::after {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  top: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  bottom: 0;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: rgb(var(--v-theme-success));
  animation: pulse-dot 2.5s infinite cubic-bezier(0.45, 0.05, 0.55, 0.95);
  z-index: -1;
}

.node-list-item {
  transition: all 0.2s ease;
  border: 1px solid transparent !important;
}

.node-list-item:hover {
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.05) !important;
  border-color: rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.2) !important;
  transform: translateX(4px);
}

.letter-spacing-1 {
  letter-spacing: 1px;
}
</style>

### File: pages/admin/keys.vue

<template>
  <v-row class="inf-gap-md">
    <v-col cols="12">
      <AdminPageHeader
        :title="t('keys.title')"
        :subtitle="t('keys.description')"
        :badge="t('admin.pages.keys.badge')"
        icon="mdi-shield-key-outline"
      >
        <template #meta>
          <v-chip color="success" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-key-check">
            {{ t('keys.hero.active_keys') }}: {{ n(summary.activeKeys) }}
          </v-chip>
          <v-chip color="primary" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-radar">
            {{ t('keys.hero.captured') }}: {{ n(summary.capturedRequests) }}
          </v-chip>
        </template>

        <template #actions>
          <v-btn color="primary" prepend-icon="mdi-plus" @click="openCreate = true">{{ t('keys.actions.create') }}</v-btn>
          <v-btn variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-refresh" :loading="loading" @click="refreshAll">{{ t('keys.actions.refresh') }}</v-btn>
        </template>
      </AdminPageHeader>
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12">
      <KeyHeroStats :summary="summary" />
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12">
      <v-sheet class="pa-4 inf-admin-command-panel" rounded="lg">
        <div class="inf-admin-filter-grid">
          <v-text-field
            v-model="search"
            :label="t('keys.filters.search')"
            density="comfortable"
            hide-details
            clearable
            prepend-inner-icon="mdi-magnify"
            @update:model-value="onFilters"
          />
          <v-text-field
            v-model="clientId"
            :label="t('keys.filters.client_id')"
            density="comfortable"
            hide-details
            clearable
            @update:model-value="onFilters"
          />
          <v-select
            v-model="tier"
            :items="tierOptions"
            :label="t('keys.filters.tier')"
            density="comfortable"
            hide-details
            clearable
            @update:model-value="onFilters"
          />
          <div>
            <ModelSelector
              v-model="model"
              :label="t('keys.filters.model')"
              @update:model-value="onFilters"
            />
          </div>
          <v-select
            v-model="days"
            :items="dayOptions"
            :label="t('keys.filters.days')"
            density="comfortable"
            hide-details
            @update:model-value="onFilters"
          />
        </div>
      </v-sheet>
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12">
      <KeyTable
        :rows="page.content"
        :total="page.totalElements"
        :loading="loading"
        :items-per-page="query.size"
        @options="onTableOptions"
        @analytics="onAnalytics"
        @logs="onLogs"
        @policy="onPolicy"
        @rotate="onRotate"
        @revoke="onRevoke"
        @delete="onDeleteRequest"
      />
    </v-col>

    <v-col v-if="error" cols="12">
      <v-alert type="error" variant="tonal">{{ t(error.i18nKey) }}</v-alert>
    </v-col>

    <KeyCreateDialog :open="openCreate" @close="openCreate = false" @create="onCreate" />

    <KeyAnalyticsDrawer :open="openAnalytics" :analytics="analytics" @close="openAnalytics = false" />
    <OperationAuditDialog
      :open="auditDialogOpen"
      :title="t('audit.dialog.keys_title')"
      :subtitle="t('audit.dialog.keys_subtitle', { apiKeyId: auditKeyId || '-' })"
      :empty-title="t('audit.dialog.empty_title')"
      :empty-detail-title="t('audit.dialog.empty_detail_title')"
      :records="auditRecords"
      :selected-request-id="selectedAuditRequestId"
      :detail="auditDetail"
      :loading="auditDialogLoading"
      :detail-loading="auditDetailLoading"
      @close="closeAuditDialog"
      @select="onSelectAudit"
    />
    <KeyAuditPolicyDialog
      :open="auditPolicyDialogOpen"
      :key-item="auditPolicyKey"
      @close="auditPolicyDialogOpen = false"
      @save="onSaveAuditPolicy"
    />

    <v-dialog v-model="deleteDialogOpen" max-width="520">
      <v-card>
        <v-card-title>{{ t('keys.delete.title') }}</v-card-title>
        <v-card-text>
          {{ t('keys.delete.body', { id: pendingDeleteKeyId }) }}
        </v-card-text>
        <v-card-actions>
          <v-spacer />
          <v-btn variant="text" @click="closeDeleteDialog">{{ t('keys.actions.cancel') }}</v-btn>
          <v-btn color="error" variant="flat" prepend-icon="mdi-delete-outline" :loading="loading" @click="onDeleteConfirm">
            {{ t('keys.actions.delete') }}
          </v-btn>
        </v-card-actions>
      </v-card>
    </v-dialog>

    <v-dialog :model-value="Boolean(revealedKey?.keyValue)" max-width="680" @update:model-value="closeSecretDialog">
      <v-card>
        <v-card-title>{{ t('keys.secret.title') }}</v-card-title>
        <v-card-text>
          <v-alert type="warning" variant="tonal" class="mb-4">{{ t('keys.secret.warning') }}</v-alert>
          <v-text-field :model-value="revealedKey?.keyValue || ''" readonly prepend-inner-icon="mdi-key-variant" />
        </v-card-text>
        <v-card-actions>
          <v-spacer />
          <v-btn color="primary" @click="closeSecretDialog">{{ t('keys.actions.done') }}</v-btn>
        </v-card-actions>
      </v-card>
    </v-dialog>
  </v-row>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import AdminPageHeader from '~/components/admin/AdminPageHeader.vue'
import OperationAuditDialog from '~/components/audit/OperationAuditDialog.vue'
import KeyAnalyticsDrawer from '~/components/keys/KeyAnalyticsDrawer.vue'
import KeyAuditPolicyDialog from '~/components/keys/KeyAuditPolicyDialog.vue'
import KeyCreateDialog from '~/components/keys/KeyCreateDialog.vue'
import KeyHeroStats from '~/components/keys/KeyHeroStats.vue'
import ModelSelector from '~/components/models/ModelSelector.vue'
import KeyTable from '~/components/keys/KeyTable.vue'
import type { OperationAuditDetail, OperationAuditListItem } from '~/domains/audit/audit'
import type { KeyAuditPolicyUpdateRequest, KeyCreateRequest, KeyListItem } from '~/domains/keys/keys'

const { t, n } = useI18n()

definePageMeta({
  middleware: 'admin'
})

useSeoMeta({
  title: () => t('keys.title'),
  description: () => t('keys.description')
})

const {
  query,
  page,
  summary,
  analytics,
  loading,
  error,
  revealedKey,
  refreshAll,
  openAnalytics: openAnalyticsData,
  createKey,
  updateAuditPolicy,
  rotateKey,
  revokeKey,
  deleteKey,
  setQuery
} = useAdminKeys()
const auditRepository = useAdminOperationAuditRepository()

const search = ref('')
const clientId = ref('')
const tier = ref<string | null>(null)
const model = ref<string | null>(null)
const days = ref(7)
const openCreate = ref(false)
const openAnalytics = ref(false)
const deleteDialogOpen = ref(false)
const pendingDeleteKeyId = ref<string | null>(null)
const auditDialogOpen = ref(false)
const auditDialogLoading = ref(false)
const auditDetailLoading = ref(false)
const auditRecords = ref<OperationAuditListItem[]>([])
const selectedAuditRequestId = ref<string | null>(null)
const auditDetail = ref<OperationAuditDetail | null>(null)
const auditKeyId = ref<string | null>(null)
const auditPolicyDialogOpen = ref(false)
const auditPolicyKey = ref<KeyListItem | null>(null)

const tierOptions = [
  { title: 'PUBLIC', value: 'PUBLIC' },
  { title: 'TRUSTED', value: 'TRUSTED' },
  { title: 'HDS', value: 'HDS' }
]

const dayOptions = [
  { title: '7', value: 7 },
  { title: '14', value: 14 },
  { title: '30', value: 30 }
]

function onFilters() {
  setQuery({
    page: 0,
    search: search.value || undefined,
    clientId: clientId.value || undefined,
    tier: tier.value || undefined,
    model: model.value || undefined,
    days: days.value
  })
  void refreshAll()
}

function onTableOptions(options: Record<string, unknown>) {
  const pageIndex = typeof options.page === 'number' ? Math.max(0, options.page - 1) : query.value.page
  const itemsPerPage = typeof options.itemsPerPage === 'number' ? options.itemsPerPage : query.value.size
  setQuery({ page: pageIndex, size: itemsPerPage })
  void refreshAll()
}

async function onAnalytics(apiKeyId: string) {
  openAnalytics.value = true
  await openAnalyticsData(apiKeyId)
}

async function onLogs(apiKeyId: string) {
  auditKeyId.value = apiKeyId
  auditDialogOpen.value = true
  auditDialogLoading.value = true
  auditRecords.value = []
  auditDetail.value = null
  selectedAuditRequestId.value = null
  try {
    auditRecords.value = await auditRepository.list({ apiKeyId, limit: 25 })
    if (auditRecords.value[0]) {
      await onSelectAudit(auditRecords.value[0].requestId)
    }
  } finally {
    auditDialogLoading.value = false
  }
}

function onPolicy(apiKeyId: string) {
  auditPolicyKey.value = page.value.content.find(item => item.apiKeyId === apiKeyId) ?? null
  auditPolicyDialogOpen.value = true
}

async function onSelectAudit(requestId: string) {
  selectedAuditRequestId.value = requestId
  auditDetailLoading.value = true
  try {
    auditDetail.value = await auditRepository.detail(requestId)
  } finally {
    auditDetailLoading.value = false
  }
}

async function onCreate(payload: KeyCreateRequest) {
  await createKey(payload)
  openCreate.value = false
}

async function onSaveAuditPolicy(payload: KeyAuditPolicyUpdateRequest) {
  if (!auditPolicyKey.value) {
    return
  }
  await updateAuditPolicy(auditPolicyKey.value.apiKeyId, payload)
  auditPolicyDialogOpen.value = false
  auditPolicyKey.value = null
}

async function onRotate(apiKeyId: string) {
  await rotateKey(apiKeyId)
}

async function onRevoke(apiKeyId: string) {
  await revokeKey(apiKeyId)
}

function onDeleteRequest(apiKeyId: string) {
  pendingDeleteKeyId.value = apiKeyId
  deleteDialogOpen.value = true
}

async function onDeleteConfirm() {
  if (!pendingDeleteKeyId.value) {
    return
  }
  await deleteKey(pendingDeleteKeyId.value)
  closeDeleteDialog()
}

function closeDeleteDialog() {
  deleteDialogOpen.value = false
  pendingDeleteKeyId.value = null
}

function closeSecretDialog() {
  revealedKey.value = null
}

function closeAuditDialog() {
  auditDialogOpen.value = false
  auditRecords.value = []
  auditDetail.value = null
  selectedAuditRequestId.value = null
}

await refreshAll()
</script>

<style scoped>
.inf-admin-command-panel {
  border: 1px solid rgba(var(--v-border-color), var(--v-border-opacity));
  background: rgb(var(--v-theme-surface));
}

.inf-admin-filter-grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(210px, 1fr));
}
</style>

```

<template>
  <div class="node-detail-page">

          <AdminPageHeader
            :title="nodeId || t('nodes.large_view.title')"
            :subtitle="heroSubtitle"
            :badge="t('admin.pages.node_detail.badge')"
            icon="mdi-server"
          >
            <template #meta>
              <NodeStatusChip v-if="detail" :status="displayStatus" />
              <v-chip v-if="detail?.tier" color="primary" variant="tonal" size="small" class="text-uppercase font-weight-bold">
                Tier: {{ detail.tier }}
              </v-chip>
              <v-chip v-if="detail?.security?.trustLevel" :color="trustColor" variant="tonal" size="small" class="font-weight-bold">

                {{ trustLabel }}
              </v-chip>
              <v-chip v-if="detail" color="success" variant="tonal" size="small">
                <v-icon start size="14">mdi-chart-timeline-variant</v-icon>
                {{ t('nodes.card.availability', { score: detail.availabilityScore ?? 0 }) }}

            </v-alert>
          </v-card-text>
        </v-card>

        <v-card variant="outlined" class="node-detail-page__panel">
          <v-card-title class="d-flex align-center">
            <v-icon start color="primary">mdi-shield-account-outline</v-icon>
            {{ t('nodes.detail.security_runtime') }}
          </v-card-title>
          <v-list density="compact" lines="two">
            <v-list-item :title="t('nodes.fields.cert_serial')" :subtitle="detail?.security?.certSerial || '-'" />
            <v-list-item :title="t('nodes.fields.cert_expires_at')" :subtitle="formatDate(detail?.security?.certExpiresAt)" />
            <v-list-item :title="t('nodes.fields.trust_level')" :subtitle="trustLabel" />
            <v-list-item :title="t('nodes.fields.agent_version')" :subtitle="detail?.runtime?.agentVersion || '-'" />
            <v-list-item :title="t('nodes.fields.localai_version')" :subtitle="detail?.runtime?.localAiVersion || '-'" />
            <v-list-item :title="t('nodes.fields.gpu_model')" :subtitle="detail?.runtime?.gpuModel || '-'" />
          </v-list>
        </v-card>

        <v-card variant="outlined" class="node-detail-page__panel">
          <v-card-title class="d-flex align-center">
            <v-icon start color="primary">mdi-server-network</v-icon>
            {{ t('nodes.detail.fleet_context') }}
          </v-card-title>
          <v-list density="compact" lines="two">
            <v-list-item :title="t('nodes.hero.active_nodes')" :subtitle="String(stats.activeNodes)" />
            <v-list-item :title="t('nodes.hero.total_nodes')" :subtitle="String(stats.totalNodes)" />
            <v-list-item :title="t('nodes.hero.total_tokens')" :subtitle="n(stats.totalTokens)" />
          </v-list>
        </v-card>
      </v-col>

      <v-col cols="12" md="6">
        <v-card variant="outlined" class="node-detail-page__panel">
          <v-card-title class="d-flex align-center">
            <v-icon start color="primary">mdi-file-eye-outline</v-icon>
            {{ t('nodes.card.profile_summary') }}
          </v-card-title>
          <v-card-text>
            <JsonTree :value="parseJsonField(detail?.metadata?.profileSummaryJson)" />
          </v-card-text>
        </v-card>
      </v-col>

      <v-col cols="12" md="6">
        <v-card variant="outlined" class="node-detail-page__panel">
          <v-card-title class="d-flex align-center">
            <v-icon start color="primary">mdi-fingerprint</v-icon>
            {{ t('nodes.card.system_fingerprint') }}
          </v-card-title>
          <v-card-text>
            <JsonTree :value="parseJsonField(detail?.metadata?.systemFingerprintJson)" />
          </v-card-text>
        </v-card>
      </v-col>

      <v-col cols="12">
        <v-card variant="outlined" class="node-detail-page__panel">
          <v-card-title class="d-flex align-center">
            <v-icon start color="primary">mdi-database-outline</v-icon>
            {{ t('nodes.detail.metadata') }}
          </v-card-title>
          <v-card-text v-if="metadataEntries.length === 0">
            {{ t('nodes.detail.metadata_empty') }}
          </v-card-text>
          <v-card-text v-else>
            <v-row dense>
              <v-col
                v-for="entry in metadataEntries"
                :key="entry.key"
                cols="12"
                md="6"
                lg="4"
              >
                <div class="node-detail-page__metadata-item">
                  <div class="node-detail-page__metadata-key">{{ entry.key }}</div>
                  <div class="node-detail-page__metadata-value">{{ entry.value }}</div>
                </div>
              </v-col>
            </v-row>
          </v-card-text>
        </v-card>
      </v-col>

      <v-col v-if="error" cols="12">
        <v-alert type="error" variant="tonal">{{ t(error.i18nKey) }}</v-alert>
      </v-col>
    </v-row>

    <OperationAuditDialog
      :open="auditDialogOpen"
      :title="t('audit.dialog.nodes_title')"
      :subtitle="t('audit.dialog.nodes_subtitle', { nodeId: nodeId || '-' })"
      :empty-title="t('audit.dialog.empty_title')"
      :empty-detail-title="t('audit.dialog.empty_detail_title')"
      :records="auditRecords"
      :selected-request-id="selectedAuditRequestId"
      :detail="auditDetail"
      :loading="auditDialogLoading"
      :detail-loading="auditDetailLoading"
      @close="closeAuditDialog"
      @select="onSelectAudit"
    />
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import AdminPageHeader from '~/components/admin/AdminPageHeader.vue'
import OperationAuditDialog from '~/components/audit/OperationAuditDialog.vue'
import NodeCard from '~/components/nodes/NodeCard.vue'
import JsonTree from '~/components/infra/JsonTree.vue'
import NodeStatusChip from '~/components/nodes/NodeStatusChip.vue'
import type { OperationAuditDetail, OperationAuditListItem } from '~/domains/audit/audit'

const route = useRoute()
const { t, n, d, locale } = useI18n()
const { detail, loading, error, selectNode } = useNodeDetail()
const { stats, refresh: refreshStats } = useNodeStats()
const auditRepository = useAdminOperationAuditRepository()
const auditDialogOpen = ref(false)
const auditDialogLoading = ref(false)
const auditDetailLoading = ref(false)
const auditRecords = ref<OperationAuditListItem[]>([])
const selectedAuditRequestId = ref<string | null>(null)
const auditDetail = ref<OperationAuditDetail | null>(null)

const nodeId = computed(() => {
  const raw = route.params.nodeId
  return typeof raw === 'string' ? raw : ''
})

const heroSubtitle = computed(() => {
  if (!detail.value) {
    return t('nodes.detail.seo_description', { nodeId: nodeId.value || '-' })
  }
  const parts: string[] = []

  // IP
  if (detail.value.ipMasked) {
    parts.push(detail.value.ipMasked)
  }

  // Hardware
  const runtime = detail.value.runtime
  if (runtime?.gpuModel) {
    let gpu = runtime.gpuModel
    if (runtime.gpuVramMb) {
      gpu += ` (${runtime.gpuVramMb} MB VRAM)`
    }
    parts.push(gpu)
  }

  // Architecture
  const fingerprint = parseJsonField<SystemFingerprintJson>(detail.value.metadata?.systemFingerprintJson)
  if (fingerprint?.architecture) {
    parts.push(fingerprint.architecture)
  }

  // Geo
  const geo = [detail.value.geo?.country, detail.value.geo?.city].filter(Boolean).join(', ')
  if (geo) {
    parts.push(geo)
  }

  return parts.length > 0 ? parts.join(' · ') : t('nodes.card.subtitle_default')
})

const trustLabel = computed(() => {
  const level = detail.value?.security?.trustLevel?.toLowerCase() || 'none'
  return t(`nodes.detail.trust_levels.${level}`)
})

const trustColor = computed(() => {
  const level = detail.value?.security?.trustLevel?.toLowerCase() || 'none'
  if (level === 'hds') return 'success'
  if (level === 'verified' || level === 'trusted') return 'info'
  return 'grey-lighten-1'
})

const formattedLastSeen = computed(() => {
  if (!detail.value?.lastSeen) {
    return '-'
  }
  const date = new Date(detail.value.lastSeen)
  return Number.isNaN(date.getTime()) ? detail.value.lastSeen : d(date, 'short', locale.value)
})

const metadataEntries = computed(() => {
  if (!detail.value) {
    return []
  }

  return Object.entries(detail.value.metadata)
    .filter(([key]) => key !== 'profileSummaryJson' && key !== 'systemFingerprintJson')
    .map(([key, value]) => ({ key, value }))
    .sort((a, b) => a.key.localeCompare(b.key))
})

const provisionedCount = computed(() => {
  const raw = detail.value?.metadata?.profileSummaryJson
  const parsed = parseJsonField<ProfileSummaryJson>(raw)
  const activeModels = parsed?.active_models
  return Array.isArray(activeModels) ? activeModels.length : 0
})


const liveCount = computed(() => (detail.value?.loadedModels?.length ?? 0) + (detail.value?.offloadedModels?.length ?? 0))

const hasProvisioningGap = computed(() => provisionedCount.value > 0 && liveCount.value === 0)

const displayStatus = computed(() => {
  const raw = String(detail.value?.status || 'UNKNOWN').toUpperCase()
  if (raw === 'UP' && liveCount.value === 0) {
    return 'DEGRADED'
  }
  return raw
})

const uptimeLabel = computed(() => {
  const seconds = detail.value?.runtime?.uptimeSeconds
  if (!seconds || seconds <= 0) {
    return '-'
  }

  const days = Math.floor(seconds / 86400)
  const hours = Math.floor((seconds % 86400) / 3600)
  const minutes = Math.floor((seconds % 3600) / 60)
  return [days > 0 ? `${days}d` : null, `${hours}h`, `${minutes}m`].filter(Boolean).join(' ')
})

useSeoMeta({
  title: () => t('nodes.detail.seo_title', { nodeId: nodeId.value || '-' }),
  description: () => t('nodes.detail.seo_description', { nodeId: nodeId.value || '-' })
})

definePageMeta({
  middleware: 'admin',
  width: 'semi-fluid'
})

function formatDate(raw: string | undefined) {
  if (!raw) {
    return '-'
  }

  const parsed = new Date(raw)
  if (Number.isNaN(parsed.getTime())) {
    return raw
  }

  return new Intl.DateTimeFormat(undefined, {
    dateStyle: 'short',
    timeStyle: 'medium'
  }).format(parsed)
}


function parseJsonField<T>(raw?: string): T | null {
  if (!raw) {
    return null
  }

  try {
    const parsed = JSON.parse(raw)
    return parsed && typeof parsed === 'object' ? parsed as T : null
  } catch {
    return null
  }
}

type ProfileSummaryJson = {
  active_models?: { name: string; size_bytes?: number }[]
  top_10?: { name: string; score: number; size_bytes?: number }[]
}

type SystemFingerprintJson = {
  hostname?: string
  osName?: string
  osRelease?: string
  architecture?: string
  pythonVersion?: string
  gpuModel?: string
}

async function refreshDetail() {
  if (!nodeId.value) {
    return
  }

  await selectNode(nodeId.value)
  await refreshStats()
}

async function goBackToList() {
  await navigateTo('/admin/nodes')
}

async function onLogs() {
  if (!nodeId.value) {
    return
  }
  auditDialogOpen.value = true
  auditDialogLoading.value = true
  auditDetail.value = null
  selectedAuditRequestId.value = null
  try {
    auditRecords.value = await auditRepository.list({ nodeId: nodeId.value, limit: 50 })
    if (auditRecords.value[0]?.requestId) {
      await onSelectAudit(auditRecords.value[0].requestId)
    }
  } finally {
    auditDialogLoading.value = false
  }
}

async function onSelectAudit(requestId: string) {
  selectedAuditRequestId.value = requestId
  auditDetailLoading.value = true
  try {
    auditDetail.value = await auditRepository.detail(requestId)
  } finally {
    auditDetailLoading.value = false
  }
}

function closeAuditDialog() {
  auditDialogOpen.value = false
  auditRecords.value = []
  selectedAuditRequestId.value = null
  auditDetail.value = null
}

await refreshDetail()
</script>

<style scoped>
.node-detail-page {
  position: relative;
}

.node-detail-page__hero {
  background:
    radial-gradient(circle at top left, rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.14), transparent 34%),
    radial-gradient(circle at top right, rgba(var(--v-theme-success), 0.1), transparent 30%),
    linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(var(--v-theme-surface), 0.98), rgba(var(--v-theme-surface), 0.92));
  border: 1px solid rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.12);
  border-radius: 20px;
  padding: 4px;
}

.node-detail-page__panel {
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-surface), 0.98);
}

.node-detail-page__metric {
  min-height: 92px;
  padding: 14px;
  border-radius: 16px;
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-surface-variant), 0.36);
}

.node-detail-page__metadata-item {
  height: 100%;
  padding: 14px;
  border: 1px solid rgba(var(--v-border-color), var(--v-border-opacity));
  border-radius: 16px;
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-surface), 0.96);
}

.node-detail-page__metadata-key {
  margin-bottom: 6px;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: rgb(var(--v-theme-on-surface-variant));
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.node-detail-page__metadata-value {
  font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, 'Liberation Mono', 'Courier New', monospace;
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  line-height: 1.5;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
  white-space: pre-wrap;
}
</style>

### File: pages/admin/nodes/index.vue

<template>
  <v-row class="inf-gap-md">
    <v-col cols="12">
      <AdminPageHeader
        :title="t('nodes.title')"
        :subtitle="t('nodes.description')"
        :badge="t('admin.pages.nodes.badge')"
        icon="mdi-server-network"
      >
        <template #meta>
          <v-chip color="success" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-check-network">
            {{ t('nodes.hero.active_nodes') }}: {{ n(stats.activeNodes) }}
          </v-chip>
          <v-chip color="primary" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-clock-outline">
            {{ t('nodes.last_refresh', { date: lastRefreshLabel }) }}
          </v-chip>
        </template>

        <template #actions>
          <v-btn color="primary" prepend-icon="mdi-refresh" :loading="loading" @click="onManualRefresh">
            {{ t('nodes.actions.refresh') }}
          </v-btn>
          <v-btn variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-chart-scatter-plot" to="/admin/observability">
            {{ t('nodes.detail.open_observability') }}
          </v-btn>
        </template>
      </AdminPageHeader>
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12">
      <NodeHeroStats :stats="stats" />
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12">
      <v-sheet class="pa-4 inf-admin-command-panel" rounded="lg">
        <div class="d-flex flex-column ga-4">
          <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-3 align-center">
            <v-chip-group v-model="quickStatus" selected-class="text-primary" @update:model-value="onQuickStatus">
            <v-chip :value="null">{{ t('nodes.quick.all') }}</v-chip>
            <v-chip value="UP">{{ t('nodes.status.UP') }}</v-chip>
            <v-chip value="DEGRADED">{{ t('nodes.status.DEGRADED') }}</v-chip>
            <v-chip value="DOWN">{{ t('nodes.status.DOWN') }}</v-chip>
            <v-chip value="OUT_OF_SERVICE">{{ t('nodes.status.OUT_OF_SERVICE') }}</v-chip>
          </v-chip-group>
          </div>

          <div class="inf-admin-filter-grid">
          <v-text-field
            v-model="search"
            :label="t('nodes.filters.search')"
            density="comfortable"
            hide-details
            clearable
            prepend-inner-icon="mdi-magnify"
            @update:model-value="onSearch"
          />
          <v-select
            v-model="status"
            :items="statusOptions"
            :label="t('nodes.filters.status')"
            density="comfortable"
            hide-details
            clearable
            @update:model-value="onFilter"
          />
          <v-select
            v-model="tier"
            :items="tierOptions"
            :label="t('nodes.filters.tier')"
            density="comfortable"
            hide-details
            clearable
            @update:model-value="onFilter"
          />
          <div>
            <ModelSelector
              v-model="modelId"
              :label="t('nodes.filters.model')"
              @update:model-value="onFilter"
            />
          </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </v-sheet>
    </v-col>


    <v-col cols="12">
      <NodeFleetCharts :nodes="page.content" />
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12">
      <NodeTable
        :rows="page.content"
        :total="page.totalElements"
        :loading="loading"
        :items-per-page="query.size"
        @options="onTableOptions"
        @logs="onLogs"
        @select="onSelectNode"
      />
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12">
      <NodesGeoMap :nodes="page.content" @select="onSelectNode" />
    </v-col>

    <v-col v-if="error" cols="12">
      <v-alert type="error" variant="tonal">
        {{ t(error?.i18nKey) }}
      </v-alert>
    </v-col>

    <OperationAuditDialog
      :open="auditDialogOpen"
      :title="t('audit.dialog.nodes_title')"
      :subtitle="t('audit.dialog.nodes_subtitle', { nodeId: auditNodeId || '-' })"
      :empty-title="t('audit.dialog.empty_title')"
      :empty-detail-title="t('audit.dialog.empty_detail_title')"
      :records="auditRecords"
      :selected-request-id="selectedAuditRequestId"
      :detail="auditDetail"
      :loading="auditDialogLoading"
      :detail-loading="auditDetailLoading"
      @close="closeAuditDialog"
      @select="onSelectAudit"
    />
  </v-row>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import AdminPageHeader from '~/components/admin/AdminPageHeader.vue'
import OperationAuditDialog from '~/components/audit/OperationAuditDialog.vue'
import NodeHeroStats from '~/components/nodes/NodeHeroStats.vue'
import NodesGeoMap from '~/components/nodes/NodesGeoMap.vue'
import NodeFleetCharts from '~/components/nodes/NodeFleetCharts.vue'
import NodeTable from '~/components/nodes/NodeTable.vue'
import ModelSelector from '~/components/models/ModelSelector.vue'
import type { OperationAuditDetail, OperationAuditListItem } from '~/domains/audit/audit'

const { t, n } = useI18n()

definePageMeta({
  middleware: 'admin',
  width: 'semi-fluid'
})

const { query, page, loading, error, refresh, setQuery } = useNodeList()
const { stats, refresh: refreshStats } = useNodeStats()
const auditRepository = useAdminOperationAuditRepository()

const search = ref('')
const status = ref<string | null>(null)
const quickStatus = ref<string | null>(null)
const tier = ref<string | null>(null)
const modelId = ref<string | null>(null)
const lastRefreshAt = ref<Date | null>(null)
const auditDialogOpen = ref(false)
const auditDialogLoading = ref(false)
const auditDetailLoading = ref(false)
const auditRecords = ref<OperationAuditListItem[]>([])
const selectedAuditRequestId = ref<string | null>(null)
const auditDetail = ref<OperationAuditDetail | null>(null)
const auditNodeId = ref<string | null>(null)

const statusOptions = computed(() => [
  { title: t('nodes.status.UP'), value: 'UP' },
  { title: t('nodes.status.DOWN'), value: 'DOWN' },
  { title: t('nodes.status.DEGRADED'), value: 'DEGRADED' },
  { title: t('nodes.status.OUT_OF_SERVICE'), value: 'OUT_OF_SERVICE' }
])

const tierOptions = computed(() => [
  { title: 'PUBLIC', value: 'PUBLIC' },
  { title: 'TRUSTED', value: 'TRUSTED' },
  { title: 'HDS', value: 'HDS' }
])

useSeoMeta({
  title: () => t('nodes.title'),
  description: () => t('nodes.description')
})

function onSearch() {
  setQuery({ page: 0, search: search.value || undefined })
  void refresh()
}

function onFilter() {
  setQuery({
    page: 0,
    status: status.value || undefined,
    tier: tier.value || undefined,
    modelId: modelId.value || undefined
  })
  void refresh()
}

function onQuickStatus() {
  status.value = quickStatus.value
  onFilter()
}

function onTableOptions(options: Record<string, unknown>) {
  const pageIndex = typeof options.page === 'number' ? Math.max(0, options.page - 1) : query.value.page
  const itemsPerPage = typeof options.itemsPerPage === 'number' ? options.itemsPerPage : query.value.size
  const sortBy = Array.isArray(options.sortBy) && options.sortBy.length > 0
    ? options.sortBy[0] as Record<string, unknown>
    : null
  const sort = sortBy && typeof sortBy.key === 'string'
    ? `${sortBy.key},${sortBy.order === 'asc' ? 'asc' : 'desc'}`
    : query.value.sort
  setQuery({ page: pageIndex, size: itemsPerPage, sort })
  void refresh()
}

async function onSelectNode(nodeId: string) {
  await navigateTo(`/admin/nodes/${encodeURIComponent(nodeId)}`)
}

async function onLogs(nodeId: string) {
  auditDialogOpen.value = true
  auditDialogLoading.value = true
  auditDetail.value = null
  selectedAuditRequestId.value = null
  auditNodeId.value = nodeId
  try {
    auditRecords.value = await auditRepository.list({ nodeId, limit: 50 })
    if (auditRecords.value[0]?.requestId) {
      await onSelectAudit(auditRecords.value[0].requestId)
    }
  } finally {
    auditDialogLoading.value = false
  }
}

async function onSelectAudit(requestId: string) {
  selectedAuditRequestId.value = requestId
  auditDetailLoading.value = true
  try {
    auditDetail.value = await auditRepository.detail(requestId)
  } finally {
    auditDetailLoading.value = false
  }
}

function closeAuditDialog() {
  auditDialogOpen.value = false
  auditRecords.value = []
  selectedAuditRequestId.value = null
  auditDetail.value = null
  auditNodeId.value = null
}

const lastRefreshLabel = computed(() => {
  if (!lastRefreshAt.value) {
    return '-'
  }
  return new Intl.DateTimeFormat(undefined, {
    dateStyle: 'short',
    timeStyle: 'medium'
  }).format(lastRefreshAt.value)
})

async function onManualRefresh() {
  await refresh()
  await refreshStats()
  lastRefreshAt.value = new Date()
}

await refresh()
await refreshStats()
lastRefreshAt.value = new Date()
</script>

<style scoped>
.inf-admin-command-panel {
  border: 1px solid rgba(var(--v-border-color), var(--v-border-opacity));
  background: rgb(var(--v-theme-surface));
}

.inf-admin-filter-grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
}
</style>

### File: pages/admin/observability.vue
```
<template>
  <v-row class="ga-4">
    <v-col cols="12">
      <AdminPageHeader
        :title="t('admin.observability.title')"
        :subtitle="t('admin.observability.subtitle')"
        :badge="t('admin.pages.observability.badge')"
        icon="mdi-earth"
      >
        <template #meta>
          <v-chip :color="connected ? 'success' : 'warning'" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-access-point">
            {{ connected ? t('admin.observability.stream.connected') : t('admin.observability.stream.fallback') }}
          </v-chip>
          <v-chip color="primary" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-clock-outline">
            {{ t('admin.observability.last_update', { date: lastUpdateLabel }) }}
          </v-chip>
        </template>
      </AdminPageHeader>
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12" md="4" lg="3">
      <NetworkGlobePanel
        :status="filter.statuses"
        :tier="filter.tiers"
        :flight-mode="filter.mode === 'flight'"
        :window-sec="filter.windowSec"
        :connected="connected"
        @update:status="filter.statuses = $event"
        @update:tier="filter.tiers = $event"
        @update:window-sec="filter.windowSec = $event"
        @update:flight-mode="onFlightMode"
      />
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12" md="8" lg="9">
      <NetworkGlobe3D
        :nodes="nodes"
        :flows="flows"
        :pops="routerPops"
        :flight-mode="filter.mode === 'flight'"
        @select-node="onSelectNode"
      />

      <v-alert v-if="error" type="warning" variant="tonal" class="mt-4">
        {{ t(error) }}
      </v-alert>
    </v-col>

    <NodeDetailsModal
      :open="detailDialog"
      :loading="detailLoading"
      :error="detailError"
      :node="detail"
      @close="detailDialog = false"
    />
  </v-row>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import AdminPageHeader from '~/components/admin/AdminPageHeader.vue'
import NetworkGlobe3D from '~/components/observability/NetworkGlobe3D.vue'
import NetworkGlobePanel from '~/components/observability/NetworkGlobePanel.vue'
import NodeDetailsModal from '~/components/nodes/NodeDetailsModal.vue'

const { t } = useI18n()

definePageMeta({
  middleware: 'admin'
})

useSeoMeta({
  title: () => t('admin.observability.title'),
  description: () => t('admin.observability.subtitle')
})

const {
  nodes,
  flows,
  routerPops,
  connected,
  loading,
  error,
  filter,
  lastUpdateAt,
  fetchSnapshot,
  connectSse,
  startSimulation
} = useObservabilityStream()

const { detail, loading: detailLoading, error: detailError, selectNode } = useNodeDetail()
const detailDialog = ref(false)

const lastUpdateLabel = computed(() => {
  if (!lastUpdateAt.value) {
    return '-'
  }

  return new Intl.DateTimeFormat(undefined, {
    dateStyle: 'short',
    timeStyle: 'medium'
  }).format(lastUpdateAt.value)
})

function onFlightMode(enabled: boolean) {
  filter.mode = enabled ? 'flight' : 'aggregate'
}

function onSelectNode(nodeId: string) {
  detailDialog.value = true
  void selectNode(nodeId)
}

await fetchSnapshot()
if (import.meta.client) {
  connectSse()
  if (!connected.value) {
    startSimulation()
  }
}

watch(
  () => filter.windowSec,
  async () => {
    if (!loading.value) {
      await fetchSnapshot()
    }
  }
)
</script>

```
