### File: pages/admin/organisations.vue
```
<template>
  <v-row class="ga-4">
    <v-col cols="12">
      <AdminPageHeader
        :title="t('organisations.title')"
        :subtitle="t('admin.pages.organisations.subtitle')"
        :badge="t('admin.pages.organisations.badge')"
        icon="mdi-domain"
      >
        <template #meta>
          <v-chip color="primary" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-domain">
            {{ t('admin.pages.organisations.total', { count: page.totalElements }) }}
          </v-chip>
          <v-chip color="success" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-check-circle-outline">
            {{ t('admin.pages.organisations.active', { count: activeOrganizationsCount }) }}
          </v-chip>
          <v-chip v-if="selected.length" color="warning" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-checkbox-marked-circle-outline">
            {{ t('admin.pages.selected', { count: selected.length }) }}
          </v-chip>
        </template>

        <template #actions>
          <v-btn color="primary" prepend-icon="mdi-domain-plus" @click="createOpen = true">{{ t('organisations.create.submit') }}</v-btn>
          <v-btn variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-refresh" :loading="loading" @click="loadOrganizations">{{ t('organisations.refresh') }}</v-btn>
        </template>
      </AdminPageHeader>
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12">
      <v-sheet class="pa-4 inf-admin-command-panel" rounded="lg">
        <div class="inf-admin-filter-grid">
          <v-text-field v-model="filters.search" :label="t('organisations.filters.search')" clearable hide-details density="comfortable" prepend-inner-icon="mdi-magnify" @update:model-value="reloadFromFilters" />
          <v-text-field v-model="filters.clientId" :label="t('organisations.filters.clientId')" clearable hide-details density="comfortable" @update:model-value="reloadFromFilters" />
          <v-select v-model="filters.status" :items="statusItems" :label="t('organisations.filters.status')" clearable hide-details density="comfortable" @update:model-value="reloadFromFilters" />
        </div>
      </v-sheet>
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12">
      <v-expand-transition>
        <v-sheet v-if="selected.length > 0" class="pa-4 inf-admin-bulk-panel" rounded="lg">
          <div class="d-flex flex-column flex-md-row align-md-center ga-3">
            <v-chip color="warning" variant="tonal">{{ t('admin.pages.selected', { count: selected.length }) }}</v-chip>
            <v-select v-model="bulkStatus" :items="statusItems" :label="t('organisations.bulk.status')" clearable hide-details density="comfortable" max-width="240" />
            <v-spacer />
            <v-btn color="primary" :disabled="!bulkStatus" @click="applyBulk">{{ t('organisations.bulk.apply', { count: selected.length }) }}</v-btn>
          </div>
        </v-sheet>
      </v-expand-transition>
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12">
      <v-card variant="outlined">
        <v-data-table-server
          v-model="selected"
          :headers="headers"
          :items="page.content"
          :items-length="page.totalElements"
          :items-per-page="query.size"
          :loading="loading"
          item-value="organizationId"
          show-select
          hover
          fixed-header
          density="comfortable"
          @update:options="onOptions"
        >
          <template #[`item.name`]="{ item }">
            <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
              <v-avatar color="primary" variant="tonal" size="30">
                <v-icon icon="mdi-domain" size="16" />
              </v-avatar>
              <div class="d-flex flex-column">
                <span class="font-weight-medium">{{ item.name }}</span>
                <span class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ item.organizationId }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </template>
          <template #[`item.usersCount`]="{ item }">
            <v-chip color="info" variant="tonal" size="small">{{ item.usersCount }}</v-chip>
          </template>
          <template #[`item.spend`]="{ item }">
            <div class="d-flex flex-column align-end">
              <span class="font-weight-medium">{{ formatMinor(item.monthlySpendMinor, item.spendCeilingCurrency) }}</span>
              <span class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">
                {{ item.monthlySpendCeilingMinor ? `/ ${formatMinor(item.monthlySpendCeilingMinor, item.spendCeilingCurrency)}` : t('organisations.columns.noCeiling') }}
              </span>
              <v-chip v-if="item.spendAlertThreshold" :color="item.spendAlertThreshold >= 100 ? 'error' : 'warning'" size="x-small" variant="tonal" class="mt-1">
                {{ t('organisations.columns.spendAlert', { threshold: item.spendAlertThreshold }) }}
              </v-chip>
            </div>
          </template>
          <template #[`item.status`]="{ item }">
            <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
              <v-chip :color="item.status === 'active' ? 'success' : 'error'" variant="tonal" size="small">
                {{ item.status }}
              </v-chip>
              <v-select
                :model-value="item.status"
                :items="statusItems"
                density="compact"
                hide-details
                max-width="130"
                @update:model-value="onStatusChange(item.organizationId, $event)"
              />
            </div>
          </template>
          <template #[`item.actions`]="{ item }">
            <div class="d-flex justify-end ga-1">
              <v-tooltip :text="t('organisations.actions.timeline')">
                <template #activator="{ props: tooltipProps }">
                  <v-btn v-bind="tooltipProps" icon="mdi-timeline-clock-outline" size="small" variant="text" @click="openTimeline(item.organizationId)" />
                </template>
              </v-tooltip>
              <v-tooltip :text="t('organisations.actions.disable')">
                <template #activator="{ props: tooltipProps }">
                  <v-btn v-bind="tooltipProps" icon="mdi-domain-off" size="small" variant="text" color="error" @click="confirmDisable(item.organizationId)" />
                </template>
              </v-tooltip>
            </div>
          </template>
        </v-data-table-server>
      </v-card>
    </v-col>

    <v-col v-if="error" cols="12">
      <v-alert type="error" variant="tonal">{{ error }}</v-alert>
    </v-col>

    <AdminTimelineDrawer
      :open="timelineOpen"
      :events="timeline"
      :title="t('organisations.timeline.title')"
      :empty-title="t('organisations.timeline.empty')"
      :close-label="t('nodes.actions.close')"
      @close="timelineOpen = false"
    />

    <v-dialog v-model="createOpen" max-width="560">
      <v-card>
        <v-card-title>{{ t('organisations.create.title') }}</v-card-title>
        <v-card-text class="d-flex flex-column ga-3">
          <v-text-field v-model="createForm.name" :label="t('organisations.create.name')" hide-details density="comfortable" />
          <v-text-field v-model="createForm.clientId" :label="t('organisations.create.clientId')" hide-details density="comfortable" />
          <v-select v-model="createForm.status" :items="statusItems" :label="t('organisations.create.status')" hide-details density="comfortable" />
          <v-select v-model="createForm.spendCeilingCurrency" :items="currencyItems" :label="t('organisations.create.currency')" hide-details density="comfortable" />
          <v-text-field v-model.number="monthlyCeilingAmount" :label="t('organisations.create.monthlyCeiling')" prefix="€" type="number" min="0" step="0.01" hide-details density="comfortable" />
          <v-text-field v-model.number="lifetimeCeilingAmount" :label="t('organisations.create.lifetimeCeiling')" prefix="€" type="number" min="0" step="0.01" hide-details density="comfortable" />
        </v-card-text>
        <v-card-actions>
          <v-spacer />
          <v-btn variant="text" @click="createOpen = false">{{ t('common.cancel') }}</v-btn>
          <v-btn color="primary" :disabled="!createForm.name || !createForm.clientId" @click="createOrganization">{{ t('organisations.create.submit') }}</v-btn>
        </v-card-actions>
      </v-card>
    </v-dialog>

    <v-dialog :model-value="Boolean(disableTarget)" max-width="520" @update:model-value="disableTarget = null">
      <v-card>
        <v-card-title>{{ t('organisations.disable.title') }}</v-card-title>
        <v-card-text>{{ t('organisations.disable.body') }}</v-card-text>
        <v-card-actions>
          <v-spacer />
          <v-btn variant="text" @click="disableTarget = null">{{ t('common.cancel') }}</v-btn>
          <v-btn color="error" @click="disableOrganization">{{ t('organisations.actions.disable') }}</v-btn>
        </v-card-actions>
      </v-card>
    </v-dialog>
  </v-row>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import AdminPageHeader from '~/components/admin/AdminPageHeader.vue'
import AdminTimelineDrawer from '~/components/admin/AdminTimelineDrawer.vue'
import type { AdminAuditItem } from '~/domains/admin/users'
import type { AdminOrganizationListQuery, AdminOrganizationPage, AdminOrganizationUpsertRequest } from '~/domains/admin/organizations'

definePageMeta({ middleware: 'admin' })
const { t } = useI18n()
const repository = useAdminOrganizationsRepository()

useSeoMeta({ title: () => t('organisations.title') })

const query = ref<AdminOrganizationListQuery>({ page: 0, size: 10, sort: 'createdAt,desc' })
const filters = ref({ search: '', clientId: '', status: null as null | 'active' | 'disabled' })
const page = ref<AdminOrganizationPage>({ page: 0, size: 10, totalElements: 0, totalPages: 0, content: [] })
const loading = ref(false)
const error = ref('')
const selected = ref<string[]>([])
const bulkStatus = ref<null | 'active' | 'disabled'>(null)
const createForm = ref<AdminOrganizationUpsertRequest>({
  name: '',
  clientId: '',
  status: 'active',
  spendCeilingCurrency: 'EUR',
  monthlySpendCeilingMinor: null,
  lifetimeSpendCeilingMinor: null
})
const monthlyCeilingAmount = ref<number | null>(null)
const lifetimeCeilingAmount = ref<number | null>(null)
const createOpen = ref(false)
const timeline = ref<AdminAuditItem[]>([])
const timelineOpen = ref(false)
const disableTarget = ref<string | null>(null)

const statusItems = ['active', 'disabled']
const currencyItems = ['EUR', 'USD']

const headers = computed(() => [
  { title: t('organisations.columns.name'), key: 'name', minWidth: 260 },
  { title: t('organisations.columns.clientId'), key: 'clientId', minWidth: 160 },
  { title: t('organisations.columns.usersCount'), key: 'usersCount', width: 110 },
  { title: t('organisations.columns.spend'), key: 'spend', sortable: false, align: 'end' as const, minWidth: 170 },
  { title: t('organisations.columns.status'), key: 'status', minWidth: 230 },
  { title: t('organisations.columns.updatedAt'), key: 'updatedAt', minWidth: 180 },
  { title: t('organisations.columns.actions'), key: 'actions', sortable: false, align: 'end' as const, width: 120 }
])

const activeOrganizationsCount = computed(() => page.value.content.filter(organization => organization.status === 'active').length)

async function loadOrganizations() {
  loading.value = true
  error.value = ''
  try {
    page.value = await repository.list(query.value)
  } catch {
    error.value = t('organisations.loadFailed')
  } finally {
    loading.value = false
  }
}

function reloadFromFilters() {
  query.value = {
    ...query.value,
    page: 0,
    search: filters.value.search || undefined,
    clientId: filters.value.clientId || undefined,
    status: filters.value.status || undefined
  }
  void loadOrganizations()
}

function onOptions(options: Record<string, unknown>) {
  const pageIndex = typeof options.page === 'number' ? Math.max(0, options.page - 1) : 0
  const size = typeof options.itemsPerPage === 'number' ? options.itemsPerPage : query.value.size
  query.value = { ...query.value, page: pageIndex, size }
  void loadOrganizations()
}

async function createOrganization() {
  createForm.value.monthlySpendCeilingMinor = toMinorUnits(monthlyCeilingAmount.value)
  createForm.value.lifetimeSpendCeilingMinor = toMinorUnits(lifetimeCeilingAmount.value)
  await repository.create(createForm.value)
  createForm.value = { name: '', clientId: '', status: 'active', spendCeilingCurrency: 'EUR', monthlySpendCeilingMinor: null, lifetimeSpendCeilingMinor: null }
  monthlyCeilingAmount.value = null
  lifetimeCeilingAmount.value = null
  createOpen.value = false
  await loadOrganizations()
}

async function onStatusChange(organizationId: string, status: unknown) {
  const row = page.value.content.find(item => item.organizationId === organizationId)
  if (!row) return
  await repository.update(organizationId, {
    name: row.name,
    clientId: row.clientId,
    status: String(status) as 'active' | 'disabled',
    spendCeilingCurrency: row.spendCeilingCurrency || 'EUR',
    monthlySpendCeilingMinor: row.monthlySpendCeilingMinor,
    lifetimeSpendCeilingMinor: row.lifetimeSpendCeilingMinor
  })
  await loadOrganizations()
}

function toMinorUnits(value: number | null) {
  if (!value || value <= 0) {
    return null
  }
  return Math.round(value * 100)
}

function formatMinor(value: number | null | undefined, currency: string | null | undefined) {
  return new Intl.NumberFormat(undefined, { style: 'currency', currency: currency || 'EUR' }).format(Number(value || 0) / 100)
}

function confirmDisable(organizationId: string) {
  disableTarget.value = organizationId
}

async function disableOrganization() {
  if (!disableTarget.value) return
  await repository.disable(disableTarget.value)
  disableTarget.value = null
  await loadOrganizations()
}

async function applyBulk() {
  if (!bulkStatus.value) return
  await repository.bulkUpdate({ organizationIds: selected.value, status: bulkStatus.value })
  selected.value = []
  await loadOrganizations()
}

async function openTimeline(organizationId: string) {
  timeline.value = await repository.timeline(organizationId)
  timelineOpen.value = true
}

await loadOrganizations()
</script>

<style scoped>
.inf-admin-command-panel,
.inf-admin-bulk-panel {
  border: 1px solid rgba(var(--v-border-color), var(--v-border-opacity));
  background: rgb(var(--v-theme-surface));
}

.inf-admin-bulk-panel {
  border-color: rgba(var(--v-theme-warning), 0.28);
}

.inf-admin-filter-grid {
  display: grid;
  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
}
</style>

```

<template>
  <v-row class="ga-4">
    <v-col cols="12">
      <AdminPageHeader
        :title="t('users.title')"
        :subtitle="t('admin.pages.users.subtitle')"

        icon="mdi-account-group-outline"
      >
        <template #meta>
          <v-chip color="primary" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-account-multiple">
            {{ t('admin.pages.users.total', { count: page.totalElements }) }}
          </v-chip>
          <v-chip color="success" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-check-circle-outline">
            {{ t('admin.pages.users.active', { count: activeUsersCount }) }}
          </v-chip>
          <v-chip v-if="selected.length" color="warning" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-checkbox-marked-circle-outline">
            {{ t('admin.pages.selected', { count: selected.length }) }}
          </v-chip>
        </template>

        <template #actions>
          <v-btn color="primary" prepend-icon="mdi-refresh" :loading="loading" @click="loadUsers">{{ t('users.refresh') }}</v-btn>
        </template>
      </AdminPageHeader>
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12">

        <div class="inf-admin-filter-grid">
          <v-text-field v-model="filters.search" :label="t('users.filters.search')" clearable hide-details density="comfortable" prepend-inner-icon="mdi-magnify" @update:model-value="reloadFromFilters" />
          <v-select v-model="filters.level" :items="levelItems" :label="t('users.filters.level')" clearable hide-details density="comfortable" @update:model-value="reloadFromFilters" />
          <v-select v-model="filters.status" :items="statusItems" :label="t('users.filters.status')" clearable hide-details density="comfortable" @update:model-value="reloadFromFilters" />
          <v-text-field v-model="filters.organizationId" :label="t('users.filters.organization')" clearable hide-details density="comfortable" @update:model-value="reloadFromFilters" />
        </div>
      </v-sheet>
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12">

        <v-sheet v-if="selected.length > 0" class="pa-4 inf-admin-bulk-panel" rounded="lg">
          <div class="d-flex flex-column flex-md-row align-md-center ga-3">
            <v-chip color="warning" variant="tonal">{{ t('admin.pages.selected', { count: selected.length }) }}</v-chip>
            <v-select v-model="bulk.status" :items="statusItems" :label="t('users.bulk.status')" clearable hide-details density="comfortable" max-width="220" />
            <v-select v-model="bulk.level" :items="levelItems" :label="t('users.bulk.level')" clearable hide-details density="comfortable" max-width="220" />
            <v-spacer />
            <v-btn color="primary" :disabled="!bulk.status && !bulk.level" @click="applyBulk">{{ t('users.bulk.apply', { count: selected.length }) }}</v-btn>
          </div>
        </v-sheet>
      </v-expand-transition>
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12">
      <v-card variant="outlined">
        <v-data-table-server
          v-model="selected"
          :headers="headers"
          :items="page.content"
          :items-length="page.totalElements"
          :items-per-page="query.size"
          :loading="loading"
          item-value="userId"
          show-select
          hover
          fixed-header
          density="comfortable"
          @update:options="onOptions"
        >
          <template #[`item.email`]="{ item }">
            <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
              <v-avatar color="primary" variant="tonal" size="30">
                <v-icon icon="mdi-account" size="16" />
              </v-avatar>
              <div class="d-flex flex-column">
                <span class="font-weight-medium">{{ item.email }}</span>
                <span class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ item.userId }}</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </template>
          <template #[`item.level`]="{ item }">
            <v-select
              :model-value="item.level"
              :items="levelItems"
              density="compact"
              hide-details
              @update:model-value="onLevelChange(item.userId, $event)"
            />
          </template>
          <template #[`item.status`]="{ item }">
            <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
              <v-chip :color="item.status === 'active' ? 'success' : 'error'" variant="tonal" size="small">
                {{ item.status }}
              </v-chip>
              <v-select
                :model-value="item.status"
                :items="statusItems"
                density="compact"
                hide-details
                max-width="130"
                @update:model-value="onStatusChange(item.userId, $event)"
              />
            </div>
          </template>
          <template #[`item.actions`]="{ item }">
            <v-tooltip :text="t('users.actions.timeline')">
              <template #activator="{ props: tooltipProps }">
                <v-btn v-bind="tooltipProps" icon="mdi-timeline-clock-outline" size="small" variant="text" @click="openTimeline(item.userId)" />
              </template>
            </v-tooltip>

      </v-card>
    </v-col>

    </v-col>

    <AdminTimelineDrawer
      :open="timelineOpen"
      :events="timeline"
      :title="t('users.timeline.title')"
      :empty-title="t('users.timeline.empty')"
      :close-label="t('nodes.actions.close')"
      @close="timelineOpen = false"
    />
  </v-row>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import AdminPageHeader from '~/components/admin/AdminPageHeader.vue'
import AdminTimelineDrawer from '~/components/admin/AdminTimelineDrawer.vue'
import type { AdminAuditItem, AdminUserListQuery, AdminUserPage } from '~/domains/admin/users'

definePageMeta({ middleware: 'admin' })
const { t } = useI18n()
const repository = useAdminUsersRepository()

useSeoMeta({ title: () => t('users.title') })

const query = ref<AdminUserListQuery>({ page: 0, size: 10, sort: 'createdAt,desc' })
const filters = ref({ search: '', level: null as null | 'user' | 'client' | 'admin', status: null as null | 'active' | 'disabled', organizationId: '' })
const page = ref<AdminUserPage>({ page: 0, size: 10, totalElements: 0, totalPages: 0, content: [] })
const loading = ref(false)
const error = ref('')
const selected = ref<string[]>([])
const bulk = ref({ level: null as null | 'user' | 'client' | 'admin', status: null as null | 'active' | 'disabled' })
const timeline = ref<AdminAuditItem[]>([])
const timelineOpen = ref(false)

const levelItems = ['user', 'client', 'admin']
const statusItems = ['active', 'disabled']

const headers = computed(() => [
  { title: t('users.columns.email'), key: 'email', minWidth: 260 },
  { title: t('users.columns.provider'), key: 'authProvider', width: 140 },
  { title: t('users.columns.organization'), key: 'organizationId', minWidth: 180 },
  { title: t('users.columns.level'), key: 'level', width: 150 },
  { title: t('users.columns.status'), key: 'status', minWidth: 230 },
  { title: t('users.columns.updatedAt'), key: 'updatedAt', minWidth: 180 },
  { title: t('users.columns.actions'), key: 'actions', sortable: false, align: 'end' as const, width: 96 }
])

const activeUsersCount = computed(() => page.value.content.filter(user => user.status === 'active').length)

async function loadUsers() {
  loading.value = true
  error.value = ''
  try {
    page.value = await repository.listUsers(query.value)
  } catch {
    error.value = t('users.loadFailed')
  } finally {
    loading.value = false
  }
}

function reloadFromFilters() {
  query.value = {
    ...query.value,
    page: 0,
    search: filters.value.search || undefined,
    level: filters.value.level || undefined,
    status: filters.value.status || undefined,
    organizationId: filters.value.organizationId || undefined
  }
  void loadUsers()
}

function onOptions(options: Record<string, unknown>) {
  const pageIndex = typeof options.page === 'number' ? Math.max(0, options.page - 1) : 0
  const size = typeof options.itemsPerPage === 'number' ? options.itemsPerPage : query.value.size
  query.value = { ...query.value, page: pageIndex, size }
  void loadUsers()
}

async function onLevelChange(userId: string, level: unknown) {
  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
  await repository.updateUser(userId, { level: String(level) as any })
  await loadUsers()
}

async function onStatusChange(userId: string, status: unknown) {
  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
  await repository.updateUser(userId, { status: String(status) as any })
  await loadUsers()
}

async function applyBulk() {
  if (!bulk.value.level && !bulk.value.status) {
    return
  }
  await repository.bulkUpdate({ userIds: selected.value, level: bulk.value.level || undefined, status: bulk.value.status || undefined })
  selected.value = []
  await loadUsers()
}

async function openTimeline(userId: string) {
  timeline.value = await repository.timeline(userId)
  timelineOpen.value = true
}

await loadUsers()
</script>

  background: rgb(var(--v-theme-surface));

  border-color: rgba(var(--v-theme-warning), 0.28);
}

  gap: 12px;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
}
</style>

### File: pages/auth/login.vue
```
<template>
  <div class="auth-page">
    <section class="auth-page__visual" aria-hidden="true">
      <v-img
        src="/images/auth-visual.png"
        alt=""
        cover
        class="auth-page__visual-image"
      />
      <div class="auth-page__visual-overlay" />

      <div class="auth-page__visual-inner">
        <v-img
          :src="logoStackedSrc"
          :alt="t('app.name')"
          height="96"
          width="96"
          contain
          class="auth-page__symbol"
        />

        <h1 class="auth-page__tagline">
          {{ t('auth.login.tagline') }}
        </h1>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="auth-page__form" :aria-label="t('auth.login.title')">
      <v-sheet class="auth-page__form-inner">
        <div class="d-flex justify-start mb-8">
          <v-img
            :src="logoSrc"
            :alt="t('app.name')"
            height="28"
            width="100"
            contain
            position="left"
          />
        </div>


        <v-alert
          v-if="accessErrorMessage"
          type="warning"
          variant="tonal"
          rounded="lg"
          class="mb-6"
        >
          {{ accessErrorMessage }}
        </v-alert>

        <div class="auth-page__heading mb-8">
          <h2 class="auth-page__title">{{ t('auth.login.title') }}</h2>
          <p class="auth-page__subtitle text-medium-emphasis mt-2">
            {{ t('auth.login.subtitle') }}
          </p>
        </div>

        <div class="d-flex flex-column ga-3">
          <v-tooltip
            v-for="(provider, i) in primaryProviders"
            :key="provider.key"
            :text="provider.configured ? '' : t('auth.login.providerUnavailable')"
            location="top"
            :disabled="provider.configured"
          >
            <template #activator="{ props }">
              <div v-bind="props">
                <v-btn
                  block
                  size="large"
                  variant="outlined"
                  :prepend-icon="provider.icon"
                  :append-icon="provider.configured ? undefined : 'mdi-lock-outline'"
                  :loading="loadingProvider === provider.key"
                  :disabled="isDisabled(provider)"
                  class="auth-page__provider-btn"
                  :class="{ 'auth-page__provider-btn--unavailable': !provider.configured }"
                  :style="{ '--stagger': i }"
                  @click="startProviderLogin(provider.key)"
                >
                  {{ t('auth.login.signInWith', { provider: t(`auth.login.providers.${provider.key}`) }) }}
                </v-btn>
              </div>
            </template>
          </v-tooltip>
        </div>

        <div class="d-flex align-center ga-3 my-5">
          <v-divider />
          <span class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis text-no-wrap">
            {{ t('auth.login.altProvider') }}
          </span>
          <v-divider />
        </div>

        <div class="d-flex flex-column ga-3">
          <v-btn
            block
            size="large"
            variant="outlined"
            class="auth-page__france-connect"
            @click="franceConnectDialog = true"
          >
            <v-img
              src="/images/france-connect.svg"
              :alt="t('auth.login.providers.france_connect')"
              width="184"
              height="48"
              contain
            />
          </v-btn>
        </div>

        <v-divider class="my-5" />

        <v-checkbox
          v-model="acceptedTerms"
          hide-details
          color="primary"
          density="compact"
        >
          <template #label>
            <span class="text-body-2">
              {{ t('auth.login.acceptPrefix') }}
              <!-- eslint-disable-next-line link-checker/valid-route, link-checker/valid-sitemap-link -->
              <NuxtLink to="/docs/legal/terms" class="auth-page__link">{{ t('auth.login.terms') }}</NuxtLink>
              {{ t('auth.login.and') }}
              <!-- eslint-disable-next-line link-checker/valid-route, link-checker/valid-sitemap-link -->
              <NuxtLink to="/docs/legal/privacy" class="auth-page__link">{{ t('auth.login.privacy') }}</NuxtLink>.
            </span>
          </template>
        </v-checkbox>

        <v-slide-y-reverse-transition>
          <v-alert
            v-if="error"
            type="error"
            variant="tonal"
            density="compact"
            rounded="lg"
            class="mt-4"
          >
            {{ error }}
          </v-alert>
        </v-slide-y-reverse-transition>
      </v-sheet>
    </section>

    <v-dialog v-model="franceConnectDialog" max-width="360">
      <v-card rounded="lg">
        <v-card-title class="text-h6">
          {{ t('auth.login.franceConnect.title') }}
        </v-card-title>
        <v-card-text class="text-body-2 text-medium-emphasis">
          {{ t('auth.login.franceConnect.body') }}
        </v-card-text>
        <v-card-actions>
          <v-spacer />
          <v-btn color="primary" variant="text" @click="franceConnectDialog = false">
            {{ t('common.close') }}
          </v-btn>
        </v-card-actions>
      </v-card>
    </v-dialog>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { useTheme } from 'vuetify'

definePageMeta({ layout: 'auth', width: 'semi-fluid' })

const { t } = useI18n()
const route = useRoute()
const vuetifyTheme = useTheme()
const { session, fetchMe } = useAuthSession()

const acceptedTerms = ref(true)
const franceConnectDialog = ref(false)
const loadingProvider = ref('')
const error = ref('')

type ProviderKey = 'google' | 'microsoft' | 'github'

interface LoginProvider {
  key: ProviderKey
  icon: string
  configured: boolean
}

const { data: configuredProvidersData } = await useFetch<Record<ProviderKey, boolean>>('/api/v1/auth/oidc/providers', {
  default: () => ({
    google: false,
    microsoft: false,
    github: false
  })
})

const configuredProviders = computed<Record<ProviderKey, boolean>>(() => {
  const providers = configuredProvidersData.value ?? {
    google: false,
    microsoft: false,
    github: false
  }

  return {
    google: Boolean(providers.google),
    microsoft: Boolean(providers.microsoft),
    github: Boolean(providers.github)
  }
})

const primaryProviders = computed<LoginProvider[]>(() => [
  { key: 'google', icon: 'mdi-google', configured: configuredProviders.value.google },
  { key: 'microsoft', icon: 'mdi-microsoft', configured: configuredProviders.value.microsoft },
  { key: 'github', icon: 'mdi-github', configured: configuredProviders.value.github }
])

const logoSrc = computed(() =>
  vuetifyTheme.current.value.dark
    ? '/brand/logo/svg/infera_lockup_horizontal_reverse.svg'
    : '/brand/logo/svg/infera_lockup_horizontal_primary.svg'
)

const logoStackedSrc = computed(() =>
  vuetifyTheme.current.value.dark
    ? '/brand/logo/svg/infera_symbol_reverse.svg'
    : '/brand/logo/svg/infera_symbol_primary.svg'
)

const next = computed(() =>
  typeof route.query.next === 'string' ? route.query.next : '/'
)

const accessErrorMessage = computed(() =>
  route.query.error === 'insufficient_role'
    ? t('auth.login.insufficientRole', {
        required: route.query.required ?? 'admin',
        current: route.query.current ?? 'public'
      })
    : ''
)

const isDisabled = (provider: LoginProvider) =>
  !provider.configured || !acceptedTerms.value || loadingProvider.value.length > 0

useSeoMeta({
  title: t('auth.login.seo.title'),
  description: t('auth.login.seo.description')
})

onMounted(async () => {
  // If we have an error in the query, do not auto-redirect even if we have a session.
  // This prevents infinite redirect loops when a user has insufficient permissions.
  if (route.query.error) {
    return
  }

  if (session.value || await fetchMe()) {
    await navigateTo(next.value)
  }
})

async function startProviderLogin(provider: ProviderKey) {
  if (!configuredProviders.value[provider]) {
    error.value = t('auth.login.providerUnavailable')
    return
  }

  if (!acceptedTerms.value) {
    error.value = t('auth.login.acceptTermsRequired')
    return
  }
  loadingProvider.value = provider
  error.value = ''
  try {
    const callbackUrl = `/auth/callback/${provider}`
    const authorizeUrl = `/api/v1/auth/oidc/authorize?provider=${encodeURIComponent(provider)}&next=${encodeURIComponent(next.value)}&callback=${encodeURIComponent(callbackUrl)}`
    await navigateTo(authorizeUrl, { external: true })
  } catch {
    error.value = t('auth.login.failed')
  } finally {
    loadingProvider.value = ''
  }
}
</script>

<style scoped lang="scss">

<template>
  <div class="download-page">
    <section class="download-hero">

              class="download-audience-toggle mb-6"

                {{ t('download.audience.enterprise.label') }}

            </v-btn-toggle>

                color="primary"
                size="large"
                variant="flat"
                prepend-icon="mdi-download"

                  {{ t('download.states.error') }}
                </v-alert>

                  {{ t('download.states.empty') }}
                </v-alert>

                  <div class="download-artifact__name mb-3">{{ recommendedArtifact.displayName }}</div>
                  <v-list density="compact" bg-color="transparent" class="pa-0">
                    <v-list-item>
                      <template #prepend><v-icon icon="mdi-shape-outline" size="small" /></template>

                    </v-list-item>
                  </v-list>
                </template>

                <v-alert v-else type="info" variant="tonal" icon="mdi-information-outline">
                  {{ t('download.states.noRecommended') }}
                </v-alert>

                <v-alert
                  v-if="releaseData?.artifactSource === 'hybrid'"
                  type="info"
                  variant="tonal"
                  icon="mdi-file-sync-outline"
                  class="mt-4"
                >
                  {{ t('download.release.hybridSource') }}
                </v-alert>
              </v-card-text>
            </v-card>
          </v-col>
        </v-row>
      </v-container>
    </section>

    <section class="section pt-0">
      <v-container>
        <v-alert
          v-if="isAppleTrustedFlow"
          type="success"
          variant="tonal"
          icon="mdi-apple-keyboard-command"
          class="download-apple-note"
        >
          <div class="font-weight-bold">{{ t('download.apple.title') }}</div>
          <div>{{ t('download.apple.body') }}</div>
        </v-alert>
      </v-container>
    </section>

    <section class="section">
      <v-container>
        <v-card class="download-console" variant="outlined">
          <v-tabs
            v-model="mode"
            color="primary"
            bg-color="transparent"
            grow
            show-arrows
            slider-transition="shift"
          >
            <v-tab
              v-for="item in visibleModes"
              :key="item.value"
              :value="item.value"
              :prepend-icon="item.icon"
            >
              {{ t(item.labelKey) }}
            </v-tab>
          </v-tabs>

          <v-divider />

          <v-window v-model="mode" :touch="false">
            <v-window-item value="public">
              <div class="download-panel">
                <v-row class="mb-6" dense>
                  <v-col cols="12" lg="8">
                    <h2 class="text-h4 font-weight-bold mb-3">{{ t('download.publicTier.title') }}</h2>
                    <p class="text-body-1 text-medium-emphasis mb-4">{{ t(publicDescriptionKey) }}</p>
                  </v-col>
                  <v-col cols="12" lg="4">
                    <v-card variant="tonal" color="primary" class="h-100">
                      <v-card-item>
                        <template #prepend><v-icon icon="mdi-head-question-outline" /></template>
                        <v-card-title>{{ t('download.publicTier.explainerTitle') }}</v-card-title>
                      </v-card-item>
                      <v-card-text class="text-body-2">
                        {{ t('download.publicTier.explainerBody') }}
                      </v-card-text>
                    </v-card>
                  </v-col>
                </v-row>

                <v-row dense class="mb-6">
                  <v-col v-for="bundle in bundleFamilies" :key="bundle.channel" cols="12" md="4">
                    <v-card class="artifact-card h-100" variant="outlined">
                      <v-card-item>
                        <template #prepend>
                          <v-avatar color="primary" variant="tonal">
                            <v-icon :icon="bundle.icon" />
                          </v-avatar>
                        </template>
                        <v-card-title>{{ t(bundle.titleKey) }}</v-card-title>
                        <v-card-subtitle>{{ t(bundle.subtitleKey) }}</v-card-subtitle>
                      </v-card-item>
                      <v-card-text>
                        <p class="text-body-2 text-medium-emphasis mb-4">{{ t(bundle.bodyKey) }}</p>
                        <v-btn
                          block
                          color="primary"
                          variant="flat"
                          prepend-icon="mdi-download"
                          :href="bundle.artifact?.url"
                          :disabled="!bundle.artifact?.available"
                        >
                          {{ bundle.artifact?.sizeLabel || t('download.states.unavailable') }}
                        </v-btn>
                      </v-card-text>
                    </v-card>
                  </v-col>
                </v-row>

                <v-row>
                  <v-col cols="12" lg="7">
                    <v-row v-if="publicArtifacts.length" density="comfortable">
                      <v-col v-for="publicArtifact in publicArtifacts" :key="publicArtifact.name" cols="12" md="6">
                        <ArtifactDownloadCard :artifact="publicArtifact" />
                      </v-col>
                    </v-row>
                    <v-alert
                      v-else
                      type="warning"
                      variant="tonal"
                      icon="mdi-package-variant-remove"
                    >
                      {{ t('download.publicTier.empty') }}
                    </v-alert>
                  </v-col>

                  <v-col cols="12" lg="5">
                    <v-card variant="tonal" color="primary">
                      <v-card-title>{{ t('download.publicTier.stepsTitle') }}</v-card-title>
                      <v-card-text>
                        <v-list density="comfortable" bg-color="transparent">
                          <v-list-item v-for="(item, index) in publicStepKeys" :key="item">
                            <template #prepend>
                              <v-avatar color="primary" size="28">
                                <span class="text-caption font-weight-bold">{{ index + 1 }}</span>
                              </v-avatar>
                            </template>
                            <v-list-item-title class="text-wrap">{{ t(item) }}</v-list-item-title>
                          </v-list-item>
                        </v-list>
                      </v-card-text>
                    </v-card>
                  </v-col>
                </v-row>
              </div>
            </v-window-item>

            <v-window-item value="native">
              <div class="download-panel">
                <v-row class="mb-6" dense>
                  <v-col cols="12" lg="8">
                    <h2 class="text-h4 font-weight-bold mb-3">{{ t('download.native.title') }}</h2>
                    <p class="text-body-1 text-medium-emphasis mb-4">{{ t(nativeDescriptionKey) }}</p>
                    <v-alert type="info" variant="tonal" icon="mdi-docker" class="mb-4">
                      {{ t('download.native.runtimeNote') }}
                    </v-alert>
                  </v-col>
                  <v-col cols="12" lg="4">
                    <v-card variant="tonal" color="secondary" class="h-100">
                      <v-card-item>
                        <template #prepend><v-icon icon="mdi-monitor-cellphone-star" /></template>
                        <v-card-title>{{ t('download.native.explainerTitle') }}</v-card-title>
                      </v-card-item>
                      <v-card-text class="text-body-2">
                        {{ t('download.native.explainerBody') }}
                      </v-card-text>
                    </v-card>
                  </v-col>
                </v-row>

                <v-row density="comfortable">
                  <v-col v-for="platform in orderedPlatforms" :key="platform.key" cols="12" md="4">
                    <v-card class="platform-card h-100" variant="outlined">
                      <v-card-item>
                        <template #prepend>
                          <v-avatar :color="platform.key === detected ? 'primary' : undefined" variant="tonal">
                            <v-icon :icon="platform.icon" />
                          </v-avatar>
                        </template>
                        <v-card-title>{{ t(`download.platforms.${platform.key}.name`) }}</v-card-title>
                        <v-card-subtitle v-if="platform.key === detected">
                          {{ t('download.platforms.detected') }}
                        </v-card-subtitle>
                      </v-card-item>
                      <v-card-text class="d-flex flex-column ga-3">
                        <div class="text-body-2 text-medium-emphasis">
                          {{ t(`download.platforms.${platform.key}.description`) }}
                        </div>
                        <v-list density="compact" bg-color="transparent" class="pa-0">
                          <v-list-item
                            v-for="nativeArtifact in nativeArtifactsByPlatform[platform.key]"
                            :key="nativeArtifact.name"
                            class="px-0"
                          >
                            <template #prepend><v-icon :icon="nativeArtifact.icon" size="small" /></template>
                            <v-list-item-title class="text-wrap">{{ nativeArtifact.displayName }}</v-list-item-title>
                            <template #append>
                              <v-btn
                                size="small"
                                color="primary"
                                variant="tonal"
                                :href="nativeArtifact.url"
                                :disabled="!nativeArtifact.available"
                              >
                                {{ t('download.download') }}
                              </v-btn>
                            </template>
                          </v-list-item>
                        </v-list>
                      </v-card-text>
                    </v-card>
                  </v-col>
                </v-row>
              </div>
            </v-window-item>

            <v-window-item value="trusted">
              <div class="download-panel">
                <v-row class="mb-6" dense>
                  <v-col cols="12" lg="8">
                    <div class="d-flex flex-wrap align-center ga-2 mb-3">
                      <h2 class="text-h4 font-weight-bold mb-0">{{ t('download.trustedTier.title') }}</h2>
                      <v-chip :color="trustedPrimaryArtifact?.available ? 'success' : 'warning'" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-lock-check-outline">
                        {{ t(trustedPrimaryArtifact?.available ? 'download.trustedTier.available' : 'download.trustedTier.preparing') }}
                      </v-chip>
                    </div>
                    <p class="text-body-1 text-medium-emphasis mb-4">{{ t(trustedDescriptionKey) }}</p>
                    <v-alert
                      :type="isAppleTrustedFlow ? 'success' : 'info'"
                      variant="tonal"
                      :icon="isAppleTrustedFlow ? 'mdi-apple-keyboard-command' : 'mdi-shield-star-outline'"
                    >
                      {{ t(isAppleTrustedFlow ? 'download.apple.body' : 'download.trustedTier.isoNote') }}
                    </v-alert>
                  </v-col>

                  <v-col cols="12" lg="4">
                    <v-card variant="tonal" color="success" class="h-100">
                      <v-card-item>
                        <template #prepend><v-icon icon="mdi-certificate-outline" /></template>
                        <v-card-title>{{ t('download.trustedTier.explainerTitle') }}</v-card-title>
                      </v-card-item>
                      <v-card-text class="text-body-2">
                        {{ t('download.trustedTier.explainerBody') }}
                      </v-card-text>
                    </v-card>
                  </v-col>
                </v-row>

                <v-row v-if="trustedArtifacts.length" density="comfortable" class="mb-6">
                  <v-col v-for="trustedArtifact in trustedArtifacts" :key="trustedArtifact.name" cols="12" md="6">
                    <ArtifactDownloadCard :artifact="trustedArtifact" />
                  </v-col>
                </v-row>

                <v-row v-else density="comfortable" class="mb-6">
                  <v-col v-for="placeholder in trustedExpectedArtifacts" :key="placeholder.name" cols="12" md="6">
                    <ArtifactDownloadCard :artifact="placeholder" />
                  </v-col>
                </v-row>

                <v-row>
                  <v-col cols="12" lg="5">
                    <v-card variant="tonal" color="primary" class="mb-4">
                      <v-card-title class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
                        <v-icon icon="mdi-certificate-outline" />
                        {{ t('download.trustedTier.evidence.title') }}
                      </v-card-title>
                      <v-card-text>
                        <v-list density="compact" bg-color="transparent">
                          <v-list-item v-for="item in trustedEvidence" :key="item.key">
                            <template #prepend>
                              <v-icon :icon="item.present ? 'mdi-check-circle-outline' : 'mdi-progress-question'" :color="item.present ? 'success' : 'warning'" />
                            </template>
                            <v-list-item-title class="text-wrap">
                              {{ t(`download.trustedTier.evidence.items.${item.key}`) }}
                            </v-list-item-title>
                          </v-list-item>
                        </v-list>
                      </v-card-text>
                    </v-card>
                  </v-col>

                  <v-col cols="12" lg="7">
                    <v-card variant="tonal" color="success">
                      <v-card-title>{{ t('download.trustedTier.stepsTitle') }}</v-card-title>
                      <v-card-text>
                        <v-list density="comfortable" bg-color="transparent">
                          <v-list-item v-for="(item, index) in trustedStepKeys" :key="item">
                            <template #prepend>
                              <v-avatar color="success" size="28">
                                <span class="text-caption font-weight-bold">{{ index + 1 }}</span>
                              </v-avatar>
                            </template>
                            <v-list-item-title class="text-wrap">{{ t(item) }}</v-list-item-title>
                          </v-list-item>
                        </v-list>
                      </v-card-text>
                    </v-card>
                  </v-col>
                </v-row>
              </div>
            </v-window-item>
          </v-window>
        </v-card>
      </v-container>
    </section>

    <section class="section pt-0">
      <v-container>
        <v-row>
          <v-col cols="12" lg="5">
            <RevenueSimulator :active-tier="mode" :is-apple-trusted-flow="isAppleTrustedFlow" />
          </v-col>

          <v-col cols="12" lg="7">
            <v-card class="h-100" variant="outlined">
              <v-card-title class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
                <v-icon icon="mdi-view-grid-plus-outline" />
                {{ t('download.matrix.title') }}
              </v-card-title>
              <v-card-subtitle>{{ t(isAppleTrustedFlow ? 'download.matrix.appleSubtitle' : 'download.matrix.subtitle') }}</v-card-subtitle>
              <v-card-text class="pa-0">
                <v-table class="download-matrix">
                  <thead>
                    <tr>
                      <th>{{ t('download.matrix.headers.dimension') }}</th>
                      <th>{{ t('download.matrix.headers.public') }}</th>
                      <th v-if="!isAppleTrustedFlow">{{ t('download.matrix.headers.native') }}</th>
                      <th>{{ t('download.matrix.headers.trusted') }}</th>
                    </tr>
                  </thead>
                  <tbody>
                    <tr v-for="row in matrixRows" :key="row.labelKey">
                      <td class="font-weight-bold">{{ t(row.labelKey) }}</td>
                      <td>{{ t(row.publicKey) }}</td>
                      <td v-if="!isAppleTrustedFlow">{{ t(row.nativeKey) }}</td>
                      <td>{{ t(row.trustedKey) }}</td>
                    </tr>
                  </tbody>
                </v-table>
              </v-card-text>
            </v-card>
          </v-col>
        </v-row>
      </v-container>
    </section>

    <section class="section pt-0">
      <v-container>
        <v-row>
          <v-col cols="12" lg="6">
            <v-card class="h-100" variant="outlined">
              <v-card-title class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
                <v-icon icon="mdi-clipboard-text-clock-outline" />
                {{ t('download.releaseNotes.title') }}
              </v-card-title>
              <v-card-text>
                <v-alert v-if="!releaseData?.changelog" type="info" variant="tonal" icon="mdi-text-box-search-outline">
                  {{ t('download.releaseNotes.empty') }}
                </v-alert>
                <pre v-else class="download-changelog">{{ releaseData.changelog }}</pre>
              </v-card-text>
            </v-card>
          </v-col>

          <v-col cols="12" lg="6">
            <v-card class="h-100" variant="outlined">
              <v-card-title class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
                <v-icon icon="mdi-connection" />
                {{ t('download.apiSurface.title') }}
              </v-card-title>
              <v-card-text>
                <p class="text-body-2 text-medium-emphasis mb-4">{{ t('download.apiSurface.description') }}</p>
                <v-list density="compact" bg-color="transparent" class="pa-0">
                  <v-list-item v-for="item in apiGapKeys" :key="item">
                    <template #prepend><v-icon icon="mdi-chevron-right" size="small" /></template>
                    <v-list-item-title class="text-wrap">{{ t(item) }}</v-list-item-title>
                  </v-list-item>
                </v-list>
              </v-card-text>
            </v-card>
          </v-col>
        </v-row>
      </v-container>
    </section>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { defineComponent, h, resolveComponent } from 'vue'
import RevenueSimulator from '~/components/landing/RevenueSimulator.vue'
import {
  AgentDownloadsAPIsApi,
  Configuration,
  type AgentArtifactResponse
} from '~/generated/backend-client'
import { useDownloadPlatform, type DownloadPlatform } from '~/composables/useDownloadPlatform'

type Audience = 'consumer' | 'enterprise'
type DownloadMode = 'public' | 'native' | 'trusted'
type ArtifactChannel = 'light' | 'images' | 'embedded' | 'native' | 'trusted_iso'

interface StaticArtifactSpec {
  name: string
  channel: ArtifactChannel
  os: DownloadPlatform | 'unknown'
  url: string
}

interface ResolvedArtifact extends AgentArtifactResponse {
  available: boolean
}

interface DownloadReleasePayload {
  version: string
  gitSha?: string
  generatedAt?: string
  changelog?: string
  artifactSource: 'backend' | 'static' | 'hybrid'
  artifacts: ResolvedArtifact[]
}

interface ArtifactView {
  name: string
  url: string
  sizeBytes: number
  channel: ArtifactChannel | 'unknown'
  os: DownloadPlatform | 'unknown'
  displayName: string
  icon: string
  osLabel: string
  sizeLabel: string
  channelLabel: string
  isPrimaryPayload: boolean
  available: boolean
}

const ArtifactDownloadCard = defineComponent({
  name: 'ArtifactDownloadCard',
  props: {
    artifact: {
      type: Object as () => ArtifactView,
      required: true
    }
  },
  setup(props) {
    const { t } = useI18n()

    return () => h(resolveComponent('v-card'), { class: 'artifact-card h-100', variant: 'outlined' }, {
      default: () => [
        h(resolveComponent('v-card-item'), {}, {
          prepend: () => h(resolveComponent('v-avatar'), { color: props.artifact.available ? 'primary' : 'warning', variant: 'tonal' }, {
            default: () => h(resolveComponent('v-icon'), { icon: props.artifact.icon })
          }),
          default: () => [
            h(resolveComponent('v-card-title'), { class: 'text-wrap' }, () => props.artifact.displayName),
            h(resolveComponent('v-card-subtitle'), {}, () => `${props.artifact.channelLabel} · ${props.artifact.osLabel}`)
          ]
        }),
        h(resolveComponent('v-card-text'), {}, () => [
          h('div', { class: 'd-flex flex-wrap ga-2 mb-3' }, [
            h(resolveComponent('v-chip'), { size: 'small', variant: 'tonal', prependIcon: 'mdi-harddisk' }, () => props.artifact.sizeLabel),
            h(resolveComponent('v-chip'), {
              size: 'small',
              color: props.artifact.available ? 'success' : 'warning',
              variant: 'tonal',
              prependIcon: props.artifact.available ? 'mdi-check' : 'mdi-progress-clock'
            }, () => t(props.artifact.available ? 'download.artifacts.available' : 'download.artifacts.comingSoon'))
          ]),
          h('div', { class: 'text-body-2 text-medium-emphasis' }, props.artifact.available
            ? t('download.artifacts.readyNote')
            : t('download.artifacts.pendingNote'))
        ]),
        h(resolveComponent('v-card-actions'), {}, () => h(resolveComponent('v-btn'), {
          block: true,
          color: props.artifact.available ? 'primary' : 'warning',
          variant: props.artifact.available ? 'flat' : 'tonal',
          prependIcon: props.artifact.available ? 'mdi-download' : 'mdi-clock-outline',
          href: props.artifact.available ? props.artifact.url : undefined,
          disabled: !props.artifact.available
        }, () => t(props.artifact.available ? 'download.download' : 'download.states.unavailable')))
      ]
    })
  }
})

const STATIC_ROOT = 'https://static.infera.fr/agent'

const { t, locale } = useI18n()
const { detected, orderedPlatforms } = useDownloadPlatform()
const config = useRuntimeConfig()

const audience = ref<Audience>('consumer')
const mode = ref<DownloadMode>('public')

const publicStepKeys = [
  'download.publicTier.steps.1',
  'download.publicTier.steps.2',
  'download.publicTier.steps.3',
  'download.publicTier.steps.4'
]

const trustedStepKeys = [
  'download.trustedTier.steps.1',
  'download.trustedTier.steps.2',
  'download.trustedTier.steps.3',
  'download.trustedTier.steps.4'
]

const apiGapKeys = [
  'download.apiSurface.gaps.1',
  'download.apiSurface.gaps.2',
  'download.apiSurface.gaps.3',
  'download.apiSurface.gaps.4'
]

const matrixRows = [
  {
    labelKey: 'download.matrix.rows.install',
    publicKey: 'download.matrix.values.public.install',
    nativeKey: 'download.matrix.values.native.install',
    trustedKey: 'download.matrix.values.trusted.install'
  },
  {
    labelKey: 'download.matrix.rows.internet',
    publicKey: 'download.matrix.values.public.internet',
    nativeKey: 'download.matrix.values.native.internet',
    trustedKey: 'download.matrix.values.trusted.internet'
  },
  {
    labelKey: 'download.matrix.rows.eligible',
    publicKey: 'download.matrix.values.public.eligible',
    nativeKey: 'download.matrix.values.native.eligible',
    trustedKey: 'download.matrix.values.trusted.eligible'
  },
  {
    labelKey: 'download.matrix.rows.os',
    publicKey: 'download.matrix.values.public.os',
    nativeKey: 'download.matrix.values.native.os',
    trustedKey: 'download.matrix.values.trusted.os'
  }
]

const visibleModes = computed(() => {
  if (isAppleTrustedFlow.value) {
    return [{ value: 'trusted', labelKey: 'download.modes.trusted', icon: 'mdi-shield-check-outline' }]
  }

  return [
    { value: 'public', labelKey: 'download.modes.public', icon: 'mdi-account-group-outline' },
    { value: 'native', labelKey: 'download.modes.native', icon: 'mdi-application-cog-outline' },
    { value: 'trusted', labelKey: 'download.modes.trusted', icon: 'mdi-shield-check-outline' }
  ]
})

const isAppleTrustedFlow = computed(() => detected.value === 'macos')

watch([detected, audience], () => {
  mode.value = preferredModeFor(audience.value, detected.value)
}, { immediate: true })

const latestReleaseAsync = await useAsyncData<DownloadReleasePayload | null>(
  'latest-release',
  async () => {
    const backendRelease = await readBackendRelease().catch(() => null)
    const staticRelease = await readStaticRelease(backendRelease?.version).catch(() => null)
    const release = backendRelease || staticRelease

    if (!release?.version) {
      return null
    }

    const specs = buildStaticArtifactSpecs(release.version)
    const resolvedArtifacts = await Promise.all(specs.map(resolveArtifactSpec))

    return {
      version: release.version,
      gitSha: release.gitSha,
      generatedAt: String(release.generatedAt || ''),
      changelog: release.changelog,
      artifactSource: backendRelease && staticRelease ? 'hybrid' : backendRelease ? 'backend' : 'static',
      artifacts: resolvedArtifacts
    }
  },
  {
    default: () => null
  }
)

const releaseData = computed<DownloadReleasePayload | null>(() => latestReleaseAsync.data.value ?? null)
const pending = latestReleaseAsync.pending
const error = latestReleaseAsync.error

const artifactViews = computed<ArtifactView[]>(() => {
  return (releaseData.value?.artifacts || [])
    .map(toArtifactView)
    .sort((left: ArtifactView, right: ArtifactView) => {
      if (left.available !== right.available) {
        return left.available ? -1 : 1
      }

      if (left.isPrimaryPayload !== right.isPrimaryPayload) {
        return left.isPrimaryPayload ? -1 : 1
      }

      return left.displayName.localeCompare(right.displayName)
    })
})

const publicArtifacts = computed(() => artifactViews.value.filter(artifact => ['light', 'images', 'embedded'].includes(artifact.channel)))
const nativeArtifacts = computed(() => artifactViews.value.filter(artifact => artifact.channel === 'native'))
const trustedArtifacts = computed(() => artifactViews.value.filter(artifact => artifact.channel === 'trusted_iso'))

const nativeArtifactsByPlatform = computed<Record<DownloadPlatform, ArtifactView[]>>(() => ({
  linux: nativeArtifacts.value.filter(artifact => artifact.os === 'linux'),
  windows: nativeArtifacts.value.filter(artifact => artifact.os === 'windows'),
  macos: nativeArtifacts.value.filter(artifact => artifact.os === 'macos')
}))

const trustedExpectedArtifacts = computed(() => {
  if (trustedArtifacts.value.length > 0) {
    return trustedArtifacts.value
  }

  return buildStaticArtifactSpecs(releaseData.value?.version || 'agent-v0.7.0')
    .filter(spec => spec.channel === 'trusted_iso')
    .map(spec => toArtifactView({
      name: spec.name,
      url: spec.url,
      sizeBytes: 0,
      channel: spec.channel,
      os: spec.os,
      available: false
    }))
})

const preferredMode = computed(() => preferredModeFor(audience.value, detected.value))

const recommendedArtifact = computed(() => {
  if (preferredMode.value === 'trusted') {
    return trustedPrimaryArtifact.value || publicPrimaryArtifact.value || nativePrimaryArtifact.value
  }

  if (preferredMode.value === 'native') {
    return nativePrimaryArtifact.value || publicPrimaryArtifact.value || trustedPrimaryArtifact.value
  }

  return publicPrimaryArtifact.value || nativePrimaryArtifact.value || trustedPrimaryArtifact.value
})

const publicPrimaryArtifact = computed(() => publicArtifacts.value.find(artifact => artifact.channel === 'light' && artifact.available)
  || publicArtifacts.value.find(artifact => artifact.available)
  || publicArtifacts.value[0])

const nativePrimaryArtifact = computed(() => nativeArtifactsByPlatform.value[detected.value]?.find(artifact => artifact.available)
  || nativeArtifacts.value.find(artifact => artifact.available)
  || nativeArtifacts.value[0])

const trustedPrimaryArtifact = computed(() => trustedArtifacts.value.find(artifact => artifact.isPrimaryPayload && artifact.available)
  || trustedArtifacts.value.find(artifact => artifact.available)
  || trustedExpectedArtifacts.value[0])

const shortGitSha = computed(() => releaseData.value?.gitSha?.slice(0, 8) || '-')

const generatedAtLabel = computed(() => {
  if (!releaseData.value?.generatedAt) {
    return t('download.release.generatedAtUnknown')
  }

  return t('download.release.generatedAt', {
    date: new Intl.DateTimeFormat(locale.value, {
      dateStyle: 'medium',
      timeStyle: 'short'
    }).format(new Date(releaseData.value.generatedAt))
  })
})

const audienceContent = computed(() => {
  if (isAppleTrustedFlow.value) {
    return {
      icon: 'mdi-apple-keyboard-command',
      titleKey: 'download.audience.apple.title',
      subtitleKey: 'download.audience.apple.subtitle',
      primaryCtaKey: 'download.audience.apple.primaryCta',
      secondaryCtaKey: 'download.audience.apple.secondaryCta',
      recommendedSubtitleKey: 'download.audience.apple.recommendedSubtitle'
    }
  }

  if (audience.value === 'enterprise') {
    return {
      icon: 'mdi-office-building-cog',
      titleKey: 'download.audience.enterprise.title',
      subtitleKey: 'download.audience.enterprise.subtitle',
      primaryCtaKey: 'download.audience.enterprise.primaryCta',
      secondaryCtaKey: 'download.audience.enterprise.secondaryCta',
      recommendedSubtitleKey: 'download.audience.enterprise.recommendedSubtitle'
    }
  }

  return {
    icon: 'mdi-home-heart',
    titleKey: 'download.audience.consumer.title',
    subtitleKey: 'download.audience.consumer.subtitle',
    primaryCtaKey: 'download.audience.consumer.primaryCta',
    secondaryCtaKey: 'download.audience.consumer.secondaryCta',
    recommendedSubtitleKey: 'download.audience.consumer.recommendedSubtitle'
  }
})

const audiencePoints = computed(() => {
  if (isAppleTrustedFlow.value) {
    return [
      { icon: 'mdi-shield-crown-outline', titleKey: 'download.audience.apple.points.1.title', bodyKey: 'download.audience.apple.points.1.body' },
      { icon: 'mdi-gauge', titleKey: 'download.audience.apple.points.2.title', bodyKey: 'download.audience.apple.points.2.body' },
      { icon: 'mdi-cash-multiple', titleKey: 'download.audience.apple.points.3.title', bodyKey: 'download.audience.apple.points.3.body' }
    ]
  }

  return audience.value === 'enterprise'
    ? [
        { icon: 'mdi-shield-lock-outline', titleKey: 'download.audience.enterprise.points.1.title', bodyKey: 'download.audience.enterprise.points.1.body' },
        { icon: 'mdi-file-certificate-outline', titleKey: 'download.audience.enterprise.points.2.title', bodyKey: 'download.audience.enterprise.points.2.body' },
        { icon: 'mdi-finance', titleKey: 'download.audience.enterprise.points.3.title', bodyKey: 'download.audience.enterprise.points.3.body' }
      ]
    : [
        { icon: 'mdi-rocket-launch-outline', titleKey: 'download.audience.consumer.points.1.title', bodyKey: 'download.audience.consumer.points.1.body' },
        { icon: 'mdi-laptop', titleKey: 'download.audience.consumer.points.2.title', bodyKey: 'download.audience.consumer.points.2.body' },
        { icon: 'mdi-school-outline', titleKey: 'download.audience.consumer.points.3.title', bodyKey: 'download.audience.consumer.points.3.body' }
      ]
})

const bundleFamilies = computed(() => [
  {
    channel: 'light',
    icon: 'mdi-feather',
    artifact: publicArtifacts.value.find(artifact => artifact.channel === 'light'),
    titleKey: 'download.bundleFamilies.light.title',
    subtitleKey: 'download.bundleFamilies.light.subtitle',
    bodyKey: 'download.bundleFamilies.light.body'
  },
  {
    channel: 'images',
    icon: 'mdi-docker',
    artifact: publicArtifacts.value.find(artifact => artifact.channel === 'images'),
    titleKey: 'download.bundleFamilies.images.title',
    subtitleKey: 'download.bundleFamilies.images.subtitle',
    bodyKey: 'download.bundleFamilies.images.body'
  },
  {
    channel: 'embedded',
    icon: 'mdi-package-variant-closed',
    artifact: publicArtifacts.value.find(artifact => artifact.channel === 'embedded'),
    titleKey: 'download.bundleFamilies.embedded.title',
    subtitleKey: 'download.bundleFamilies.embedded.subtitle',
    bodyKey: 'download.bundleFamilies.embedded.body'
  }
])

const publicDescriptionKey = computed(() => audience.value === 'enterprise'
  ? 'download.publicTier.enterpriseDescription'
  : 'download.publicTier.description')

const nativeDescriptionKey = computed(() => audience.value === 'enterprise'
  ? 'download.native.enterpriseDescription'
  : 'download.native.description')

const trustedDescriptionKey = computed(() => isAppleTrustedFlow.value
  ? 'download.trustedTier.appleDescription'
  : audience.value === 'enterprise'
    ? 'download.trustedTier.enterpriseDescription'
    : 'download.trustedTier.description')

const trustedEvidence = computed(() => {
  const names = trustedExpectedArtifacts.value.map(artifact => artifact.name.toLowerCase())

  return [
    { key: 'iso', present: names.some(name => name.endsWith('.iso')) && trustedArtifacts.value.some(artifact => artifact.name.toLowerCase().endsWith('.iso') && artifact.available) },
    { key: 'checksum', present: names.some(name => name.includes('sha256')) && trustedArtifacts.value.some(artifact => artifact.name.toLowerCase().includes('sha256') && artifact.available) },
    { key: 'signature', present: names.some(name => name.endsWith('.p7s')) && trustedArtifacts.value.some(artifact => artifact.name.toLowerCase().endsWith('.p7s') && artifact.available) },
    {
      key: 'manifest',
      present: names.some(name => name.includes('manifest') || name.includes('attested-os-profile'))
        && trustedArtifacts.value.some(artifact => {
          const artifactName = artifact.name.toLowerCase()
          return artifactName.includes('manifest') || artifactName.includes('attested-os-profile')
        })
    }
  ]
})

async function readBackendRelease() {
  const downloadApi = new AgentDownloadsAPIsApi(new Configuration({
    basePath: config.public.backendBaseUrl,
    credentials: 'include',
    headers: getSsrCookieHeader()
  }))

  const release = await downloadApi.getLatestRelease()
  return {
    version: release.version || '',
    gitSha: release.gitSha || '',
    generatedAt: release.generatedAt || '',
    changelog: release.changelog || ''
  }
}

async function readStaticRelease(preferredVersion?: string) {
  const version = preferredVersion || (await $fetch<{ latest: string }>(`${STATIC_ROOT}/channel.json`)).latest
  const meta = await $fetch<{
    version?: string
    git_sha?: string
    generated_at_utc?: string
  }>(`${STATIC_ROOT}/releases/${version}/meta/release-index.json`)

  const changelog = await $fetch<string>(`${STATIC_ROOT}/releases/${version}/meta/changelog.md`, {
    responseType: 'text'
  }).catch(() => '')

  return {
    version: meta.version || version,
    gitSha: meta.git_sha || '',
    generatedAt: meta.generated_at_utc || '',
    changelog
  }
}

async function resolveArtifactSpec(spec: StaticArtifactSpec): Promise<ResolvedArtifact> {
  try {
    const response = await $fetch.raw(spec.url, { method: 'HEAD' })
    const sizeHeader = response.headers.get('content-length')
    return {
      name: spec.name,
      url: spec.url,
      sizeBytes: sizeHeader ? Number.parseInt(sizeHeader, 10) || 0 : 0,
      channel: spec.channel,
      os: spec.os,
      available: response.status >= 200 && response.status < 400
    }
  } catch {
    return {
      name: spec.name,
      url: spec.url,
      sizeBytes: 0,
      channel: spec.channel,
      os: spec.os,
      available: false
    }
  }
}

function buildStaticArtifactSpecs(version: string): StaticArtifactSpec[] {
  const numericVersion = version.replace(/^agent-v/, '').replace(/^v/, '')
  const releaseRoot = `${STATIC_ROOT}/releases/${version}`

  return [
    {
      name: `infera-agent-light-${version}.tar.gz`,
      channel: 'light',
      os: 'unknown',
      url: `${releaseRoot}/bundles/infera-agent-light-${version}.tar.gz`
    },
    {
      name: `infera-agent-images-${version}.tar.gz`,
      channel: 'images',
      os: 'unknown',
      url: `${releaseRoot}/bundles/infera-agent-images-${version}.tar.gz`
    },
    {
      name: `infera-agent-embedded-${version}.tar.gz`,
      channel: 'embedded',
      os: 'unknown',
      url: `${releaseRoot}/bundles/infera-agent-embedded-${version}.tar.gz`
    },
    {
      name: `infera-agent_${numericVersion}_amd64.deb`,
      channel: 'native',
      os: 'linux',
      url: `${releaseRoot}/native/infera-agent_${numericVersion}_amd64.deb`
    },
    {
      name: `infera-agent-light-${version}.msi`,
      channel: 'native',
      os: 'windows',
      url: `${releaseRoot}/native/infera-agent-light-${version}.msi`
    },
    {
      name: `infera-agent-light-${version}.tar.gz`,
      channel: 'native',
      os: 'linux',
      url: `${releaseRoot}/native/infera-agent-light-${version}.tar.gz`
    },
    {
      name: 'infera-trusted-node.iso',
      channel: 'trusted_iso',
      os: 'unknown',
      url: `${releaseRoot}/trusted/infera-trusted-node.iso`
    },
    {
      name: 'infera-trusted-node.iso.sha256',
      channel: 'trusted_iso',
      os: 'unknown',
      url: `${releaseRoot}/trusted/infera-trusted-node.iso.sha256`
    },
    {
      name: 'infera-trusted-node.iso.p7s',
      channel: 'trusted_iso',
      os: 'unknown',
      url: `${releaseRoot}/trusted/infera-trusted-node.iso.p7s`
    },
    {
      name: 'attested-os-profile.json',
      channel: 'trusted_iso',
      os: 'unknown',
      url: `${releaseRoot}/trusted/attested-os-profile.json`
    }
  ]
}

function toArtifactView(artifact: ResolvedArtifact): ArtifactView {
  const name = artifact.name || ''
  const normalizedName = name.toLowerCase()
  const os = normalizeOs(artifact.os || '', normalizedName)
  const channel = normalizeChannel(artifact.channel || '', normalizedName)

  return {
    name,
    url: artifact.url || '',
    sizeBytes: artifact.sizeBytes || 0,
    channel,
    os,
    displayName: name.replace(/^infera-agent-/, '').replace(/^infera-/, ''),
    icon: artifactIcon(normalizedName, channel),
    osLabel: t(os === 'unknown' ? 'download.artifacts.os.any' : `download.platforms.${os}.name`),
    sizeLabel: formatBytes(artifact.sizeBytes || 0),
    channelLabel: t(`download.artifacts.channels.${channel}`),
    isPrimaryPayload: isPrimaryPayload(normalizedName),
    available: artifact.available
  }
}

function preferredModeFor(targetAudience: Audience, platform: DownloadPlatform): DownloadMode {
  if (platform === 'macos') return 'trusted'
  if (targetAudience === 'enterprise') return 'trusted'
  if (platform === 'windows') return 'native'
  return 'public'
}

function getSsrCookieHeader() {
  if (!import.meta.server) {
    return undefined
  }

  const cookie = useRequestHeaders(['cookie']).cookie
  return cookie ? { cookie } : undefined
}

function normalizeOs(os: string, name: string): DownloadPlatform | 'unknown' {
  if (os === 'macos' || name.includes('mac') || name.endsWith('.pkg') || name.endsWith('.dmg')) return 'macos'
  if (os === 'windows' || name.includes('windows') || name.endsWith('.msi') || name.endsWith('.exe')) return 'windows'
  if (os === 'linux' || name.includes('linux') || name.endsWith('.deb') || name.endsWith('.rpm') || name.endsWith('.tar.gz')) return 'linux'
  return 'unknown'
}

function normalizeChannel(channel: string, name: string): ArtifactChannel | 'unknown' {
  if (channel === 'light' || channel === 'images' || channel === 'embedded' || channel === 'native' || channel === 'trusted_iso') {
    return channel
  }

  if (name.includes('trusted-node') || name.endsWith('.iso') || name.endsWith('.p7s') || name.includes('attested-os-profile')) return 'trusted_iso'
  if (name.endsWith('.deb') || name.endsWith('.msi') || name.endsWith('.pkg') || name.endsWith('.dmg')) return 'native'
  if (name.includes('embedded')) return 'embedded'
  if (name.includes('images')) return 'images'
  if (name.includes('light')) return 'light'
  return 'unknown'
}

function artifactIcon(name: string, channel: ArtifactChannel | 'unknown') {
  if (channel === 'trusted_iso') return 'mdi-shield-lock-outline'
  if (name.endsWith('.deb')) return 'mdi-linux'
  if (name.endsWith('.msi') || name.endsWith('.exe')) return 'mdi-microsoft-windows'
  if (name.endsWith('.pkg') || name.endsWith('.dmg')) return 'mdi-apple'
  if (name.includes('images')) return 'mdi-docker'
  if (name.includes('embedded')) return 'mdi-package-variant'
  if (name.includes('light')) return 'mdi-feather'
  return 'mdi-package-variant-closed'
}

function isPrimaryPayload(name: string) {
  return !name.endsWith('.sha256')
    && !name.endsWith('.p7s')
    && !name.endsWith('.json')
    && !name.endsWith('.md')
}

function formatBytes(sizeBytes: number) {
  if (!sizeBytes) return t('download.artifacts.sizeUnknown')

  return new Intl.NumberFormat(locale.value, {
    style: 'unit',
    unit: sizeBytes >= 1024 * 1024 * 1024 ? 'gigabyte' : 'megabyte',
    maximumFractionDigits: 1
  }).format(sizeBytes >= 1024 * 1024 * 1024 ? sizeBytes / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 : sizeBytes / 1024 / 1024)
}

useLocalizedPageSeo({
  titleKey: 'download.seo.title',
  descriptionKey: 'download.seo.description'
})
</script>

                {{ t('enrollment.card.subtitle') }}
