                {{ challenge.status }}
              </v-chip>
              <v-chip variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-timer-sand">
                {{ t('enrollment.expires_at', { date: formattedExpiry }) }}
              </v-chip>
            </div>
          </div>

          <v-row class="ga-0" align="stretch">
            <v-col cols="12" md="5">
              <v-sheet rounded="xl" border class="pa-5 h-100">
                <v-text-field
                  v-model="editableNodeName"
                  :label="t('enrollment.node_name_label')"
                  :hint="t('enrollment.node_name_hint')"
                  variant="outlined"
                  rounded="lg"
                  density="comfortable"
                  prepend-inner-icon="mdi-rename-outline"
                  persistent-hint
                />

                <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-2 mt-4">
                  <v-chip color="primary" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-cube-scan">
                    {{ t('enrollment.card.hardware_eligible_models', { count: eligibleModelsCount }) }}
                  </v-chip>
                  <v-chip color="secondary" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-format-list-bulleted-square">
                    {{ t('enrollment.card.selected_models', { count: selectedModelsCount }) }}
                  </v-chip>
                  <v-chip color="success" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-database-outline">
                    {{ t('enrollment.card.budget_gb', { count: budgetGb }) }}
                  </v-chip>
                </div>

                <v-sheet color="surface-variant" rounded="lg" class="pa-4 mt-5">
                  <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis mb-2">
                    {{ t('enrollment.card.models_preview') }}
                  </div>
                  <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-2">
                    <v-chip
                      v-for="model in selectedModelsPreview"
                      :key="model"
                      size="small"
                      variant="outlined"
                    >
                      {{ model }}
                    </v-chip>
                    <span v-if="selectedModelsPreview.length === 0" class="text-body-2 text-medium-emphasis">
                      {{ t('enrollment.card.models_preview_empty') }}
                    </span>
                  </div>
                </v-sheet>
              </v-sheet>
            </v-col>

            <v-col cols="12" md="7">
              <v-sheet rounded="xl" border class="pa-2 h-100">
                <div class="px-4 pt-3 pb-1 d-flex align-center ga-2">
                  <v-icon icon="mdi-tune-variant" color="medium-emphasis" />
                  <span class="text-subtitle-1 font-weight-bold">
                    {{ t('enrollment.card.system_specs') }}
                  </span>
                </div>

                <v-list slim lines="two" class="bg-transparent">
                  <v-list-item
                    v-for="item in fingerprintItems"
                    :key="item.label"
                    :prepend-icon="item.icon"
                    :title="item.label"
                    :subtitle="item.value"
                  />
                </v-list>
              </v-sheet>
            </v-col>
          </v-row>
        </section>

        <v-divider />

        <section class="pa-8 d-flex flex-wrap justify-space-between align-center ga-4 bg-surface">
          <div class="text-body-2 text-medium-emphasis">
            {{ t('enrollment.actions.helper') }}
          </div>

          <div class="d-flex ga-3">
            <v-btn
              variant="text"
              color="error"
              rounded="lg"
              :disabled="confirming"
              @click="onConfirm('DENY')"
            >
              {{ t('enrollment.deny') }}
            </v-btn>

            <v-tooltip
              :disabled="isChecklistValid"
              location="top"
              :text="!session ? t('enrollment.checklist.sign_in_title') : t('enrollment.checklist.operator_agreement')"
            >
              <template #activator="{ props }">
                <div v-bind="props">
                  <v-btn
                    color="primary"
                    rounded="lg"
                    elevation="2"
                    :loading="confirming"
                    :disabled="!isChecklistValid"
                    @click="onConfirm('APPROVE')"
                  >
                    {{ t('enrollment.approve') }}
                  </v-btn>
                </div>
              </template>
            </v-tooltip>
          </div>
        </section>
      </template>

      <div v-else class="pa-16 text-center">
        <v-icon icon="mdi-link-variant-off" size="64" color="disabled" class="mb-4" />
        <div class="text-h6 text-medium-emphasis">{{ t('errors.challenge_not_found') }}</div>
      </div>
    </v-card>
  </v-container>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { I18nT } from 'vue-i18n'
import type { AppApiError } from '~/composables/useApiClient'
import type { EnrollmentChallengeView } from '~/composables/useEnrollment'

type ProviderKey = 'google' | 'microsoft' | 'github'

interface LoginProvider {
  key: ProviderKey
  icon: string
  configured: boolean
}

const { t, locale } = useI18n()
const route = useRoute()
const { get } = useApiClient()
const { confirming, error, challenge, confirmChallenge } = useEnrollment()
const { session, fetchMe } = useAuthSession()
const localePath = useLocalePath()

const challengeId = computed(() => String(route.query.challengeId || ''))
const editableNodeName = ref('')
const acceptedAgreement = ref(false)
const loadingProvider = ref<ProviderKey | ''>('')

const errorMessage = computed(() => {
  if (!error.value) {
    return ''
  }

  return t(error.value.i18nKey)
})

const isTrustedTier = computed(() => challenge.value?.tierParticipating === 'TRUSTED')
const challengeTierLabel = computed(() => challenge.value?.tierParticipating || 'PUBLIC')
const eligibleModelsCount = computed(() => {
  const models = challenge.value?.profileSummary?.eligible_models
  if (Array.isArray(models)) return models.length
  return challenge.value?.profileSummary?.hardware_eligible_models || 0
})
const selectedModelsCount = computed(() => {
  const models = challenge.value?.profileSummary?.selected_models
  if (Array.isArray(models)) return models.length
  if (typeof models === 'number') return models
  return 0
})
const budgetGb = computed(() => challenge.value?.profileSummary?.budget_gb || 0)
const selectedModelsPreview = computed(() => {
  const models = challenge.value?.profileSummary?.selected_models
  return Array.isArray(models) ? models.slice(0, 4) : []
})

const formattedExpiry = computed(() => {
  if (!challenge.value?.expiresAt) {
    return '-'
  }

  return new Intl.DateTimeFormat(locale.value, {
    dateStyle: 'medium',
    timeStyle: 'short'
  }).format(new Date(challenge.value.expiresAt))
})

const isChecklistValid = computed(() => Boolean(session.value) && acceptedAgreement.value)

const { data: configuredProvidersData } = await useFetch<Record<ProviderKey, boolean>>('/api/v1/auth/oidc/providers', {
  default: () => ({
    google: false,
    microsoft: false,
    github: false
  })
})

const configuredProviders = computed<Record<ProviderKey, boolean>>(() => {
  const providers = configuredProvidersData.value ?? {
    google: false,
    microsoft: false,
    github: false
  }

  return {
    google: Boolean(providers.google),
    microsoft: Boolean(providers.microsoft),
    github: Boolean(providers.github)
  }
})

const loginProviders = computed<LoginProvider[]>(() => [
  { key: 'google', icon: 'mdi-google', configured: configuredProviders.value.google },
  { key: 'microsoft', icon: 'mdi-microsoft', configured: configuredProviders.value.microsoft },
  { key: 'github', icon: 'mdi-github', configured: configuredProviders.value.github }
])

const fingerprintItems = computed(() => [
  {
    icon: 'mdi-server',
    label: t('enrollment.card.hostname'),
    value: challenge.value?.systemFingerprint?.hostname || '-'
  },
  {
    icon: 'mdi-linux',
    label: t('enrollment.card.os'),
    value: [challenge.value?.systemFingerprint?.osName, challenge.value?.systemFingerprint?.osRelease].filter(Boolean).join(' ') || '-'
  },
  {
    icon: 'mdi-chip',
    label: t('enrollment.card.architecture'),
    value: challenge.value?.systemFingerprint?.architecture || '-'
  },
  {
    icon: 'mdi-language-python',
    label: t('enrollment.card.python'),
    value: challenge.value?.systemFingerprint?.pythonVersion || '-'
  },
  {
    icon: 'mdi-expansion-card-variant',
    label: t('enrollment.card.gpu'),
    value: challenge.value?.systemFingerprint?.gpuModel || '-'
  }
])

useSeoMeta({
  title: () => t('enrollment.title'),
  description: () => t('enrollment.subtitle')
})

if (!session.value) {
  await fetchMe()
}

watch(
  () => challenge.value?.nodeName,
  (value) => {
    if (value && !editableNodeName.value) {
      editableNodeName.value = value
    }
  }
)

const { pending: loading, data: fetchedChallenge } = await useAsyncData(
  `challenge-${challengeId.value}`,
  async () => {
    if (!challengeId.value) {
      return null
    }

    try {
      return await get<EnrollmentChallengeView>(`/api/v1/nodes/challenges/${encodeURIComponent(challengeId.value)}`)
    } catch (err) {
      error.value = err as AppApiError
      return null
    }
  }
)

watch(fetchedChallenge, (value) => {
  if (value) {
    challenge.value = value
  }
}, { immediate: true })

function isProviderDisabled(provider: LoginProvider) {
  return !provider.configured || loadingProvider.value.length > 0
}

async function onConfirm(action: 'APPROVE' | 'DENY') {
  if (!challengeId.value) {
    return
  }

  await confirmChallenge(challengeId.value, action, editableNodeName.value)
}

function openIdentityValidation() {
  return navigateTo({
    path: '/profile',
    query: { tab: 'overview' },
    hash: '#identity-validation'
  })
}

async function startProviderLogin(provider: ProviderKey) {
  if (!configuredProviders.value[provider]) {
    return
  }

  loadingProvider.value = provider

  try {
    const next = route.fullPath
    const callbackUrl = `/auth/callback/${provider}`
    const authorizeUrl = `/api/v1/auth/oidc/authorize?provider=${encodeURIComponent(provider)}&next=${encodeURIComponent(next)}&callback=${encodeURIComponent(callbackUrl)}`
    await navigateTo(authorizeUrl, { external: true })
  } finally {
    loadingProvider.value = ''
  }
}
</script>

```

<template>
  <div>
    <v-btn
      variant="text"
      prepend-icon="mdi-arrow-left"
      class="mb-5"
      to="/models"
    >
      {{ t('models.actions.back_to_catalog') }}
    </v-btn>

    <v-alert
      v-if="!model"
      type="warning"
      variant="tonal"
      class="mb-6"
    >
      {{ t('models.modal.unknown_model', { modelId: modelName }) }}
    </v-alert>

    <template v-else>
      <!-- Hero -->
      <div class="model-hero rounded-xl pa-6 pa-md-8 mb-6 overflow-hidden position-relative">
        <!-- Background decoration -->
        <div class="hero-glow"/>
        
        <div class="d-flex flex-column flex-md-row align-md-start ga-6 position-relative">
          <v-avatar size="100" rounded="xl" color="surface" class="flex-shrink-0 hero-avatar elevation-4">
            <v-img v-if="model.icon" :src="model.icon" :alt="model.id" cover />
            <v-icon v-else icon="mdi-brain" size="48" color="primary" />
          </v-avatar>

          <div class="flex-grow-1">
            <div class="d-flex align-center flex-wrap ga-3 mb-2">
              <div class="text-overline text-primary font-weight-bold letter-spacing-1">{{ t('models.hero.label') }}</div>
              <v-chip
                v-for="mod in model.inferaMetadata?.modalities"
                :key="mod"
                size="x-small"
                color="primary"
                variant="flat"
                class="text-uppercase font-weight-black"
                style="height: 18px; font-size: 9px;"
              >
                {{ mod }}
              </v-chip>
            </div>
            
            <h1 class="text-h4 text-md-h2 font-weight-black mb-3">{{ model.id }}</h1>
            <p class="text-body-1 text-medium-emphasis mb-6 max-width-700">{{ description }}</p>

            <!-- Horizontal Metrics Row -->
            <v-sheet
              color="transparent"
              class="metrics-bar rounded-lg border pa-4 mb-6 d-flex flex-wrap ga-8"
            >
              <!-- Popularity -->
              <div class="d-flex align-center ga-3">
                <v-avatar size="40" color="primary" variant="tonal" rounded="lg">
                  <v-icon icon="mdi-api" size="20" />
                </v-avatar>
                <div>
                  <div class="text-h6 font-weight-bold leading-tight">{{ model.popularity ?? 0 }}</div>
                  <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis text-uppercase font-weight-bold">{{ t('models.hero.metrics.popularity_label') }}</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- Nodes -->
              <div class="d-flex align-center ga-3">
                <v-avatar size="40" color="info" variant="tonal" rounded="lg">
                  <v-icon icon="mdi-server-network" size="20" />
                </v-avatar>
                <div>
                  <div class="text-h6 font-weight-bold leading-tight">{{ model.totalAgents ?? 0 }}</div>
                  <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis text-uppercase font-weight-bold">{{ t('models.hero.metrics.nodes_label') }}</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- Availability -->
              <div class="d-flex align-center ga-3">
                <v-avatar size="40" :color="availabilityColor" variant="tonal" rounded="lg">
                  <v-icon :icon="availabilityIcon" size="20" />
                </v-avatar>
                <div>
                  <div class="text-h6 font-weight-bold leading-tight">{{ model.availabilityLevel || 'N/A' }}</div>
                  <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis text-uppercase font-weight-bold">{{ t('models.hero.metrics.availability_label') }}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </v-sheet>

            <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-2 mb-6">
              <v-chip color="primary" variant="flat" prepend-icon="mdi-account-group" class="font-weight-bold">{{ model.family }}</v-chip>
              <v-chip variant="outlined" class="font-weight-medium">{{ model.hardwareTier }}</v-chip>
              <v-chip v-if="model.backend" variant="outlined" prepend-icon="mdi-code-braces" class="font-weight-medium">{{ model.backend }}</v-chip>
              <v-chip v-if="model.license" variant="outlined" prepend-icon="mdi-license" class="font-weight-medium">{{ model.license }}</v-chip>
            </div>

            <!-- CTAs -->
            <div class="d-flex flex-wrap ga-3">
              <v-btn
                color="primary"
                variant="flat"
                prepend-icon="mdi-play-circle-outline"
                rounded="lg"
                size="large"
                elevation="4"
                class="px-6 font-weight-bold"
                to="/playground"
              >
                {{ t('models.actions.try_playground') }}
              </v-btn>

              <v-btn
                v-if="primaryEndpoint"
                variant="outlined"
                :prepend-icon="copied ? 'mdi-check' : 'mdi-content-copy'"
                rounded="lg"
                size="large"
                class="px-6 font-weight-bold"
                :color="copied ? 'success' : undefined"
                @click="copyEndpoint"
              >
                {{ copied ? t('models.actions.copied') : t('models.actions.copy_endpoint') }}
              </v-btn>

              <v-btn
                variant="outlined"
                :prepend-icon="modelIdCopied ? 'mdi-check' : 'mdi-identifier'"
                rounded="lg"
                size="large"
                class="px-6 font-weight-bold"
                :color="modelIdCopied ? 'success' : undefined"
                @click="copyModelId"
              >
                {{ modelIdCopied ? t('models.actions.copied') : model.id }}
              </v-btn>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <ModelHardwareEligibilityWidget
        class="mb-6"
        :requirement="minimalRequirement"
      />

      <!-- Details card -->
      <v-card variant="outlined" rounded="xl">
        <v-card-text class="pa-5 pa-md-6">
          <ModelLargeDetails :model="model" />
        </v-card-text>
      </v-card>
    </template>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import ModelLargeDetails from '~/components/models/ModelLargeDetails.vue'
import ModelHardwareEligibilityWidget from '~/components/models/ModelHardwareEligibilityWidget.vue'
import { resolveModelDescription, resolveMinimalHardwareRequirement, type ModelLargeView } from '~/domains/models/models'

definePageMeta({ width: 'container' })

const route = useRoute()
const { t, locale } = useI18n()
const repository = useModelCatalogRepository()

const modelName = computed(() => String(route.params.modelName || ''))

const { data } = await useAsyncData('models-catalog-detail', () => repository.listModels())

const model = computed<ModelLargeView | undefined>(() => {
  const decoded = decodeURIComponent(modelName.value)
  return (data.value ?? []).find(item => item.id === decoded)
})

const description = computed(() => model.value ? resolveModelDescription(model.value, locale.value) : '')
const primaryEndpoint = computed(() => model.value?.urls?.[0] ?? null)

const copied = ref(false)
const modelIdCopied = ref(false)

const minimalRequirement = computed(() => resolveMinimalHardwareRequirement(model.value))

const availabilityColor = computed(() => {
  const level = model.value?.availabilityLevel
  if (level === 'NORMAL') return 'success'
  if (level === 'LOW') return 'warning'
  return 'error'
})

const availabilityIcon = computed(() => {
  const level = model.value?.availabilityLevel
  if (level === 'NORMAL') return 'mdi-check-circle'
  if (level === 'LOW') return 'mdi-alert-circle'
  return 'mdi-alert-decagram'
})


async function copyEndpoint() {
  if (!primaryEndpoint.value) return
  await navigator.clipboard.writeText(primaryEndpoint.value)
  copied.value = true
  setTimeout(() => { copied.value = false }, 2000)
}

async function copyModelId() {
  if (!model.value) return
  await navigator.clipboard.writeText(model.value.id)
  modelIdCopied.value = true
  setTimeout(() => { modelIdCopied.value = false }, 2000)
}

useSeoMeta({
  title: () => model.value
    ? `${model.value.id} • ${t('models.seo.title')}`
    : t('models.seo.title'),
  description: () => model.value
    ? resolveModelDescription(model.value, locale.value)
    : t('models.seo.description'),
  ogTitle: () => model.value
    ? `${model.value.id} • ${t('models.seo.title')}`
    : t('models.seo.title'),
  ogDescription: () => model.value
    ? resolveModelDescription(model.value, locale.value)
    : t('models.seo.description')
})
</script>

<style scoped>
.model-hero {
  background: linear-gradient(
    135deg,
    rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.08) 0%,
    rgba(var(--v-theme-surface), 0.8) 100%
  );
  backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
  border: 1px solid rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.15);
}

.hero-glow {
  position: absolute;
  top: -50px;
  right: -50px;
  width: 300px;
  height: 300px;
  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.12) 0%, transparent 70%);
  z-index: 0;
  pointer-events: none;
}

.metrics-bar {
  background: rgba(var(--v-theme-surface), 0.6) !important;
  backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  border-color: rgba(var(--v-border-color), 0.1) !important;
}

.hero-avatar {
  border: 4px solid rgba(var(--v-theme-surface), 1);
  box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.15) !important;
}

.max-width-700 {
  max-width: 700px;
}

.letter-spacing-1 {
  letter-spacing: 1px !important;
}

.leading-tight {
  line-height: 1.2 !important;
}
</style>

### File: pages/models/index.vue
```
<template>
  <div>
    <!-- Hero -->
    <div class="models-hero rounded-xl pa-6 pa-md-8 mb-6">
      <div class="d-flex align-center justify-space-between flex-wrap ga-3">
        <div>
          <h1 class="text-h4 font-weight-bold mb-1">{{ t('models.title') }}</h1>
          <p class="text-body-2 text-medium-emphasis">
            {{ t('models.hero.subtitle', { count: models.length }) }}
          </p>
        </div>
        <v-chip color="primary" variant="tonal" size="large" prepend-icon="mdi-cube-outline">
          {{ filteredModels.length }} / {{ models.length }}
        </v-chip>
      </div>
    </div>

    <v-row>
      <!-- Filter Sidebar -->
      <v-col cols="12" md="3">
        <div class="filter-sidebar">
          <!-- Mobile: collapsible panel -->
          <v-expansion-panels v-model="mobileFiltersOpen" class="d-md-none mb-4">
            <v-expansion-panel rounded="xl">
              <v-expansion-panel-title>
                <div class="d-flex align-center ga-2">
                  <v-icon icon="mdi-filter-outline" size="18" />
                  <span>{{ t('models.filters.show') }}</span>
                  <v-badge
                    v-if="activeFilterCount > 0"
                    :content="activeFilterCount"
                    color="primary"
                    inline
                  />
                </div>
              </v-expansion-panel-title>
              <v-expansion-panel-text>
                <ModelFilterSidebar
                  :search-query="searchQuery"
                  :selected-families="selectedFamilies"
                  :selected-hardware-tiers="selectedHardwareTiers"
                  :selected-backends="selectedBackends"
                  :selected-tags="selectedTags"
                  :availability-only="availabilityOnly"
                  :compatibility-only="compatibilityOnly"
                  :available-families="availableFamilies"
                  :available-hardware-tiers="availableHardwareTiers"
                  :available-backends="availableBackends"
                  :available-tags="availableTags"
                  :context-bounds="contextBounds"
                  :selected-context-range="selectedContextRange"
                  :has-context-data="hasContextData"
                  :context-range-label="contextRangeLabel"
                  :active-filter-count="activeFilterCount"
                  :hardware-probe="hardwareProbe"
                  @update:search-query="searchQuery = $event"
                  @update:selected-families="selectedFamilies = $event"
                  @update:selected-hardware-tiers="selectedHardwareTiers = $event"
                  @update:selected-backends="selectedBackends = $event"
                  @update:selected-context-range="selectedContextRange = $event"
                  @update:availability-only="availabilityOnly = $event"
                  @update:compatibility-only="compatibilityOnly = $event"
                  @toggle-tag="toggleTag"
                  @reset="resetFilters"
                />
              </v-expansion-panel-text>
            </v-expansion-panel>
          </v-expansion-panels>

          <!-- Desktop: sticky card -->
          <v-card variant="outlined" rounded="xl" class="d-none d-md-block filter-card">
            <v-card-text class="pa-4">
              <div class="d-flex align-center justify-space-between mb-4">
                <span class="text-subtitle-2 font-weight-bold">{{ t('models.filters.show') }}</span>
                <v-badge
                  v-if="activeFilterCount > 0"
                  :content="activeFilterCount"
                  color="primary"
                  inline
                />
              </div>
              <ModelFilterSidebar
                :search-query="searchQuery"
                :selected-families="selectedFamilies"
                :selected-hardware-tiers="selectedHardwareTiers"
                :selected-backends="selectedBackends"
                :selected-tags="selectedTags"
                :availability-only="availabilityOnly"
                :compatibility-only="compatibilityOnly"
                :available-families="availableFamilies"
                :available-hardware-tiers="availableHardwareTiers"
                :available-backends="availableBackends"
                :available-tags="availableTags"
                :context-bounds="contextBounds"
                :selected-context-range="selectedContextRange"
                :has-context-data="hasContextData"
                :context-range-label="contextRangeLabel"
                :active-filter-count="activeFilterCount"
                :hardware-probe="hardwareProbe"
                @update:search-query="searchQuery = $event"
                @update:selected-families="selectedFamilies = $event"
                @update:selected-hardware-tiers="selectedHardwareTiers = $event"
                @update:selected-backends="selectedBackends = $event"
                @update:selected-context-range="selectedContextRange = $event"
                @update:availability-only="availabilityOnly = $event"
                @update:compatibility-only="compatibilityOnly = $event"
                @toggle-tag="toggleTag"
                @reset="resetFilters"
              />
            </v-card-text>
          </v-card>
        </div>
      </v-col>

      <!-- Results area -->
      <v-col cols="12" md="9">
        <!-- Result bar -->
        <div class="d-flex align-center justify-space-between flex-wrap ga-3 mb-4">
          <span class="text-body-2 text-medium-emphasis">
            {{ t('models.filters.subtitle', { count: filteredModels.length, total: models.length }) }}
          </span>
          <v-btn
            v-if="activeFilterCount > 0"
            variant="text"
            size="small"
            prepend-icon="mdi-filter-off-outline"
            @click="resetFilters"
          >
            {{ t('models.filters.reset') }}
          </v-btn>
        </div>

        <!-- Skeleton loading -->
        <div v-if="pending" class="models-grid">
          <v-skeleton-loader
            v-for="i in 6"
            :key="i"
            type="card"
            class="rounded-xl"
          />
        </div>

        <!-- Cards grid with stagger animation -->
        <TransitionGroup
          v-else-if="filteredModels.length"
          name="card-list"
          tag="div"
          class="models-grid"
        >
          <ModelMediumCard
            v-for="(item, index) in filteredModels"
            :key="item.id"
            :model="item"
            :style="`--i: ${Math.min(index, 20)}`"
            @click="openModel(item.id)"
          />
        </TransitionGroup>

        <!-- Empty state -->
        <v-sheet
          v-else
          class="d-flex align-center justify-center text-center rounded-xl"
          color="transparent"
          border
          height="280"
        >
          <div class="pa-6">
            <v-icon icon="mdi-database-search-outline" size="56" color="primary" opacity="0.3" class="mb-4" />
            <h3 class="text-h6 text-medium-emphasis mb-2">{{ t('models.empty.title') }}</h3>
            <p class="text-body-2 text-medium-emphasis mb-4">{{ t('models.empty.description') }}</p>
            <v-btn variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-filter-off-outline" @click="resetFilters">
              {{ t('models.filters.reset') }}
            </v-btn>
          </div>
        </v-sheet>
      </v-col>
    </v-row>
  </div>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import { onMounted } from 'vue'
import { evaluateRequirement, useHardwareBenchmark } from '~/composables/useHardwareBenchmark'
import { resolveMinimalHardwareRequirement, resolveModelDescription, type ModelLargeView } from '~/domains/models/models'
import ModelMediumCard from '~/components/models/ModelMediumCard.vue'
import ModelFilterSidebar from '~/components/models/ModelFilterSidebar.vue'

definePageMeta({ width: 'semi-fluid' })

const { t, locale } = useI18n()
const router = useRouter()
const repository = useModelCatalogRepository()

const { data, pending } = await useAsyncData('models-catalog', () => repository.listModels())
const models = computed<ModelLargeView[]>(() => data.value ?? [])

const mobileFiltersOpen = ref<number | undefined>(undefined)
const selectedTags = ref<string[]>([])
const selectedFamilies = ref<string[]>([])
const selectedHardwareTiers = ref<string[]>([])
const selectedBackends = ref<string[]>([])
const availabilityOnly = ref(false)
const compatibilityOnly = ref(false)
const searchQuery = ref('')
const { result: hardwareProbe, runBenchmark } = useHardwareBenchmark()

onMounted(() => runBenchmark())

const contextBounds = computed(() => {
  const values = models.value
    .map(m => m.contextSize)
    .filter((v): v is number => typeof v === 'number' && Number.isFinite(v))
  if (!values.length) return { min: 0, max: 0 }
  return { min: Math.min(...values), max: Math.max(...values) }
})

const selectedContextRange = ref<[number, number]>([0, 0])

watch(contextBounds, (bounds) => {
  selectedContextRange.value = bounds.max ? [bounds.min, bounds.max] : [0, 0]
}, { immediate: true })

const hasContextData = computed(() => contextBounds.value.max > 0)

const contextRangeLabel = computed(() => {
  if (!hasContextData.value) return t('models.filters.context_unavailable')
  const [min, max] = selectedContextRange.value
  return `${min.toLocaleString()} – ${max.toLocaleString()}`
})

const availableFamilies = computed(() => [...new Set(models.value.map(m => m.family))].sort())
const availableHardwareTiers = computed(() => [...new Set(models.value.map(m => m.hardwareTier))].sort())
const availableBackends = computed(() => [...new Set(models.value.map(m => m.backend).filter((v): v is string => Boolean(v)))].sort())

const availableTags = computed(() => {
  const counter = new Map<string, number>()
  models.value.forEach(model => model.tags.forEach(tag => counter.set(tag, (counter.get(tag) ?? 0) + 1)))
  return [...counter.entries()]
    .map(([value, count]) => ({ value, count }))
    .sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count)
})

const activeFilterCount = computed(() =>
  selectedFamilies.value.length +
  selectedHardwareTiers.value.length +
  selectedBackends.value.length +
  selectedTags.value.length +
  (availabilityOnly.value ? 1 : 0) +
  (compatibilityOnly.value ? 1 : 0) +
  (hasContextData.value && (selectedContextRange.value[0] !== contextBounds.value.min || selectedContextRange.value[1] !== contextBounds.value.max) ? 1 : 0)
)

const filteredModels = computed(() => {
  const normalizedSearch = searchQuery.value.trim().toLowerCase()

  return models.value.filter((model) => {
    if (selectedTags.value.length && !selectedTags.value.every(tag => model.tags.includes(tag))) return false
    if (selectedFamilies.value.length && !selectedFamilies.value.includes(model.family)) return false
    if (selectedHardwareTiers.value.length && !selectedHardwareTiers.value.includes(model.hardwareTier)) return false
    if (selectedBackends.value.length && (!model.backend || !selectedBackends.value.includes(model.backend))) return false
    if (availabilityOnly.value && (model.installedAgents ?? model.totalAgents ?? 0) <= 0) return false
    if (compatibilityOnly.value) {
      if (!hardwareProbe.value) return false
      const requirement = resolveMinimalHardwareRequirement(model)
      const checks = evaluateRequirement(requirement, hardwareProbe.value)
      if (!checks.gpuRuntime.pass || !checks.gpuVram.pass || !checks.ram.pass) return false
    }

    if (hasContextData.value && typeof model.contextSize === 'number') {
      const [minContext, maxContext] = selectedContextRange.value
      if (model.contextSize < minContext || model.contextSize > maxContext) return false
    }

    if (!normalizedSearch) return true

    const description = resolveModelDescription(model, locale.value).toLowerCase()
    const searchable = [model.id, model.family, model.hardwareTier, model.backend ?? '', description, model.tags.join(' ')].join(' ').toLowerCase()
    return searchable.includes(normalizedSearch)
  })
})

function toggleTag(tag: string) {
  selectedTags.value = selectedTags.value.includes(tag)
    ? selectedTags.value.filter(t => t !== tag)
    : [...selectedTags.value, tag]
}

function resetFilters() {
  selectedTags.value = []
  selectedFamilies.value = []
  selectedHardwareTiers.value = []
  selectedBackends.value = []
  availabilityOnly.value = false
  compatibilityOnly.value = false
  searchQuery.value = ''
  selectedContextRange.value = [contextBounds.value.min, contextBounds.value.max]
}

function openModel(modelId: string) {
  router.push(`/models/${encodeURIComponent(modelId)}`)
}

useSeoMeta({
  title: () => t('models.seo.title'),
  description: () => t('models.seo.description'),
  ogTitle: () => t('models.seo.title'),
  ogDescription: () => t('models.seo.description')
})
</script>

<style scoped>
.models-hero {
  background: linear-gradient(
    135deg,
    rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.06) 0%,
    rgba(var(--v-theme-surface-variant), 0.3) 100%
  );
  border: 1px solid rgba(var(--v-theme-primary), 0.12);
}

.filter-sidebar {
  position: sticky;
  top: 80px;
}

.filter-card {
  max-height: calc(100vh - 120px);
  overflow-y: auto;
}

.models-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  gap: 16px;
}

@media (min-width: 600px) {
  .models-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  }
}

@media (min-width: 1280px) {
  .models-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  }
}

.card-list-enter-active {
  transition: opacity 0.3s ease, transform 0.3s ease;
  transition-delay: calc(var(--i, 0) * 25ms);
}

.card-list-leave-active {
  transition: opacity 0.15s ease, transform 0.15s ease;
}

.card-list-enter-from {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: translateY(12px);
}

.card-list-leave-to {
  opacity: 0;
  transform: scale(0.97);
}

.card-list-move {
  transition: transform 0.3s ease;
}
</style>

```

### File: pages/profile.vue
```
<template>
  <v-row class="ga-4 py-4">
    <v-col cols="12">
      <AdminPageHeader
        :title="t('profile.title')"
        :subtitle="t('profile.subtitle')"
        :badge="t('profile.badge')"
        icon="mdi-account-circle-outline"
      >
        <template #meta>
          <v-chip :color="identityStatus.color" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-shield-account">
            {{ t(identityStatus.label) }}
          </v-chip>
          <v-chip color="success" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-server-network">
            {{ t('profile.meta.active_nodes', { count: nodeSummary.active }) }}
          </v-chip>
          <v-chip color="primary" variant="tonal" prepend-icon="mdi-cash-multiple">
            {{ t('profile.meta.earnings', { amount: currency(nodeSummary.earningsUsd) }) }}
          </v-chip>
        </template>
      </AdminPageHeader>
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12">
      <v-tabs v-model="tab" color="primary" grow>
        <v-tab value="overview">{{ t('profile.tabs.overview') }}</v-tab>
        <v-tab value="profile">{{ t('profile.tabs.profile') }}</v-tab>
        <v-tab value="billing">{{ t('profile.tabs.billing') }}</v-tab>
        <v-tab value="apiKeys">{{ t('profile.tabs.apiKeys') }}</v-tab>
        <v-tab value="nodes">{{ t('profile.tabs.nodes') }}</v-tab>
      </v-tabs>
    </v-col>

    <v-col cols="12">
      <v-window v-model="tab">
        <v-window-item value="overview">
          <v-row class="ga-4">
            <v-col v-for="item in overviewCards" :key="item.key" cols="12" md="4">
              <v-card variant="outlined" height="100%">
                <v-card-text>
                  <div class="text-caption text-medium-emphasis">{{ item.label }}</div>
                  <div class="text-h5 font-weight-bold">{{ item.value }}</div>
                  <div class="text-body-2 mt-1">{{ item.caption }}</div>
                </v-card-text>
              </v-card>
            </v-col>
            <v-col cols="12" md="8">
              <v-card id="identity-validation" variant="outlined" height="100%">
                <v-card-title>{{ t('profile.identity.title') }}</v-card-title>
                <v-card-text>
                  <v-stepper alt-labels :model-value="identityStep" flat>
                    <v-stepper-header>
                      <v-stepper-item :title="t('profile.identity.steps.submitted')" :value="1" />
                      <v-divider />
                      <v-stepper-item :title="t('profile.identity.steps.review')" :value="2" />
                      <v-divider />
                      <v-stepper-item :title="t('profile.identity.steps.verified')" :value="3" />
                    </v-stepper-header>
                  </v-stepper>
                  <v-alert class="mt-4" :type="identityStatus.alertType" variant="tonal">{{ t('profile.identity.helper') }}</v-alert>
                </v-card-text>
              </v-card>
            </v-col>
            <v-col cols="12" md="4">
              <v-card variant="outlined" height="100%">
                <v-card-title>{{ t('profile.organization.title') }}</v-card-title>
                <v-card-text class="d-flex flex-column ga-3">
                  <v-alert type="info" variant="tonal">{{ t('profile.organization.link_notice') }}</v-alert>
                  <v-btn color="primary" prepend-icon="mdi-link-variant">{{ t('profile.organization.link_cta') }}</v-btn>
                </v-card-text>
              </v-card>
            </v-col>
          </v-row>
        </v-window-item>

        <v-window-item value="profile">
          <v-card variant="outlined">
            <v-card-title>{{ t('profile.profile_tab.title') }}</v-card-title>
            <v-card-text>
              <v-row>
                <v-col cols="12" md="6"><v-text-field :model-value="mockProfile.fullName" :label="t('profile.fields.fullName')" readonly /></v-col>
                <v-col cols="12" md="6"><v-text-field :model-value="mockProfile.email" :label="t('profile.fields.email')" readonly /></v-col>
                <v-col cols="12" md="6"><v-text-field :model-value="mockProfile.organization" :label="t('profile.fields.organization')" readonly /></v-col>
                <v-col cols="12" md="6"><v-text-field :model-value="mockProfile.country" :label="t('profile.fields.country')" readonly /></v-col>
              </v-row>
            </v-card-text>
          </v-card>
        </v-window-item>

        <v-window-item value="billing">
          <v-card variant="outlined">
            <v-card-title>{{ t('profile.billing_tab.title') }}</v-card-title>
            <v-card-text>
              <v-row>
                <v-col v-for="item in billingCards" :key="item.key" cols="12" md="4">
                  <v-sheet class="pa-4" rounded="lg" color="surface-variant">
                    <div class="text-caption">{{ item.label }}</div>
                    <div class="text-h6 font-weight-bold">{{ item.value }}</div>
                  </v-sheet>
                </v-col>
              </v-row>
            </v-card-text>
          </v-card>
        </v-window-item>

        <v-window-item value="apiKeys">
          <v-card variant="outlined">
            <v-card-title>{{ t('profile.api_tab.title') }}</v-card-title>
            <v-data-table :headers="keyHeaders" :items="mockApiKeys" density="comfortable" />
          </v-card>
        </v-window-item>

        <v-window-item value="nodes">
          <v-card variant="outlined">
            <v-card-title>{{ t('profile.nodes_tab.title') }}</v-card-title>
            <v-data-table :headers="nodeHeaders" :items="mockNodes" density="comfortable" />
          </v-card>
        </v-window-item>
      </v-window>
    </v-col>
  </v-row>
</template>

<script setup lang="ts">
import AdminPageHeader from '~/components/admin/AdminPageHeader.vue'
definePageMeta({ middleware: ['authenticated'], width: 'container' })
const { t, n } = useI18n()
const route = useRoute()
const validTabs = ['overview', 'profile', 'billing', 'apiKeys', 'nodes'] as const
type ProfileTab = typeof validTabs[number]

const initialTab = computed<ProfileTab>(() => {
  const tabQuery = route.query.tab
  if (typeof tabQuery === 'string' && validTabs.includes(tabQuery as ProfileTab)) {
    return tabQuery as ProfileTab
  }

  return 'overview'
})

const tab = ref<ProfileTab>(initialTab.value)
const identityStep = ref(2)
const identityStatus = computed(() => ({ color: 'warning', label: 'profile.identity.status_pending', alertType: 'warning' as const }))
const nodeSummary = { active: 3, earningsUsd: 482.13 }
const mockProfile = { fullName: 'Ava Martin', email: 'ava@acme.ai', organization: 'Acme AI Ops', country: 'France' }
const mockApiKeys = [
  { name: 'prod-router', tier: 'TRUSTED', credit: 420, status: 'active' },
  { name: 'staging', tier: 'PUBLIC', credit: 80, status: 'active' }
]
const mockNodes = [
  { node: 'paris-a100-01', model: 'llama-3.1-70b', tokensIn: 1220000, tokensOut: 844000, earnings: 320.4 },
  { node: 'lyon-l40s-02', model: 'mistral-large', tokensIn: 690000, tokensOut: 510000, earnings: 161.73 }
]
const currency = (value: number) => new Intl.NumberFormat(undefined, { style: 'currency', currency: 'USD' }).format(value)
const overviewCards = computed(() => [
  { key: 'nodes', label: t('profile.overview.nodes'), value: n(mockNodes.length), caption: t('profile.overview.nodes_caption') },
  { key: 'keys', label: t('profile.overview.keys'), value: n(mockApiKeys.length), caption: t('profile.overview.keys_caption') },
  { key: 'credits', label: t('profile.overview.credit'), value: '$500', caption: t('profile.overview.credit_caption') }
])
const billingCards = computed(() => [
  { key: 'balance', label: t('profile.billing.balance'), value: '$500.00' },
  { key: 'month', label: t('profile.billing.monthly_spend'), value: '$128.72' },
  { key: 'next', label: t('profile.billing.next_invoice'), value: 'May 12, 2026' }
])
const keyHeaders = computed(() => [
  { title: t('profile.api_tab.columns.name'), key: 'name' },
  { title: t('profile.api_tab.columns.tier'), key: 'tier' },
  { title: t('profile.api_tab.columns.credit'), key: 'credit' },
  { title: t('profile.api_tab.columns.status'), key: 'status' }
])
const nodeHeaders = computed(() => [
  { title: t('profile.nodes_tab.columns.node'), key: 'node' },
  { title: t('profile.nodes_tab.columns.model'), key: 'model' },
  { title: t('profile.nodes_tab.columns.tokens_in'), key: 'tokensIn' },
  { title: t('profile.nodes_tab.columns.tokens_out'), key: 'tokensOut' },
  { title: t('profile.nodes_tab.columns.earnings'), key: 'earnings' }
])
useSeoMeta({ title: () => t('profile.title') })

watch(initialTab, (value) => {
  tab.value = value
}, { immediate: true })

onMounted(() => {
  if (route.hash !== '#identity-validation') {
    return
  }

  requestAnimationFrame(() => {
    document.getElementById('identity-validation')?.scrollIntoView({
      behavior: 'smooth',
      block: 'start'
    })
  })
})
</script>

```

### File: plugins/design-system.ts
```
import { buildCssVariables, type InferaThemeName } from '~/assets/style/tokens-to-vuetify'

/**
 * Plugin to inject Design System CSS variables into the root element.
 * Handles both SSR (via useHead) and Client-side theme changes.
 */
export default defineNuxtPlugin(() => {
  const { activeTheme } = useThemePreference()

  // 1. SSR Injection: Inject tokens as a style block to avoid FOUC
  const cssVariables = computed(() => {
    const vars = buildCssVariables(activeTheme.value as InferaThemeName)
    const styleString = Object.entries(vars)
      .map(([key, value]) => `${key}: ${value};`)
      .join(' ')
    
    return `:root { ${styleString} color-scheme: ${activeTheme.value}; }`
  })

  useHead({
    style: [
      {
        id: 'infera-design-tokens',
        textContent: cssVariables
      }
    ]
  })

  // 2. Client-side: Sync color-scheme attribute on <html> for some browser UI elements
  if (import.meta.client) {
    watch(activeTheme, (newTheme) => {
      document.documentElement.setAttribute('data-theme', newTheme)
      document.documentElement.style.colorScheme = newTheme
    }, { immediate: true })
  }
})

```

---
### File: plugins/plausible.client.ts
```
export default defineNuxtPlugin(() => {
  const { public: publicConfig } = useRuntimeConfig()

  if (!publicConfig.plausibleEnabled || !publicConfig.plausibleDomain || !publicConfig.plausibleApiHost) {
    return
  }

  useHead({
    script: [
      {
        defer: true,
        'data-domain': publicConfig.plausibleDomain,
        src: `${publicConfig.plausibleApiHost}/js/script.js`,
      },
    ],
  })

  const router = useRouter()

  router.afterEach((to) => {
    if (import.meta.client && typeof window !== 'undefined' && typeof window.plausible === 'function') {
      window.plausible('pageview', { u: to.fullPath })
    }
  })
})

```

---
### File: plugins/vuetify.ts
```
import { createVuetify } from 'vuetify'
import { buildVuetifyThemes } from '~/assets/style/tokens-to-vuetify'

export default defineNuxtPlugin((nuxtApp) => {
  const initialTheme = resolveThemeFromPreference(useCookie<ThemePreference>(THEME_PREFERENCE_STORAGE_KEY).value ?? 'light')

  const vuetify = createVuetify({
    theme: {
      defaultTheme: initialTheme,
      themes: buildVuetifyThemes()
    }
  })

  nuxtApp.vueApp.use(vuetify)

  if (import.meta.client) {
    const mediaQuery = window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)')
    mediaQuery.addEventListener('change', () => {
      const storedPreference = useCookie<ThemePreference>(THEME_PREFERENCE_STORAGE_KEY).value ?? 'light'
      if (storedPreference === 'system') {
        vuetify.theme.global.name.value = getSystemThemePreference()
      }
    })
  }
})

```

### File: scripts/generate-openapi.ts
```
import { mkdir, writeFile } from 'node:fs/promises'
import { resolve } from 'node:path'
import openapiTS, { astToString } from 'openapi-typescript'

type UiField = {
  key: string
  label: string
  component: 'text' | 'number' | 'switch' | 'json'
  required: boolean
}

type UiSchemaEntity = {
  entity: string
  endpoint: string
  method: string
  fields: UiField[]
}

const defaultUrl = 'http://localhost:8082/api-docs'
const source = process.env.BACKEND_OPENAPI_URL || defaultUrl
const typesOutput = resolve(process.cwd(), 'types/backend-openapi.d.ts')
const uiSchemaOutput = resolve(process.cwd(), 'ui-schema/health.gen.ts')
const domainOutput = resolve(process.cwd(), 'domains/health/health.gen.ts')
const zodOutput = resolve(process.cwd(), 'domains/health/health.zod.gen.ts')

const args = new Set(process.argv.slice(2))
const shouldGenerateTypes = !args.size || args.has('--types-only') || (!args.has('--ui-schema-only') && !args.has('--domain-only'))
const shouldGenerateUiSchema = !args.size || args.has('--ui-schema-only') || (!args.has('--types-only') && !args.has('--domain-only'))
const shouldGenerateDomain = !args.size || args.has('--domain-only') || (!args.has('--types-only') && !args.has('--ui-schema-only'))

function createHealthUiSchema(): UiSchemaEntity {
  return {
    entity: 'health',
    endpoint: '/actuator/health',
    method: 'get',
    fields: [
      { key: 'status', label: 'health.status', component: 'text', required: true },
      { key: 'components', label: 'health.components', component: 'json', required: false }
    ]
  }
}

function renderUiSchemaModule(entity: UiSchemaEntity) {
  return `// AUTO-GENERATED FILE - DO NOT EDIT\n\nexport type UiField = {\n  key: string\n  label: string\n  component: 'text' | 'number' | 'switch' | 'json'\n  required: boolean\n}\n\nexport type UiSchemaEntity = {\n  entity: string\n  endpoint: string\n  method: string\n  fields: UiField[]\n}\n\nexport const ${entity.entity}UiSchema: UiSchemaEntity = ${JSON.stringify(entity, null, 2)}\n`
}

function renderDomainModule(entity: UiSchemaEntity) {
  return `// AUTO-GENERATED FILE - DO NOT EDIT\n\nexport type ${capitalize(entity.entity)}Entity = {\n  status: string\n  components?: Record<string, unknown>\n}\n\nexport function map${capitalize(entity.entity)}Response(payload: unknown): ${capitalize(entity.entity)}Entity {\n  const status = typeof (payload as { status?: unknown })?.status === 'string' ? (payload as { status: string }).status : 'UNKNOWN'\n  const components = typeof (payload as { components?: unknown })?.components === 'object' && (payload as { components?: unknown }).components !== null\n    ? (payload as { components: Record<string, unknown> }).components\n    : undefined\n\n  return {\n    status,\n    components\n  }\n}\n`
}

function renderZodModule(entity: UiSchemaEntity) {
  const shape = entity.fields
    .map((field) => {
      const base = field.component === 'json'
        ? 'z.record(z.string(), z.unknown())'
        : field.component === 'switch'
          ? 'z.boolean()'
          : field.component === 'number'
            ? 'z.number()'
            : 'z.string()'
      return `  ${field.key}: ${field.required ? base : `${base}.optional()`}`
    })
    .join(',\n')

  return `// AUTO-GENERATED FILE - DO NOT EDIT\n\nimport { z } from 'zod'\n\nexport const ${entity.entity}Schema = z.object({\n${shape}\n})\n\nexport type ${capitalize(entity.entity)}Input = z.infer<typeof ${entity.entity}Schema>\n`
}

function capitalize(value: string) {
  return value.length ? value.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + value.slice(1) : value
}

async function main() {
  await mkdir(resolve(process.cwd(), 'types'), { recursive: true })
  await mkdir(resolve(process.cwd(), 'ui-schema'), { recursive: true })
  await mkdir(resolve(process.cwd(), 'domains/health'), { recursive: true })

  if (shouldGenerateTypes) {
    const ast = await openapiTS(source)
    await writeFile(typesOutput, astToString(ast))
  }

  const healthUiSchema = createHealthUiSchema()

  if (shouldGenerateUiSchema) {
    await writeFile(uiSchemaOutput, renderUiSchemaModule(healthUiSchema))
  }

  if (shouldGenerateDomain) {
    await writeFile(domainOutput, renderDomainModule(healthUiSchema))
    await writeFile(zodOutput, renderZodModule(healthUiSchema))
  }

  console.log(`Generated OpenAPI artifacts from ${source}`)
  if (shouldGenerateTypes) console.log(`- ${typesOutput}`)
  if (shouldGenerateUiSchema) console.log(`- ${uiSchemaOutput}`)
  if (shouldGenerateDomain) {
    console.log(`- ${domainOutput}`)
    console.log(`- ${zodOutput}`)
  }
}

main().catch((error) => {
  console.error('OpenAPI generation failed:', error)
  process.exitCode = 1
})

```

---
### File: server/api/docs/source.get.ts
```
import { Buffer } from 'node:buffer'

export default defineEventHandler(async (event) => {
  const query = getQuery(event)
  const path = String(query.path || '')
  if (!path.startsWith('apps/frontend/content/') || !path.endsWith('.md')) {
    throw createError({ statusCode: 400, statusMessage: 'Invalid path' })
  }

  const config = useRuntimeConfig(event)
  const token = config.githubToken || process.env.CONTENT_GITHUB_TOKEN || process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN
  if (!token) {
    throw createError({ statusCode: 500, statusMessage: 'Missing CONTENT_GITHUB_TOKEN' })
  }

  const response = await $fetch<{ content: string }>(`https://api.github.com/repos/open4good/infera/contents/${encodeURIComponent(path)}`, {
    headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`, Accept: 'application/vnd.github+json' }
  })

  return { content: Buffer.from(response.content, 'base64').toString('utf8') }
})

```

---
### File: server/api/docs/source.post.ts
```
import { Buffer } from 'node:buffer'

interface SaveBody { path: string, content: string, message?: string }

export default defineEventHandler(async (event) => {
  const body = await readBody<SaveBody>(event)
  if (!body.path.startsWith('apps/frontend/content/') || !body.path.endsWith('.md')) {
    throw createError({ statusCode: 400, statusMessage: 'Invalid path' })
  }

  const config = useRuntimeConfig(event)
  const token = config.githubToken || process.env.CONTENT_GITHUB_TOKEN || process.env.GITHUB_TOKEN
  if (!token) {
    throw createError({ statusCode: 500, statusMessage: 'Missing CONTENT_GITHUB_TOKEN' })
  }

  const branch = config.githubDocsBranch || process.env.GITHUB_DOCS_BRANCH || 'main'
  const current = await $fetch<{ sha: string }>(`https://api.github.com/repos/open4good/infera/contents/${encodeURIComponent(body.path)}?ref=${encodeURIComponent(branch)}`, {
    headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`, Accept: 'application/vnd.github+json' }
  })

  return await $fetch(`https://api.github.com/repos/open4good/infera/contents/${encodeURIComponent(body.path)}`, {
    method: 'PUT',
    headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`, Accept: 'application/vnd.github+json' },
    body: {
      message: body.message || `docs: update ${body.path}`,
      content: Buffer.from(body.content, 'utf8').toString('base64'),
      sha: current.sha,
      branch
    }
  })
})

```

### File: server/api/playground/audio-transcriptions.post.ts
```
import { fetchRouterMultipartWithMappedErrors } from '../../utils/playgroundProxy'

export default defineEventHandler(async (event) => {
  const parts = await readMultipartFormData(event)
  if (!parts) {
    throw createError({ statusCode: 400, statusMessage: 'invalid_audio_transcriptions_payload' })
  }

  let apiKey = ''
  const formData = new FormData()

  for (const part of parts) {
    if (part.name === 'apiKey') {
      apiKey = part.data.toString('utf8')
      continue
    }

    if (!part.name) {
      continue
    }

    if (part.filename) {
      formData.append(part.name, new Blob([new Uint8Array(part.data)], { type: part.type || 'application/octet-stream' }), part.filename)
      continue
    }

    formData.append(part.name, part.data.toString('utf8'))
  }

  if (!apiKey || !formData.get('file') || !formData.get('model')) {
    throw createError({ statusCode: 400, statusMessage: 'invalid_audio_transcriptions_payload' })
  }

  return await fetchRouterMultipartWithMappedErrors(event, '/v1/audio/transcriptions', apiKey, formData)
})

```

### File: server/api/playground/chat.post.ts
```
import { assertPlaygroundPayloadSize, fetchRouterWithMappedErrors } from '../../utils/playgroundProxy'

interface ChatRequestBody {
  apiKey?: string
  model?: string
  messages?: unknown[]
  temperature?: number
  maxTokens?: number
}

/**
 * Proxies playground chat requests to the Router OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
 */
export default defineEventHandler(async (event) => {
  const body = await readBody<ChatRequestBody>(event)
  if (!body.apiKey || !body.model || !Array.isArray(body.messages)) {
    throw createError({ statusCode: 400, statusMessage: 'invalid_chat_payload' })
  }

  const payload = {
    model: body.model,
    messages: body.messages,
    temperature: body.temperature,
    max_tokens: body.maxTokens,
    stream: false
  }
  assertPlaygroundPayloadSize(payload)

  return await fetchRouterWithMappedErrors(event, '/v1/chat/completions', body.apiKey, 'POST', payload)
})

```

import { fetchRouterMultipartWithMappedErrors } from '../../utils/playgroundProxy'

export default defineEventHandler(async (event) => {
  const parts = await readMultipartFormData(event)
  if (!parts) {
    throw createError({ statusCode: 400, statusMessage: 'invalid_files_payload' })
  }

  let apiKey = ''
  const formData = new FormData()

  for (const part of parts) {
    if (part.name === 'apiKey') {
      apiKey = part.data.toString('utf8')
      continue
    }

    if (!part.name) {
      continue
    }

    if (part.filename) {
      formData.append(part.name, new Blob([new Uint8Array(part.data)], { type: part.type || 'application/octet-stream' }), part.filename)
      continue
    }

    formData.append(part.name, part.data.toString('utf8'))
  }

  if (!apiKey || !formData.get('file') || !formData.get('purpose')) {
    throw createError({ statusCode: 400, statusMessage: 'invalid_files_payload' })
  }

  return await fetchRouterMultipartWithMappedErrors(event, '/v1/files', apiKey, formData)
})

### File: server/api/v1/auth/oidc/authorize.get.ts
```
import { createError, getQuery, sendRedirect } from 'h3'
import { resolveOidcProviderConfig } from '~/server/utils/oidcProviders'

export default defineEventHandler(async (event) => {
  const query = getQuery(event)
  const provider = String(query.provider || '').trim().toLowerCase()
  const next = String(query.next || '/')
  const callback = String(query.callback || `/auth/callback/${provider}`)

  const config = useRuntimeConfig(event)
  const providerConfig = resolveOidcProviderConfig(provider, config)
  if (!providerConfig) throw createError({ statusCode: 400, statusMessage: 'unsupported_oidc_provider' })
  if (!providerConfig.clientId || !providerConfig.clientSecret) throw createError({ statusCode: 500, statusMessage: `oidc_${provider}_credentials_missing` })

  const origin = getRequestURL(event).origin
  const callbackPath = callback.startsWith('/') ? callback : `/${callback}`
  const redirectUri = new URL(callbackPath, origin).toString()
  const nonce = crypto.randomUUID()

  setCookie(event, 'INFERA_OIDC_STATE', Buffer.from(JSON.stringify({ next, nonce, provider })).toString('base64url'), {
    httpOnly: true, secure: process.env.NODE_ENV === 'production', sameSite: 'lax', path: '/', maxAge: 600
  })

  const authorizeUrl = new URL(providerConfig.authorizeEndpoint)
  authorizeUrl.searchParams.set('client_id', providerConfig.clientId)
  authorizeUrl.searchParams.set('redirect_uri', redirectUri)
  authorizeUrl.searchParams.set('response_type', 'code')
  authorizeUrl.searchParams.set('scope', providerConfig.scopes)
  authorizeUrl.searchParams.set('state', nonce)
  authorizeUrl.searchParams.set('nonce', nonce)

  return sendRedirect(event, authorizeUrl.toString(), 302)
})

```

### File: server/api/v1/auth/oidc/providers.get.ts
```
import { resolveOidcProviderConfig } from '~/server/utils/oidcProviders'

interface OidcProvidersAvailability {
  google: boolean
  microsoft: boolean
  github: boolean
}

/**
 * Exposes provider availability without leaking provider secrets to the client.
 */
export default defineEventHandler((event): OidcProvidersAvailability => {
  const config = useRuntimeConfig(event)

  const isConfigured = (provider: 'google' | 'microsoft' | 'github') => {
    const providerConfig = resolveOidcProviderConfig(provider, config)
    return Boolean(providerConfig?.clientId && providerConfig.clientSecret)
  }

  return {
    google: isConfigured('google'),
    microsoft: isConfigured('microsoft'),
    github: isConfigured('github')
  }
})

```

---
### File: server/routes/auth/callback/[provider].get.ts
```
import { createError, getCookie, getQuery, sendRedirect, deleteCookie, appendResponseHeader } from 'h3'
import { resolveOidcProviderConfig } from '~/server/utils/oidcProviders'

interface OidcState { next: string, nonce: string, provider: string }

export default defineEventHandler(async (event) => {
  const provider = event.context.params?.provider?.toLowerCase() || ''
  const query = getQuery(event)
  if (query.error) return sendRedirect(event, '/auth/login?error=oidc_provider_error', 302)

  const code = String(query.code || '')
  const state = String(query.state || '')
  const stateCookie = getCookie(event, 'INFERA_OIDC_STATE')
  if (!code || !state || !stateCookie) throw createError({ statusCode: 400, statusMessage: 'oidc_callback_invalid_request' })

  const parsed = JSON.parse(Buffer.from(stateCookie, 'base64url').toString('utf8')) as OidcState
  deleteCookie(event, 'INFERA_OIDC_STATE', { path: '/' })
  if (parsed.provider !== provider || parsed.nonce !== state) throw createError({ statusCode: 400, statusMessage: 'oidc_state_mismatch' })

  const config = useRuntimeConfig(event)
  const providerConfig = resolveOidcProviderConfig(provider, config)
  if (!providerConfig) throw createError({ statusCode: 400, statusMessage: 'unsupported_oidc_provider' })

  const redirectUri = new URL(`/auth/callback/${provider}`, getRequestURL(event).origin).toString()
  const tokenResponse = await $fetch<{ id_token?: string, access_token?: string }>(providerConfig.tokenEndpoint, {
    method: 'POST',
    body: new URLSearchParams({
      grant_type: 'authorization_code', code, client_id: providerConfig.clientId, client_secret: providerConfig.clientSecret, redirect_uri: redirectUri
    }).toString(),
    headers: { 'content-type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded', accept: 'application/json' }
  })

  const token = tokenResponse.id_token || (provider === 'github' ? tokenResponse.access_token : null)
  if (!token) throw createError({ statusCode: 401, statusMessage: 'oidc_token_missing' })

  const backendResponse = await $fetch.raw('/api/v1/auth/oidc', {
    baseURL: config.public.backendBaseUrl,
    method: 'POST',
    body: { provider, idToken: token }
  })
  for (const cookie of backendResponse.headers.getSetCookie()) appendResponseHeader(event, 'set-cookie', cookie)

  return sendRedirect(event, parsed.next?.startsWith('/') ? parsed.next : '/', 302)
})

```

---
### File: server/utils/oidcProviders.ts
```
export interface OidcProviderConfig {
  key: string
  authorizeEndpoint: string
  tokenEndpoint: string
  clientId: string
  clientSecret: string
  scopes: string
}

function runtimeValue(configValue: unknown, ...legacyEnvNames: string[]) {
  for (const name of legacyEnvNames) {
    const value = process.env[name]
    if (value?.trim()) {
      return value
    }
  }

  if (typeof configValue === 'string' && configValue.trim()) {
    return configValue
  }

  return ''
}

function googleAuthorizeIssuer(value: string) {
  return value.includes('oauth2.googleapis.com') ? 'https://accounts.google.com' : value
}

function githubScopes(value: string) {
  return !value || value.includes('openid') ? 'read:user user:email' : value
}

function githubAuthorizeIssuer(value: string) {
  const issuer = value.trim()
  if (issuer.startsWith('https://github.com') && !issuer.includes('/login/oauth')) {
    return 'https://github.com/login/oauth'
  }
  return issuer
}

export function resolveOidcProviderConfig(key: string, config: ReturnType<typeof useRuntimeConfig>): OidcProviderConfig | null {
  switch (key) {
    case 'google':
      return {
        key,
        authorizeEndpoint: `${googleAuthorizeIssuer(runtimeValue(config.oidcGoogleIssuer, 'OIDC_GOOGLE_ISSUER') || 'https://accounts.google.com')}/o/oauth2/v2/auth`,
        tokenEndpoint: `${runtimeValue(config.oidcGoogleTokenEndpoint, 'OIDC_GOOGLE_TOKEN_ENDPOINT') || 'https://oauth2.googleapis.com/token'}`,
        clientId: runtimeValue(config.oidcGoogleClientId, 'OIDC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID', 'NUXT_PUBLIC_GOOGLE_OIDC_CLIENT_ID'),
        clientSecret: runtimeValue(config.oidcGoogleClientSecret, 'OIDC_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET'),
        scopes: runtimeValue(config.oidcGoogleScopes, 'OIDC_GOOGLE_SCOPES') || 'openid profile email'
      }
    case 'microsoft':
      return {
        key,
        authorizeEndpoint: `${runtimeValue(config.oidcMicrosoftIssuer, 'OIDC_MICROSOFT_ISSUER') || 'https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/oauth2/v2.0'}/authorize`,
        tokenEndpoint: `${runtimeValue(config.oidcMicrosoftTokenEndpoint, 'OIDC_MICROSOFT_TOKEN_ENDPOINT') || 'https://login.microsoftonline.com/common/oauth2/v2.0/token'}`,
        clientId: runtimeValue(config.oidcMicrosoftClientId, 'OIDC_MICROSOFT_CLIENT_ID'),
        clientSecret: runtimeValue(config.oidcMicrosoftClientSecret, 'OIDC_MICROSOFT_CLIENT_SECRET'),
        scopes: runtimeValue(config.oidcMicrosoftScopes, 'OIDC_MICROSOFT_SCOPES') || 'openid profile email'
      }
    case 'github':
      return {
        key,
        authorizeEndpoint: `${githubAuthorizeIssuer(runtimeValue(config.oidcGithubIssuer, 'OIDC_GITHUB_ISSUER') || 'https://github.com/login/oauth')}/authorize`,
        tokenEndpoint: `${runtimeValue(config.oidcGithubTokenEndpoint, 'OIDC_GITHUB_TOKEN_ENDPOINT') || 'https://github.com/login/oauth/access_token'}`,
        clientId: runtimeValue(config.oidcGithubClientId, 'OIDC_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID'),
        clientSecret: runtimeValue(config.oidcGithubClientSecret, 'OIDC_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET'),
        scopes: githubScopes(runtimeValue(config.oidcGithubScopes, 'OIDC_GITHUB_SCOPES'))
      }

    default:
      return null
  }
}

```

### File: server/utils/playgroundProxy.ts
```
const MAX_PROXY_PAYLOAD_BYTES = 3 * 1024 * 1024
const ROUTER_TIMEOUT_MS = 15000

/**
 * Validates serialized payload size to keep relay requests compatible with serverless limits.
 */
export function assertPlaygroundPayloadSize(payload: unknown) {
  const serialized = JSON.stringify(payload)
  const bytes = new TextEncoder().encode(serialized).byteLength
  if (bytes > MAX_PROXY_PAYLOAD_BYTES) {
    throw createError({ statusCode: 413, statusMessage: 'playground_payload_too_large' })
  }
}

/**
 * Relays requests to the Router and normalizes status messages for UI-level classification.
 */
export async function fetchRouterWithMappedErrors(
  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
  event: any,
  path: string,
  apiKey: string,
  method: 'GET' | 'POST',
  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
  body?: Record<string, any>,
  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
  query?: Record<string, any>
) {
  const config = useRuntimeConfig(event)

  try {
    return await $fetch(path, {
      method,
      baseURL: config.public.routerBaseUrl,
      timeout: ROUTER_TIMEOUT_MS,
      headers: {
        Authorization: `Bearer ${apiKey.trim()}`
      },
      query,
      body
    })
  } catch (error: unknown) {
    // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
    const err = error as any
    const statusCode = Number(err?.response?.status || err?.statusCode || 502)
    const mappedStatusMessage = mapPlaygroundProxyError(statusCode)
    throw createError({ statusCode, statusMessage: mappedStatusMessage })
  }
}

/**
 * Relays multipart form-data requests to the Router while keeping API keys server-side.
 */
export async function fetchRouterMultipartWithMappedErrors(
  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
  event: any,
  path: string,
  apiKey: string,
  formData: FormData
) {
  const config = useRuntimeConfig(event)
  const controller = new AbortController()
  const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), ROUTER_TIMEOUT_MS)

  try {
    const response = await fetch(new URL(path, config.public.routerBaseUrl).toString(), {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        Authorization: `Bearer ${apiKey.trim()}`
      },
      body: formData,
      signal: controller.signal
    })

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw createError({
        statusCode: response.status,
        statusMessage: mapPlaygroundProxyError(response.status)
      })
    }

    const contentType = response.headers.get('content-type') || ''
    if (contentType.includes('application/json')) {
      return await response.json()
    }

    return await response.text()
  } catch (error: unknown) {
    if ((error as { statusCode?: number })?.statusCode) {
      throw error
    }

    const statusCode = error instanceof Error && error.name === 'AbortError' ? 408 : 502
    throw createError({ statusCode, statusMessage: mapPlaygroundProxyError(statusCode) })
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timeout)
  }
}

/**
 * Relays binary responses to the client as a data URL so the UI can preview them inline.
 */
export async function fetchRouterBinaryAsDataUrl(
  // eslint-disable-next-line @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any
  event: any,
  path: string,
  apiKey: string,
  body: Record<string, unknown>
) {
  const config = useRuntimeConfig(event)
  const controller = new AbortController()
  const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort(), ROUTER_TIMEOUT_MS)

  try {
    const response = await fetch(new URL(path, config.public.routerBaseUrl).toString(), {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        Authorization: `Bearer ${apiKey.trim()}`,
        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
      },
      body: JSON.stringify(body),
      signal: controller.signal
    })

    if (!response.ok) {
      throw createError({
        statusCode: response.status,
        statusMessage: mapPlaygroundProxyError(response.status)
      })
    }

    const contentType = response.headers.get('content-type') || 'application/octet-stream'
    const buffer = Buffer.from(await response.arrayBuffer())
    return {
      contentType,
      dataUrl: `data:${contentType};base64,${buffer.toString('base64')}`
    }
  } catch (error: unknown) {
    if ((error as { statusCode?: number })?.statusCode) {
      throw error
    }

    const statusCode = error instanceof Error && error.name === 'AbortError' ? 408 : 502
    throw createError({ statusCode, statusMessage: mapPlaygroundProxyError(statusCode) })
  } finally {
    clearTimeout(timeout)
  }
}

function mapPlaygroundProxyError(statusCode: number): string {
  if (statusCode === 401) return 'playground_unauthorized'
  if (statusCode === 403) return 'playground_forbidden'
  if (statusCode === 404) return 'playground_not_found'
  if (statusCode === 408) return 'playground_timeout'
  if (statusCode === 413) return 'playground_payload_too_large'
  if (statusCode === 429) return 'playground_rate_limited'
  if (statusCode >= 500) return 'playground_upstream_unavailable'
  return 'playground_proxy_error'
}

```

### File: types/backend-openapi.d.ts
```
export interface paths {
    "/api/v1/organizations": {
        parameters: {
            query?: never;
            header?: never;
            path?: never;
            cookie?: never;
        };
        get?: never;
        put?: never;
        /**
         * Create organization
         * @description Create organization
         */
        post: operations["create"];
        delete?: never;
        options?: never;
        head?: never;
        patch?: never;
        trace?: never;
    };
    "/api/v1/nodes/enroll": {
