export type webhooks = Record<string, never>;
export interface components {
    schemas: {
        CreateOrganizationRequest: {
            name: string;
        };
        OrganizationResponse: {
            organizationId?: string;
            name?: string;
            createdAt?: string;
        };
        NodeEnrollmentResponse: {
            nodeId?: string;
            certificatePem?: string;
            caChainPem?: string;
            serialNumber?: string;
            expiresAt?: string;
        };
        CapabilityDto: {
            modelId: string;
            /** Format: double */
            predictedTps?: number;
        };
        FingerprintDto: {
            hostHash: string;
            gpuHash: string;
            osHash: string;
        };
        NodeEnrollmentRequest: {
            agentId: string;
            challengeId: string;
            csrPem: string;
            nodeName?: string;
            fingerprint: components["schemas"]["FingerprintDto"];
            capabilities: components["schemas"]["CapabilityDto"][];
            profileSummary?: {
                [key: string]: unknown;
            };
            systemFingerprint?: {
                [key: string]: unknown;
            };
        };
        EnrollmentChallengeResponse: {
            challengeId?: string;
            shortUrl?: string;
            status?: string;
            expiresAt?: string;
            agentId?: string;
            nodeName?: string;
            tierParticipating?: string;
            profileSummary?: {
                [key: string]: unknown;
            };
            systemFingerprint?: {
                [key: string]: unknown;
            };
        };
        EnrollmentChallengeCreateRequest: {
            agentId: string;
            nodeName?: string;
            tierParticipating?: string;
            profileSummary?: {
                [key: string]: unknown;
            };
            systemFingerprint?: {
                [key: string]: unknown;
            };
            grid?: string;
            shortConfirmBaseUrl?: string;
        };
        EnrollmentChallengeConfirmRequest: {
            action: string;
            operatorId?: string;
            nodeName?: string;
        };
        WebhookRequest: {
            url: string;
            eventTypes?: string[];
        };
        WebhookResponse: {
            webhookId?: string;
            url?: string;
            eventTypes?: string[];
            createdAt?: string;
        };
        MemberInviteRequest: {
            /** Format: email */
            email: string;
            role: string;
        };
        MemberResponse: {
            memberId?: string;
            email?: string;
            role?: string;
            status?: string;
            createdAt?: string;
        };
        PaymentMethodRequest: {
            brand: string;
            last4: string;
            /** Format: int32 */
            expMonth?: number;
            /** Format: int32 */
            expYear?: number;
        };
        PaymentMethodResponse: {
            paymentMethodId?: string;
            brand?: string;
            last4?: string;
            /** Format: int32 */
            expMonth?: number;
            /** Format: int32 */
            expYear?: number;
            createdAt?: string;
        };
        /** @description Payload used to provision an API key with tier, billing and model policy. */
        ApiKeyCreateRequest: {
            /**
             * @description Tier policy to attach to the key.
             * @example TRUSTED
             * @enum {string}
             */
            tier?: "PUBLIC" | "TRUSTED" | "HDS";
            /**
             * @description Whether billing enforcement is enabled for this key.
             * @example true
             */
            billingEnabled?: boolean;
            /**
             * @description Whether safe fallback routing is enabled when no eligible grid node is available.
             * @example true
             */
            fallbackEnabled?: boolean;
            /**
             * @description Fallback billing mode projected to the router.
             * @example SURCHARGED
             * @enum {string}
             */
            fallbackBillingMode?: "INCLUDED" | "SURCHARGED" | "DISABLED";
            /**
             * @description Whether the paid audit trail option is enabled for this key.
             * @example true
             */
            auditTrailEnabled?: boolean;
            /**
             * @description Audit trail verbosity level retained for this key when audit trail is enabled.
             * @example INFO
             * @enum {string}
             */
            operationLogLevel?: "INFO" | "DEBUG";
            /**
             * Format: int32
             * @description Per-key recent audit trail tail size exposed by live/read APIs.
             * @example 50
             */
            operationLogRecentLimit?: number;
            /**
             * @description Whether performance-based routing is enabled for this key.
             * @example true
             */
            performanceRoutingEnabled?: boolean;
            /**
             * @description Requested top percentile cohort for performance routing.
             * @example TOP_25
             * @enum {string}
             */
            performanceMode?: "TOP_10" | "TOP_25" | "TOP_50" | "DISABLED";
            /**
             * @description Whether soft spend-limit alerts are enabled for this key.
             * @example true
             */
            spendLimitEnabled?: boolean;
            /**
             * @description Currency for spend limits. Defaults to the organization currency.
             * @example EUR
             * @enum {string}
             */
            spendLimitCurrency?: "EUR" | "USD";
            /**
             * Format: int64
             * @description Monthly soft spend limit in minor currency units (cents).
             * @example 50000
             */
            monthlySpendLimitMinor?: number;
            /**
             * Format: int64
             * @description Lifetime soft spend limit in minor currency units (cents).
             * @example 250000
             */
            lifetimeSpendLimitMinor?: number;
            /** @description Per-key allowed model allowlist, normalized by backend. */
            allowedModels?: string[];
        };
        /** @description API key identity, routing policy and one-time clear key value when applicable. */
        ApiKeyResponse: {
            /**
             * @description API key identifier.
             * @example ak_123
             */
            apiKeyId?: string;
            /**
             * @description Client identifier owning the key.
             * @example cli_42
             */
            clientId?: string;
            /** @description Friendly generated key name. */
            name?: string;
            /** @description Public key prefix shown in UI. */
            keyPrefix?: string;
            /** @description Clear API key value, returned only when newly created or rotated. */
            keyValue?: string;
            /**
             * @description Tier policy associated with the key.
             * @example TRUSTED
             */
            tier?: string;
            /**
             * @description Whether the key can authenticate requests.
             * @example true
             */
            enabled?: boolean;
            /**
             * @description Whether billing enforcement is enabled for this key.
             * @example true
             */
            billingEnabled?: boolean;
            /**
             * @description Whether safe fallback routing is enabled.
             * @example true
             */
            fallbackEnabled?: boolean;
            /**
             * @description Fallback billing mode projected to the router.
             * @example SURCHARGED
             */
            fallbackBillingMode?: string;
            /**
             * @description Whether the paid audit trail option is enabled for this key.
             * @example true
             */
            auditTrailEnabled?: boolean;
            /**
             * @description Audit trail verbosity level retained for this key.
             * @example INFO
             * @enum {string}
             */
            operationLogLevel?: "INFO" | "DEBUG";
            /**
             * Format: int32
             * @description Per-key recent audit trail tail size exposed by live/read APIs.
             * @example 50
             */
            operationLogRecentLimit?: number;
            /**
             * @description Whether performance-based routing is enabled for this key.
             * @example true
             */
            performanceRoutingEnabled?: boolean;
            /**
             * @description Requested top percentile cohort for performance routing.
             * @example TOP_25
             */
            performanceMode?: string;
            /**
             * @description Whether soft spend-limit alerts are enabled for this key.
             * @example true
             */
            spendLimitEnabled?: boolean;
            /**
             * @description Currency for spend limits.
             * @example EUR
             */
            spendLimitCurrency?: string;
            /**
             * Format: int64
             * @description Monthly soft spend limit in minor currency units (cents).
             * @example 50000
             */
            monthlySpendLimitMinor?: number;
            /**
             * Format: int64
             * @description Lifetime soft spend limit in minor currency units (cents).
             * @example 250000
             */
            lifetimeSpendLimitMinor?: number;
            /** @description Allowed model identifiers for this key policy. */
            allowedModels?: string[];
            /**
             * @description Policy version projected to the router.
             * @example v1
             */
            policyVersion?: string;
            /** @description Most recent update timestamp. */
            updatedAt?: string;
            /** @description Creation timestamp. */
            createdAt?: string;
            /** @description Revocation timestamp, empty when active. */
            revokedAt?: string;
        };
        ProblemDetail: {
            /** Format: uri */
            type?: string;
            title?: string;
            /** Format: int32 */
            status?: number;
            detail?: string;
            /** Format: uri */
            instance?: string;
            properties?: {
                [key: string]: unknown;
            };
        };
        /** @description Canonical benchmark run record. */
        BenchmarkRunRecord: {
            /**
             * @description Schema version.
             * @example benchmark-run.v1
             */
            schemaVersion: string;
            /** @description Stable benchmark run identifier. */
            runId: string;
            /** @description Benchmark campaign identifier. */
            campaignId: string;
            /** @description Executing node identifier. */
            nodeId: string;
            /** @description Benchmarked model identifier. */
            modelId: string;
            /**
             * @description Workload type.
             * @example chat_completions_smoke
             */
            workloadType: string;
            /**
             * @description Benchmark methodology version.
             * @example energy-methodology.v1
             */
            methodVersion: string;
            /**
             * @description Derived KPI calculation version.
             * @example benchmark-kpi.v1
             */
            calculationVersion: string;
            /**
             * Format: date-time
             * @description Capture timestamp.
             */
            capturedAt: string;
            /** @description Hardware fingerprint key used for grouping and comparisons. */
            hardwareKey: string;
            /**
             * @description Power measurement scope.
             * @example none
             */
            powerScope: string;
            /**
             * @description Carbon factor source.
             * @example none
             */
            carbonSource: string;
            /**
             * @description Carbon factor region.
             * @example unknown
             */
            carbonRegion: string;
            /**
             * @description Measurement quality label.
             * @example LOW
             */
            measurementQuality: string;
            /**
             * Format: int64
             * @description Number of requests in the benchmark sample.
             */
            requestCount: number;
            /**
             * Format: int64
             * @description Generated token count in the benchmark sample.
             */
            generatedTokens: number;
            /**
             * Format: int32
             * @description Number of samples represented by this record.
             */
            sampleCount: number;
            /** @description Marginal Wh for the benchmark sample. */
            marginalWh: number;
            /** @description Wh per request. */
            whPerRequest: number;
            /** @description Wh per token. */
            whPerToken: number;
            /** @description Total gCO2 for the benchmark sample. */
            gco2Total: number;
            /** @description gCO2 per request. */
            gco2PerRequest: number;
            /** @description gCO2 per token. */
            gco2PerToken: number;
            /** @description Median latency in milliseconds. */
            latencyP50Ms: number;
            /** @description 95th percentile latency in milliseconds. */
            latencyP95Ms: number;
            /** @description Tokens per second. */
            tokensPerSecond: number;
            /** @description Aggregated benchmark score. */
            score: number;
            /** @description Grade computed from the benchmark score. */
            grade: string;
            /** @description Client identifier for scoped backfills or future customer reports. */
            clientId?: string;
            /** @description Team identifier for scoped backfills or future customer reports. */
            teamId?: string;
            /** @description Application identifier for scoped backfills or future customer reports. */
            applicationId?: string;
            /**
             * @description Benchmark endpoint used by the probe.
             * @example /v1/chat/completions
             */
            benchmarkEndpoint?: string;
            /**
             * Format: int32
             * @description HTTP status code returned by the local benchmark probe.
             */
            benchmarkStatusCode?: number;
            /**
             * Format: int32
             * @description End-to-end benchmark duration in milliseconds.
             */
            benchmarkDurationMs?: number;
            /**
             * Format: int32
             * @description Estimated model load time in milliseconds.
             */
            benchmarkLoadTimeMs?: number;
            /**
             * Format: int32
             * @description Prompt processing time in milliseconds.
             */
            benchmarkPromptTimeMs?: number;
            /**
             * Format: int32
             * @description Generation time in milliseconds.
             */
            benchmarkGenerationTimeMs?: number;
            /**
             * Format: int32
             * @description Prompt token count for the probe.
             */
            benchmarkPromptTokens?: number;
            /**
             * Format: int32
             * @description Generated token count for the probe.
             */
            benchmarkGeneratedTokens?: number;
            /** @description End-to-end tokens per second. */
            benchmarkTokensPerSecond?: number;
            /** @description Generation-only completion tokens per second. */
            benchmarkCompletionTokensPerSecond?: number;
            /** @description Prompt-processing tokens per second. */
            benchmarkPromptTokensPerSecond?: number;
            /** @description Total prompt+completion tokens per second. */
            benchmarkTotalTokensPerSecond?: number;
            /** @description Preview of the benchmark response payload. */
            responsePreview?: string;
        };
        /** @description Benchmark ingestion result. */
        BenchmarkRunIngestResponse: {
            /** @description Stable run identifier. */
            runId?: string;
            /** @description True when the run already existed and was replayed idempotently. */
            replayed?: boolean;
        };
        AuthTokenResponse: {
            accessToken?: string;
            refreshToken?: string;
            tokenType?: string;
            /** Format: int64 */
            expiresIn?: number;
            level?: string;
        };
        OidcAuthRequest: {
            /**
             * @description OIDC provider key (google today, extendable to future providers).
             * @example google
             */
            provider: string;
            /** @description Provider ID token issued by OIDC authorization flow. */
            idToken: string;
        };
        GoogleAuthRequest: {
            /** @description Google ID token issued by browser OIDC flow. */
            idToken: string;
        };
        /** @description Canonical request-level energy attribution event. */
        InferenceEnergyEvent: {
            /**
             * @description Schema version.
             * @example inference-energy-event.v1
             */
            schemaVersion: string;
            /** @description Stable request identifier. */
            requestId: string;
            /**
             * Format: date-time
             * @description UTC request start timestamp.
             */
            timestampStart: string;
            /**
             * Format: date-time
             * @description UTC request end timestamp.
             */
            timestampEnd: string;
            /** @description Organization identifier when resolved from account data. */
            orgId?: string;
            /** @description User identifier when resolved from account data. */
            userId?: string;
            /** @description API key identifier. */
            apiKeyId: string;
            /** @description Routed model identifier. */
            modelId: string;
            /** @description Executing node identifier. */
            nodeId: string;
            /**
             * Format: int64
             * @description Input token count.
             */
            tokensIn?: number;
            /**
             * Format: int64
             * @description Output token count.
             */
            tokensOut?: number;
            /**
             * Format: int64
             * @description Total token count.
             */
            tokensTotal?: number;
            /**
             * Format: int32
             * @description Effective context length in tokens.
             */
            contextLen?: number;
            /** @description Runtime quantization label. */
            quantization?: string;
            /**
             * Format: int32
             * @description Batch size.
             */
            batchSize?: number;
            /**
             * Format: int32
             * @description Observed concurrency level during attribution.
             */
            concurrencyLevel: number;
            /** @description Gross integrated Joules over the request window. */
            joulesGross: number;
            /** @description Baseline Joules allocated over the request window. */
            joulesBaseline: number;
            /** @description Net Joules after baseline subtraction. */
            joulesNet: number;
            /** @description Average power during the request window. */
            avgWatts: number;
            /**
             * @description Specific provider or measurement method.
             * @example nvidia-smi
             */
            measurementMethod: string;
            /**
             * @description Measurement hierarchy tier.
             * @example device_direct
             */
            methodTier: string;
            /** @description Estimated uncertainty percentage. */
            uncertaintyPercent: number;
            /** @description Normalized confidence score. */
            confidenceScore: number;
            /** @description Tokenizer identifier used for token accounting. */
            tokenizerId?: string;
            /** @description Tokenizer version used for token accounting. */
            tokenizerVersion?: string;
            /** @description Agent software version. */
            agentVersion: string;
            /** @description Whether the request completed with a partial failure. */
            partialFailure: boolean;
            /**
             * @description Optional KPI exclusion reason.
             * @example missing_tokens
             */
            exclusionReason?: string;
            /**
             * @description Attribution strategy used for concurrency handling.
             * @example exclusive_window
             */
            attributionStrategy: string;
        };
        /** @description Result of an energy event ingestion attempt. */
        EnergyEventIngestResponse: {
            /** @description Stable request identifier. */
            requestId?: string;
            /** @description True when the event was persisted into the fact table. */
            accepted?: boolean;
            /** @description True when the event was already known and treated idempotently. */
            duplicate?: boolean;
            /** @description True when the event was quarantined instead of persisted. */
            quarantined?: boolean;
            /** @description Reason code when the event is quarantined. */
            reasonCode?: string;
        };
        AdminUserBulkUpdateRequest: {
            /** @description User identifiers to mutate. */
            userIds: string[];
            /**
             * @description Optional access level applied to every selected user.
             * @enum {string}
             */
            level?: "user" | "client" | "admin";
            /**
             * @description Optional account status applied to every selected user.
             * @enum {string}
             */
            status?: "active" | "disabled";
            /**
             * @description Optional organization id applied to every selected user.
             * @example org_123
             */
            organizationId?: string;
        };
        AdminBulkResultResponse: {
            /**
             * Format: int32
             * @description Number of ids requested by the caller.
             * @example 24
             */
            requested?: number;
            /**
             * Format: int32
             * @description Number of entities successfully mutated.
             * @example 22
             */
            updated?: number;
            /**
             * Format: int32
             * @description Number of ids skipped because they did not exist.
             * @example 2
             */
            skipped?: number;
        };
        AdminOrganizationUpsertRequest: {
            /**
             * @description Organization display name.
             * @example Acme AI
             */
            name: string;
            /**
             * @description Owning client identifier.
             * @example cli_789
             */
            clientId: string;
            /**
             * @description Organization status.
             * @example active
             * @enum {string}
             */
            status?: "active" | "disabled";
            /**
             * @description Billing currency for organization ceilings.
             * @example EUR
             * @enum {string}
             */
            spendCeilingCurrency?: "EUR" | "USD";
            /**
             * Format: int64
             * @description Organization monthly spend ceiling in minor currency units.
             * @example 1000000
             */
            monthlySpendCeilingMinor?: number;
            /**
             * Format: int64
             * @description Organization lifetime spend ceiling in minor currency units.
             * @example 5000000
             */
            lifetimeSpendCeilingMinor?: number;
        };
        AdminOrganizationListItemResponse: {
            /**
             * @description Organization identifier.
             * @example org_123
             */
            organizationId?: string;
            /**
             * @description Organization display name.
             * @example Acme AI
             */
            name?: string;
            /**
             * @description Owning client identifier.
             * @example cli_789
             */
            clientId?: string;
            /**
             * @description Organization status (`active` or `disabled`).
             * @example active
             */
            status?: string;
            /**
             * @description Billing currency used for spend ceilings.
             * @example EUR
             */
            spendCeilingCurrency?: string;
            /**
             * Format: int64
             * @description Organization monthly spend ceiling in minor currency units.
             * @example 1000000
             */
            monthlySpendCeilingMinor?: number;
            /**
             * Format: int64
             * @description Organization lifetime spend ceiling in minor currency units.
             * @example 5000000
             */
            lifetimeSpendCeilingMinor?: number;
            /**
             * Format: int64
             * @description Captured organization spend for the current UTC calendar month in minor currency units.
             * @example 123456
             */
            monthlySpendMinor?: number;
            /**
             * Format: int64
             * @description Captured organization spend since organization creation in minor currency units.
             * @example 654321
             */
            lifetimeSpendMinor?: number;

             * Format: int32
             * @description Highest soft spend alert threshold reached for this organization.
             * @example 100
             */

            createdAt?: string;

            updatedAt?: string;
            /**
             * Format: int32
             * @description Approximate linked user count.
             * @example 12
             */
            usersCount?: number;
        };

        /** @description Admin payload used to provision an API key for any client. */

    requestBodies: never;

export type $defs = Record<string, never>;
export interface operations {
    create: {
